Want me to flesh out any of the other product pages?

I see your current dashboard. Let me add the Products button and pages to it without breaking what you have:

bash
# Create Products page
mkdir -p ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/products

cat > ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/products/page.tsx << 'EOF'
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import Link from "next/link";

const products = [
  { id: "workroom_forge", name: "Workroom Forge", description: "Production & Order Management", icon: "🏭", status: "active", color: "from-purple-600 to-purple-800", features: ["Order tracking", "Client management", "Invoicing", "Task boards"], route: "/products/workroom-forge" },
  { id: "luxe_forge", name: "Luxe Forge", description: "Designer Marketplace & Storefront", icon: "💎", status: "active", color: "from-pink-600 to-rose-800", features: ["Product listings", "Shopping cart", "Payment processing", "Inventory"], route: "/products/luxe-forge" },
  { id: "market_forge", name: "Market Forge", description: "Multi-Platform Marketplace Integration", icon: "🛒", status: "coming_soon", color: "from-orange-500 to-amber-700", features: ["eBay sync", "Amazon integration", "Etsy listings", "Poshmark"], route: "/products/market-forge" },
  { id: "support_forge", name: "Support Forge", description: "Customer Support & Helpdesk", icon: "🎧", status: "active", color: "from-blue-600 to-cyan-800", features: ["Ticket system", "Live chat", "AI responses", "Knowledge base"], route: "/products/support-forge" },
  { id: "lead_forge", name: "Lead Forge", description: "CRM & Lead Management", icon: "🎯", status: "coming_soon", color: "from-green-600 to-emerald-800", features: ["Contact management", "Sales pipeline", "Email campaigns", "Analytics"], route: "/products/lead-forge" },
  { id: "empire_wallet", name: "Empire Wallet", description: "Crypto & Payment Processing", icon: "💰", status: "coming_soon", color: "from-yellow-500 to-orange-700", features: ["Crypto payments", "Multi-currency", "Invoicing", "Reports"], route: "/products/empire-wallet" },
  { id: "content_forge", name: "Content Forge", description: "AI Content Generation", icon: "✨", status: "active", color: "from-indigo-600 to-violet-800", features: ["Product descriptions", "Social posts", "Email templates", "Blog posts"], route: "/products/content-forge" },
  { id: "open_claw", name: "Open Claw", description: "Legal Document Generator", icon: "⚖️", status: "coming_soon", color: "from-slate-600 to-gray-800", features: ["Contracts", "Terms of service", "Privacy policies", "NDAs"], route: "/products/open-claw" }
];

export default function ProductsPage() {
  const [filter, setFilter] = useState<"all" | "active" | "coming_soon">("all");
  const filteredProducts = products.filter(p => filter === "all" ? true : p.status === filter);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 via-purple-900 to-gray-900 p-6">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
          <div>
            <Link href="/" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm mb-2 inline-block">← Back to Dashboard</Link>
            <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-3">
              <span className="text-5xl">📦</span>
              Empire Box® Products
            </h1>
            <p className="text-gray-400 mt-2">Access your complete business suite</p>
          </div>
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            <button onClick={() => setFilter("all")} className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition ${filter === "all" ? "bg-purple-600 text-white" : "bg-gray-800 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700"}`}>
              All ({products.length})
            </button>
            <button onClick={() => setFilter("active")} className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition ${filter === "active" ? "bg-green-600 text-white" : "bg-gray-800 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700"}`}>
              Active ({products.filter(p => p.status === "active").length})
            </button>
            <button onClick={() => setFilter("coming_soon")} className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition ${filter === "coming_soon" ? "bg-yellow-600 text-white" : "bg-gray-800 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700"}`}>
              Coming Soon ({products.filter(p => p.status === "coming_soon").length})
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Product Grid */}
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
          {filteredProducts.map((product) => (
            <div key={product.id} className={`relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden ${product.status === "active" ? "cursor-pointer hover:scale-105 transition-transform" : "opacity-75"}`}>
              <div className={`absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br ${product.color} opacity-20`} />
              <div className="relative p-6 bg-gray-800/80 backdrop-blur border border-gray-700 rounded-xl h-full">
                <div className="absolute top-4 right-4">
                  {product.status === "active" ? (
                    <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 text-xs rounded-full border border-green-500/30">Active</span>
                  ) : (
                    <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400 text-xs rounded-full border border-yellow-500/30">Coming Soon</span>
                  )}
                </div>
                <div className="text-5xl mb-4">{product.icon}</div>
                <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-2">{product.name}</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-4">{product.description}</p>
                <ul className="space-y-1 mb-6">
                  {product.features.map((feature, i) => (
                    <li key={i} className="text-gray-500 text-sm flex items-center gap-2">
                      <span className="text-purple-400">•</span>{feature}
                    </li>
                  ))}
                </ul>
                {product.status === "active" ? (
                  <Link href={product.route} className={`block w-full py-3 px-4 rounded-lg text-center font-medium bg-gradient-to-r ${product.color} text-white hover:opacity-90 transition`}>
                    Open {product.name} →
                  </Link>
                ) : (
                  <button disabled className="w-full py-3 px-4 rounded-lg text-center font-medium bg-gray-700 text-gray-500 cursor-not-allowed">
                    Coming Soon
                  </button>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* License Info */}
        <div className="mt-12 p-6 bg-gray-800/50 rounded-xl border border-purple-500/30">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <div>
              <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">👑 Master License</h3>
              <p className="text-gray-400">All products unlocked • Unlimited usage</p>
            </div>
            <div className="text-right">
              <p className="text-green-400 font-bold">EM-RG22-MSTR-2026</p>
              <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">Founder Edition</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
EOF

echo "✓ Products page created"


Now create Workroom Forge product page:

bash
mkdir -p ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/products/workroom-forge

cat > ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/products/workroom-forge/page.tsx << 'EOF'
"use client";

import Link from "next/link";
import { useState, useEffect } from "react";

const API_URL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:8000/api/v1';

interface Order { id: string; client: string; item: string; status: string; due: string; total: number; }
interface Client { id: string; name: string; email: string; phone: string; orders: number; }

export default function WorkroomForgePage() {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("orders");
  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);
  const [clients, setClients] = useState<Client[]>([]);
  const [showNewOrder, setShowNewOrder] = useState(false);
  const [newOrder, setNewOrder] = useState({ client: "", item: "", due: "", total: 0 });

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchOrders();
    fetchClients();
  }, []);

  const fetchOrders = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(API_URL + '/workroom/orders');
      const data = await res.json();
      setOrders(data.orders || []);
    } catch (e) {
      // Demo data if API not ready
      setOrders([
        { id: "ORD-001", client: "Sarah Johnson", item: "Custom Wedding Dress", status: "in_progress", due: "2026-03-01", total: 2500 },
        { id: "ORD-002", client: "Emily Chen", item: "Bridesmaid Alterations (3)", status: "pending", due: "2026-03-05", total: 450 },
        { id: "ORD-003", client: "Maria Garcia", item: "Evening Gown Repair", status: "completed", due: "2026-02-20", total: 180 },
        { id: "ORD-004", client: "Lisa Wong", item: "Prom Dress Custom", status: "in_progress", due: "2026-03-15", total: 800 },
      ]);
    }
  };

  const fetchClients = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(API_URL + '/workroom/clients');
      const data = await res.json();
      setClients(data.clients || []);
    } catch (e) {
      setClients([
        { id: "C001", name: "Sarah Johnson", email: "sarah@email.com", phone: "555-0101", orders: 5 },
        { id: "C002", name: "Emily Chen", email: "emily@email.com", phone: "555-0102", orders: 3 },
        { id: "C003", name: "Maria Garcia", email: "maria@email.com", phone: "555-0103", orders: 2 },
      ]);
    }
  };

  const createOrder = async () => {
    if (!newOrder.client || !newOrder.item) return;
    try {
      await fetch(API_URL + '/workroom/orders', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(newOrder)
      });
      setShowNewOrder(false);
      setNewOrder({ client: "", item: "", due: "", total: 0 });
      fetchOrders();
    } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 via-purple-900 to-gray-900">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="bg-gray-800/50 border-b border-purple-500/30">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
              <Link href="/products" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white">← Products</Link>
              <div className="h-6 w-px bg-gray-700" />
              <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-2">
                <span className="text-3xl">🏭</span>Workroom Forge
              </h1>
            </div>
            <button onClick={() => setShowNewOrder(true)} className="px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 text-white rounded-lg transition">
              + New Order
            </button>
          </div>
          
          {/* Tabs */}
          <div className="flex gap-1 mt-4">
            {["orders", "clients", "tasks", "invoices", "reports"].map((tab) => (
              <button key={tab} onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab)} className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-t-lg capitalize transition ${activeTab === tab ? "bg-gray-900 text-white" : "text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-gray-800"}`}>
                {tab}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Content */}
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-6">
        {/* Stats */}
        <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-6">
          <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-600 to-purple-800 rounded-xl p-4">
            <p className="text-white/70 text-sm">Total Orders</p>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">{orders.length}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-blue-800 rounded-xl p-4">
            <p className="text-white/70 text-sm">In Progress</p>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">{orders.filter(o => o.status === "in_progress").length}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-green-600 to-green-800 rounded-xl p-4">
            <p className="text-white/70 text-sm">Completed</p>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">{orders.filter(o => o.status === "completed").length}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-yellow-600 to-orange-700 rounded-xl p-4">
            <p className="text-white/70 text-sm">Revenue</p>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">${orders.reduce((sum, o) => sum + o.total, 0).toLocaleString()}</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Orders Tab */}
        {activeTab === "orders" && (
          <div className="bg-gray-800/50 rounded-xl border border-gray-700">
            <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-700 flex justify-between items-center">
              <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-white">Orders</h2>
              <input type="search" placeholder="Search orders..." className="px-3 py-2 bg-gray-900 border border-gray-700 rounded-lg text-white text-sm w-64" />
            </div>
            <table className="w-full">
              <thead>
                <tr className="text-left text-gray-400 text-sm border-b border-gray-700">
                  <th className="px-4 py-3">Order ID</th>
                  <th className="px-4 py-3">Client</th>
                  <th className="px-4 py-3">Item</th>
                  <th className="px-4 py-3">Status</th>
                  <th className="px-4 py-3">Due Date</th>
                  <th className="px-4 py-3">Total</th>
                  <th className="px-4 py-3">Actions</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {orders.map((order) => (
                  <tr key={order.id} className="border-b border-gray-700/50 hover:bg-gray-700/30">
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-purple-400 font-mono">{order.id}</td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-white">{order.client}</td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-gray-300">{order.item}</td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3">
                      <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs border ${
                        order.status === "completed" ? "bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 border-green-500/30" :
                        order.status === "in_progress" ? "bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400 border-blue-500/30" :
                        "bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400 border-yellow-500/30"
                      }`}>
                        {order.status.replace("_", " ")}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-gray-400">{order.due}</td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-green-400">${order.total}</td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3">
                      <button className="text-purple-400 hover:text-purple-300 mr-2">Edit</button>
                      <button className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white">View</button>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Clients Tab */}
        {activeTab === "clients" && (
          <div className="bg-gray-800/50 rounded-xl border border-gray-700">
            <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-700 flex justify-between items-center">
              <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-white">👥 Clients</h2>
              <button className="px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 text-white rounded-lg transition">+ Add Client</button>
            </div>
            <table className="w-full">
              <thead>
                <tr className="text-left text-gray-400 text-sm border-b border-gray-700">
                  <th className="px-4 py-3">Name</th>
                  <th className="px-4 py-3">Email</th>
                  <th className="px-4 py-3">Phone</th>
                  <th className="px-4 py-3">Orders</th>
                  <th className="px-4 py-3">Actions</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {clients.map((client) => (
                  <tr key={client.id} className="border-b border-gray-700/50 hover:bg-gray-700/30">
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-white">{client.name}</td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-gray-400">{client.email}</td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-gray-400">{client.phone}</td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-purple-400">{client.orders}</td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3">
                      <button className="text-purple-400 hover:text-purple-300">View</button>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Tasks Tab */}
        {activeTab === "tasks" && (
          <div className="bg-gray-800/50 rounded-xl border border-gray-700 p-6">
            <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-4">✅ Task Board</h2>
            <p className="text-gray-400">Coming soon - Kanban board for production tasks</p>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Invoices Tab */}
        {activeTab === "invoices" && (
          <div className="bg-gray-800/50 rounded-xl border border-gray-700 p-6">
            <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-4">🧾 Invoices</h2>
            <p className="text-gray-400">Coming soon - Generate and manage invoices</p>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Reports Tab */}
        {activeTab === "reports" && (
          <div className="bg-gray-800/50 rounded-xl border border-gray-700 p-6">
            <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-4">📊 Reports</h2>
            <p className="text-gray-400">Coming soon - Revenue and production analytics</p>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* New Order Modal */}
      {showNewOrder && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50">
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-xl p-6 w-full max-w-md border border-purple-500/30">
            <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-4">📦 New Order</h2>
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div>
                <label className="text-gray-400 text-sm">Client Name</label>
                <input type="text" value={newOrder.client} onChange={(e) => setNewOrder({...newOrder, client: e.target.value})}
                  className="w-full mt-1 px-3 py-2 bg-gray-900 border border-gray-700 rounded-lg text-white" placeholder="Sarah Johnson" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="text-gray-400 text-sm">Item Description</label>
                <input type="text" value={newOrder.item} onChange={(e) => setNewOrder({...newOrder, item: e.target.value})}
                  className="w-full mt-1 px-3 py-2 bg-gray-900 border border-gray-700 rounded-lg text-white" placeholder="Custom Wedding Dress" />
              </div>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div>
                  <label className="text-gray-400 text-sm">Due Date</label>
                  <input type="date" value={newOrder.due} onChange={(e) => setNewOrder({...newOrder, due: e.target.value})}
                    className="w-full mt-1 px-3 py-2 bg-gray-900 border border-gray-700 rounded-lg text-white" />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className="text-gray-400 text-sm">Total ($)</label>
                  <input type="number" value={newOrder.total} onChange={(e) => setNewOrder({...newOrder, total: Number(e.target.value)})}
                    className="w-full mt-1 px-3 py-2 bg-gray-900 border border-gray-700 rounded-lg text-white" placeholder="0" />
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="flex gap-2 mt-6">
              <button onClick={() => setShowNewOrder(false)} className="flex-1 px-4 py-2 bg-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-600 text-white rounded-lg">Cancel</button>
              <button onClick={createOrder} className="flex-1 px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 text-white rounded-lg">Create Order</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
EOF

echo "✓ Workroom Forge page created"


Create placeholder pages for other products:

bash
# Create placeholders for all products
for product in luxe-forge support-forge content-forge market-forge lead-forge empire-wallet open-claw; do
  mkdir -p ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/products/$product
  
  case $product in
    luxe-forge) icon="💎"; name="Luxe Forge"; desc="Designer Marketplace & Storefront"; stat="active" ;;
    support-forge) icon="🎧"; name="Support Forge"; desc="Customer Support & Helpdesk"; stat="active" ;;
    content-forge) icon="✨"; name="Content Forge"; desc="AI Content Generation"; stat="active" ;;
    market-forge) icon="🛒"; name="Market Forge"; desc="Multi-Platform Marketplace"; stat="coming" ;;
    lead-forge) icon="🎯"; name="Lead Forge"; desc="CRM & Lead Management"; stat="coming" ;;
    empire-wallet) icon="💰"; name="Empire Wallet"; desc="Crypto & Payments"; stat="coming" ;;
    open-claw) icon="⚖️"; name="Open Claw"; desc="Legal Documents"; stat="coming" ;;
  esac

  cat > ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/products/$product/page.tsx << EOF
"use client";
import Link from "next/link";

export default function Page() {
  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 via-purple-900 to-gray-900 p-6">
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        <Link href="/products" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm mb-4 inline-block">← Back to Products</Link>
        <div className="bg-gray-800/50 rounded-xl border border-gray-700 p-8 text-center">
          <span className="text-8xl">$icon</span>
          <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-white mt-6">$name</h1>
          <p className="text-gray-400 mt-2 text-lg">$desc</p>
          <div className="mt-8 p-6 bg-${stat == "active" ? "purple" : "yellow"}-500/10 border border-${stat == "active" ? "purple" : "yellow"}-500/30 rounded-lg">
            <p className="text-${stat == "active" ? "purple" : "yellow"}-400 text-lg">${stat == "active" ? "🚀 Active - In Development" : "🚧 Coming Soon"}</p>
            <p className="text-gray-400 mt-2">This product is ${stat == "active" ? "being built" : "planned for future release"}.</p>
          </div>
          <Link href="/products" className="mt-8 inline-block px-6 py-3 bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 text-white rounded-lg transition">
            Back to Products
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
EOF
done

echo "✓ All product pages created"


Now add the Products button to your existing dashboard. I'll add it without replacing your page:

bash
# Check the current page structure and add Products button
# First, let's backup
cp ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/page.tsx ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/page.tsx.backup

# Add Products button to the dashboard by inserting it
# We'll add it after the stats section

cat > /tmp/add_products_button.py << 'PYTHON'
import re

with open('/home/rg/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/page.tsx', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find a good place to add the Products button - after the header/stats area
# Look for the main grid area or stats section

products_button = '''
        {/* ═══════════ PRODUCTS ACCESS ═══════════ */}
        <div className="mb-6">
          <a href="/products" className="block bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 via-pink-600 to-purple-600 rounded-xl p-6 hover:opacity-90 transition group">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                <span className="text-5xl">📦</span>
                <div>
                  <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">Products</h2>
                  <p className="text-white/70">Access all Empire Box® products</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="text-white text-4xl group-hover:translate-x-2 transition-transform">→</div>
            </div>
            <div className="flex gap-2 mt-4 flex-wrap">
              <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-white/20 rounded text-white text-sm">🏭 Workroom</span>
              <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-white/20 rounded text-white text-sm">💎 Luxe</span>
              <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-white/20 rounded text-white text-sm">🎧 Support</span>
              <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-white/20 rounded text-white text-sm">✨ Content</span>
              <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-white/20 rounded text-white text-sm">+4 more</span>
            </div>
          </a>
        </div>
'''

# Try to find "Stats Grid" comment or similar location
if '/* Stats' in content or 'stats' in content.lower()[:2000]:
    # Insert before the first major div after return statement
    # Find the first div inside the main return
    pattern = r'(return \(\s*<div[^>]*>.*?)(className="grid)'
    match = re.search(pattern, content, re.DOTALL)
    if match:
        insert_pos = match.start(2)
        # Find the parent div that contains this grid
        content = content[:insert_pos] + products_button + '\n        ' + content[insert_pos:]
        print("Added Products button before grid")
    else:
        print("Could not find insertion point")
else:
    print("Stats section not found, manual edit needed")

with open('/home/rg/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/page.tsx', 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

print("Done")
PYTHON

python3 /tmp/add_products_button.py 2>/dev/null || echo "Manual edit may be needed"

Now let's add the Products button to your main dashboard. First let me see the structure of your page:

bash

Then I'll add the Products button directly. Based on your current dashboard, let me insert it:

bash
# Create a simple script to add Products button after the header section
cat > /tmp/insert_products.py << 'PYTHON'
import re

filepath = '/home/rg/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/page.tsx'

with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# The Products button JSX to insert
products_button = '''
        {/* ═══════════ PRODUCTS ACCESS BUTTON ═══════════ */}
        <a href="/products" className="block bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 via-pink-600 to-purple-600 rounded-xl p-5 hover:opacity-90 transition group mb-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
              <span className="text-4xl">📦</span>
              <div>
                <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-white">Products</h2>
                <p className="text-white/70 text-sm">Access all Empire Box® products</p>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="text-white text-3xl group-hover:translate-x-2 transition-transform">→</div>
          </div>
          <div className="flex gap-2 mt-3 flex-wrap">
            <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-white/20 rounded text-white text-xs">🏭 Workroom</span>
            <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-white/20 rounded text-white text-xs">💎 Luxe</span>
            <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-white/20 rounded text-white text-xs">🎧 Support</span>
            <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-white/20 rounded text-white text-xs">✨ Content</span>
            <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-white/20 rounded text-white text-xs">+4 more</span>
          </div>
        </a>

'''

# Find the return statement and the first main div content
# Look for pattern after "return (" and first meaningful content div

# Try to find stats grid or main content area
patterns_to_try = [
    # After stats grid
    (r'(<div className="grid grid-cols-4)', products_button + r'\1'),
    # After any header area with stats
    (r'(const \[stats)', r'\1'),
    # Before first main grid
    (r'(<div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4)', products_button + r'\1'),
]

inserted = False

# Try finding "Stats Grid" or similar section
if 'grid grid-cols-4' in content:
    # Insert before the stats grid
    content = content.replace(
        '<div className="grid grid-cols-4',
        products_button + '<div className="grid grid-cols-4',
        1  # Only first occurrence
    )
    inserted = True
    print("Inserted before stats grid")
elif 'Stats' in content:
    # Find Stats section
    match = re.search(r'(/\* Stats.*?\*/)', content)
    if match:
        insert_point = match.end()
        content = content[:insert_point] + '\n' + products_button + content[insert_point:]
        inserted = True
        print("Inserted after Stats comment")

if not inserted:
    # Find first <div className="grid after return
    match = re.search(r'(return\s*\(\s*<[^>]+>\s*)(.*?)(<div className="grid)', content, re.DOTALL)
    if match:
        content = content[:match.start(3)] + products_button + content[match.start(3):]
        inserted = True
        print("Inserted before first grid")

if inserted:
    with open(filepath, 'w') as f:
        f.write(content)
    print("✓ Products button added to dashboard!")
else:
    print("Could not auto-insert. Manual edit needed.")
    
PYTHON

If that doesn't work, let me do it manually:

bash
# Check if it was added
if grep -q "PRODUCTS BUTTON" ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/page.tsx; then
    echo "✓ Products button successfully added!"
else
    echo "Adding manually..."
    
    # Use Python for reliable insertion
    python3 << 'PYEOF'
filepath = '/home/rg/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/page.tsx'

with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

# Find line with the main div
for i, line in enumerate(lines):
    if 'className="h-screen bg-[#0a0a0f] flex overflow-hidden' in line:
        # Insert after this line
        insert_code = '''
      {/* ═══════ PRODUCTS BUTTON ═══════ */}
      <a href="/products" className="fixed top-4 right-4 z-40 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-pink-600 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg hover:opacity-90 transition flex items-center gap-2 shadow-lg border border-purple-400/30">
        <span>📦</span>
        <span className="font-bold text-white text-sm">Products</span>
        <span className="text-white/70">→</span>
      </a>
'''
        lines.insert(i + 1, insert_code)
        print(f"✓ Inserted Products button after line {i + 1}")
        break

with open(filepath, 'w') as f:
    f.writelines(lines)

print("✓ File saved!")
PYEOF
fi

filepath = '/home/rg/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/page.tsx'

with open(filepath, 'r') as f:

'''

if 'PRODUCTS BUTTON' in content:

else:

# First, find the model selector and header area

Let me update both the Products button and find the model selector:

bash
python3 << 'PYEOF'
filepath = '/home/rg/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/page.tsx'

with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# 1. Update the Products button to be more attractive with animations
old_products_button = '''      {/* ═══════ PRODUCTS BUTTON ═══════ */}
      <a href="/products" className="fixed top-4 right-4 z-40 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-pink-600 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg hover:opacity-90 transition flex items-center gap-2 shadow-lg border border-purple-400/30">
        <span>📦</span>
        <span className="font-bold text-white text-sm">Products</span>
        <span className="text-white/70">→</span>
      </a>'''

new_products_button = '''      {/* ═══════ PRODUCTS BUTTON - PREMIUM ═══════ */}
      <a 
        href="/products" 
        className="fixed top-4 right-4 z-40 group"
        onClick={(e) => {
          e.preventDefault();
          const btn = e.currentTarget;
          btn.style.transform = 'scale(0.95)';
          btn.style.boxShadow = '0 0 60px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.8)';
          setTimeout(() => {
            btn.style.transform = 'scale(1.1)';
            setTimeout(() => {
              window.location.href = '/products';
            }, 200);
          }, 100);
        }}
      >
        <div className="relative px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 via-pink-500 to-purple-600 rounded-xl shadow-2xl border border-purple-400/50 overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(168,85,247,0.6)] group-hover:border-pink-400/70">
          {/* Animated background shimmer */}
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-white/20 to-transparent -translate-x-full group-hover:translate-x-full transition-transform duration-1000"></div>
          
          {/* Glow effect */}
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600/0 via-pink-500/30 to-purple-600/0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300"></div>
          
          <div className="relative flex items-center gap-3">
            <span className="text-2xl animate-bounce">📦</span>
            <div>
              <span className="font-bold text-white text-lg">Products</span>
              <span className="block text-purple-200 text-xs">8 Apps Included</span>
            </div>
            <span className="text-white text-xl ml-2 group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform">→</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        {/* Pulsing ring effect */}
        <div className="absolute inset-0 rounded-xl border-2 border-purple-400/50 animate-ping opacity-20"></div>
      </a>'''

content = content.replace(old_products_button, new_products_button)

with open(filepath, 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

print("✓ Products button upgraded with premium effects!")
PYEOF

Now let me update the Products page to be a premium landing page:

bash
cat > ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/products/page.tsx << 'EOF'
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import Link from "next/link";

const products = [
  { id: "workroom_forge", name: "Workroom Forge", description: "Production & Order Management", longDesc: "Complete order tracking, client management, invoicing, and task boards for seamless production workflow.", icon: "🏭", status: "active", color: "from-purple-600 to-purple-800", gradient: "purple", features: ["Order tracking", "Client management", "Invoicing", "Task boards", "Production timeline", "Cost calculator"], route: "/products/workroom-forge" },
  { id: "luxe_forge", name: "Luxe Forge", description: "Designer Marketplace & Storefront", longDesc: "Beautiful storefronts for designers to showcase and sell their creations with integrated payments.", icon: "💎", status: "active", color: "from-pink-600 to-rose-800", gradient: "pink", features: ["Product listings", "Shopping cart", "Payment processing", "Inventory management", "Customer reviews", "Analytics"], route: "/products/luxe-forge" },
  { id: "support_forge", name: "Support Forge", description: "Customer Support & Helpdesk", longDesc: "AI-powered customer support with ticket management, live chat, and knowledge base.", icon: "🎧", status: "active", color: "from-blue-600 to-cyan-800", gradient: "blue", features: ["Ticket system", "Live chat", "AI auto-responses", "Knowledge base", "Customer history", "SLA tracking"], route: "/products/support-forge" },
  { id: "content_forge", name: "Content Forge", description: "AI Content Generation", longDesc: "Generate product descriptions, social posts, emails, and marketing content with AI.", icon: "✨", status: "active", color: "from-indigo-600 to-violet-800", gradient: "indigo", features: ["Product descriptions", "Social media posts", "Email templates", "Blog posts", "SEO optimization", "Brand voice"], route: "/products/content-forge" },
  { id: "market_forge", name: "Market Forge", description: "Multi-Platform Marketplace Integration", longDesc: "Sync your products across eBay, Amazon, Etsy, Poshmark and more from one dashboard.", icon: "🛒", status: "coming_soon", color: "from-orange-500 to-amber-700", gradient: "orange", features: ["eBay sync", "Amazon integration", "Etsy listings", "Poshmark", "Inventory sync", "Price management"], route: "/products/market-forge" },
  { id: "lead_forge", name: "Lead Forge", description: "CRM & Lead Management", longDesc: "Track leads, manage your sales pipeline, and automate follow-ups to close more deals.", icon: "🎯", status: "coming_soon", color: "from-green-600 to-emerald-800", gradient: "green", features: ["Contact management", "Sales pipeline", "Email campaigns", "Lead scoring", "Analytics", "Automation"], route: "/products/lead-forge" },
  { id: "empire_wallet", name: "Empire Wallet", description: "Crypto & Payment Processing", longDesc: "Accept crypto payments, manage multiple currencies, and track all your finances.", icon: "💰", status: "coming_soon", color: "from-yellow-500 to-orange-700", gradient: "yellow", features: ["Crypto payments", "Multi-currency", "Invoice generation", "Payment links", "Reports", "Tax exports"], route: "/products/empire-wallet" },
  { id: "open_claw", name: "Open Claw", description: "Legal Document Generator", longDesc: "Generate contracts, terms of service, privacy policies, and NDAs with AI assistance.", icon: "⚖️", status: "coming_soon", color: "from-slate-600 to-gray-800", gradient: "slate", features: ["Contracts", "Terms of service", "Privacy policies", "NDAs", "Custom templates", "E-signatures"], route: "/products/open-claw" }
];

export default function ProductsPage() {
  const [filter, setFilter] = useState<"all" | "active" | "coming_soon">("all");
  const [hoveredProduct, setHoveredProduct] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false);
  
  useEffect(() => {
    setMounted(true);
  }, []);

  const filteredProducts = products.filter(p => filter === "all" ? true : p.status === filter);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#0a0a0f] overflow-hidden">
      {/* Animated Background */}
      <div className="fixed inset-0 overflow-hidden pointer-events-none">
        <div className="absolute top-1/4 left-1/4 w-96 h-96 bg-purple-600/20 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-pulse"></div>
        <div className="absolute bottom-1/4 right-1/4 w-96 h-96 bg-pink-600/20 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-pulse delay-1000"></div>
        <div className="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 w-64 h-64 bg-blue-600/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-pulse delay-500"></div>
      </div>

      {/* Header */}
      <header className={`relative z-10 transition-all duration-1000 ${mounted ? 'opacity-100 translate-y-0' : 'opacity-0 -translate-y-10'}`}>
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-8">
          <Link 
            href="/" 
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition mb-6 group"
          >
            <span className="group-hover:-translate-x-1 transition-transform">←</span>
            <span>Back to Dashboard</span>
          </Link>

          {/* Hero Section */}
          <div className="text-center mb-12">
            <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-purple-500/20 border border-purple-500/30 rounded-full text-purple-300 text-sm mb-6">
              <span className="animate-pulse">👑</span>
              <span>Founder Edition - All Products Unlocked</span>
            </div>
            
            <h1 className="text-6xl font-bold mb-4">
              <span className="bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-400 via-pink-400 to-purple-400 bg-clip-text text-transparent">
                Empire Box®
              </span>
            </h1>
            <p className="text-2xl text-gray-400 mb-2">Business Command Center</p>
            <p className="text-gray-500">8 Powerful Products • 1 Unified Platform • Unlimited Potential</p>
            
            {/* Stats */}
            <div className="flex justify-center gap-8 mt-8">
              <div className="text-center">
                <p className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">{products.filter(p => p.status === 'active').length}</p>
                <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">Active Products</p>
              </div>
              <div className="text-center">
                <p className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">{products.length}</p>
                <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">Total Suite</p>
              </div>
              <div className="text-center">
                <p className="text-3xl font-bold text-green-400">∞</p>
                <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">Usage Limit</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Filter Tabs */}
          <div className="flex justify-center gap-2 mb-8">
            {[
              { key: "all", label: "All Products", count: products.length },
              { key: "active", label: "Active", count: products.filter(p => p.status === "active").length },
              { key: "coming_soon", label: "Coming Soon", count: products.filter(p => p.status === "coming_soon").length }
            ].map((tab) => (
              <button
                key={tab.key}
                onClick={() => setFilter(tab.key as any)}
                className={`px-6 py-3 rounded-xl transition-all duration-300 ${
                  filter === tab.key 
                    ? "bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-pink-600 text-white shadow-lg shadow-purple-500/30" 
                    : "bg-gray-800/50 text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-700/50 hover:text-white"
                }`}
              >
                {tab.label} ({tab.count})
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      {/* Products Grid */}
      <main className="relative z-10 max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 pb-12">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
          {filteredProducts.map((product, index) => (
            <div
              key={product.id}
              className={`transition-all duration-700 ${mounted ? 'opacity-100 translate-y-0' : 'opacity-0 translate-y-10'}`}
              style={{ transitionDelay: `${index * 100}ms` }}
              onMouseEnter={() => setHoveredProduct(product.id)}
              onMouseLeave={() => setHoveredProduct(null)}
            >
              <Link href={product.route}>
                <div className={`
                  relative h-full rounded-2xl overflow-hidden
                  ${product.status === "active" ? "cursor-pointer" : "cursor-default"}
                  transition-all duration-500
                  ${hoveredProduct === product.id ? "scale-105 z-20" : "scale-100 z-10"}
                `}>
                  {/* Glow effect on hover */}
                  <div className={`
                    absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br ${product.color} opacity-0 blur-xl transition-opacity duration-500
                    ${hoveredProduct === product.id ? "opacity-40" : ""}
                  `}></div>

                  {/* Card */}
                  <div className={`
                    relative h-full p-6 
                    bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-800/90 to-gray-900/90 
                    backdrop-blur-sm
                    border border-gray-700/50 rounded-2xl
                    transition-all duration-300
                    ${hoveredProduct === product.id ? "border-purple-500/50 shadow-2xl" : ""}
                  `}>
                    {/* Status Badge */}
                    <div className="absolute top-4 right-4">
                      {product.status === "active" ? (
                        <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 text-xs rounded-full border border-green-500/30 flex items-center gap-1">
                          <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-green-400 rounded-full animate-pulse"></span>
                          Active
                        </span>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400 text-xs rounded-full border border-yellow-500/30">
                          Coming Soon
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </div>

                    {/* Icon */}
                    <div className={`
                      text-6xl mb-4 transition-transform duration-300
                      ${hoveredProduct === product.id ? "scale-110 animate-bounce" : ""}
                    `}>
                      {product.icon}
                    </div>

                    {/* Title & Description */}
                    <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-2">{product.name}</h3>
                    <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-4 line-clamp-2">
                      {hoveredProduct === product.id ? product.longDesc : product.description}
                    </p>

                    {/* Features */}
                    <div className="space-y-1 mb-6">
                      {product.features.slice(0, hoveredProduct === product.id ? 6 : 3).map((feature, i) => (
                        <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
                          <span className={`text-xs ${hoveredProduct === product.id ? "text-purple-400" : "text-gray-600"}`}>✓</span>
                          <span>{feature}</span>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                      {hoveredProduct !== product.id && product.features.length > 3 && (
                        <p className="text-xs text-gray-600">+{product.features.length - 3} more features</p>
                      )}
                    </div>

                    {/* Action Button */}
                    {product.status === "active" ? (
                      <div className={`
                        w-full py-3 px-4 rounded-xl text-center font-medium
                        bg-gradient-to-r ${product.color} text-white
                        transition-all duration-300
                        ${hoveredProduct === product.id ? "shadow-lg" : ""}
                      `}>
                        <span className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                          Launch {product.name.split(' ')[0]}
                          <span className={`transition-transform ${hoveredProduct === product.id ? "translate-x-1" : ""}`}>→</span>
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    ) : (
                      <div className="w-full py-3 px-4 rounded-xl text-center font-medium bg-gray-700/50 text-gray-500 border border-gray-600/30">
                        Coming Soon
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </Link>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* License Card */}
        <div className={`mt-12 transition-all duration-1000 delay-500 ${mounted ? 'opacity-100 translate-y-0' : 'opacity-0 translate-y-10'}`}>
          <div className="relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl">
            {/* Animated border */}
            <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 via-pink-600 to-purple-600 animate-gradient-x"></div>
            
            <div className="relative m-[2px] p-8 bg-[#0a0a0f] rounded-2xl">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between flex-wrap gap-6">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                  <div className="text-5xl animate-pulse">👑</div>
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">Founder Master License</h3>
                    <p className="text-gray-400">All products unlocked • Unlimited usage • Lifetime access</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="text-right">
                  <p className="text-green-400 font-bold text-xl font-mono">EM-RG22-MSTR-2026</p>
                  <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">Activated • First Edition</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              {/* Features */}
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mt-6 pt-6 border-t border-gray-800">
                <div className="text-center">
                  <p className="text-2xl">🚀</p>
                  <p className="text-white font-medium">Priority Access</p>
                  <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">First to new features</p>
                </div>
                <div className="text-center">
                  <p className="text-2xl">💎</p>
                  <p className="text-white font-medium">Premium Support</p>
                  <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">Direct founder line</p>
                </div>
                <div className="text-center">
                  <p className="text-2xl">🔓</p>
                  <p className="text-white font-medium">Full Source</p>
                  <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">Customize anything</p>
                </div>
                <div className="text-center">
                  <p className="text-2xl">♾️</p>
                  <p className="text-white font-medium">Unlimited</p>
                  <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">No restrictions</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Footer */}
        <div className="text-center mt-12 text-gray-600">
          <p>Empire Box® v1.0.0 • by RG22</p>
        </div>
      </main>

      {/* CSS for gradient animation */}
      <style jsx>{`
        @keyframes gradient-x {
          0%, 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
          50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
        }
        .animate-gradient-x {
          background-size: 200% 200%;
          animation: gradient-x 3s ease infinite;
        }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  );
}
EOF

bash

Now I'll make the changes - move model selector to left under header:

bash
python3 << 'PYEOF'
filepath = '/home/rg/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/page.tsx'

with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# The layout has model selector on the right of chat input area
# We want to move it to the left sidebar, under "Founder Command Center"

# Current structure around line 344 (header):
#   <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Founder Command Center</p>
# 
# Current structure around line 396 (model selector in chat area):
#   <select value={selectedModel}...

# Strategy: 
# 1. Add model selector right after "Founder Command Center"
# 2. Remove it from the chat input area (or hide it)

# Find "Founder Command Center" and add model selector after it
old_header = '''<p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Founder Command Center</p>'''

new_header = '''<p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Founder Command Center</p>
            
            {/* AI Model Selector - moved to left */}
            <div className="mt-3 flex items-center gap-2">
              <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">🤖 AI:</span>
              <select 
                value={selectedModel} 
                onChange={(e) => setSelectedModel(e.target.value)} 
                className="bg-[#1a1a2f] border border-purple-500/30 rounded-lg px-3 py-1.5 text-sm text-purple-300 hover:border-purple-400 focus:border-purple-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-purple-500/50 transition cursor-pointer"
              >
                {models.map(m => (
                  <option key={m.id} value={m.id} disabled={!m.available}>{m.name}</option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </div>'''

if old_header in content:
    content = content.replace(old_header, new_header)
    print("✓ Added model selector under Founder Command Center")
else:
    print("Could not find header text")

# Now hide/remove the duplicate model selector in chat area
# Find the old select in chat area and comment it out or remove
old_select_pattern = '''          <select value={selectedModel} onChange={(e) => setSelectedModel(e.target.value)} className="bg-[#0a0a0f] border border-gray-700 rounded px-2 py-1 text-sm">
            {models.map(m => (<option key={m.id} value={m.id} disabled={!m.available}>{m.name}</option>))}
          </select>'''

# Replace with a simple label or nothing
new_select_area = '''          {/* Model selector moved to left sidebar */}
          <span className="text-xs text-purple-400 bg-purple-500/10 px-2 py-1 rounded">{selectedModel}</span>'''

if old_select_pattern in content:
    content = content.replace(old_select_pattern, new_select_area)
    print("✓ Replaced chat area selector with label")
else:
    # Try a more flexible match
    import re
    pattern = r'<select value=\{selectedModel\}[^>]+>\s*\{models\.map\(m => \(<option[^)]+\)\)\}\s*</select>'
    if re.search(pattern, content):
        content = re.sub(pattern, '{/* Model moved to sidebar */}\n          <span className="text-xs text-purple-400 bg-purple-500/10 px-2 py-1 rounded">{selectedModel}</span>', content)
        print("✓ Replaced selector with regex match")
    else:
        print("Note: Could not find exact select pattern to replace")

with open(filepath, 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

print("\n✓ Layout updated!")
print("  - Model selector now under 'Founder Command Center' on left")
print("  - Products button stays on top right")

Now update the Products button to be more premium:

bash
python3 << 'PYEOF'
filepath = '/home/rg/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/page.tsx'

with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find current Products button
old_button = '''      {/* ═══════ PRODUCTS BUTTON ═══════ */}
      <a href="/products" className="fixed top-4 right-4 z-40 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-pink-600 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg hover:opacity-90 transition flex items-center gap-2 shadow-lg border border-purple-400/30">
        <span>📦</span>
        <span className="font-bold text-white text-sm">Products</span>
        <span className="text-white/70">→</span>
      </a>'''

# Premium Products button with effects
new_button = '''      {/* ═══════ PRODUCTS BUTTON - PREMIUM ═══════ */}
      <a 
        href="/products" 
        className="fixed top-4 right-4 z-40 group"
      >
        <div className="relative">
          {/* Glow effect */}
          <div className="absolute -inset-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 via-pink-500 to-purple-600 rounded-xl blur opacity-40 group-hover:opacity-75 transition duration-500 group-hover:duration-200 animate-pulse"></div>
          
          {/* Button */}
          <div className="relative px-5 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 via-pink-500 to-purple-600 rounded-xl shadow-xl border border-white/20 transition-all duration-300 group-hover:scale-105 group-hover:shadow-2xl group-hover:shadow-purple-500/30">
            {/* Shimmer effect */}
            <div className="absolute inset-0 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-white/25 to-transparent -translate-x-full group-hover:translate-x-full transition-transform duration-700"></div>
            
            <div className="relative flex items-center gap-3">
              <span className="text-2xl group-hover:animate-bounce">📦</span>
              <div className="text-left">
                <span className="font-bold text-white block leading-tight">Products</span>
                <span className="text-purple-200 text-xs">8 Apps Suite</span>
              </div>
              <span className="text-white/80 text-lg group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform">→</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>'''

if old_button in content:
    content = content.replace(old_button, new_button)
    print("✓ Products button upgraded!")
else:
    # Try to find and replace any existing products button
    if 'PRODUCTS BUTTON' in content:
        import re
        # Replace everything between the comment and closing </a>
        pattern = r'\{/\* ═+ PRODUCTS BUTTON[^}]*\*/\}.*?</a>'
        content = re.sub(pattern, new_button.strip(), content, flags=re.DOTALL)
        print("✓ Products button replaced with regex")
    else:
        print("Products button not found")

with open(filepath, 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

python3 << 'PYEOF'
filepath = '/home/rg/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/page.tsx'

with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find the header div and add model selector after it
old_header_section = '''        <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-800">
          <h1 className="text-xl font-bold text-purple-400">Empire Console</h1>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Founder Command Center</p>
        </div>'''

new_header_section = '''        <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-800">
          <h1 className="text-xl font-bold text-purple-400">Empire Console</h1>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Founder Command Center</p>
          
          {/* AI Model Selector */}
          <div className="mt-3 flex items-center gap-2">
            <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">🤖</span>
            <select 
              value={selectedModel} 
              onChange={(e) => setSelectedModel(e.target.value)} 
              className="flex-1 bg-[#1a1a2f] border border-purple-500/30 rounded-lg px-2 py-1.5 text-xs text-purple-300 hover:border-purple-400 focus:border-purple-500 focus:outline-none transition cursor-pointer"
            >
              {models.map(m => (
                <option key={m.id} value={m.id} disabled={!m.available}>{m.name}</option>
              ))}
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>'''

if old_header_section in content:
    content = content.replace(old_header_section, new_header_section)
    print("✓ Added model selector under Founder Command Center!")
else:
    print("Header section not found exactly, trying flexible match...")
    # Try with different whitespace
    import re
    pattern = r'(<div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-800">\s*<h1[^>]*>Empire Console</h1>\s*<p[^>]*>Founder Command Center</p>\s*)(</div>)'
    replacement = r'''\1
          {/* AI Model Selector */}
          <div className="mt-3 flex items-center gap-2">
            <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">🤖</span>
            <select value={selectedModel} onChange={(e) => setSelectedModel(e.target.value)} className="flex-1 bg-[#1a1a2f] border border-purple-500/30 rounded-lg px-2 py-1.5 text-xs text-purple-300 hover:border-purple-400 focus:border-purple-500 focus:outline-none transition cursor-pointer">
              {models.map(m => (<option key={m.id} value={m.id} disabled={!m.available}>{m.name}</option>))}
            </select>
          </div>
        \2'''
    
    if re.search(pattern, content, re.DOTALL):
        content = re.sub(pattern, replacement, content, flags=re.DOTALL)
        print("✓ Added with regex match!")
    else:
        print("Could not match pattern")

with open(filepath, 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

Now update the Products button to be premium with effects:

bash
python3 << 'PYEOF'
filepath = '/home/rg/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/page.tsx'

with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find and replace the Products button with premium version
# First check what we have
if 'PRODUCTS BUTTON - PREMIUM' in content:
    print("Premium button already exists")
elif 'PRODUCTS BUTTON' in content:
    # Find the old button pattern
    import re
    
    # Match the entire products button block
    old_pattern = r'\{/\* ═+ PRODUCTS BUTTON ═+ \*/\}\s*<a[^>]*href="/products"[^>]*>.*?</a>'
    
    new_button = '''{/* ═══════ PRODUCTS BUTTON - PREMIUM ═══════ */}
      <a href="/products" className="fixed top-4 right-4 z-40 group">
        <div className="relative">
          {/* Animated glow */}
          <div className="absolute -inset-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 via-pink-500 to-purple-600 rounded-xl blur-sm opacity-50 group-hover:opacity-100 transition duration-300 animate-pulse"></div>
          
          {/* Main button */}
          <div className="relative px-5 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 via-pink-500 to-purple-600 rounded-xl border border-white/20 shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 group-hover:scale-105 group-hover:shadow-2xl group-hover:shadow-purple-500/40 overflow-hidden">
            {/* Shimmer effect */}
            <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-white/30 to-transparent -translate-x-full group-hover:translate-x-full transition-transform duration-700 ease-out"></div>
            
            {/* Content */}
            <div className="relative flex items-center gap-3">
              <span className="text-2xl group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">📦</span>
              <div className="text-left">
                <span className="font-bold text-white block leading-tight">Products</span>
                <span className="text-purple-200 text-[10px]">8 Apps Unlocked</span>
              </div>
              <span className="text-white text-lg ml-1 group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform duration-300">→</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>'''
    
    match = re.search(old_pattern, content, re.DOTALL)
    if match:
        content = content[:match.start()] + new_button + content[match.end():]
        print("✓ Products button upgraded to premium!")
    else:
        print("Could not match old button pattern")
        # Try simpler replacement
        if '<a href="/products"' in content:
            print("Found products link, doing line-by-line replacement...")
else:
    print("No Products button found")

with open(filepath, 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

old_select = '''          <select value={selectedModel} onChange={(e) => setSelectedModel(e.target.value)} className="bg-[#0a0a0f] border border-gray-700 rounded px-2 py-1 text-sm">
            {models.map(m => (<option key={m.id} value={m.id} disabled={!m.available}>{m.name}</option>))}
          </select>'''

new_label = '''          {/* Model selector is in sidebar */}
          <span className="text-xs text-purple-400 bg-purple-900/30 px-2 py-1 rounded border border-purple-500/20">{models.find(m => m.id === selectedModel)?.name || selectedModel}</span>'''

if old_select in content:
    content = content.replace(old_select, new_label)
    print("✓ Removed old model selector from chat area!")
    with open(filepath, 'w') as f:
        f.write(content)
else:
    print("Old selector pattern not found exactly")
    # Show what's there
    if 'selectedModel} onChange' in content:
        lines = content.split('\n')
        count = 0
        for i, line in enumerate(lines):
            if 'selectedModel} onChange' in line:
                count += 1
                print(f"  Found #{count} at line {i+1}")
        print(f"Total occurrences: {count}")

│  • Workroom Forge UI shows "Orders" table                                  │
│  • But clicking "New Order" just shows a form                              │
│  • The form submits to /api/workroom/orders                               │
│  • But that endpoint doesn't exist yet!                                    │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
