Which approach?

Let's create a proper versioned release and deployment protocol:

bash
# Create version and release structure
mkdir -p ~/Empire/{releases,deploy,scripts}

# Set version
VERSION="1.0.0-alpha.1"
RELEASE_DATE=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)
RELEASE_NAME="EmpireBox_v${VERSION}_${RELEASE_DATE}"

echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo "  EMPIRE BOX® - CREATING RELEASE v${VERSION}"
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"

# Create VERSION file
cat > ~/Empire/VERSION << EOF
{
  "version": "${VERSION}",
  "release_date": "${RELEASE_DATE}",
  "codename": "Foundation",
  "build": "$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)",
  "license": "EM-RG22-MSTR-2026",
  "author": "RG22"
}
EOF

echo "✓ VERSION file created"

bash
# Create CHANGELOG
cat > ~/Empire/CHANGELOG.md << 'EOF'
# Empire Box® Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [1.0.0-alpha.1] - 2026-02-23

### 🎉 Initial Foundation Release

#### Core Platform
- ✅ Empire Console Dashboard (Next.js)
- ✅ MAX AI Assistant integration (Claude, GPT-4, Ollama)
- ✅ Multi-model AI routing system
- ✅ Task management system
- ✅ File browser and upload
- ✅ Image paste and analysis

#### Products Landing Page
- ✅ Products grid with all 8 core products
- ✅ Premium UI with animations
- ✅ Founder license display

#### Product Pages (UI Ready)
- ✅ Workroom Forge - Orders/Clients UI
- 📝 Luxe Forge - Placeholder
- 📝 Support Forge - Placeholder
- 📝 Content Forge - Placeholder
- 📝 Market Forge - Coming Soon
- 📝 Lead Forge - Coming Soon
- 📝 Empire Wallet - Coming Soon
- 📝 Open Claw - Coming Soon

#### Backend Services
- ✅ FastAPI backend structure
- ✅ AI router with multi-provider support
- ✅ Token management system
- ✅ Request routing (local/cloud)
- ✅ Agent safeguards

#### Voice & Telegram (Ready, needs config)
- ✅ Telegram bot service
- ✅ Voice transcription (Whisper)
- ✅ Text-to-speech (Edge TTS, ElevenLabs)
- ⏳ Awaiting Telegram bot token

#### Licensing System
- ✅ License tier definitions
- ✅ License key generation
- ✅ USB installer creator
- ✅ Phone-home activation

#### Infrastructure
- ✅ PostgreSQL ready
- ✅ Redis ready
- ✅ Ollama integration
- ✅ Docker compose templates

### 🔧 Known Issues
- Products need backend API wiring
- Telegram needs bot token configuration
- Some UI elements need polish

### 📋 Next Release Goals
- Wire Workroom Forge to backend
- Complete Telegram integration
- Add real-time notifications
- Database migrations

---

## Version Numbering

- **Major.Minor.Patch-PreRelease**
- `1.0.0-alpha.1` = First alpha, core features
- `1.0.0-beta.1` = Feature complete, testing
- `1.0.0` = Production ready

---

*Empire Box® by RG22*
EOF

echo "✓ CHANGELOG created"

bash
# Create deployment protocol document
cat > ~/Empire/DEPLOY_PROTOCOL.md << 'EOF'
# Empire Box® Deployment Protocol

## Version: 1.0.0-alpha.1
## Last Updated: 2026-02-23

---

## 📦 Release Structure



~/Empire/ ├── VERSION # Current version info (JSON) ├── CHANGELOG.md # Version history ├── DEPLOY_PROTOCOL.md # This file ├── releases/ # Archived releases │ └── EmpireBox_v1.0.0-alpha.1_2026-02-23.tar.gz ├── deploy/ # Deployment scripts │ ├── deploy.sh # Main deployment script │ ├── rollback.sh # Rollback to previous version │ └── health-check.sh # Verify deployment └── scripts/ # Utility scripts ├── backup.sh # Create backup ├── restore.sh # Restore from backup └── create-release.sh # Create new release

Code

---

## 🚀 Deployment Commands

### Create a New Release
```bash
cd ~/Empire
./scripts/create-release.sh [version]
# Example: ./scripts/create-release.sh 1.0.0-alpha.2

Deploy to Production
bash
cd ~/Empire
./deploy/deploy.sh [version]
# Example: ./deploy/deploy.sh 1.0.0-alpha.1

Rollback
bash
cd ~/Empire
./deploy/rollback.sh [previous-version]

Health Check
bash
./deploy/health-check.sh

📋 Pre-Deployment Checklist
 All tests passing
 VERSION file updated
 CHANGELOG.md updated
 Backend running without errors
 Frontend builds successfully
 Database migrations applied
 Environment variables set
 Backup created
🔧 Environment Variables Required
bash
# AI Providers
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your-key
OPENAI_API_KEY=your-key (optional)

# Telegram (optional)
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=your-token
TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID=your-chat-id

# Database
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/empire
REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379

# License
LICENSE_KEY=EM-RG22-MSTR-2026

📊 Port Assignments
Service	Port	Status
Dashboard	3000	✅ Active
Backend API	8000	✅ Active
PostgreSQL	5432	✅ Active
Redis	6379	✅ Active
Ollama	11434	✅ Active
MarketForge	8010	⏳ Planned
ContractorForge	8020	⏳ Planned
LuxeForge	8030	⏳ Planned
SupportForge	8040	⏳ Planned
LeadForge	8050	⏳ Planned
ShipForge	8060	⏳ Planned
ForgeCRM	8070	⏳ Planned
RelistApp	8080	⏳ Planned
SocialForge	8090	⏳ Planned
LLCFactory	8100	⏳ Planned
ApostApp	8110	⏳ Planned
EmpireAssist	8120	⏳ Planned
EmpirePay	8130	⏳ Planned
🔄 Deployment Flow
Code
┌─────────────┐     ┌─────────────┐     ┌─────────────┐
│   Develop   │────▶│   Release   │────▶│   Deploy    │
│   locally   │     │   create    │     │   to prod   │
└─────────────┘     └─────────────┘     └─────────────┘
       │                   │                   │
       ▼                   ▼                   ▼
   Git commit         tar.gz archive      Extract & run
   Push to repo       VERSION bump        Health check
                      CHANGELOG update    Notify

🛡️ Rollback Procedure
Stop current services: ./deploy/stop.sh
Restore previous release: ./deploy/rollback.sh [version]
Verify health: ./deploy/health-check.sh
Notify team of rollback

Empire Box® by RG22 EOF

echo "✓ DEPLOY_PROTOCOL.md created"

Code

```bash
# Create the release script
cat > ~/Empire/scripts/create-release.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
#############################################
# Empire Box® Release Creator
# by RG22
#############################################

set -e

PURPLE='\033[0;35m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m'

EMPIRE_DIR="$HOME/Empire"
RELEASES_DIR="$EMPIRE_DIR/releases"

# Get version from argument or VERSION file
if [ -n "$1" ]; then
    NEW_VERSION="$1"
else
    CURRENT_VERSION=$(cat "$EMPIRE_DIR/VERSION" 2>/dev/null | grep '"version"' | cut -d'"' -f4)
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Current version: $CURRENT_VERSION${NC}"
    read -p "Enter new version (or press Enter to keep current): " NEW_VERSION
    NEW_VERSION=${NEW_VERSION:-$CURRENT_VERSION}
fi

RELEASE_DATE=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)
RELEASE_NAME="EmpireBox_v${NEW_VERSION}_${RELEASE_DATE}"
BUILD_NUMBER=$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)

echo ""
echo -e "${PURPLE}═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════${NC}"
echo -e "${PURPLE}  EMPIRE BOX® - Creating Release v${NEW_VERSION}${NC}"
echo -e "${PURPLE}═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════${NC}"
echo ""

# Update VERSION file
cat > "$EMPIRE_DIR/VERSION" << EOF
{
  "version": "${NEW_VERSION}",
  "release_date": "${RELEASE_DATE}",
  "codename": "Foundation",
  "build": "${BUILD_NUMBER}",
  "license": "EM-RG22-MSTR-2026",
  "author": "RG22"
}
EOF
echo -e "${GREEN}✓ VERSION file updated${NC}"

# Create releases directory if not exists
mkdir -p "$RELEASES_DIR"

# Files and directories to include in release
INCLUDE_LIST=(
    "VERSION"
    "CHANGELOG.md"
    "DEPLOY_PROTOCOL.md"
    "README.md"
    "backend"
    "founder_dashboard"
    "scripts"
    "deploy"
    ".env.example"
)

# Create temporary directory for release
TEMP_DIR=$(mktemp -d)
RELEASE_DIR="$TEMP_DIR/$RELEASE_NAME"
mkdir -p "$RELEASE_DIR"

echo -e "${CYAN}Copying files...${NC}"

for item in "${INCLUDE_LIST[@]}"; do
    if [ -e "$EMPIRE_DIR/$item" ]; then
        cp -r "$EMPIRE_DIR/$item" "$RELEASE_DIR/"
        echo "  ✓ $item"
    fi
done

# Remove node_modules and other large/sensitive files
find "$RELEASE_DIR" -name "node_modules" -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
find "$RELEASE_DIR" -name "__pycache__" -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
find "$RELEASE_DIR" -name "*.pyc" -delete 2>/dev/null || true
find "$RELEASE_DIR" -name ".env" -delete 2>/dev/null || true
find "$RELEASE_DIR" -name "venv" -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true

# Create .env.example if it doesn't exist
if [ ! -f "$RELEASE_DIR/.env.example" ]; then
    cat > "$RELEASE_DIR/.env.example" << 'ENVEXAMPLE'
# Empire Box® Environment Configuration
# Copy this to .env and fill in your values

# AI Providers
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your-anthropic-key
OPENAI_API_KEY=your-openai-key

# Telegram (optional)
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=your-bot-token
TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID=your-chat-id

# Database
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://empire:empire@localhost:5432/empire
REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379

# License
LICENSE_KEY=your-license-key
ENVEXAMPLE
fi

# Create tarball
echo -e "${CYAN}Creating archive...${NC}"
cd "$TEMP_DIR"
tar -czf "${RELEASE_NAME}.tar.gz" "$RELEASE_NAME"
mv "${RELEASE_NAME}.tar.gz" "$RELEASES_DIR/"

# Create checksum
cd "$RELEASES_DIR"
sha256sum "${RELEASE_NAME}.tar.gz" > "${RELEASE_NAME}.sha256"

# Cleanup
rm -rf "$TEMP_DIR"

# Show result
RELEASE_SIZE=$(du -h "$RELEASES_DIR/${RELEASE_NAME}.tar.gz" | cut -f1)

echo ""
echo -e "${GREEN}═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════${NC}"
echo -e "${GREEN}  ✓ RELEASE CREATED SUCCESSFULLY${NC}"
echo -e "${GREEN}═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════${NC}"
echo ""
echo -e "  Version:  ${PURPLE}${NEW_VERSION}${NC}"
echo -e "  Build:    ${BUILD_NUMBER}"
echo -e "  Date:     ${RELEASE_DATE}"
echo -e "  Size:     ${RELEASE_SIZE}"
echo ""
echo -e "  Files:"
echo -e "    ${CYAN}$RELEASES_DIR/${RELEASE_NAME}.tar.gz${NC}"
echo -e "    ${CYAN}$RELEASES_DIR/${RELEASE_NAME}.sha256${NC}"
echo ""
echo -e "${GREEN}═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════${NC}"

# List all releases
echo ""
echo -e "${YELLOW}All Releases:${NC}"
ls -lh "$RELEASES_DIR"/*.tar.gz 2>/dev/null | awk '{print "  " $9 " (" $5 ")"}'
SCRIPT

chmod +x ~/Empire/scripts/create-release.sh
echo "✓ create-release.sh created"

bash
# Create deployment script
cat > ~/Empire/deploy/deploy.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
#############################################
# Empire Box® Deployment Script
# by RG22
#############################################

set -e

PURPLE='\033[0;35m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
RED='\033[0;31m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m'

EMPIRE_DIR="$HOME/Empire"
RELEASES_DIR="$EMPIRE_DIR/releases"
BACKUP_DIR="$EMPIRE_DIR/backups"
DEPLOY_LOG="$EMPIRE_DIR/deploy/deploy.log"

VERSION="$1"

if [ -z "$VERSION" ]; then
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Available releases:${NC}"
    ls "$RELEASES_DIR"/*.tar.gz 2>/dev/null | xargs -n1 basename | sed 's/.tar.gz//' || echo "  No releases found"
    echo ""
    read -p "Enter version to deploy: " VERSION
fi

RELEASE_FILE="$RELEASES_DIR/EmpireBox_v${VERSION}_*.tar.gz"
RELEASE_FILE=$(ls $RELEASE_FILE 2>/dev/null | head -1)

if [ ! -f "$RELEASE_FILE" ]; then
    echo -e "${RED}✗ Release not found: $VERSION${NC}"
    exit 1
fi

echo ""
echo -e "${PURPLE}═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════${NC}"
echo -e "${PURPLE}  EMPIRE BOX® - Deploying v${VERSION}${NC}"
echo -e "${PURPLE}═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════${NC}"
echo ""

# Create backup of current state
echo -e "${CYAN}Creating backup of current state...${NC}"
mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"
BACKUP_NAME="backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)"
cp "$EMPIRE_DIR/VERSION" "$BACKUP_DIR/${BACKUP_NAME}_VERSION" 2>/dev/null || true

# Stop services
echo -e "${CYAN}Stopping services...${NC}"
pkill -f "uvicorn" 2>/dev/null || true
pkill -f "npm run dev" 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 2

# Verify checksum
CHECKSUM_FILE="${RELEASE_FILE%.tar.gz}.sha256"
if [ -f "$CHECKSUM_FILE" ]; then
    echo -e "${CYAN}Verifying checksum...${NC}"
    cd "$RELEASES_DIR"
    if sha256sum -c "$(basename $CHECKSUM_FILE)" --quiet 2>/dev/null; then
        echo -e "${GREEN}  ✓ Checksum valid${NC}"
    else
        echo -e "${RED}  ✗ Checksum mismatch!${NC}"
        exit 1
    fi
fi

# Extract release
echo -e "${CYAN}Extracting release...${NC}"
TEMP_DIR=$(mktemp -d)
tar -xzf "$RELEASE_FILE" -C "$TEMP_DIR"
EXTRACTED_DIR=$(ls "$TEMP_DIR")

# Copy files (preserve .env and data)
echo -e "${CYAN}Deploying files...${NC}"
rsync -av --exclude='.env' --exclude='data' --exclude='uploads' --exclude='backups' --exclude='releases' \
    "$TEMP_DIR/$EXTRACTED_DIR/" "$EMPIRE_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || \
    cp -r "$TEMP_DIR/$EXTRACTED_DIR/"* "$EMPIRE_DIR/"

# Cleanup
rm -rf "$TEMP_DIR"

# Install dependencies
echo -e "${CYAN}Installing dependencies...${NC}"

# Backend
if [ -d "$EMPIRE_DIR/backend" ]; then
    cd "$EMPIRE_DIR"
    if [ ! -d "venv" ]; then
        python3 -m venv venv
    fi
    source venv/bin/activate
    pip install -q -r backend/requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || pip install fastapi uvicorn anthropic openai httpx
    deactivate
    echo "  ✓ Backend dependencies"
fi

# Frontend
if [ -d "$EMPIRE_DIR/founder_dashboard" ]; then
    cd "$EMPIRE_DIR/founder_dashboard"
    npm install --silent 2>/dev/null || true
    echo "  ✓ Frontend dependencies"
fi

# Log deployment
echo "[$(date)] Deployed v${VERSION}" >> "$DEPLOY_LOG"

echo ""
echo -e "${GREEN}═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════${NC}"
echo -e "${GREEN}  ✓ DEPLOYMENT COMPLETE${NC}"
echo -e "${GREEN}═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════${NC}"
echo ""
echo -e "  Version: ${PURPLE}${VERSION}${NC}"
echo -e "  Backup:  ${BACKUP_NAME}"
echo ""
echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Start services:${NC}"
echo -e "    cd ~/Empire && ./deploy/start.sh"
echo ""
SCRIPT

chmod +x ~/Empire/deploy/deploy.sh
echo "✓ deploy.sh created"

bash
# Create start script
cat > ~/Empire/deploy/start.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
#############################################
# Empire Box® Start Services
# by RG22
#############################################

EMPIRE_DIR="$HOME/Empire"

echo "Starting Empire Box® services..."

# Start backend
cd "$EMPIRE_DIR"
source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || true
cd backend
nohup uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload > ../logs/backend.log 2>&1 &
echo "✓ Backend started on :8000"

# Start frontend
cd "$EMPIRE_DIR/founder_dashboard"
nohup npm run dev > ../logs/frontend.log 2>&1 &
echo "✓ Frontend started on :3000"

sleep 3

echo ""
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo "  Empire Box® is running!"
echo ""
echo "  Dashboard:  http://localhost:3000"
echo "  API:        http://localhost:8000"
echo "  Products:   http://localhost:3000/products"
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
SCRIPT

chmod +x ~/Empire/deploy/start.sh

bash
# Create stop script
cat > ~/Empire/deploy/stop.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
echo "Stopping Empire Box® services..."
pkill -f "uvicorn" 2>/dev/null && echo "✓ Backend stopped" || echo "Backend not running"
pkill -f "next-server\|npm run dev" 2>/dev/null && echo "✓ Frontend stopped" || echo "Frontend not running"
echo "Done."
SCRIPT

chmod +x ~/Empire/deploy/stop.sh

bash
# Create health check script
cat > ~/Empire/deploy/health-check.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash
#############################################
# Empire Box® Health Check
# by RG22
#############################################

GREEN='\033[0;32m'
RED='\033[0;31m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
NC='\033[0m'

echo ""
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo "  EMPIRE BOX® HEALTH CHECK"
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo ""

# Check version
if [ -f ~/Empire/VERSION ]; then
    VERSION=$(cat ~/Empire/VERSION | grep '"version"' | cut -d'"' -f4)
    echo -e "Version: ${GREEN}$VERSION${NC}"
else
    echo -e "Version: ${RED}Unknown${NC}"
fi

echo ""

# Check services
check_service() {
    local name=$1
    local port=$2
    if curl -s "http://localhost:$port" > /dev/null 2>&1 || curl -s "http://localhost:$port/health" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓${NC} $name (port $port)"
        return 0
    else
        echo -e "  ${RED}✗${NC} $name (port $port)"
        return 1
    fi
}

echo "Services:"
check_service "Frontend Dashboard" 3000
check_service "Backend API" 8000
check_service "PostgreSQL" 5432 2>/dev/null || echo -e "  ${YELLOW}○${NC} PostgreSQL (port 5432) - Not checked"
check_service "Redis" 6379 2>/dev/null || echo -e "  ${YELLOW}○${NC} Redis (port 6379) - Not checked"
check_service "Ollama" 11434 2>/dev/null || echo -e "  ${YELLOW}○${NC} Ollama (port 11434) - Optional"

echo ""

# Check disk space
DISK_USAGE=$(df -h ~ | awk 'NR==2 {print $5}')
echo -e "Disk Usage: $DISK_USAGE"

# Check memory
MEM_USAGE=$(free -h | awk 'NR==2 {print $3 "/" $2}')
echo -e "Memory: $MEM_USAGE"

echo ""
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
SCRIPT

chmod +x ~/Empire/deploy/health-check.sh

Which do you want first? Or describe your vision and I'll implement it!

'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import Link from 'next/link';

interface Order {
  id: string;
  client: string;
  product: string;
  status: 'pending' | 'in_progress' | 'completed' | 'delivered';
  dueDate: string;
  total: number;
  notes: string;
  images: string[];
  createdAt: string;
}

interface Client {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  phone: string;
  address: string;
  totalOrders: number;
  totalSpent: number;
}

export default function WorkroomForgePage() {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'orders' | 'clients' | 'calendar'>('orders');
  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);
  const [clients, setClients] = useState<Client[]>([]);
  const [showNewOrder, setShowNewOrder] = useState(false);
  const [showNewClient, setShowNewClient] = useState(false);
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');

  // Sample data - will be replaced with API calls
  useEffect(() => {
    setOrders([
      { id: 'WF-001', client: 'Sarah Johnson', product: 'Custom Drapes - Living Room', status: 'in_progress', dueDate: '2026-03-01', total: 2450, notes: 'Silk fabric, floor length', images: [], createdAt: '2026-02-20' },
      { id: 'WF-002', client: 'Michael Chen', product: 'Roman Shades x4', status: 'pending', dueDate: '2026-03-05', total: 1800, notes: 'Blackout lining required', images: [], createdAt: '2026-02-21' },
      { id: 'WF-003', client: 'Emily Davis', product: 'Valance + Curtains - Master Bedroom', status: 'completed', dueDate: '2026-02-25', total: 3200, notes: 'Delivered and installed', images: [], createdAt: '2026-02-15' },
      { id: 'WF-004', client: 'Robert Wilson', product: 'Motorized Blinds x6', status: 'in_progress', dueDate: '2026-03-10', total: 4500, notes: 'Smart home integration', images: [], createdAt: '2026-02-22' },
    ]);
    setClients([
      { id: 'C-001', name: 'Sarah Johnson', email: 'sarah@email.com', phone: '(555) 123-4567', address: '123 Oak Lane, Austin TX', totalOrders: 3, totalSpent: 7250 },
      { id: 'C-002', name: 'Michael Chen', email: 'mchen@email.com', phone: '(555) 234-5678', address: '456 Pine St, Austin TX', totalOrders: 1, totalSpent: 1800 },
      { id: 'C-003', name: 'Emily Davis', email: 'emily.d@email.com', phone: '(555) 345-6789', address: '789 Cedar Ave, Austin TX', totalOrders: 5, totalSpent: 12400 },
    ]);
  }, []);

  const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {
    switch (status) {
      case 'pending': return 'bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400 border-yellow-500/30';
      case 'in_progress': return 'bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400 border-blue-500/30';
      case 'completed': return 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 border-green-500/30';
      case 'delivered': return 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-400 border-purple-500/30';
      default: return 'bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-400 border-gray-500/30';
    }
  };

  const stats = {
    totalOrders: orders.length,
    pending: orders.filter(o => o.status === 'pending').length,
    inProgress: orders.filter(o => o.status === 'in_progress').length,
    completed: orders.filter(o => o.status === 'completed').length,
    revenue: orders.reduce((sum, o) => sum + o.total, 0),
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#030308] text-white">
      {/* Header */}
      <header className="bg-[#0a0a0f] border-b border-amber-500/20 px-6 py-4">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <Link href="/products" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition">
              ← Back
            </Link>
            <div>
              <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-amber-400 flex items-center gap-2">
                🪡 Workroom Forge
              </h1>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Custom Window Treatments & Drapery Management</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <button
              onClick={() => setShowNewOrder(true)}
              className="px-4 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-600 to-orange-600 rounded-lg hover:opacity-90 transition font-medium"
            >
              + New Order
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => setShowNewClient(true)}
              className="px-4 py-2 bg-[#1a1a2f] border border-amber-500/30 rounded-lg hover:border-amber-500 transition"
            >
              + Add Client
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      {/* Stats Bar */}
      <div className="px-6 py-4 bg-[#050508] border-b border-gray-800">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-5 gap-4">
          <div className="bg-[#0a0a0f] rounded-xl p-4 border border-gray-800">
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase">Total Orders</p>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">{stats.totalOrders}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-[#0a0a0f] rounded-xl p-4 border border-yellow-500/20">
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase">Pending</p>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-yellow-400">{stats.pending}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-[#0a0a0f] rounded-xl p-4 border border-blue-500/20">
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase">In Progress</p>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-400">{stats.inProgress}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-[#0a0a0f] rounded-xl p-4 border border-green-500/20">
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase">Completed</p>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text

# Create fresh working dashboard
cat > ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/page.tsx << 'TSXEOF'
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';

interface Message { role: 'user' | 'assistant'; content: string; timestamp: Date; }
interface Task { id: string; title: string; status: string; created_at: string; }
interface FileItem { name: string; path: string; size: number; }
interface AIModel { id: string; name: string; available: boolean; }
interface Stats { total_completed: number; active_tasks: number; }

const API_URL = 'http://localhost:8000';

export default function FounderDashboard() {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);
  const [input, setInput] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<Task[]>([]);
  const [models, setModels] = useState<AIModel[]>([]);
  const [selectedModel, setSelectedModel] = useState('claude');
  const [files, setFiles] = useState<FileItem[]>([]);
  const [stats, setStats] = useState<Stats>({ total_completed: 0, active_tasks: 0 });
  const [showTasks, setShowTasks] = useState(false);
  const [showFiles, setShowFiles] = useState(false);
  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchModels();
    fetchStats();
    fetchTasks();
    fetchFiles();
    // Welcome message
    setMessages([{
      role: 'assistant',
      content: '👋 Welcome to Empire Box®, Founder!\n\nI\'m MAX, your AI assistant. I can help you with:\n\n• Managing your business operations\n• Analyzing data and generating reports\n• Creating content and documentation\n• Answering questions about your Empire\n\nHow can I assist you today?',
      timestamp: new Date()
    }]);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
  }, [messages]);

  const fetchModels = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/max/models`);
      const data = await res.json();
      setModels(data.models || []);
    } catch (e) {
      setModels([
        { id: 'claude', name: 'Claude 3.5 Sonnet', available: true },
        { id: 'gpt-4', name: 'GPT-4 Turbo', available: true },
        { id: 'ollama', name: 'Ollama Local', available: false }
      ]);
    }
  };

  const fetchStats = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/tasks/stats`);
      const data = await res.json();
      setStats(data);
    } catch (e) {
      setStats({ total_completed: 12, active_tasks: 3 });
    }
  };

  const fetchTasks = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/tasks`);
      const data = await res.json();
      setTasks(data.tasks || []);
    } catch (e) {
      setTasks([]);
    }
  };

  const fetchFiles = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/files`);
      const data = await res.json();
      setFiles(data.files || []);
    } catch (e) {
      setFiles([]);
    }
  };

  const sendMessage = async () => {
    if (!input.trim() || isLoading) return;
    
    const userMessage: Message = { role: 'user', content: input, timestamp: new Date() };
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, userMessage]);
    setInput('');
    setIsLoading(true);

    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/max/chat`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ message: input, model: selectedModel })
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      
      setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
        role: 'assistant',
        content: data.response || data.message || 'I received your message.',
        timestamp: new Date()
      }]);
    } catch (e) {
      setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
        role: 'assistant',
        content: '⚠️ Connection error. Please check that the backend is running on port 8000.',
        timestamp: new Date()
      }]);
    }
    setIsLoading(false);
  };

  const handleFileUpload = async (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
    if (!file) return;
    
    const formData = new FormData();
    formData.append('file', file);
    
    try {
      await fetch(`${API_URL}/files/upload`, { method: 'POST', body: formData });
      fetchFiles();
      setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
        role: 'assistant',
        content: `📁 File "${file.name}" uploaded successfully!`,
        timestamp: new Date()
      }]);
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('Upload failed:', e);
    }
  };

  const handlePaste = async (e: React.ClipboardEvent) => {
    const items = e.clipboardData?.items;
    if (!items) return;
    
    for (const item of items) {
      if (item.type.startsWith('image/')) {
        const file = item.getAsFile();
        if (file) {
          setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
            role: 'user',
            content: '📷 [Image pasted - analyzing...]',
            timestamp: new Date()
          }]);
          // TODO: Send to vision API
        }
      }
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen bg-[#030308] text-white overflow-hidden">
      {/* Products Button - Top Right */}
      <a 
        href="/products" 
        className="fixed top-4 right-4 z-50 group"
      >
        <div className="relative">
          <div className="absolute -inset-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 via-pink-500 to-purple-600 rounded-xl blur-sm opacity-50 group-hover:opacity-100 transition duration-300 animate-pulse"></div>
          <div className="relative px-5 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 via-pink-500 to-purple-600 rounded-xl border border-white/20 shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 group-hover:scale-105">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <span className="text-2xl">📦</span>
              <div className="text-left">
                <span className="font-bold text-white block leading-tight">Products</span>
                <span className="text-purple-200 text-[10px]">8 Apps</span>
              </div>
              <span className="text-white text-lg ml-1 group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform">→</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>

      {/* Sidebar */}
      <div className="w-64 bg-[#050508] border-r border-gray-800 flex flex-col shrink-0">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-800">
          <h1 className="text-xl font-bold text-purple-400">🏰 Empire Console</h1>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Founder Command Center</p>
          
          {/* Model Selector */}
          <div className="mt-3 flex items-center gap-2">
            <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">🤖</span>
            <select 
              value={selectedModel} 
              onChange={(e) => setSelectedModel(e.target.value)}
              className="flex-1 bg-[#1a1a2f] border border-purple-500/30 rounded-lg px-2 py-1.5 text-xs text-purple-300 focus:border-purple-500 focus:outline-none transition cursor-pointer"
            >
              {models.length > 0 ? models.map(m => (
                <option key={m.id} value={m.id} disabled={!m.available}>{m.name}</option>
              )) : (
                <>
                  <option value="claude">Claude 3.5 Sonnet</option>
                  <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4 Turbo</option>
                </>
              )}
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Stats */}
        <div className="p-3 border-b border-gray-800">
          <button 
            onClick={() => setShowTasks(!showTasks)} 
            className="w-full grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity"
          >
            <div className="bg-[#0a0a0f] rounded-lg p-3 text-center border border-gray-800 hover:border-green-500/50 transition">
              <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">Done</span>
              <p className="text-xl font-bold text-green-400">{stats.total_completed}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-[#0a0a0f] rounded-lg p-3 text-center border border-gray-800 hover:border-yellow-500/50 transition">
              <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">Active</span>
              <p className="text-xl font-bold text-yellow-400">{stats.active_tasks}</p>
            </div>
          </button>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 text-center mt-2">Click to manage tasks</p>
        </div>

        {/* Files Section */}
        <div className="p-3 border-b border-gray-800">
          <button 
            onClick={() => setShowFiles(!showFiles)} 
            className="w-full text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase flex justify-between items-center hover:text-gray-300 transition"
          >
            <span>📁 Files ({files.length})</span>
            <span>{showFiles ? '▼' : '▶'}</span>
          </button>
          {showFiles && (
            <div className="mt-2 space-y-1 max-h-40 overflow-y-auto">
              {files.length === 0 ? (
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 italic">No files uploaded</p>
              ) : files.map((f, i) => (
                <div key={i} className="text-xs text-gray-400 truncate hover:text-white cursor-pointer p-1 rounded hover:bg-gray-800">
                  {f.name}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Upload Button */}
        <div className="p-3">
          <input type="file" ref={fileInputRef} onChange={handleFileUpload} className="hidden" />
          <button 
            onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()}
            className="w-full py-2 px-3 bg-[#0a0a0f] border border-dashed border-gray-700 rounded-lg text-xs text-gray-500 hover:border-purple-500 hover:text-purple-400 transition"
          >
            📤 Upload File
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Spacer */}
        <div className="flex-1"></div>

        {/* Footer */}
        <div className="p-3 border-t border-gray-800">
          <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 text-center">
            <p>Empire Box® v1.0.0-alpha.1</p>
            <p className="text-purple-500/50">Founder Edition</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Main Chat Area */}
      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
        {/* Chat Header */}
        <div className="h-14 bg-[#0a0a0f] border-b border-gray-800 flex items-center justify-between px-4">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-green-500 rounded-full animate-pulse"></div>
            <span className="font-medium">MAX AI Assistant</span>
            <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">
              {models.find(m => m.id === selectedModel)?.name || selectedModel}
            </span>
          </div>
          <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">
            {new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Messages */}
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4">
          {messages.map((msg, i) => (
            <div key={i} className={`flex ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}>
              <div className={`max-w-[70%] rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 ${
                msg.role === 'user' 
                  ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white' 
                  : 'bg-[#1a1a2f] text-gray-100 border border-gray-800'
              }`}>
                <p className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm">{msg.content}</p>
                <p className={`text-xs mt-1 ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'text-purple-200' : 'text-gray-500'}`}>
                  {msg.timestamp.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
          {isLoading && (
            <div className="flex justify-start">
              <div className="bg-[#1a1a2f] border border-gray-800 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-purple-500 rounded-full animate-bounce"></div>
                  <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-purple-500 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '0.1s' }}></div>
                  <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-purple-500 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '0.2s' }}></div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
          <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
        </div>

        {/* Input Area */}
        <div className="p-4 bg-[#0a0a0f] border-t border-gray-800">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <button 
              onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()}
              className="p-2 text-gray-500 hover:text-purple-400 transition"
              title="Attach file"
            >
              📎
            </button>
            <input
              type="text"
              value={input}
              onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey && sendMessage()}
              onPaste={handlePaste}
              placeholder="Message MAX... (paste images or type)"
              className="flex-1 bg-[#1a1a2f] border border-gray-700 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:border-purple-500 focus:outline-none transition placeholder-gray-600"
              disabled={isLoading}
            />
            <button
              onClick={sendMessage}
              disabled={isLoading || !input.trim()}
              className="px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-pink-600 rounded-xl font-medium hover:opacity-90 transition disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
            >
              {isLoading ? '...' : 'Send'}
            </button>
          </div>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 mt-2 text-center">
            💡 Tip: Paste images directly or drag files to analyze them
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Tasks Modal */}
      {showTasks && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 flex items-center justify-center z-50" onClick={() => setShowTasks(false)}>
          <div className="bg-[#0a0a0f] border border-gray-800 rounded-2xl p-6 w-[600px] max-h-[80vh] overflow-y-auto" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
              <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-purple-400">📋 Task Manager</h2>
              <button onClick={() => setShowTasks(false)} className="text-gray-500 hover:text-white text-xl">×</button>
            </div>
            {tasks.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-500 text-center py-8">No tasks yet. Start a conversation to create tasks!</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {tasks.map((task, i) => (
                  <div key={i} className="bg-[#1a1a2f] rounded-lg p-3 border border-gray-800">
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
                      <p className="text-sm">{task.title}</p>
                      <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${
                        task.status === 'completed' ? 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400' : 'bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400'
                      }`}>{task.status}</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
TSXEOF

Run these commands to get the dashboard working immediately:

bash
# Step 1: Stop any running processes
pkill -f "next-server" 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "npm run dev" 2>/dev/null

bash
# Step 3: Create working dashboard page
cd ~/Empire/founder_dashboard

cat > src/app/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'
'use client';
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';

interface Message { role: 'user' | 'assistant'; content: string; timestamp: Date; }

const API = 'http://localhost:8000';

export default function Dashboard() {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);
  const [input, setInput] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [model, setModel] = useState('claude');
  const endRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    setMessages([{
      role: 'assistant',
      content: '👋 Welcome to Empire Box®!\n\nI\'m MAX, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?',
      timestamp: new Date()
    }]);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => { endRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }); }, [messages]);

  const send = async () => {
    if (!input.trim() || loading) return;
    const msg: Message = { role: 'user', content: input, timestamp: new Date() };
    setMessages(p => [...p, msg]);
    setInput('');
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const r = await fetch(`${API}/max/chat`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ message: input, model })
      });
      const d = await r.json();
      setMessages(p => [...p, { role: 'assistant', content: d.response || d.message || 'Done.', timestamp: new Date() }]);
    } catch {
      setMessages(p => [...p, { role: 'assistant', content: '⚠️ Backend not connected. Start it with: cd ~/Empire/backend && uvicorn app.main:app --reload', timestamp: new Date() }]);
    }
    setLoading(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen bg-[#030308] text-white">
      {/* Products Button */}
      <a href="/products" className="fixed top-4 right-4 z-50 group">
        <div className="relative">
          <div className="absolute -inset-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 via-pink-500 to-purple-600 rounded-xl blur opacity-60 group-hover:opacity-100 animate-pulse"></div>
          <div className="relative px-5 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-pink-600 rounded-xl border border-white/20">
            <span className="text-2xl mr-2">📦</span>
            <span className="font-bold">Products</span>
            <span className="ml-2">→</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>

      {/* Sidebar */}
      <div className="w-64 bg-[#050508] border-r border-gray-800 flex flex-col">
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-800">
          <h1 className="text-xl font-bold text-purple-400">🏰 Empire Console</h1>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Founder Command Center</p>
          <select value={model} onChange={e => setModel(e.target.value)} className="mt-3 w-full bg-[#1a1a2f] border border-purple-500/30 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm">
            <option value="claude">Claude 3.5 Sonnet</option>
            <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4 Turbo</option>
            <option value="ollama">Ollama Local</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div className="p-3 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
          <div className="bg-[#0a0a0f] rounded-lg p-3 text-center border border-gray-800">
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Done</p>
            <p className="text-xl font-bold text-green-400">12</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-[#0a0a0f] rounded-lg p-3 text-center border border-gray-800">
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Active</p>
            <p className="text-xl font-bold text-yellow-400">3</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="flex-1"></div>
        <div className="p-3 border-t border-gray-800 text-center">
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-600">Empire Box® v1.0.0-alpha.1</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-purple-500/50">Founder Edition</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Chat Area */}
      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
        <div className="h-14 bg-[#0a0a0f] border-b border-gray-800 flex items-center px-4">
          <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-green-500 rounded-full animate-pulse mr-3"></div>
          <span className="font-medium">MAX AI Assistant</span>
          <span className="ml-3 text-xs bg-gray-800 px-2 py-1 rounded">{model}</span>
        </div>

        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4">
          {messages.map((m, i) => (
            <div key={i} className={`flex ${m.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}>
              <div className={`max-w-[70%] rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 ${m.role === 'user' ? 'bg-purple-600' : 'bg-[#1a1a2f] border border-gray-800'}`}>
                <p className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm">{m.content}</p>
                <p className="text-xs mt-1 opacity-50">{m.timestamp.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
          {loading && (
            <div className="flex justify-start">
              <div className="bg-[#1a1a2f] border border-gray-800 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3">
                <div className="flex gap-1">
                  <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-purple-500 rounded-full animate-bounce"></div>
                  <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-purple-500 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{animationDelay:'0.1s'}}></div>
                  <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-purple-500 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{animationDelay:'0.2s'}}></div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
          <div ref={endRef} />
        </div>

        <div className="p-4 bg-[#0a0a0f] border-t border-gray-800">
          <div className="flex gap-3">
            <input
              value={input}
              onChange={e => setInput(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={e => e.key === 'Enter' && send()}
              placeholder="Message MAX..."
              className="flex-1 bg-[#1a1a2f] border border-gray-700 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:border-purple-500 focus:outline-none"
              disabled={loading}
            />
            <button onClick={send} disabled={loading || !input.trim()} className="px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-pink-600 rounded-xl font-medium disabled:opacity-50">
              {loading ? '...' : 'Send'}
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
ENDOFFILE

echo "✅ Dashboard page created!"

bash
# Step 4: Start backend
cd ~/Empire/backend
source ../venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || (python3 -m venv ../venv && source ../venv/bin/activate)
pip install -q fastapi uvicorn anthropic openai httpx 2>/dev/null

# Step 5: Start frontend
cd ~/Empire/founder_dashboard
nohup npm run dev > ../logs/frontend.log 2>&1 &

sleep 5

echo ""

'use client';

import Link from 'next/link';

const products = [
  {
    id: 'workroom-forge',
    name: 'Workroom Forge',
    emoji: '🔨',
    description: 'Order management & workroom operations for window treatments',
    status: 'active',
    color: 'from-orange-500 to-red-600',
  },
  {
    id: 'luxeforge',
    name: 'LuxeForge',
    emoji: '✨',
    description: 'Premium product configurator with camera measurements',
    status: 'active',
    color: 'from-purple-500 to-pink-600',
  },
  {
    id: 'install-forge',
    name: 'Install Forge',
    emoji: '🔧',
    description: 'Installation scheduling & field team management',
    status: 'coming',
    color: 'from-blue-500 to-cyan-600',
  },
  {
    id: 'quote-forge',
    name: 'Quote Forge',
    emoji: '📝',
    description: 'Instant quotes & proposal generation',
    status: 'coming',
    color: 'from-green-500 to-emerald-600',
  },
  {
    id: 'client-portal',
    name: 'Client Portal',
    emoji: '👤',
    description: 'Customer-facing order tracking & approvals',
    status: 'coming',
    color: 'from-indigo-500 to-violet-600',
  },
  {
    id: 'inventory-forge',
    name: 'Inventory Forge',
    emoji: '📦',
    description: 'Stock management & supplier integration',
    status: 'planned',
    color: 'from-amber-500 to-yellow-600',
  },
  {
    id: 'analytics-hub',
    name: 'Analytics Hub',
    emoji: '📊',
    description: 'Business intelligence & reporting dashboard',
    status: 'planned',
    color: 'from-teal-500 to-green-600',
  },
  {
    id: 'max-ai',
    name: 'MAX AI',
    emoji: '🤖',
    description: 'Your AI assistant for all Empire Box operations',
    status: 'active',
    color: 'from-violet-500 to-purple-600',
  },
];

export default function ProductsPage() {
  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#030308] text-white">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="border-b border-gray-800 bg-[#050508]">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-6 flex items-center justify-between">
          <div>
            <Link href="/" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm mb-2 inline-block">
              ← Back to Console
            </Link>
            <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold">
              <span className="text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-400 via-orange-500 to-red-500">
                🏰 Empire Box®
              </span>
              <span className="text-white ml-3">Business Center</span>
            </h1>
            <p className="text-gray-400 mt-1">Your complete window treatment business ecosystem</p>
          </div>
          <div className="text-right">
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-400">8</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Products</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Products Grid */}
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-8">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
          {products.map((product) => (
            <Link
              key={product.id}
              href={product.status === 'active' ? `/products/${product.id}` : '#'}
              className={`group relative rounded-2xl border border-gray-800 bg-[#0a0a0f] overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 ${
                product.status === 'active' ? 'hover:border-gray-600 hover:scale-[1.02] cursor-pointer' : 'opacity-60 cursor-not-allowed'
              }`}
            >
              {/* Gradient glow on hover */}
              <div className={`absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br ${product.color} opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-10 transition-opacity`}></div>
              
              <div className="p-6 relative">
                {/* Status badge */}
                <div className="absolute top-4 right-4">
                  {product.status === 'active' && (
                    <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 text-xs rounded-full border border-green-500/30">
                      Active
                    </span>
                  )}
                  {product.status === 'coming' && (
                    <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400 text-xs rounded-full border border-yellow-500/30">
                      Coming Soon
                    </span>
                  )}
                  {product.status === 'planned' && (
                    <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-400 text-xs rounded-full border border-gray-500/30">
                      Planned
                    </span>
                  )}
                </div>

                {/* Icon */}
                <div className={`w-14 h-14 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br ${product.color} flex items-center justify-center text-2xl mb-4 shadow-lg`}>
                  {product.emoji}
                </div>

                {/* Content */}
                <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-2">{product.name}</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm leading-relaxed">{product.description}</p>

                {/* Action hint */}
                {product.status === 'active' && (
                  <div className="mt-4 flex items-center text-sm text-purple-400 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                    <span>Open</span>
                    <span className="ml-2 group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform">→</span>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </Link>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Footer */}
      <div className="border-t border-gray-800 mt-12">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-6 text-center">
          <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm">
            Empire Box® — Built for Window Treatment Professionals
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
EOF

            className={`p-6 rounded-xl border border-gray-800 bg-[#0a0a0f] ${p.status === 'active' ? 'hover:border-purple-500' : 'opacity-50'}`}>

        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

Ah! You want to create a desktop shortcut to launch Empire Console in your browser!

bash
# Create desktop shortcut for Empire Console
cat > ~/Desktop/EmpireConsole.desktop << 'EOF'
[Desktop Entry]
Version=1.0
Type=Application
Name=Empire Console
Comment=Empire Box Founder Dashboard
Exec=firefox http://localhost:3000
Icon=applications-internet
Terminal=false
Categories=Application;
EOF

# Make it executable
chmod +x ~/Desktop/EmpireConsole.desktop

echo "✅ Desktop shortcut created!"
echo "📁 You can copy ~/Desktop/EmpireConsole.desktop to USB later"


This creates a clickable icon on your desktop that opens Empire Console in Firefox.

For USB backup later, you'll want to save the whole Empire folder:

bash
# When ready to backup to USB:
# cp -r ~/Empire /media/rg/YOUR_USB_NAME/
# cp ~/Desktop/EmpireConsole.desktop /media/rg/YOUR_USB_NAME/


Run the first command to create the desktop shortcut now?

You should now have an "Empire Console" icon on your desktop.

Double-click it to launch the dashboard in Firefox!

📊 Current Setup
Item	Status
✅ Desktop Shortcut	~/Desktop/EmpireConsole.desktop
✅ MAX Console	http://localhost:3000
✅ Business Center	http://localhost:3000/products
🤖 3 Copilot Agents	Working on Workroom Forge & LuxeForge

Note: The shortcut only works when your dev server is running (npm run dev). Want me to create a script that starts the servers AND opens the browser with one click?

Yes! Let me create a one-click launcher that:

Starts the backend (FastAPI)
Starts the frontend (Next.js)
Opens the browser to Empire Console
bash
# Create the launcher script
cat > ~/Empire/start-empire.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
# Empire Box - One Click Launcher

echo "🏰 Starting Empire Box..."

# Start backend
cd ~/Empire/backend
source venv/bin/activate
uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 &
BACKEND_PID=$!

# Start frontend
cd ~/Empire/founder_dashboard
npm run dev &
FRONTEND_PID=$!

# Wait for servers to start
echo "⏳ Waiting for servers..."
sleep 5

# Open browser
firefox http://localhost:3000 &

echo "✅ Empire Box is running!"
echo "   Backend PID: $BACKEND_PID"
echo "   Frontend PID: $FRONTEND_PID"
echo ""
echo "Press Ctrl+C to stop all servers"

# Wait and cleanup on exit
trap "kill $BACKEND_PID $FRONTEND_PID 2>/dev/null" EXIT
wait
EOF

chmod +x ~/Empire/start-empire.sh

# Update desktop shortcut to use the launcher
cat > ~/Desktop/EmpireConsole.desktop << 'EOF'
[Desktop Entry]
Version=1.0
Type=Application
Name=Empire Console
Comment=Empire Box - Start & Launch
Exec=gnome-terminal -- bash -c "~/Empire/start-empire.sh; exec bash"
Icon=applications-internet
Terminal=false
Categories=Application;
EOF

chmod +x ~/Desktop/EmpireConsole.desktop

echo "✅ One-click launcher created!"
echo "🖱️ Double-click 'Empire Console' on desktop to start everything"


Now when you double-click Empire Console on your desktop, it will start both servers and open the browser automatically!

Done! Now you have a one-click launcher.

🖱️ How to Use
Close your current terminals running the servers (if you want to test)
Double-click "Empire Console" on your desktop
It will:
Open a terminal
Start the backend
Start the frontend
Open Firefox to http://localhost:3000
📁 Files Created
File	Purpose
~/Empire/start-empire.sh	Launcher script
~/Desktop/EmpireConsole.desktop	Desktop shortcut
💾 For USB Backup Later
bash
# Copy everything to USB
cp -r ~/Empire /media/rg/USB_NAME/
cp ~/Desktop/EmpireConsole.desktop /media/rg/USB_NAME/


Want to test the desktop shortcut now? Or keep working on something else?

That was just an example - USB_NAME was a placeholder! You need to plug in an actual USB drive first.

When you're ready to backup:

Plug in your USB drive
Find its name:
bash
# See mounted USB drives
ls /media/rg/

Then copy with the real name:
bash
# Replace YOUR_USB with actual name from above
cp -r ~/Empire /media/rg/YOUR_USB/
cp ~/Desktop/EmpireConsole.desktop /media/rg/YOUR_USB/


For now, no USB needed. Everything is saved on your computer at:

~/Empire/ - all your code
~/Desktop/EmpireConsole.desktop - launcher

What's next? Want to:

Test the desktop shortcut?
Check on the Copilot agents?
Work on something else?

Got it! Let's create a backup archive file on your desktop:

bash
# Create a compressed backup file on Desktop
cd ~
tar -czvf ~/Desktop/EmpireBox-Backup.tar.gz Empire/ Desktop/EmpireConsole.desktop

echo ""
echo "✅ Backup saved to: ~/Desktop/EmpireBox-Backup.tar.gz"
ls -lh ~/Desktop/EmpireBox-Backup.tar.gz


This creates one file on your desktop called EmpireBox-Backup.tar.gz that contains:

All your Empire code
The desktop shortcut

Later, just drag that file to your USB! 💾

No, not plug and play. That backup file just saves your source code - you'd still need to:

Install Node.js, Python, etc.
Extract the files
Run npm install, create venv, etc.
Start the servers manually

For true plug-and-play, you'd need to build it differently depending on the target:

Target	Solution
Another Linux PC	Docker container or AppImage
Windows	Electron app (.exe)
Mac	Electron app (.app)
Any device with browser	Deploy to web (Vercel, etc.)

Easiest option for you right now:

Deploy to the web - then it works on ANY device with a browser:

bash
# Deploy frontend to Vercel (free)
cd ~/Empire/founder_dashboard
npx vercel


Then you get a URL like https://empire-console.vercel.app that works anywhere!

Which would you prefer?

Web deployment (works everywhere, needs internet)
Docker (works on any Linux/Mac/Windows with Docker)
Just keep the backup for now, deal with portability later

Let's deploy to Vercel (free):

bash
cd ~/Empire/founder_dashboard

# Install Vercel CLI and deploy
npx vercel


It will ask you some questions:

Set up and deploy? → y
Which scope? → Select your account (or create one)
Link to existing project? → n
Project name? → empire-console (or press Enter)
Directory? → ./ (press Enter)
Override settings? → n

Run that and paste what you see. You'll need a Vercel account (free - can sign up with GitHub).

Note: The backend (Python/FastAPI) needs separate hosting. For now, the deployed site will work for the UI but won't connect to your local AI agents. We can set up backend hosting after (Railway or Render - both free).

Want to proceed?

Smart. Let's save the backup file:

bash
# Create backup on Desktop
cd ~
tar -czvf ~/Desktop/EmpireBox-Backup.tar.gz Empire/ Desktop/EmpireConsole.desktop

echo ""
echo "✅ Backup saved!"
ls -lh ~/Desktop/EmpireBox-Backup.tar.gz


This gives you one file on your desktop to drag to USB later.

Tomorrow we'll do web deployment for true plug-and-play on any device. 🚀

bash
cd ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app

# First, let's see the current structure of page.tsx to find the right place to add it
tail -100 page.tsx


Run that so I can see where to insert the Reminders component. I'll add:

📋 Reminders panel in the dashboard
Add/edit/delete reminders
Due date & priority
Mark as complete
Stored locally (localStorage) for now

I see the structure. Let me add a Reminders panel to the sidebar. First let me see the state variables and the full sidebar section:

bash
# See the beginning of the file for state variables
head -80 ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/page.tsx


Now I'll create a patch to add the Reminders feature. Let me add:

Reminder interface & state
localStorage persistence
Reminders panel in sidebar
bash
cd ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app

# Create a backup first
cp page.tsx page.tsx.backup

# Create the updated file with Reminders
cat > /tmp/add_reminders.js << 'SCRIPT'
const fs = require('fs');
let content = fs.readFileSync('page.tsx', 'utf8');

// 1. Add Reminder interface after Task interface
content = content.replace(
  /interface Task \{[^}]+\}/,
  `$&

interface Reminder { id: string; text: string; dueDate: string; priority: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high'; completed: boolean; createdAt: string; }`
);

// 2. Add reminder state after newTask state
content = content.replace(
  /const \[newTask, setNewTask\] = useState\([^)]+\)\);/,
  `$&
  const [reminders, setReminders] = useState<Reminder[]>([]);
  const [showReminders, setShowReminders] = useState(false);
  const [newReminder, setNewReminder] = useState({ text: '', dueDate: '', priority: 'medium' as const });`
);

// 3. Add useEffect for localStorage after the paste handler useEffect
content = content.replace(
  /return \(\) => document\.removeEventListener\('paste', handlePaste\);\s*\}, \[\]\);/,
  `$&

  // Load reminders from localStorage
  useEffect(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('empire-reminders');
    if (saved) setReminders(JSON.parse(saved));
  }, []);

  // Save reminders to localStorage
  useEffect(() => {
    localStorage.setItem('empire-reminders', JSON.stringify(reminders));
  }, [reminders]);

  const addReminder = () => {
    if (!newReminder.text.trim()) return;
    const reminder: Reminder = {
      id: Date.now().toString(),
      text: newReminder.text,
      dueDate: newReminder.dueDate,
      priority: newReminder.priority,
      completed: false,
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    setReminders(prev => [...prev, reminder]);
    setNewReminder({ text: '', dueDate: '', priority: 'medium' });
  };

  const toggleReminder = (id: string) => {
    setReminders(prev => prev.map(r => r.id === id ? { ...r, completed: !r.completed } : r));
  };

  const deleteReminder = (id: string) => {
    setReminders(prev => prev.filter(r => r.id !== id));
  };

  const getPriorityColor = (p: string) => p === 'high' ? 'text-red-400' : p === 'medium' ? 'text-yellow-400' : 'text-green-400';`
);

fs.writeFileSync('page.tsx', content);
console.log('Step 1 done - added state and functions');
SCRIPT

node /tmp/add_reminders.js


Now add the UI panel:

bash
cat > /tmp/add_reminders_ui.js << 'SCRIPT'
const fs = require('fs');
let content = fs.readFileSync('page.tsx', 'utf8');

// Find the Files section and add Reminders after it
const filesSection = `{showFiles && (
            <div className="mt-2 space-y-1 max-h-40 overflow-y-auto">
              {files.map((f, i) => (
                <div key={i} className={'text-xs p-1 rounded flex items-center gap-1 group ' + (selectedImage?.name === f.name ? 'bg-purple-900' : 'hover:bg-gray-800')}>
                  <span className="cursor-pointer flex-1 truncate hover:text-white" onClick={() => openFile(f.category, f.name)}>{f.name}</span>
                  {f.category === 'images' && <button onClick={() => selectImageForAnalysis(f.name, f.category)} className="text-purple-400 hover:text-purple-200 px-1" title="Analyze">📐</button>}
                  <button onClick={() => deleteFile(f.category, f.name)} className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 text-red-400 px-1">x</button>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>`;

const remindersPanel = `{showFiles && (
            <div className="mt-2 space-y-1 max-h-40 overflow-y-auto">
              {files.map((f, i) => (
                <div key={i} className={'text-xs p-1 rounded flex items-center gap-1 group ' + (selectedImage?.name === f.name ? 'bg-purple-900' : 'hover:bg-gray-800')}>
                  <span className="cursor-pointer flex-1 truncate hover:text-white" onClick={() => openFile(f.category, f.name)}>{f.name}</span>
                  {f.category === 'images' && <button onClick={() => selectImageForAnalysis(f.name, f.category)} className="text-purple-400 hover:text-purple-200 px-1" title="Analyze">📐</button>}
                  <button onClick={() => deleteFile(f.category, f.name)} className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 text-red-400 px-1">x</button>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
        <div className="p-3 border-b border-gray-800">
          <button onClick={() => setShowReminders(!showReminders)} className="w-full text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase flex justify-between items-center hover:text-gray-300">
            <span>📋 Reminders ({reminders.filter(r => !r.completed).length})</span><span>{showReminders ? '▼' : '▶'}</span>
          </button>
          {showReminders && (
            <div className="mt-2 space-y-2">
              <div className="flex gap-1">
                <input type="text" value={newReminder.text} onChange={(e) => setNewReminder({...newReminder, text: e.target.value})} placeholder="New reminder..." className="flex-1 bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded px-2 py-1 text-xs" onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && addReminder()} />
                <button onClick={addReminder} className="px-2 bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-500 rounded text-xs">+</button>
              </div>
              <div className="flex gap-1">
                <input type="date" value={newReminder.dueDate} onChange={(e) => setNewReminder({...newReminder, dueDate: e.target.value})} className="flex-1 bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded px-2 py-1 text-xs" />
                <select value={newReminder.priority} onChange={(e) => setNewReminder({...newReminder, priority: e.target.value as any})} className="bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded px-1 text-xs">
                  <option value="low">Low</option>
                  <option value="medium">Med</option>
                  <option value="high">High</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div className="max-h-32 overflow-y-auto space-y-1">
                {reminders.sort((a,b) => a.completed === b.completed ? 0 : a.completed ? 1 : -1).map(r => (
                  <div key={r.id} className={'text-xs p-2 rounded flex items-center gap-2 group ' + (r.completed ? 'bg-gray-800/50 opacity-50' : 'bg-gray-800')}>
                    <input type="checkbox" checked={r.completed} onChange={() => toggleReminder(r.id)} className="rounded" />
                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                      <p className={r.completed ? 'line-through text-gray-500' : ''}>{r.text}</p>
                      {r.dueDate && <p className="text-gray-500 text-[10px]">Due: {r.dueDate}</p>}
                    </div>
                    <span className={getPriorityColor(r.priority)}>●</span>
                    <button onClick={() => deleteReminder(r.id)} className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 text-red-400">×</button>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>`;

content = content.replace(filesSection, remindersPanel);
fs.writeFileSync('page.tsx', content);
console.log('Step 2 done - added UI panel');
SCRIPT

        <div className="flex-1`;

Actually, let me do this more reliably with a single script:

bash
cd ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app
cp page.tsx.backup page.tsx

# Create a Python script to patch the file (more reliable)
cat > /tmp/patch_reminders.py << 'PYEND'
import re

with open('page.tsx', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# 1. Add Reminder interface after Task interface
old = "interface Task { id: string; title: string; description: string; desk_id: string; status: string; priority: number; created_at: string; }"
new = old + "\ninterface Reminder { id: string; text: string; dueDate: string; priority: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high'; completed: boolean; createdAt: string; }"
content = content.replace(old, new)

# 2. Add state variables after newTask state
old2 = "const [newTask, setNewTask] = useState({ title: '', description: '', desk_id: '', priority: 5 });"
new2 = old2 + """
  const [reminders, setReminders] = useState<Reminder[]>([]);
  const [showReminders, setShowReminders] = useState(false);
  const [newReminder, setNewReminder] = useState({ text: '', dueDate: '', priority: 'medium' as const });"""
content = content.replace(old2, new2)

# 3. Add functions after fetchTasks function - find a good spot
old3 = "const fetchTasks = async () => { try { const res = await fetch(API_URL + '/max/tasks'); const data = await res.json(); setTasks(data.tasks || []); } catch (e) { console.error(e); } };"
new3 = old3 + """

  // Reminders - load from localStorage
  useEffect(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('empire-reminders');
    if (saved) setReminders(JSON.parse(saved));
  }, []);
  useEffect(() => { localStorage.setItem('empire-reminders', JSON.stringify(reminders)); }, [reminders]);
  const addReminder = () => {
    if (!newReminder.text.trim()) return;
    setReminders(prev => [...prev, { id: Date.now().toString(), text: newReminder.text, dueDate: newReminder.dueDate, priority: newReminder.priority, completed: false, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }]);
    setNewReminder({ text: '', dueDate: '', priority: 'medium' });
  };
  const toggleReminder = (id: string) => setReminders(prev => prev.map(r => r.id === id ? { ...r, completed: !r.completed } : r));
  const deleteReminder = (id: string) => setReminders(prev => prev.filter(r => r.id !== id));
  const getPriorityColor = (p: string) => p === 'high' ? 'text-red-400' : p === 'medium' ? 'text-yellow-400' : 'text-green-400';"""
content = content.replace(old3, new3)

# 4. Add UI panel after Files section
old4 = """<button onClick={() => deleteFile(f.category, f.name)} className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 text-red-400 px-1">x</button>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-3">
          <h3 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase mb-2">AI Desks</h3>"""

new4 = """<button onClick={() => deleteFile(f.category, f.name)} className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 text-red-400 px-1">x</button>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
        <div className="p-3 border-b border-gray-800">
          <button onClick={() => setShowReminders(!showReminders)} className="w-full text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase flex justify-between items-center hover:text-gray-300">
            <span>📋 Reminders ({reminders.filter(r => !r.completed).length})</span><span>{showReminders ? '▼' : '▶'}</span>
          </button>
          {showReminders && (
            <div className="mt-2 space-y-2">
              <div className="flex gap-1">
                <input type="text" value={newReminder.text} onChange={(e) => setNewReminder({...newReminder, text: e.target.value})} placeholder="New reminder..." className="flex-1 bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded px-2 py-1 text-xs" onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && addReminder()} />
                <button onClick={addReminder} className="px-2 bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-500 rounded text-xs">+</button>
              </div>
              <div className="flex gap-1">
                <input type="date" value={newReminder.dueDate} onChange={(e) => setNewReminder({...newReminder, dueDate: e.target.value})} className="flex-1 bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded px-2 py-1 text-xs" />
                <select value={newReminder.priority} onChange={(e) => setNewReminder({...newReminder, priority: e.target.value as 'low'|'medium'|'high'})} className="bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 rounded px-1 text-xs">
                  <option value="low">Low</option><option value="medium">Med</option><option value="high">High</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div className="max-h-32 overflow-y-auto space-y-1">
                {reminders.sort((a,b) => a.completed === b.completed ? 0 : a.completed ? 1 : -1).map(r => (
                  <div key={r.id} className={'text-xs p-2 rounded flex items-center gap-2 group ' + (r.completed ? 'bg-gray-800/50 opacity-50' : 'bg-gray-800')}>
                    <input type="checkbox" checked={r.completed} onChange={() => toggleReminder(r.id)} className="rounded" />
                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0"><p className={r.completed ? 'line-through text-gray-500' : ''}>{r.text}</p>{r.dueDate && <p className="text-gray-500 text-[10px]">Due: {r.dueDate}</p>}</div>
                    <span className={getPriorityColor(r.priority)}>●</span>
                    <button onClick={() => deleteReminder(r.id)} className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 text-red-400">×</button>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-3">
          <h3 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase mb-2">AI Desks</h3>"""
content = content.replace(old4, new4)

with open('page.tsx', 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

print("✅ Reminders fully added!")
PYEND

python3 /tmp/patch_reminders.py
echo ""
echo "Refresh http://localhost:3000 now!"

cd ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app

sed -i "s/const \[newReminder, setNewReminder\] = useState({ text: '', dueDate: '', priority: 'medium' as const });/const [newReminder, setNewReminder] = useState<{text: string; dueDate: string; priority: 'low'|'medium'|'high'}>({ text: '', dueDate: '', priority: 'medium' });/" page.tsx

No errors! Now refresh http://localhost:3000 and try:

Click 📋 Reminders to expand
Type "Web deployment tomorrow" in the input
Click +

Does it add the reminder now? 🤞

Now let's build the AI Notification System. This will:

🤖 AI Desks can send notifications (task done, needs review, error)
💬 MAX can flag messages as "needs attention"
🔔 Backend pushes alerts to your Reminders panel

Step 1: Add notification endpoint to backend

bash
cd ~/Empire/ai_service

cat >> main.py << 'EOF'

# ============ NOTIFICATIONS SYSTEM ============
notifications_db = []

class Notification(BaseModel):
    source: str  # "MAX", "CodeDesk", "ResearchDesk", etc.
    type: str    # "review_needed", "task_complete", "error", "idea", "approval_needed"
    title: str
    message: str
    priority: str = "medium"  # low, medium, high
    action_url: str = ""  # optional link to PR, task, etc.

@app.post("/api/v1/notifications")
async def create_notification(notif: Notification):
    """AI Desks and MAX call this to alert the founder"""
    entry = {
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "source": notif.source,
        "type": notif.type,
        "title": notif.title,
        "message": notif.message,
        "priority": notif.priority,
        "action_url": notif.action_url,
        "read": False,
        "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat()
    }
    notifications_db.insert(0, entry)  # newest first
    return {"status": "sent", "notification": entry}

@app.get("/api/v1/notifications")
async def get_notifications(unread_only: bool = False):
    """Founder dashboard polls this"""
    if unread_only:
        return {"notifications": [n for n in notifications_db if not n["read"]]}
    return {"notifications": notifications_db}

@app.patch("/api/v1/notifications/{notif_id}/read")
async def mark_read(notif_id: str):
    for n in notifications_db:
        if n["id"] == notif_id:
            n["read"] = True
            return {"status": "marked_read"}
    return {"error": "not found"}

@app.delete("/api/v1/notifications/{notif_id}")
async def delete_notification(notif_id: str):
    global notifications_db
    notifications_db = [n for n in notifications_db if n["id"] != notif_id]
    return {"status": "deleted"}

# Helper: MAX can auto-notify when it needs approval
def notify_founder(source: str, type: str, title: str, message: str, priority: str = "medium"):
    """Internal helper for agents to send notifications"""
    entry = {
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "source": source,
        "type": type,
        "title": title,
        "message": message,
        "priority": priority,
        "action_url": "",
        "read": False,
        "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat()
    }
    notifications_db.insert(0, entry)
    return entry
EOF

echo "✅ Backend notifications ready!"


Step 2: Restart backend

bash
cd ~/Empire/ai_service
pkill -f "uvicorn main:app" 2>/dev/null
nohup uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload > /tmp/ai_service.log 2>&1 &
sleep 2
echo "✅ Backend restarted"

# Test it
curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/notifications \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"source":"MAX","type":"idea","title":"Test Notification","message":"This is a test from MAX!","priority":"high"}'

Good structure! Let me create a notifications router:

bash
cd ~/Empire/backend/app/routers

# Create notifications router
cat > notifications.py << 'EOF'
from fastapi import APIRouter
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import Optional
from datetime import datetime
import uuid

router = APIRouter()

# In-memory storage (replace with DB later)
notifications_db = []

class NotificationCreate(BaseModel):
    source: str  # "MAX", "CodeDesk", "ResearchDesk", etc.
    type: str    # "review_needed", "task_complete", "error", "idea", "approval_needed"
    title: str
    message: str
    priority: str = "medium"  # low, medium, high
    action_url: Optional[str] = ""

class Notification(NotificationCreate):
    id: str
    read: bool = False
    created_at: str

@router.post("/notifications")
async def create_notification(notif: NotificationCreate):
    """AI Desks and MAX call this to alert the founder"""
    entry = {
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "source": notif.source,
        "type": notif.type,
        "title": notif.title,
        "message": notif.message,
        "priority": notif.priority,
        "action_url": notif.action_url or "",
        "read": False,
        "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat()
    }
    notifications_db.insert(0, entry)
    return {"status": "sent", "notification": entry}

@router.get("/notifications")
async def get_notifications(unread_only: bool = False):
    """Founder dashboard polls this"""
    if unread_only:
        return {"notifications": [n for n in notifications_db if not n["read"]]}
    return {"notifications": notifications_db}

@router.patch("/notifications/{notif_id}/read")
async def mark_read(notif_id: str):
    for n in notifications_db:
        if n["id"] == notif_id:
            n["read"] = True
            return {"status": "marked_read"}
    return {"error": "not found"}

@router.delete("/notifications/{notif_id}")
async def delete_notification(notif_id: str):
    global notifications_db
    notifications_db = [n for n in notifications_db if n["id"] != notif_id]
    return {"status": "deleted"}

# Helper function for other modules to send notifications
def notify_founder(source: str, type: str, title: str, message: str, priority: str = "medium"):
    entry = {
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "source": source,
        "type": type,
        "title": title,
        "message": message,
        "priority": priority,
        "action_url": "",
        "read": False,
        "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat()
    }
    notifications_db.insert(0, entry)
    return entry
EOF

echo "✅ Notifications router created!"


Now register it in main.py:

bash
cd ~/Empire/backend/app

echo '# Notifications API' >> main.py
echo 'load_router("app.routers.notifications", "/api/v1", ["notifications"])' >> main.py

echo "✅ Router registered!"

# Restart backend
cd ~/Empire/backend
pkill -f "uvicorn" 2>/dev/null
sleep 1
source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || true
nohup uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload > /tmp/backend.log 2>&1 &
sleep 3

# Test it

  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"source":"MAX","type":"idea","title":"Test Alert","message":"Your AI assistant needs your attention!","priority":"high"}'
