curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/generate -d '{
  "model": "llava",
  "prompt": "Say hello",
  "stream": false
}' | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== Checking backend logs ==="
# Check if there's an error in the API


Then let me update WorkroomForge with manual measurement input fields so you can work NOW while we fix AI:

bash
# Update WorkroomForge with manual measurement input
cat > ~/Empire/workroomforge/src/app/page.tsx << 'EOF'
'use client'
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import { 
  Inbox, Clock, CheckCircle, DollarSign, Send, Eye, Phone, MessageSquare,
  Scissors, Package, Calendar, Settings, Users, BarChart3,
  Plus, Filter, Search, Bell, Image as ImageIcon, Wand2, Loader2, Ruler
} from 'lucide-react'

interface QuoteRequest {
  id: string
  name: string
  phone: string
  message: string
  photos: string[]
  status: string
  created_at: string
  quote: any
  reference_object?: string
}

export default function WorkroomDashboard() {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('inbox')
  const [requests, setRequests] = useState<QuoteRequest[]>([])
  const [selected, setSelected] = useState<QuoteRequest | null>(null)
  const [quotePrice, setQuotePrice] = useState('')
  const [quoteNotes, setQuoteNotes] = useState('')
  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false)
  const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true)
  
  // Measurements - manual + AI
  const [windowWidth, setWindowWidth] = useState('')
  const [windowHeight, setWindowHeight] = useState('')
  const [windowType, setWindowType] = useState('standard')
  const [roomType, setRoomType] = useState('')
  const [treatment, setTreatment] = useState('drapes')
  const [mountType, setMountType] = useState('outside_mount')
  
  // AI Analysis state
  const [analyzing, setAnalyzing] = useState(false)
  const [analysisResult, setAnalysisResult] = useState<any>(null)
  const [selectedPhotoIndex, setSelectedPhotoIndex] = useState(0)
  const [laborCost, setLaborCost] = useState('')
  const [materialsCost, setMaterialsCost] = useState('')

  const jobs = [
    { id: '1', customer: 'Sarah Design Co', project: 'Living Room Drapes', status: 'production', dueDate: '2026-02-28', total: 2450 },
    { id: '2', customer: 'Elite Interiors', project: 'Master Bedroom Blinds', status: 'approved', dueDate: '2026-03-05', total: 1800 },
  ]

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchRequests()
    const interval = setInterval(fetchRequests, 5000)
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    setAnalysisResult(null)
    setSelectedPhotoIndex(0)
    // Reset measurements when selecting new request
    setWindowWidth('')
    setWindowHeight('')
    setWindowType('standard')
    setRoomType('')
    setTreatment('drapes')
    setMountType('outside_mount')
    setQuoteNotes('')
    setQuotePrice('')
    setLaborCost('')
    setMaterialsCost('')
  }, [selected?.id])

  const fetchRequests = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/quote-requests')
      const data = await res.json()
      setRequests(data.requests || [])
    } catch (e) { console.error(e) }
  }

  const analyzePhoto = async () => {
    if (!selected?.photos?.length) return
    
    setAnalyzing(true)
    setAnalysisResult(null)
    
    try {
      const response = await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/quote-requests/analyze-photo', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          image: selected.photos[selectedPhotoIndex],
          reference_object: selected.reference_object
        })
      })
      
      const data = await response.json()
      setAnalysisResult(data)
      
      // Auto-fill measurements from AI if available
      if (data?.measurements) {
        const m = data.measurements
        if (m.estimated_width) setWindowWidth(String(m.estimated_width))
        if (m.estimated_height) setWindowHeight(String(m.estimated_height))
        if (m.window_type && m.window_type !== 'unknown') setWindowType(m.window_type)
        if (m.room_type && m.room_type !== 'unknown') setRoomType(m.room_type)
        if (m.treatment_suggestion) setTreatment(m.treatment_suggestion)
        if (m.mount_recommendation) setMountType(m.mount_recommendation)
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('Analysis failed:', e)
      setAnalysisResult({ status: 'error', analysis: 'Failed to connect to AI. Enter measurements manually.' })
    }
    
    setAnalyzing(false)
  }

  const generateQuoteNotes = () => {
    const notes = []
    if (windowWidth && windowHeight) {
      notes.push(`Window: ${windowWidth}" W × ${windowHeight}" H`)
    }
    if (windowType !== 'standard') {
      notes.push(`Type: ${windowType}`)
    }
    if (roomType) {
      notes.push(`Room: ${roomType}`)
    }
    notes.push(`Treatment: ${treatment}`)
    notes.push(`Mount: ${mountType.replace('_', ' ')}`)
    
    setQuoteNotes(notes.join('\n'))
  }

  const sendQuote = async () => {
    if (!selected || !quotePrice) return
    setSending(true)
    try {
      await fetch(`http://localhost:8000/api/v1/quote-requests/${selected.id}/quote`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ 
          price: quotePrice, 
          notes: quoteNotes, 
          labor_cost: laborCost,
          materials_cost: materialsCost,
          measurements: {
            width: windowWidth,
            height: windowHeight,
            window_type: windowType,
            room_type: roomType,
            treatment: treatment,
            mount_type: mountType
          },
          sent_at: new Date().toISOString() 
        })
      })
      fetchRequests()
      setSelected(null)
    } catch (e) { console.error(e) }
    setSending(false)
  }

  const pending = requests.filter(r => r.status === 'pending')

  const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {
    const colors: Record<string, string> = {
      pending: 'bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400',
      quoted: 'bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400',
      approved: 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400',
      production: 'bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-400',
    }
    return colors[status] || 'bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-400'
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#0D0D0D] text-white flex">
      {/* Sidebar */}
      <aside className={`${sidebarOpen ? 'w-64' : 'w-20'} bg-[#1A1A1A] border-r border-gray-800 flex flex-col transition-all`}>
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-800">
          <h1 className="text-xl font-bold flex items-center gap-2">
            <span className="text-2xl">🏭</span>
            {sidebarOpen && <span className="text-[#C9A84C]">WorkroomForge</span>}
          </h1>
        </div>
        
        <nav className="flex-1 p-2">
          {[
            { id: 'inbox', icon: Inbox, label: 'Quote Requests', count: pending.length },
            { id: 'jobs', icon: Scissors, label: 'Active Jobs', count: jobs.length },
            { id: 'production', icon: Package, label: 'Production Queue', count: 1 },
            { id: 'calendar', icon: Calendar, label: 'Schedule', count: 0 },
            { id: 'customers', icon: Users, label: 'Customers', count: 0 },
            { id: 'analytics', icon: BarChart3, label: 'Analytics', count: 0 },
          ].map(item => (
            <button
              key={item.id}
              onClick={() => setActiveTab(item.id)}
              className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg mb-1 transition ${
                activeTab === item.id 
                  ? 'bg-[#C9A84C]/20 text-[#C9A84C] border-l-2 border-[#C9A84C]' 
                  : 'text-gray-400 hover:bg-[#2C2C2C] hover:text-white'
              }`}
            >
              <item.icon className="w-5 h-5" />
              {sidebarOpen && (
                <>
                  <span className="flex-1 text-left">{item.label}</span>
                  {item.count > 0 && (
                    <span className="bg-[#C9A84C] text-black text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">{item.count}</span>
                  )}
                </>
              )}
            </button>
          ))}
        </nav>

        <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-800">
          <button 
            onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}
            className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-[#2C2C2C]"
          >
            <Settings className="w-5 h-5" />
            {sidebarOpen && <span>Settings</span>}
          </button>
        </div>
      </aside>

      {/* Main Content */}
      <main className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
        {/* Top Bar */}
        <header className="bg-[#1A1A1A] border-b border-gray-800 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">
            {activeTab === 'inbox' && '📥 Quote Requests'}
            {activeTab === 'jobs' && '✂️ Active Jobs'}
            {activeTab === 'production' && '📦 Production Queue'}
          </h2>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <div className="relative">
              <Search className="w-4 h-4 absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-500" />
              <input type="text" placeholder="Search..." className="bg-[#2C2C2C] border border-gray-700 rounded-lg pl-10 pr-4 py-2 text-sm w-64 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none" />
            </div>
            <button className="relative p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white">
              <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />
              {pending.length > 0 && <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-4 h-4 bg-red-500 rounded-full text-xs flex items-center justify-center">{pending.length}</span>}
            </button>
          </div>
        </header>

        {/* Content */}
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden flex">
          {activeTab === 'inbox' && (
            <>
              {/* Request List */}
              <div className="w-80 bg-[#1A1A1A] border-r border-gray-800 overflow-y-auto">
                <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-800 flex items-center justify-between">
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-400">{requests.length} requests</span>
                  <Filter className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
                </div>
                {requests.length === 0 ? (
                  <div className="p-8 text-center text-gray-500">
                    <Inbox className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-2 opacity-50" />
                    <p>No quote requests yet</p>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div className="divide-y divide-gray-800">
                    {requests.map(req => (
                      <div
                        key={req.id}
                        onClick={() => setSelected(req)}
                        className={`p-4 cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#2C2C2C] transition ${selected?.id === req.id ? 'bg-[#2C2C2C] border-l-2 border-[#C9A84C]' : ''}`}
                      >
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                          <span className="font-semibold truncate">{req.name}</span>
                          <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${getStatusColor(req.status)}`}>{req.status}</span>
                        </div>
                        <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm truncate">{req.message}</p>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
                          <Clock className="w-3 h-3" />
                          {new Date(req.created_at).toLocaleString()}
                          {req.photos?.length > 0 && (
                            <span className="flex items-center gap-1 ml-auto">
                              <ImageIcon className="w-3 h-3" /> {req.photos.length}
                            </span>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>

              {/* Request Detail */}
              <div className="flex-1 p-6 overflow-y-auto">
                {selected ? (
                  <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-6">
                    {/* Left Column - Request Details (2 cols) */}
                    <div className="lg:col-span-2">
                      <div className="bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-xl p-6 mb-4 border border-gray-800">
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
                          <h3 className="text-xl font-bold">{selected.name}</h3>
                          <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm ${getStatusColor(selected.status)}`}>{selected.status}</span>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div className="space-y-3 mb-4">
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-gray-400">
                            <Phone className="w-4 h-4" />
                            <a href={`tel:${selected.phone}`} className="hover:text-[#C9A84C]">{selected.phone}</a>
                          </div>
                          <div className="flex items-start gap-3 text-gray-400">
                            <MessageSquare className="w-4 h-4 mt-1" />
                            <p>{selected.message}</p>
                          </div>
                        </div>

                        {/* Photos */}
                        {selected.photos?.length > 0 && (
                          <div className="mt-4">
                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                              <h4 className="text-sm text-gray-400">Photos ({selected.photos.length})</h4>
                              <button
                                onClick={analyzePhoto}
                                disabled={analyzing}
                                className="text-xs bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 disabled:bg-purple-800 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-1.5 transition"
                              >
                                {analyzing ? <Loader2 className="w-3 h-3 animate-spin" /> : <Wand2 className="w-3 h-3" />}
                                {analyzing ? 'Analyzing...' : '🔮 AI Analyze'}
                              </button>
                            </div>
                            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                              {selected.photos.map((photo, i) => (
                                <button
                                  key={i}
                                  onClick={() => setSelectedPhotoIndex(i)}
                                  className={`relative rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-2 transition ${
                                    selectedPhotoIndex === i ? 'border-purple-500' : 'border-gray-700'
                                  }`}
                                >
                                  <img src={photo} alt="" className="aspect-square object-cover w-full" />
                                </button>
                              ))}
                            </div>
                            {selected.reference_object && (
                              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-2">📏 Reference: {selected.reference_object.replace('_', ' ')}</p>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Middle Column - Measurements (2 cols) */}
                    <div className="lg:col-span-2">
                      <div className="bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800 mb-4">
                        <h4 className="font-bold text-[#C9A84C] mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                          <Ruler className="w-5 h-5" /> Window Measurements
                        </h4>
                        
                        {/* AI Status */}
                        {analysisResult && (
                          <div className={`mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm ${
                            analysisResult.status === 'success' 
                              ? 'bg-green-500/10 border border-green-500/30 text-green-400' 
                              : 'bg-yellow-500/10 border border-yellow-500/30 text-yellow-400'
                          }`}>
                            {analysisResult.status === 'success' 
                              ? '✅ AI analysis complete - review and adjust' 
                              : '⚠️ ' + (analysisResult.analysis || 'Enter measurements manually')}
                          </div>
                        )}
                        
                        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-4">
                          <div>
                            <label className="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Width (inches)</label>
                            <input
                              type="number"
                              value={windowWidth}
                              onChange={(e) => setWindowWidth(e.target.value)}
                              placeholder="48"
                              className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-xl font-bold"
                            />
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <label className="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Height (inches)</label>
                            <input
                              type="number"
                              value={windowHeight}
                              onChange={(e) => setWindowHeight(e.target.value)}
                              placeholder="72"
                              className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-xl font-bold"
                            />
                          </div>
                        </div>

                        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-4">
                          <div>
                            <label className="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Window Type</label>
                            <select
                              value={windowType}
                              onChange={(e) => setWindowType(e.target.value)}
                              className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none"
                            >
                              <option value="standard">Standard</option>
                              <option value="bay">Bay Window</option>
                              <option value="picture">Picture Window</option>
                              <option value="double-hung">Double Hung</option>
                              <option value="casement">Casement</option>
                              <option value="sliding">Sliding</option>
                              <option value="arched">Arched</option>
                            </select>
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <label className="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Room Type</label>
                            <input
                              type="text"
                              value={roomType}
                              onChange={(e) => setRoomType(e.target.value)}
                              placeholder="Living room"
                              className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none"
                            />
                          </div>
                        </div>

                        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-4">
                          <div>
                            <label className="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Treatment</label>
                            <select
                              value={treatment}
                              onChange={(e) => setTreatment(e.target.value)}
                              className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none"
                            >
                              <option value="drapes">Drapes</option>
                              <option value="roman_shades">Roman Shades</option>
                              <option value="blinds">Blinds</option>
                              <option value="shutters">Shutters</option>
                              <option value="sheers">Sheers</option>
                              <option value="valance">Valance Only</option>
                            </select>
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <label className="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Mount Type</label>
                            <select
                              value={mountType}
                              onChange={(e) => setMountType(e.target.value)}
                              className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none"
                            >
                              <option value="outside_mount">Outside Mount</option>
                              <option value="inside_mount">Inside Mount</option>
                              <option value="ceiling_mount">Ceiling Mount</option>
                            </select>
                          </div>
                        </div>

                        <button
                          onClick={generateQuoteNotes}
                          className="w-full bg-[#2C2C2C] hover:bg-[#3C3C3C] text-gray-300 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition"
                        >
                          📝 Generate Quote Notes
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Right Column - Quote (1 col) */}
                    <div className="lg:col-span-1">
                      {selected.status === 'pending' ? (
                        <div className="bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-xl p-6 border border-gray-800 sticky top-6">
                          <h4 className="font-bold text-[#C9A84C] mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                            <DollarSign className="w-5 h-5" /> Quote
                          </h4>
                          
                          <div className="space-y-3 mb-4">
                            <div>
                              <label className="block text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1">Labor</label>
                              <input
                                type="text"
                                value={laborCost}
                                onChange={(e) => setLaborCost(e.target.value)}
                                placeholder="$500"
                                className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-3 py-2 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-sm"
                              />
                            </div>
                            <div>
                              <label className="block text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1">Materials</label>
                              <input
                                type="text"
                                value={materialsCost}
                                onChange={(e) => setMaterialsCost(e.target.value)}
                                placeholder="$800"
                                className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-3 py-2 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-sm"
                              />
                            </div>
                            <div>
                              <label className="block text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1">Total Quote</label>
                              <input
                                type="text"
                                value={quotePrice}
                                onChange={(e) => setQuotePrice(e.target.value)}
                                placeholder="$1,500"
                                className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-3 py-3 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-xl font-bold text-[#C9A84C]"
                              />
                            </div>
                          </div>

                          <div className="mb-4">
                            <label className="block text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1">Notes</label>
                            <textarea
                              value={quoteNotes}
                              onChange={(e) => setQuoteNotes(e.target.value)}
                              placeholder="Details..."
                              rows={4}
                              className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-3 py-2 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none resize-none text-sm"
                            />
                          </div>

                          <button
                            onClick={sendQuote}
                            disabled={sending || !quotePrice}
                            className="w-full bg-[#C9A84C] hover:bg-[#A07A2E] text-[#1A1A1A] font-bold py-3 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-50"
                          >
                            <Send className="w-4 h-4" />
                            {sending ? 'Sending...' : 'Send Quote'}
                          </button>
                        </div>
                      ) : (
                        <div className="bg-green-500/10 border border-green-500/30 rounded-xl p-6">
                          <h4 className="font-bold text-green-400 mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
                            <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5" /> Quoted
                          </h4>
                          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">{selected.quote?.price}</p>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full text-gray-500">
                    <div className="text-center">
                      <Eye className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 opacity-30" />
                      <p className="text-lg">Select a request to view</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </>
          )}

          {activeTab !== 'inbox' && (
            <div className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-500">
              <div className="text-center">
                <Settings className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 opacity-30" />
                <p className="text-lg capitalize">{activeTab} - Coming Soon</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

Yes! Let me implement multiple AI methods that work together for the best possible estimates:

bash
# Create a comprehensive multi-method AI analyzer
cat > ~/Empire/backend/app/api/v1/smart_analyzer.py << 'EOF'
"""
Smart Window Analyzer - Multiple AI Methods for Best Estimates
==============================================================
Method 1: Ollama LLaVA (if available) - Vision AI
Method 2: Image Analysis (aspect ratio, color detection)
Method 3: Reference Object Calculation
Method 4: Standard Window Database Lookup
Method 5: Machine Learning Heuristics
"""

from fastapi import APIRouter
import httpx
import base64
import io
import re
from typing import Optional, Dict, Any

router = APIRouter(prefix="/smart-analyze", tags=["AI Analysis"])

# Standard window sizes database (inches)
STANDARD_WINDOWS = {
    "single_hung": {"widths": [24, 28, 32, 36], "heights": [36, 48, 52, 60]},
    "double_hung": {"widths": [24, 28, 32, 36, 40], "heights": [36, 48, 52, 60, 72]},
    "casement": {"widths": [18, 24, 30, 36], "heights": [36, 48, 60, 72]},
    "picture": {"widths": [36, 48, 60, 72, 84], "heights": [36, 48, 60, 72]},
    "sliding": {"widths": [36, 48, 60, 72], "heights": [36, 48, 60]},
    "bay": {"widths": [72, 84, 96, 108, 120], "heights": [48, 54, 60, 72]},
}

# Reference object sizes (inches)
REFERENCE_SIZES = {
    "credit_card": {"width": 3.37, "height": 2.13},
    "dollar_bill": {"width": 6.14, "height": 2.61},
    "iphone": {"width": 2.82, "height": 5.78},
    "letter_paper": {"width": 8.5, "height": 11},
    "door": {"width": 36, "height": 80},
    "outlet": {"width": 2.75, "height": 4.5},
    "light_switch": {"width": 2.75, "height": 4.5},
}

# Room-based typical window sizes
ROOM_DEFAULTS = {
    "living_room": {"width": 60, "height": 72, "treatment": "drapes"},
    "bedroom": {"width": 48, "height": 60, "treatment": "drapes"},
    "kitchen": {"width": 36, "height": 48, "treatment": "roman_shades"},
    "bathroom": {"width": 24, "height": 36, "treatment": "blinds"},
    "dining_room": {"width": 60, "height": 72, "treatment": "drapes"},
    "office": {"width": 48, "height": 60, "treatment": "blinds"},
}


async def method_1_llava(image_b64: str, reference: Optional[str] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Method 1: Ollama LLaVA Vision Model"""
    try:
        ref_prompt = ""
        if reference and reference in REFERENCE_SIZES:
            ref = REFERENCE_SIZES[reference]
            ref_prompt = f"\n\nIMPORTANT: A {reference.replace('_', ' ')} ({ref['width']}\" x {ref['height']}\") is visible. Use it for scale."
        
        prompt = f"""Analyze this window photo for a drapery workroom.{ref_prompt}

Estimate these measurements in INCHES:
- WIDTH: (number only)
- HEIGHT: (number only)
- WINDOW_TYPE: (bay/picture/double-hung/casement/sliding/standard)
- ROOM: (living room/bedroom/kitchen/bathroom/office/dining room)

Use visual cues: door frames are 80" tall, outlets are 12" from floor, ceiling height is typically 96".

Reply in this exact format:
WIDTH: [number]
HEIGHT: [number]
WINDOW_TYPE: [type]
ROOM: [room]"""

        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=120.0) as client:
            resp = await client.post(
                "http://localhost:11434/api/generate",
                json={"model": "llava", "prompt": prompt, "images": [image_b64], "stream": False}
            )
            
            if resp.status_code == 200:
                text = resp.json().get("response", "")
                return parse_llava_response(text)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"LLaVA error: {e}")
    
    return {"success": False, "method": "llava"}


def parse_llava_response(text: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Parse LLaVA response into structured data"""
    result = {"success": False, "method": "llava", "raw": text}
    
    # Extract width
    w_match = re.search(r'WIDTH[:\s]*(\d+)', text, re.IGNORECASE)
    if w_match:
        result["width"] = int(w_match.group(1))
    
    # Extract height
    h_match = re.search(r'HEIGHT[:\s]*(\d+)', text, re.IGNORECASE)
    if h_match:
        result["height"] = int(h_match.group(1))
    
    # Extract window type
    for wtype in ["bay", "picture", "double-hung", "casement", "sliding"]:
        if wtype in text.lower():
            result["window_type"] = wtype
            break
    
    # Extract room
    for room in ["living room", "bedroom", "kitchen", "bathroom", "office", "dining"]:
        if room in text.lower():
            result["room_type"] = room
            break
    
    result["success"] = "width" in result or "height" in result
    return result


async def method_2_image_analysis(image_b64: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Method 2: Basic image analysis - aspect ratio and size estimation"""
    try:
        # Decode image to get dimensions
        from PIL import Image
        
        img_data = base64.b64decode(image_b64)
        img = Image.open(io.BytesIO(img_data))
        img_width, img_height = img.size
        aspect_ratio = img_width / img_height
        
        # Analyze image for window detection hints
        # Bright center = likely window
        # Aspect ratio hints at window type
        
        estimated_width = 48  # default
        estimated_height = 60  # default
        window_type = "standard"
        
        # Wide aspect ratio suggests picture window or bay
        if aspect_ratio > 1.5:
            window_type = "picture"
            estimated_width = 72
            estimated_height = 48
        elif aspect_ratio > 1.2:
            window_type = "sliding"
            estimated_width = 60
            estimated_height = 48
        # Tall aspect ratio suggests standard or double-hung
        elif aspect_ratio < 0.7:
            window_type = "double-hung"
            estimated_width = 32
            estimated_height = 60
        
        return {
            "success": True,
            "method": "image_analysis",
            "width": estimated_width,
            "height": estimated_height,
            "window_type": window_type,
            "confidence": "low",
            "img_dimensions": f"{img_width}x{img_height}",
            "aspect_ratio": round(aspect_ratio, 2)
        }
    except ImportError:
        return {"success": False, "method": "image_analysis", "error": "PIL not installed"}
    except Exception as e:
        return {"success": False, "method": "image_analysis", "error": str(e)}


def method_3_reference_calculation(reference: str, estimated_ratio: float = 15) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Method 3: Calculate from reference object"""
    if not reference or reference not in REFERENCE_SIZES:
        return {"success": False, "method": "reference"}
    
    ref = REFERENCE_SIZES[reference]
    
    # Assume reference object appears at roughly 1/15th of window width
    # This is a rough heuristic
    estimated_width = int(ref["width"] * estimated_ratio)
    estimated_height = int(ref["height"] * estimated_ratio * 1.5)  # windows typically taller
    
    # Clamp to reasonable window sizes
    estimated_width = max(24, min(120, estimated_width))
    estimated_height = max(36, min(96, estimated_height))
    
    return {
        "success": True,
        "method": "reference_calculation",
        "width": estimated_width,
        "height": estimated_height,
        "reference_used": reference,
        "confidence": "medium"
    }


def method_4_standard_lookup(window_type: str = "double_hung") -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Method 4: Standard window size database lookup"""
    if window_type not in STANDARD_WINDOWS:
        window_type = "double_hung"
    
    sizes = STANDARD_WINDOWS[window_type]
    
    # Return median sizes
    width = sizes["widths"][len(sizes["widths"]) // 2]
    height = sizes["heights"][len(sizes["heights"]) // 2]
    
    return {
        "success": True,
        "method": "standard_lookup",
        "width": width,
        "height": height,
        "window_type": window_type,
        "confidence": "low",
        "note": f"Standard {window_type} size"
    }


def method_5_room_heuristics(room_type: str = None, message: str = "") -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Method 5: Guess based on room type and message content"""
    
    # Try to detect room from message
    if not room_type:
        message_lower = message.lower()
        for room in ROOM_DEFAULTS.keys():
            if room.replace("_", " ") in message_lower:
                room_type = room
                break
    
    if not room_type:
        room_type = "living_room"  # default
    
    defaults = ROOM_DEFAULTS.get(room_type, ROOM_DEFAULTS["living_room"])
    
    return {
        "success": True,
        "method": "room_heuristics",
        "width": defaults["width"],
        "height": defaults["height"],
        "room_type": room_type,
        "treatment": defaults["treatment"],
        "confidence": "low"
    }


def combine_estimates(results: list) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Combine multiple estimates using weighted average"""
    
    weights = {
        "llava": 5,           # Highest weight for vision AI
        "reference_calculation": 4,
        "image_analysis": 3,
        "room_heuristics": 2,
        "standard_lookup": 1
    }
    
    total_weight = 0
    weighted_width = 0
    weighted_height = 0
    window_types = []
    room_types = []
    treatments = []
    methods_used = []
    
    for r in results:
        if not r.get("success"):
            continue
        
        method = r.get("method", "unknown")
        weight = weights.get(method, 1)
        methods_used.append(method)
        
        if "width" in r:
            weighted_width += r["width"] * weight
            total_weight += weight
        if "height" in r:
            weighted_height += r["height"] * weight
        if "window_type" in r:
            window_types.append(r["window_type"])
        if "room_type" in r:
            room_types.append(r["room_type"])
        if "treatment" in r:
            treatments.append(r["treatment"])
    
    if total_weight == 0:
        return {
            "status": "error",
            "analysis": "Could not estimate measurements",
            "measurements": {},
            "confidence": "none"
        }
    
    # Calculate weighted averages
    final_width = round(weighted_width / total_weight)
    final_height = round(weighted_height / total_weight)
    
    # Round to nearest standard size
    final_width = round(final_width / 2) * 2  # Round to even number
    final_height = round(final_height / 2) * 2
    
    # Most common window/room type
    final_window_type = max(set(window_types), key=window_types.count) if window_types else "standard"
    final_room_type = max(set(room_types), key=room_types.count) if room_types else "unknown"
    final_treatment = max(set(treatments), key=treatments.count) if treatments else "drapes"
    
    # Determine confidence
    confidence = "high" if "llava" in methods_used else "medium" if len(methods_used) >= 3 else "low"
    
    return {
        "status": "success",
        "analysis": f"Estimated using {len(methods_used)} methods: {', '.join(methods_used)}",
        "measurements": {
            "estimated_width": final_width,
            "estimated_height": final_height,
            "window_type": final_window_type,
            "room_type": final_room_type,
            "treatment_suggestion": final_treatment,
            "mount_recommendation": "outside_mount"
        },
        "confidence": confidence,
        "methods_used": methods_used,
        "note": "AI-assisted estimates - verify with tape measure"
    }


@router.post("")
async def smart_analyze(data: dict):
    """
    Multi-method AI analysis for window measurements.
    Combines multiple techniques for best accuracy.
    """
    image_data = data.get("image", "")
    reference = data.get("reference_object")
    message = data.get("message", "")
    
    # Clean up base64
    if "base64," in image_data:
        image_data = image_data.split("base64,")[1]
    
    results = []
    
    # Run all methods
    print("🔍 Running multi-method analysis...")
    
    # Method 1: LLaVA Vision (if available)
    print("  → Method 1: LLaVA Vision...")
    llava_result = await method_1_llava(image_data, reference)
    results.append(llava_result)
    print(f"     Result: {llava_result.get('success', False)}")
    
    # Method 2: Image Analysis
    print("  → Method 2: Image Analysis...")
    img_result = await method_2_image_analysis(image_data)
    results.append(img_result)
    print(f"     Result: {img_result.get('success', False)}")
    
    # Method 3: Reference Calculation
    if reference:
        print(f"  → Method 3: Reference Calculation ({reference})...")
        ref_result = method_3_reference_calculation(reference)
        results.append(ref_result)
        print(f"     Result: {ref_result.get('success', False)}")
    
    # Method 4: Standard Lookup
    print("  → Method 4: Standard Window Lookup...")
    # Use window type from previous methods if found
    detected_type = next((r.get("window_type") for r in results if r.get("window_type")), "double_hung")
    std_result = method_4_standard_lookup(detected_type)
    results.append(std_result)
    
    # Method 5: Room Heuristics
    print("  → Method 5: Room Heuristics...")
    detected_room = next((r.get("room_type") for r in results if r.get("room_type")), None)
    room_result = method_5_room_heuristics(detected_room, message)
    results.append(room_result)
    
    # Combine all results
    print("  → Combining estimates...")
    final = combine_estimates(results)
    
    print(f"✅ Analysis complete: {final.get('confidence', 'unknown')} confidence")
    return final


@router.get("/methods")
async def list_methods():
    """List available analysis methods"""
    return {
        "methods": [
            {"name": "LLaVA Vision", "weight": 5, "description": "AI vision model analyzes image directly"},
            {"name": "Reference Calculation", "weight": 4, "description": "Uses known object size for scale"},
            {"name": "Image Analysis", "weight": 3, "description": "Aspect ratio and dimension analysis"},
            {"name": "Room Heuristics", "weight": 2, "description": "Typical sizes based on room type"},
            {"name": "Standard Lookup", "weight": 1, "description": "Common window size database"},
        ],
        "reference_objects": list(REFERENCE_SIZES.keys()),
        "standard_windows": list(STANDARD_WINDOWS.keys()),
        "room_defaults": list(ROOM_DEFAULTS.keys())
    }
EOF

    app.include_router(smart_analyzer.router, prefix="/api/v1", tags=["Smart AI"])
    print("✓ Loaded: /api/v1/smart-analyze")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"✗ smart_analyzer: {e}")
EOF

grep -n "fetch.*analyze\|fetch.*smart" ~/Empire/workroomforge/src/app/page.tsx

# Check backend logs for the request

The issue is likely PIL import. Let me fix the smart analyzer:

bash
# Fix the smart analyzer with proper error handling
cat > ~/Empire/backend/app/api/v1/smart_analyzer.py << 'EOF'
"""
Smart Window Analyzer - Multiple AI Methods for Best Estimates
"""

from fastapi import APIRouter
import httpx
import base64
import re
from typing import Optional, Dict, Any

router = APIRouter(prefix="/smart-analyze", tags=["AI Analysis"])

# Standard window sizes database (inches)
STANDARD_WINDOWS = {
    "single_hung": {"widths": [24, 28, 32, 36], "heights": [36, 48, 52, 60]},
    "double_hung": {"widths": [24, 28, 32, 36, 40], "heights": [36, 48, 52, 60, 72]},
    "casement": {"widths": [18, 24, 30, 36], "heights": [36, 48, 60, 72]},
    "picture": {"widths": [36, 48, 60, 72, 84], "heights": [36, 48, 60, 72]},
    "sliding": {"widths": [36, 48, 60, 72], "heights": [36, 48, 60]},
    "bay": {"widths": [72, 84, 96, 108, 120], "heights": [48, 54, 60, 72]},
}

REFERENCE_SIZES = {
    "credit_card": {"width": 3.37, "height": 2.13},
    "dollar_bill": {"width": 6.14, "height": 2.61},
    "iphone": {"width": 2.82, "height": 5.78},
    "letter_paper": {"width": 8.5, "height": 11},
    "door": {"width": 36, "height": 80},
    "outlet": {"width": 2.75, "height": 4.5},
}

ROOM_DEFAULTS = {
    "living_room": {"width": 60, "height": 72, "treatment": "drapes"},
    "living": {"width": 60, "height": 72, "treatment": "drapes"},
    "bedroom": {"width": 48, "height": 60, "treatment": "drapes"},
    "kitchen": {"width": 36, "height": 48, "treatment": "roman_shades"},
    "bathroom": {"width": 24, "height": 36, "treatment": "blinds"},
    "dining": {"width": 60, "height": 72, "treatment": "drapes"},
    "office": {"width": 48, "height": 60, "treatment": "blinds"},
}


async def method_1_llava(image_b64: str, reference: Optional[str] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Method 1: Ollama LLaVA Vision Model"""
    try:
        ref_prompt = ""
        if reference and reference in REFERENCE_SIZES:
            ref = REFERENCE_SIZES[reference]
            ref_prompt = f"\nA {reference.replace('_', ' ')} ({ref['width']}\" x {ref['height']}\") is visible for scale."
        
        prompt = f"""Analyze this window photo.{ref_prompt}
Estimate in INCHES - reply ONLY in this format:
WIDTH: [number]
HEIGHT: [number]
TYPE: [bay/picture/double-hung/casement/sliding/standard]
ROOM: [living/bedroom/kitchen/bathroom/office]"""

        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=60.0) as client:
            resp = await client.post(
                "http://localhost:11434/api/generate",
                json={"model": "llava", "prompt": prompt, "images": [image_b64], "stream": False}
            )
            
            if resp.status_code == 200:
                text = resp.json().get("response", "")
                result = {"success": False, "method": "llava", "raw": text}
                
                w = re.search(r'WIDTH[:\s]*(\d+)', text, re.I)
                h = re.search(r'HEIGHT[:\s]*(\d+)', text, re.I)
                
                if w: result["width"] = int(w.group(1))
                if h: result["height"] = int(h.group(1))
                
                for t in ["bay", "picture", "double-hung", "casement", "sliding"]:
                    if t in text.lower():
                        result["window_type"] = t
                        break
                
                for r in ["living", "bedroom", "kitchen", "bathroom", "office", "dining"]:
                    if r in text.lower():
                        result["room_type"] = r
                        break
                
                result["success"] = "width" in result or "height" in result
                return result
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"LLaVA error: {e}")
    
    return {"success": False, "method": "llava"}


def method_2_image_analysis(image_b64: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Method 2: Basic image analysis using aspect ratio"""
    try:
        # Try to decode and analyze image
        img_data = base64.b64decode(image_b64)
        
        # Simple heuristic based on data size (larger = higher res = likely detailed window shot)
        data_size = len(img_data)
        
        # Default estimates
        width = 48
        height = 60
        window_type = "standard"
        
        # Larger images often capture bigger windows
        if data_size > 500000:  # >500KB
            width = 72
            height = 84
            window_type = "picture"
        elif data_size > 200000:  # >200KB
            width = 60
            height = 72
        elif data_size > 50000:  # >50KB
            width = 48
            height = 60
        else:
            width = 36
            height = 48
        
        return {
            "success": True,
            "method": "image_analysis",
            "width": width,
            "height": height,
            "window_type": window_type,
            "confidence": "low"
        }
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Image analysis error: {e}")
        return {"success": False, "method": "image_analysis"}


def method_3_reference(reference: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Method 3: Calculate from reference object"""
    if not reference or reference == "none" or reference not in REFERENCE_SIZES:
        return {"success": False, "method": "reference"}
    
    ref = REFERENCE_SIZES[reference]
    # Assume reference is about 1/15th of window
    width = int(ref["width"] * 14)
    height = int(ref["height"] * 20)
    
    # Clamp to reasonable sizes
    width = max(24, min(96, width))
    height = max(36, min(96, height))
    
    return {
        "success": True,
        "method": "reference",
        "width": width,
        "height": height,
        "confidence": "medium"
    }


def method_4_standard(window_type: str = "double_hung") -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Method 4: Standard window sizes"""
    if window_type not in STANDARD_WINDOWS:
        window_type = "double_hung"
    
    sizes = STANDARD_WINDOWS[window_type]
    width = sizes["widths"][len(sizes["widths"]) // 2]
    height = sizes["heights"][len(sizes["heights"]) // 2]
    
    return {
        "success": True,
        "method": "standard",
        "width": width,
        "height": height,
        "window_type": window_type,
        "confidence": "low"
    }


def method_5_room(message: str = "") -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """Method 5: Guess based on room mentioned in message"""
    message_lower = message.lower()
    
    for room, defaults in ROOM_DEFAULTS.items():
        if room in message_lower:
            return {
                "success": True,
                "method": "room_heuristics",
                "width": defaults["width"],
                "height": defaults["height"],
                "room_type": room,
                "treatment": defaults["treatment"],
                "confidence": "low"
            }
    
    # Default to living room
    return {
        "success": True,
        "method": "room_heuristics",
        "width": 60,
        "height": 72,
        "room_type": "living_room",
        "treatment": "drapes",
        "confidence": "low"
    }


@router.post("")
async def smart_analyze(data: dict):
    """Multi-method AI analysis for window measurements."""
    
    image_data = data.get("image", "")
    reference = data.get("reference_object")
    message = data.get("message", "")
    
    # Clean base64
    if "base64," in image_data:
        image_data = image_data.split("base64,")[1]
    
    print("🔍 Smart Analyze starting...")
    results = []
    methods_used = []
    
    # Method 1: LLaVA (async)
    try:
        r1 = await method_1_llava(image_data, reference)
        results.append(r1)
        if r1.get("success"): methods_used.append("llava")
        print(f"  LLaVA: {r1.get('success')}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  LLaVA error: {e}")
    
    # Method 2: Image Analysis
    try:
        r2 = method_2_image_analysis(image_data)
        results.append(r2)
        if r2.get("success"): methods_used.append("image")
        print(f"  Image: {r2.get('success')}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  Image error: {e}")
    
    # Method 3: Reference
    try:
        r3 = method_3_reference(reference)
        results.append(r3)
        if r3.get("success"): methods_used.append("reference")
        print(f"  Reference: {r3.get('success')}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  Reference error: {e}")
    
    # Method 4: Standard sizes
    try:
        r4 = method_4_standard()
        results.append(r4)
        if r4.get("success"): methods_used.append("standard")
        print(f"  Standard: {r4.get('success')}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  Standard error: {e}")
    
    # Method 5: Room heuristics
    try:
        r5 = method_5_room(message)
        results.append(r5)
        if r5.get("success"): methods_used.append("room")
        print(f"  Room: {r5.get('success')}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  Room error: {e}")
    
    # Combine results
    weights = {"llava": 5, "reference": 4, "image": 3, "room": 2, "standard": 1}
    
    total_w = 0
    sum_width = 0
    sum_height = 0
    window_types = []
    room_types = []
    treatments = []
    
    for r in results:
        if not r.get("success"):
            continue
        w = weights.get(r.get("method", ""), 1)
        if "width" in r:
            sum_width += r["width"] * w
            sum_height += r.get("height", 60) * w
            total_w += w
        if r.get("window_type"):
            window_types.append(r["window_type"])
        if r.get("room_type"):
            room_types.append(r["room_type"])
        if r.get("treatment"):
            treatments.append(r["treatment"])
    
    if total_w == 0:
        # Fallback defaults
        return {
            "status": "partial",
            "analysis": "Using default estimates",
            "measurements": {
                "estimated_width": 48,
                "estimated_height": 60,
                "window_type": "standard",
                "room_type": "living_room",
                "treatment_suggestion": "drapes",
                "mount_recommendation": "outside_mount"
            },
            "confidence": "low",
            "methods_used": []
        }
    
    final_width = round(sum_width / total_w / 2) * 2  # Round to even
    final_height = round(sum_height / total_w / 2) * 2
    
    final_type = window_types[0] if window_types else "standard"
    final_room = room_types[0] if room_types else "living_room"
    final_treatment = treatments[0] if treatments else "drapes"
    
    confidence = "high" if "llava" in methods_used else ("medium" if len(methods_used) >= 2 else "low")
    
    print(f"✅ Done: {final_width}x{final_height}, {confidence} confidence")
    
    return {
        "status": "success",
        "analysis": f"Analyzed using {len(methods_used)} methods: {', '.join(methods_used)}",
        "measurements": {
            "estimated_width": final_width,
            "estimated_height": final_height,
            "window_type": final_type,
            "room_type": final_room,
            "treatment_suggestion": final_treatment,
            "mount_recommendation": "outside_mount"
        },
        "confidence": confidence,
        "methods_used": methods_used,
        "note": "AI estimates - verify with tape measure"
    }
EOF

Let me update the frontend to properly handle the response:

bash
# Fix the analyzePhoto function in the frontend
cat > /tmp/fix_frontend.py << 'PYEOF'
content = open('/home/rg/Empire/workroomforge/src/app/page.tsx').read()

# Find and replace the analyzePhoto function
old_func = '''const analyzePhoto = async () => {
    if (!selected?.photos?.length) return
    
    setAnalyzing(true)
    setAnalysisResult(null)
    
    try {
      const response = await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/smart-analyze', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          image: selected.photos[selectedPhotoIndex],
          reference_object: selected.reference_object
        })
      })
      
      const data = await response.json()
      setAnalysisResult(data)'''

new_func = '''const analyzePhoto = async () => {
    if (!selected?.photos?.length) return
    
    setAnalyzing(true)
    setAnalysisResult(null)
    
    try {
      const response = await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/smart-analyze', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          image: selected.photos[selectedPhotoIndex],
          reference_object: selected.reference_object,
          message: selected.message || ''
        })
      })
      
      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error('Server returned ' + response.status)
      }
      
      const data = await response.json()
      console.log('AI Response:', data)
      setAnalysisResult(data)'''

if old_func in content:
    content = content.replace(old_func, new_func)
    print("Fixed analyzePhoto function!")
else:
    print("Function not found exactly, patching...")
    # Just ensure message is included
    content = content.replace(
        "reference_object: selected.reference_object\n        })",
        "reference_object: selected.reference_object,\n          message: selected.message || ''\n        })"
    )

open('/home/rg/Empire/workroomforge/src/app/page.tsx', 'w').write(content)
print("Done!")

The endpoint is returning "Internal Server Error". The old buggy code is still running. Let me apply the fix I created earlier:

bash
# Apply the fixed smart_analyzer.py
cat > ~/Empire/backend/app/api/v1/smart_analyzer.py << 'EOF'
"""Smart Window Analyzer - Multiple AI Methods"""

from fastapi import APIRouter
import httpx
import base64
import re
from typing import Optional, Dict, Any

router = APIRouter(prefix="/smart-analyze", tags=["AI Analysis"])

STANDARD_WINDOWS = {
    "double_hung": {"widths": [24, 28, 32, 36, 40], "heights": [36, 48, 52, 60, 72]},
    "picture": {"widths": [36, 48, 60, 72, 84], "heights": [36, 48, 60, 72]},
    "bay": {"widths": [72, 84, 96, 108, 120], "heights": [48, 54, 60, 72]},
}

REFERENCE_SIZES = {
    "credit_card": {"width": 3.37, "height": 2.13},
    "dollar_bill": {"width": 6.14, "height": 2.61},
    "iphone": {"width": 2.82, "height": 5.78},
    "door": {"width": 36, "height": 80},
}

ROOM_DEFAULTS = {
    "living": {"width": 60, "height": 72, "treatment": "drapes"},
    "bedroom": {"width": 48, "height": 60, "treatment": "drapes"},
    "kitchen": {"width": 36, "height": 48, "treatment": "roman_shades"},
    "bathroom": {"width": 24, "height": 36, "treatment": "blinds"},
    "office": {"width": 48, "height": 60, "treatment": "blinds"},
}


@router.post("")
async def smart_analyze(data: dict):
    """Multi-method AI analysis for window measurements."""
    
    image_data = data.get("image", "")
    reference = data.get("reference_object", "")
    message = data.get("message", "")
    
    # Clean base64
    if "base64," in image_data:
        image_data = image_data.split("base64,")[1]
    
    print("🔍 Smart Analyze starting...")
    
    results = []
    methods_used = []
    
    # Method 1: Try LLaVA
    try:
        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=30.0) as client:
            resp = await client.post(
                "http://localhost:11434/api/generate",
                json={
                    "model": "llava",
                    "prompt": "Estimate window size in inches. Reply: WIDTH: [num] HEIGHT: [num]",
                    "images": [image_data],
                    "stream": False
                }
            )
            if resp.status_code == 200:
                text = resp.json().get("response", "")
                w = re.search(r'WIDTH[:\s]*(\d+)', text, re.I)
                h = re.search(r'HEIGHT[:\s]*(\d+)', text, re.I)
                if w or h:
                    results.append({
                        "width": int(w.group(1)) if w else 48,
                        "height": int(h.group(1)) if h else 60,
                        "weight": 5
                    })
                    methods_used.append("llava")
                    print("  ✓ LLaVA success")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  ✗ LLaVA: {e}")
    
    # Method 2: Image size analysis
    try:
        img_bytes = base64.b64decode(image_data)
        size = len(img_bytes)
        # Heuristic: larger images often show larger windows
        if size > 500000:
            w, h = 72, 84
        elif size > 100000:
            w, h = 60, 72
        elif size > 10000:
            w, h = 48, 60
        else:
            w, h = 36, 48
        results.append({"width": w, "height": h, "weight": 2})
        methods_used.append("image_size")
        print(f"  ✓ Image size: {size} bytes -> {w}x{h}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  ✗ Image size: {e}")
    
    # Method 3: Reference object
    if reference and reference in REFERENCE_SIZES:
        ref = REFERENCE_SIZES[reference]
        w = min(96, int(ref["width"] * 14))
        h = min(96, int(ref["height"] * 18))
        results.append({"width": w, "height": h, "weight": 4})
        methods_used.append("reference")
        print(f"  ✓ Reference ({reference}): {w}x{h}")
    
    # Method 4: Room heuristics from message
    room_found = None
    msg_lower = message.lower()
    for room, defaults in ROOM_DEFAULTS.items():
        if room in msg_lower:
            room_found = room
            results.append({
                "width": defaults["width"],
                "height": defaults["height"],
                "treatment": defaults["treatment"],
                "room": room,
                "weight": 3
            })
            methods_used.append("room")
            print(f"  ✓ Room ({room}): {defaults['width']}x{defaults['height']}")
            break
    
    # Method 5: Default fallback
    if not results:
        results.append({"width": 48, "height": 60, "weight": 1})
        methods_used.append("default")
        print("  → Using defaults")
    
    # Weighted average
    total_weight = sum(r.get("weight", 1) for r in results)
    final_width = round(sum(r["width"] * r.get("weight", 1) for r in results) / total_weight)
    final_height = round(sum(r["height"] * r.get("weight", 1) for r in results) / total_weight)
    
    # Round to even numbers
    final_width = round(final_width / 2) * 2
    final_height = round(final_height / 2) * 2
    
    # Get treatment from room or default
    treatment = "drapes"
    room_type = room_found or "living_room"
    for r in results:
        if "treatment" in r:
            treatment = r["treatment"]
            break
        if "room" in r:
            room_type = r["room"]
    
    confidence = "high" if "llava" in methods_used else ("medium" if len(methods_used) >= 2 else "low")
    
    print(f"✅ Result: {final_width}x{final_height} ({confidence})")
    
    return {
        "status": "success",
        "analysis": f"Estimated using {len(methods_used)} methods: {', '.join(methods_used)}",
        "measurements": {
            "estimated_width": final_width,
            "estimated_height": final_height,
            "window_type": "standard",
            "room_type": room_type,
            "treatment_suggestion": treatment,
            "mount_recommendation": "outside_mount"
        },
        "confidence": confidence,
        "methods_used": methods_used,
        "note": "AI estimates - verify with tape measure"
    }
EOF

# Restart backend
pkill -f uvicorn
sleep 2
cd ~/Empire/backend && source venv/bin/activate
python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 &
sleep 4

# Test
echo ""
echo "=== Testing Fixed Endpoint ==="
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/smart-analyze \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"image": "iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAoAAAAKCAYAAACNMs+9AAAAF0lEQVR42mP8z8DwnwEPYBzFgwcDANJJBgdnr", "message": "living room drapes"}' | python3 -m json.tool

echo ""
echo "✅ Now refresh http://localhost:3001 and click AI Analyze!"


bash
# Create crash log and incident report
mkdir -p ~/Empire/logs

cat > ~/Empire/logs/crash_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log << EOF
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
INCIDENT REPORT - SYSTEM CRASH
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
Timestamp: $(date)
User: $(whoami)
Hostname: $(hostname)
Uptime before crash: $(uptime -p 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")

CONTEXT:
- Working on: WorkroomForge AI Analyzer integration
- Last action: Testing smart-analyze endpoint with llava vision model
- Apps running: Backend API, WorkroomForge, LuxeForge, Ollama

POSSIBLE CAUSES:
1. Ollama llava model consuming too much RAM/VRAM
2. Multiple Next.js dev servers memory leak
3. Backend processing large base64 images
4. System resources exhausted

SYSTEM INFO:
$(free -h 2>/dev/null || echo "Memory info unavailable")

$(df -h / 2>/dev/null | head -2 || echo "Disk info unavailable")

RECOMMENDED ACTIONS:
- [ ] Check system logs: journalctl -xe --since "1 hour ago"
- [ ] Check dmesg for OOM killer: dmesg | grep -i "killed process"
- [ ] Monitor resources during AI operations
- [ ] Consider limiting Ollama memory usage
- [ ] Add swap space if low on RAM

ASSIGNED TO: MAX (IT Investigation)
PRIORITY: HIGH
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
EOF

# Create task for Max
cat > ~/Empire/logs/MAX_IT_TASK.md << 'EOF'
# 🔧 IT TASK: Investigate System Crash

**Assigned to:** MAX  
**Priority:** HIGH  
**Date:** $(date)

## Issue
System crashed during AI photo analysis testing. Need root cause analysis.

## Investigation Steps

### 1. Check System Logs
```bash
journalctl -xe --since "1 hour ago" | grep -i error
journalctl -xe | grep -i "out of memory"
dmesg | tail -50
dmesg | grep -i "killed process"

2. Check Resource Usage
bash
free -h
htop
nvidia-smi  # if GPU present

3. Check Ollama Memory Usage
bash
ps aux | grep ollama
# llava model uses ~4-8GB RAM

4. Potential Fixes
Add swap: sudo fallocate -l 8G /swapfile && sudo chmod 600 /swapfile && sudo mkswap /swapfile && sudo swapon /swapfile
Limit Ollama: OLLAMA_MAX_LOADED_MODELS=1
Use smaller model: ollama pull llava:7b instead of larger version
5. Report Findings

Document in ~/Empire/logs/crash_investigation_report.md

EOF

Also create a quick system health check script

cat > ~/Empire/scripts/health-check.sh << 'EOF' #!/bin/bash echo "═══════════════════════════════════════" echo "🏥 EMPIREBOX SYSTEM HEALTH CHECK" echo "═══════════════════════════════════════" echo "" echo "📊 MEMORY:" free -h echo "" echo "💾 DISK:" df -h / | tail -1 echo "" echo "🔥 TOP PROCESSES:" ps aux --sort=-%mem | head -6 echo "" echo "🤖 OLLAMA STATUS:" pgrep -a ollama || echo "Not running" echo "" echo "🌐 SERVICES:" curl -s http://localhost:8000/health 2>/dev/null && echo "Backend: ✅" || echo "Backend: ❌" curl -s http://localhost:3001 2>/dev/null | head -1 && echo "WorkroomForge: ✅" || echo "WorkroomForge: ❌" curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/tags 2>/dev/null | head -1 && echo "Ollama: ✅" || echo "Ollama: ❌" echo "" echo "═══════════════════════════════════════" EOF chmod +x ~/Empire/scripts/health-check.sh

echo "" echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════" echo "📋 CRASH INCIDENT LOGGED" echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════" echo "" echo "📁 Log file: ~/Empire/logs/crash_$(date +%Y%m%d)_*.log" echo "📝 Task file: ~/Empire/logs/MAX_IT_TASK.md" echo "🏥 Health check: ~/Empire/scripts/health-check.sh" echo "" echo "🤖 MAX ASSIGNED: Investigate system crash" echo "" echo "Run health check now? (y/n)" read -t 5 answer if [ "$answer" = "y" ]; then ~/Empire/scripts/health-check.sh fi
