You're right! Let me fix both issues:

Auto-calculate total from Labor + Materials
Auto-fill measurements from AI
bash
# Update WorkroomForge with auto-calculation and better AI integration
cat > ~/Empire/workroomforge/src/app/page.tsx << 'EOF'
'use client'
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import { 
  Inbox, Clock, CheckCircle, DollarSign, Send, Eye, Phone, MessageSquare,
  Scissors, Package, Calendar, Settings, Users, BarChart3,
  Filter, Search, Bell, Image as ImageIcon, Wand2, Loader2, Ruler
} from 'lucide-react'

interface QuoteRequest {
  id: string
  name: string
  phone: string
  message: string
  photos: string[]
  status: string
  created_at: string
  quote: any
  reference_object?: string
}

export default function WorkroomDashboard() {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('inbox')
  const [requests, setRequests] = useState<QuoteRequest[]>([])
  const [selected, setSelected] = useState<QuoteRequest | null>(null)
  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false)
  const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true)
  
  // Measurements
  const [windowWidth, setWindowWidth] = useState('')
  const [windowHeight, setWindowHeight] = useState('')
  const [windowType, setWindowType] = useState('standard')
  const [roomType, setRoomType] = useState('')
  const [treatment, setTreatment] = useState('drapes')
  const [mountType, setMountType] = useState('outside_mount')
  
  // Pricing - auto-calculated
  const [laborCost, setLaborCost] = useState('')
  const [materialsCost, setMaterialsCost] = useState('')
  const [totalQuote, setTotalQuote] = useState('')
  const [quoteNotes, setQuoteNotes] = useState('')
  
  // AI state
  const [analyzing, setAnalyzing] = useState(false)
  const [analysisResult, setAnalysisResult] = useState<any>(null)
  const [selectedPhotoIndex, setSelectedPhotoIndex] = useState(0)

  // Auto-calculate total when labor or materials change
  useEffect(() => {
    const labor = parseFloat(laborCost.replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')) || 0
    const materials = parseFloat(materialsCost.replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')) || 0
    if (labor > 0 || materials > 0) {
      setTotalQuote(`$${(labor + materials).toLocaleString()}`)
    }
  }, [laborCost, materialsCost])

  // Auto-calculate suggested price based on measurements
  useEffect(() => {
    const w = parseFloat(windowWidth) || 0
    const h = parseFloat(windowHeight) || 0
    if (w > 0 && h > 0) {
      // Simple pricing formula: $15/sq ft for labor, $20/sq ft for materials
      const sqFt = (w * h) / 144
      const suggestedLabor = Math.round(sqFt * 15 / 10) * 10  // Round to $10
      const suggestedMaterials = Math.round(sqFt * 20 / 10) * 10
      
      // Only auto-fill if empty
      if (!laborCost) setLaborCost(`$${suggestedLabor}`)
      if (!materialsCost) setMaterialsCost(`$${suggestedMaterials}`)
    }
  }, [windowWidth, windowHeight])

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchRequests()
    const interval = setInterval(fetchRequests, 5000)
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  // Reset form when selecting new request
  useEffect(() => {
    setAnalysisResult(null)
    setSelectedPhotoIndex(0)
    setWindowWidth('')
    setWindowHeight('')
    setWindowType('standard')
    setRoomType('')
    setTreatment('drapes')
    setMountType('outside_mount')
    setQuoteNotes('')
    setLaborCost('')
    setMaterialsCost('')
    setTotalQuote('')
  }, [selected?.id])

  const fetchRequests = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/quote-requests')
      const data = await res.json()
      setRequests(data.requests || [])
    } catch (e) { console.error(e) }
  }

  const analyzePhoto = async () => {
    if (!selected?.photos?.length) return
    
    setAnalyzing(true)
    setAnalysisResult(null)
    
    try {
      const response = await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/smart-analyze', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          image: selected.photos[selectedPhotoIndex],
          reference_object: selected.reference_object,
          message: selected.message || ''
        })
      })
      
      const data = await response.json()
      console.log('AI Response:', data)
      setAnalysisResult(data)
      
      // AUTO-FILL measurements from AI
      if (data?.measurements) {
        const m = data.measurements
        if (m.estimated_width) setWindowWidth(String(m.estimated_width))
        if (m.estimated_height) setWindowHeight(String(m.estimated_height))
        if (m.window_type && m.window_type !== 'unknown') setWindowType(m.window_type)
        if (m.room_type && m.room_type !== 'unknown') {
          setRoomType(m.room_type.replace('_', ' '))
        }
        if (m.treatment_suggestion) setTreatment(m.treatment_suggestion)
        if (m.mount_recommendation) setMountType(m.mount_recommendation)
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('Analysis failed:', e)
      setAnalysisResult({ status: 'error', analysis: 'Connection failed. Enter measurements manually.' })
    }
    
    setAnalyzing(false)
  }

  const generateQuoteNotes = () => {
    const lines = []
    if (windowWidth && windowHeight) {
      lines.push(`Window: ${windowWidth}" W × ${windowHeight}" H`)
    }
    if (windowType !== 'standard') {
      lines.push(`Window Type: ${windowType}`)
    }
    if (roomType) {
      lines.push(`Room: ${roomType}`)
    }
    lines.push(`Treatment: ${treatment.replace('_', ' ')}`)
    lines.push(`Mount: ${mountType.replace('_', ' ')}`)
    
    if (selected?.message) {
      lines.push(``)
      lines.push(`Customer notes: ${selected.message}`)
    }
    
    setQuoteNotes(lines.join('\n'))
  }

  const sendQuote = async () => {
    if (!selected || !totalQuote) return
    setSending(true)
    try {
      await fetch(`http://localhost:8000/api/v1/quote-requests/${selected.id}/quote`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ 
          price: totalQuote, 
          notes: quoteNotes,
          labor_cost: laborCost,
          materials_cost: materialsCost,
          measurements: {
            width: windowWidth,
            height: windowHeight,
            window_type: windowType,
            room_type: roomType,
            treatment: treatment,
            mount_type: mountType
          },
          sent_at: new Date().toISOString() 
        })
      })
      fetchRequests()
      setSelected(null)
    } catch (e) { console.error(e) }
    setSending(false)
  }

  const pending = requests.filter(r => r.status === 'pending')

  const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {
    const colors: Record<string, string> = {
      pending: 'bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400',
      quoted: 'bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400',
      approved: 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400',
    }
    return colors[status] || 'bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-400'
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#0D0D0D] text-white flex">
      {/* Sidebar */}
      <aside className={`${sidebarOpen ? 'w-64' : 'w-20'} bg-[#1A1A1A] border-r border-gray-800 flex flex-col transition-all`}>
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-800">
          <h1 className="text-xl font-bold flex items-center gap-2">
            <span className="text-2xl">🏭</span>
            {sidebarOpen && <span className="text-[#C9A84C]">WorkroomForge</span>}
          </h1>
        </div>
        
        <nav className="flex-1 p-2">
          {[
            { id: 'inbox', icon: Inbox, label: 'Quote Requests', count: pending.length },
            { id: 'jobs', icon: Scissors, label: 'Active Jobs', count: 2 },
            { id: 'production', icon: Package, label: 'Production Queue', count: 1 },
            { id: 'calendar', icon: Calendar, label: 'Schedule', count: 0 },
            { id: 'customers', icon: Users, label: 'Customers', count: 0 },
            { id: 'analytics', icon: BarChart3, label: 'Analytics', count: 0 },
          ].map(item => (
            <button
              key={item.id}
              onClick={() => setActiveTab(item.id)}
              className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg mb-1 transition ${
                activeTab === item.id 
                  ? 'bg-[#C9A84C]/20 text-[#C9A84C] border-l-2 border-[#C9A84C]' 
                  : 'text-gray-400 hover:bg-[#2C2C2C] hover:text-white'
              }`}
            >
              <item.icon className="w-5 h-5" />
              {sidebarOpen && (
                <>
                  <span className="flex-1 text-left">{item.label}</span>
                  {item.count > 0 && (
                    <span className="bg-[#C9A84C] text-black text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">{item.count}</span>
                  )}
                </>
              )}
            </button>
          ))}
        </nav>

        <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-800">
          <button className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-[#2C2C2C]">
            <Settings className="w-5 h-5" />
            {sidebarOpen && <span>Settings</span>}
          </button>
        </div>
      </aside>

      {/* Main Content */}
      <main className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
        {/* Top Bar */}
        <header className="bg-[#1A1A1A] border-b border-gray-800 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
            📥 Quote Requests
          </h2>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <div className="relative">
              <Search className="w-4 h-4 absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-500" />
              <input type="text" placeholder="Search..." className="bg-[#2C2C2C] border border-gray-700 rounded-lg pl-10 pr-4 py-2 text-sm w-64 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none" />
            </div>
            <button className="relative p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white">
              <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />
              {pending.length > 0 && <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-4 h-4 bg-red-500 rounded-full text-xs flex items-center justify-center">{pending.length}</span>}
            </button>
          </div>
        </header>

        {/* Content */}
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden flex">
          {/* Request List */}
          <div className="w-80 bg-[#1A1A1A] border-r border-gray-800 overflow-y-auto">
            <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-800 flex items-center justify-between">
              <span className="text-sm text-gray-400">{requests.length} requests</span>
              <Filter className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
            </div>
            {requests.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="p-8 text-center text-gray-500">
                <Inbox className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-2 opacity-50" />
                <p>No quote requests yet</p>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="divide-y divide-gray-800">
                {requests.map(req => (
                  <div
                    key={req.id}
                    onClick={() => setSelected(req)}
                    className={`p-4 cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#2C2C2C] transition ${selected?.id === req.id ? 'bg-[#2C2C2C] border-l-2 border-[#C9A84C]' : ''}`}
                  >
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                      <span className="font-semibold truncate">{req.name}</span>
                      <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${getStatusColor(req.status)}`}>{req.status}</span>
                    </div>
                    <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm truncate">{req.message}</p>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
                      <Clock className="w-3 h-3" />
                      {new Date(req.created_at).toLocaleString()}
                      {req.photos?.length > 0 && (
                        <span className="flex items-center gap-1 ml-auto">
                          <ImageIcon className="w-3 h-3" /> {req.photos.length}
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Request Detail */}
          <div className="flex-1 p-6 overflow-y-auto">
            {selected ? (
              <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto">
                {/* Header */}
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold">{selected.name}</h3>
                    <p className="text-gray-400 flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
                      <Phone className="w-4 h-4" />
                      {selected.phone}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                  <span className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm ${getStatusColor(selected.status)}`}>{selected.status}</span>
                </div>

                {/* Customer Message */}
                <div className="bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-xl p-4 mb-6 border border-gray-800">
                  <p className="text-gray-300 flex items-start gap-2">
                    <MessageSquare className="w-4 h-4 mt-1 text-gray-500" />
                    {selected.message}
                  </p>
                </div>

                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                  {/* Column 1: Photos */}
                  <div className="bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-xl p-5 border border-gray-800">
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
                      <h4 className="font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
                        <ImageIcon className="w-4 h-4 text-[#C9A84C]" />
                        Photos ({selected.photos?.length || 0})
                      </h4>
                      <button
                        onClick={analyzePhoto}
                        disabled={analyzing || !selected.photos?.length}
                        className="text-xs bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 disabled:bg-purple-800 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-1.5 transition"
                      >
                        {analyzing ? <Loader2 className="w-3 h-3 animate-spin" /> : <Wand2 className="w-3 h-3" />}
                        {analyzing ? 'Analyzing...' : '🔮 AI Analyze'}
                      </button>
                    </div>
                    
                    {selected.photos?.length > 0 ? (
                      <div className="space-y-3">
                        <img 
                          src={selected.photos[selectedPhotoIndex]} 
                          alt="Window" 
                          className="w-full rounded-lg border border-gray-700"
                        />
                        {selected.photos.length > 1 && (
                          <div className="flex gap-2">
                            {selected.photos.map((p, i) => (
                              <button
                                key={i}
                                onClick={() => setSelectedPhotoIndex(i)}
                                className={`w-16 h-16 rounded border-2 overflow-hidden ${selectedPhotoIndex === i ? 'border-purple-500' : 'border-gray-700'}`}
                              >
                                <img src={p} alt="" className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
                              </button>
                            ))}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    ) : (
                      <div className="text-center py-8 text-gray-500">No photos</div>
                    )}

                    {/* AI Result */}
                    {analysisResult && (
                      <div className={`mt-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm ${
                        analysisResult.status === 'success' 
                          ? 'bg-green-500/10 border border-green-500/30 text-green-400' 
                          : 'bg-yellow-500/10 border border-yellow-500/30 text-yellow-400'
                      }`}>
                        {analysisResult.status === 'success' ? (
                          <>
                            <p className="font-semibold mb-1">✅ AI Analysis Complete</p>
                            <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">{analysisResult.analysis}</p>
                            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Confidence: {analysisResult.confidence}</p>
                          </>
                        ) : (
                          <p>⚠️ {analysisResult.analysis || 'Enter measurements manually'}</p>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  {/* Column 2: Measurements */}
                  <div className="bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-xl p-5 border border-gray-800">
                    <h4 className="font-semibold flex items-center gap-2 mb-4">
                      <Ruler className="w-4 h-4 text-[#C9A84C]" />
                      Measurements
                    </h4>
                    
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-4">
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1">Width (in)</label>
                        <input
                          type="number"
                          value={windowWidth}
                          onChange={(e) => setWindowWidth(e.target.value)}
                          placeholder="48"
                          className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-3 py-2 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-lg font-bold"
                        />
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1">Height (in)</label>
                        <input
                          type="number"
                          value={windowHeight}
                          onChange={(e) => setWindowHeight(e.target.value)}
                          placeholder="60"
                          className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-3 py-2 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-lg font-bold"
                        />
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-4">
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1">Window Type</label>
                        <select
                          value={windowType}
                          onChange={(e) => setWindowType(e.target.value)}
                          className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-3 py-2 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-sm"
                        >
                          <option value="standard">Standard</option>
                          <option value="bay">Bay Window</option>
                          <option value="picture">Picture</option>
                          <option value="double-hung">Double Hung</option>
                          <option value="sliding">Sliding</option>
                          <option value="arched">Arched</option>
                        </select>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1">Room</label>
                        <input
                          type="text"
                          value={roomType}
                          onChange={(e) => setRoomType(e.target.value)}
                          placeholder="Living room"
                          className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-3 py-2 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-sm"
                        />
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-4">
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1">Treatment</label>
                        <select
                          value={treatment}
                          onChange={(e) => setTreatment(e.target.value)}
                          className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-3 py-2 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-sm"
                        >
                          <option value="drapes">Drapes</option>
                          <option value="roman_shades">Roman Shades</option>
                          <option value="blinds">Blinds</option>
                          <option value="sheers">Sheers</option>
                          <option value="valance">Valance</option>
                        </select>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1">Mount</label>
                        <select
                          value={mountType}
                          onChange={(e) => setMountType(e.target.value)}
                          className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-3 py-2 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-sm"
                        >
                          <option value="outside_mount">Outside Mount</option>
                          <option value="inside_mount">Inside Mount</option>
                          <option value="ceiling_mount">Ceiling Mount</option>
                        </select>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <button
                      onClick={generateQuoteNotes}
                      className="w-full bg-[#2C2C2C] hover:bg-[#3C3C3C] text-gray-300 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
                    >
                      📝 Generate Quote Notes
                    </button>
                  </div>

                  {/* Column 3: Pricing & Send */}
                  <div className="bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-xl p-5 border border-gray-800">
                    <h4 className="font-semibold flex items-center gap-2 mb-4">
                      <DollarSign className="w-4 h-4 text-[#C9A84C]" />
                      Quote Pricing
                    </h4>
                    
                    {selected.status === 'pending' ? (
                      <>
                        <div className="space-y-3 mb-4">
                          <div>
                            <label className="block text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1">Labor Cost</label>
                            <input
                              type="text"
                              value={laborCost}
                              onChange={(e) => setLaborCost(e.target.value)}
                              placeholder="$500"
                              className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-3 py-2 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none"
                            />
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <label className="block text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1">Materials Cost</label>
                            <input
                              type="text"
                              value={materialsCost}
                              onChange={(e) => setMaterialsCost(e.target.value)}
                              placeholder="$800"
                              className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-3 py-2 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none"
                            />
                          </div>
                          <div className="pt-2 border-t border-gray-700">
                            <label className="block text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1">Total Quote</label>
                            <input
                              type="text"
                              value={totalQuote}
                              onChange={(e) => setTotalQuote(e.target.value)}
                              placeholder="$1,300"
                              className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-3 py-3 border-2 border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-2xl font-bold text-[#C9A84C] text-center"
                            />
                            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1 text-center">Auto-calculates from Labor + Materials</p>
                          </div>
                        </div>

                        <div className="mb-4">
                          <label className="block text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1">Quote Notes</label>
                          <textarea
                            value={quoteNotes}
                            onChange={(e) => setQuoteNotes(e.target.value)}
                            placeholder="Window details, special notes..."
                            rows={4}
                            className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-3 py-2 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none resize-none text-sm"
                          />
                        </div>

                        <button
                          onClick={sendQuote}
                          disabled={sending || !totalQuote}
                          className="w-full bg-[#C9A84C] hover:bg-[#A07A2E] text-[#1A1A1A] font-bold py-3 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-50 transition"
                        >
                          <Send className="w-4 h-4" />
                          {sending ? 'Sending...' : 'Send Quote'}
                        </button>
                      </>
                    ) : (
                      <div className="text-center py-8">
                        <CheckCircle className="w-12 h-12 text-green-500 mx-auto mb-3" />
                        <p className="text-green-400 font-semibold">Quote Sent!</p>
                        <p className="text-2xl font-bold mt-2">{selected.quote?.price}</p>
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full text-gray-500">
                <div className="text-center">
                  <Eye className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 opacity-30" />
                  <p className="text-lg">Select a request to view</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

echo "✅ MAX assigned: Inventory + Financial modules"

# Now build the comprehensive quote builder
cat > ~/Empire/workroomforge/src/app/page.tsx << 'EOF'
'use client'
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import { 
  Inbox, Clock, CheckCircle, DollarSign, Send, Eye, Phone, MessageSquare,
  Settings, Plus, Minus, Copy, Trash2, ChevronDown, ChevronUp,
  Filter, Search, Bell, Image as ImageIcon, Wand2, Loader2, Ruler, Home
} from 'lucide-react'

// Types
interface WindowItem {
  id: string
  width: string
  height: string
  quantity: number
  treatment: string
  lining: string
  hardware: string
  motorization: string
  notes: string
  laborCost: number
  materialsCost: number
  hardwareCost: number
}

interface Room {
  id: string
  name: string
  windows: WindowItem[]
  photos: string[]
  expanded: boolean
}

interface QuoteRequest {
  id: string
  name: string
  phone: string
  message: string
  photos: string[]
  status: string
  created_at: string
  quote: any
  reference_object?: string
}

// Pricing data (based on Rowley Company)
const PRICING = {
  labor: {
    drapes: 85,          // per width
    roman_shades: 120,   // per shade
    blinds: 45,
    sheers: 65,
    valance: 55,
  },
  lining: {
    unlined: 0,
    standard: 8,         // per yard
    blackout: 15,
    thermal: 18,
    interlining: 22,
  },
  hardware: {
    standard_rod: 45,    // per foot
    decorative_rod: 85,
    ripplefold_track: 35,
    motorized_basic: 450,    // per window
    motorized_somfy: 650,
    motorized_lutron: 850,
    customer_supplies: 0,
  }
}

const createEmptyWindow = (): WindowItem => ({
  id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
  width: '',
  height: '',
  quantity: 1,
  treatment: 'drapes',
  lining: 'standard',
  hardware: 'standard_rod',
  motorization: 'none',
  notes: '',
  laborCost: 0,
  materialsCost: 0,
  hardwareCost: 0,
})

const createEmptyRoom = (name: string = 'New Room'): Room => ({
  id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
  name,
  windows: [createEmptyWindow()],
  photos: [],
  expanded: true,
})

export default function WorkroomDashboard() {
  const [requests, setRequests] = useState<QuoteRequest[]>([])
  const [selected, setSelected] = useState<QuoteRequest | null>(null)
  const [rooms, setRooms] = useState<Room[]>([])
  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false)
  const [analyzing, setAnalyzing] = useState(false)
  const [analysisResult, setAnalysisResult] = useState<any>(null)
  const [quoteNotes, setQuoteNotes] = useState('')

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchRequests()
    const interval = setInterval(fetchRequests, 5000)
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (selected) {
      // Initialize with one room from the request
      setRooms([{
        ...createEmptyRoom('Main Area'),
        photos: selected.photos || []
      }])
      setQuoteNotes('')
      setAnalysisResult(null)
    }
  }, [selected?.id])

  const fetchRequests = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/quote-requests')
      const data = await res.json()
      setRequests(data.requests || [])
    } catch (e) { console.error(e) }
  }

  // Room management
  const addRoom = () => {
    setRooms([...rooms, createEmptyRoom(`Room ${rooms.length + 1}`)])
  }

  const removeRoom = (roomId: string) => {
    if (rooms.length > 1) {
      setRooms(rooms.filter(r => r.id !== roomId))
    }
  }

  const updateRoom = (roomId: string, updates: Partial<Room>) => {
    setRooms(rooms.map(r => r.id === roomId ? { ...r, ...updates } : r))
  }

  const toggleRoom = (roomId: string) => {
    setRooms(rooms.map(r => r.id === roomId ? { ...r, expanded: !r.expanded } : r))
  }

  // Window management
  const addWindow = (roomId: string) => {
    setRooms(rooms.map(r => {
      if (r.id === roomId) {
        return { ...r, windows: [...r.windows, createEmptyWindow()] }
      }
      return r
    }))
  }

  const removeWindow = (roomId: string, windowId: string) => {
    setRooms(rooms.map(r => {
      if (r.id === roomId && r.windows.length > 1) {
        return { ...r, windows: r.windows.filter(w => w.id !== windowId) }
      }
      return r
    }))
  }

  const copyWindow = (roomId: string, windowId: string) => {
    setRooms(rooms.map(r => {
      if (r.id === roomId) {
        const windowToCopy = r.windows.find(w => w.id === windowId)
        if (windowToCopy) {
          const newWindow = { ...windowToCopy, id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9) }
          return { ...r, windows: [...r.windows, newWindow] }
        }
      }
      return r
    }))
  }

  const updateWindow = (roomId: string, windowId: string, updates: Partial<WindowItem>) => {
    setRooms(rooms.map(r => {
      if (r.id === roomId) {
        return {
          ...r,
          windows: r.windows.map(w => {
            if (w.id === windowId) {
              const updated = { ...w, ...updates }
              // Recalculate costs
              const width = parseFloat(updated.width) || 0
              const height = parseFloat(updated.height) || 0
              const sqFt = (width * height) / 144
              const widthFt = width / 12
              
              // Labor based on treatment
              const laborRate = PRICING.labor[updated.treatment as keyof typeof PRICING.labor] || 85
              updated.laborCost = Math.round(laborRate * updated.quantity * (sqFt > 0 ? Math.max(1, sqFt / 10) : 1))
              
              // Materials (fabric + lining)
              const liningRate = PRICING.lining[updated.lining as keyof typeof PRICING.lining] || 0
              const fabricYards = sqFt > 0 ? Math.ceil(sqFt / 4) : 2
              updated.materialsCost = Math.round((25 + liningRate) * fabricYards * updated.quantity)
              
              // Hardware
              const hwKey = updated.motorization !== 'none' ? updated.motorization : updated.hardware
              const hwRate = PRICING.hardware[hwKey as keyof typeof PRICING.hardware] || 0
              updated.hardwareCost = Math.round(hwRate * (updated.motorization !== 'none' ? 1 : widthFt || 1) * updated.quantity)
              
              return updated
            }
            return w
          })
        }
      }
      return r
    }))
  }

  // Calculate totals
  const calculateRoomTotal = (room: Room) => {
    return room.windows.reduce((sum, w) => sum + w.laborCost + w.materialsCost + w.hardwareCost, 0)
  }

  const calculateGrandTotal = () => {
    return rooms.reduce((sum, r) => sum + calculateRoomTotal(r), 0)
  }

  const calculateTotalLabor = () => rooms.reduce((sum, r) => sum + r.windows.reduce((s, w) => s + w.laborCost, 0), 0)
  const calculateTotalMaterials = () => rooms.reduce((sum, r) => sum + r.windows.reduce((s, w) => s + w.materialsCost, 0), 0)
  const calculateTotalHardware = () => rooms.reduce((sum, r) => sum + r.windows.reduce((s, w) => s + w.hardwareCost, 0), 0)

  // AI Analysis
  const analyzePhoto = async (roomId: string, photoIndex: number) => {
    const room = rooms.find(r => r.id === roomId)
    if (!room?.photos?.[photoIndex]) return
    
    setAnalyzing(true)
    try {
      const response = await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/smart-analyze', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          image: room.photos[photoIndex],
          message: selected?.message || ''
        })
      })
      const data = await response.json()
      setAnalysisResult(data)
      
      // Auto-fill first empty window in this room
      if (data?.measurements) {
        const m = data.measurements
        const emptyWindow = room.windows.find(w => !w.width || !w.height)
        if (emptyWindow) {
          updateWindow(roomId, emptyWindow.id, {
            width: String(m.estimated_width || ''),
            height: String(m.estimated_height || ''),
            treatment: m.treatment_suggestion || 'drapes',
          })
        }
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e)
      setAnalysisResult({ status: 'error', analysis: 'Failed to analyze' })
    }
    setAnalyzing(false)
  }

  // Generate quote summary
  const generateQuoteNotes = () => {
    const lines: string[] = []
    rooms.forEach(room => {
      lines.push(`\n📍 ${room.name}`)
      lines.push('─'.repeat(30))
      room.windows.forEach((w, i) => {
        if (w.width && w.height) {
          lines.push(`  Window ${i + 1}: ${w.width}" W × ${w.height}" H (Qty: ${w.quantity})`)
          lines.push(`    Treatment: ${w.treatment.replace('_', ' ')}`)
          lines.push(`    Lining: ${w.lining.replace('_', ' ')}`)
          lines.push(`    Hardware: ${w.hardware.replace('_', ' ')}`)
          if (w.motorization !== 'none') {
            lines.push(`    Motorization: ${w.motorization.replace('_', ' ')}`)
          }
          lines.push(`    Subtotal: $${(w.laborCost + w.materialsCost + w.hardwareCost).toLocaleString()}`)
        }
      })
      lines.push(`  Room Total: $${calculateRoomTotal(room).toLocaleString()}`)
    })
    lines.push(`\n${'═'.repeat(30)}`)
    lines.push(`GRAND TOTAL: $${calculateGrandTotal().toLocaleString()}`)
    setQuoteNotes(lines.join('\n'))
  }

  // Send quote
  const sendQuote = async () => {
    if (!selected) return
    setSending(true)
    try {
      await fetch(`http://localhost:8000/api/v1/quote-requests/${selected.id}/quote`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          price: `$${calculateGrandTotal().toLocaleString()}`,
          notes: quoteNotes,
          rooms: rooms,
          totals: {
            labor: calculateTotalLabor(),
            materials: calculateTotalMaterials(),
            hardware: calculateTotalHardware(),
            grand_total: calculateGrandTotal()
          },
          sent_at: new Date().toISOString()
        })
      })
      fetchRequests()
      setSelected(null)
    } catch (e) { console.error(e) }
    setSending(false)
  }

  const pending = requests.filter(r => r.status === 'pending')

  const getStatusColor = (status: string) => ({
    pending: 'bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400',
    quoted: 'bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400',
    approved: 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400',
  }[status] || 'bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-400')

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#0D0D0D] text-white flex">
      {/* Sidebar */}
      <aside className="w-64 bg-[#1A1A1A] border-r border-gray-800 flex flex-col">
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-800">
          <h1 className="text-xl font-bold flex items-center gap-2">
            <span className="text-2xl">🏭</span>
            <span className="text-[#C9A84C]">WorkroomForge</span>
          </h1>
        </div>
        
        <nav className="flex-1 p-2">
          <button className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg mb-1 bg-[#C9A84C]/20 text-[#C9A84C] border-l-2 border-[#C9A84C]">
            <Inbox className="w-5 h-5" />
            <span className="flex-1 text-left">Quote Requests</span>
            {pending.length > 0 && (
              <span className="bg-[#C9A84C] text-black text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">{pending.length}</span>
            )}
          </button>
        </nav>

        <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-800">
          <button className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-[#2C2C2C]">
            <Settings className="w-5 h-5" />
            <span>Settings</span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </aside>

      {/* Main */}
      <main className="flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        {/* Header */}
        <header className="bg-[#1A1A1A] border-b border-gray-800 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">📥 Quote Requests</h2>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <div className="relative">
              <Search className="w-4 h-4 absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-500" />
              <input type="text" placeholder="Search..." className="bg-[#2C2C2C] border border-gray-700 rounded-lg pl-10 pr-4 py-2 text-sm w-64 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none" />
            </div>
            <button className="relative p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white">
              <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />
              {pending.length > 0 && <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-4 h-4 bg-red-500 rounded-full text-xs flex items-center justify-center">{pending.length}</span>}
            </button>
          </div>
        </header>

        <div className="flex-1 flex overflow-hidden">
          {/* Request List */}
          <div className="w-72 bg-[#1A1A1A] border-r border-gray-800 overflow-y-auto">
            <div className="p-3 border-b border-gray-800 text-sm text-gray-400">
              {requests.length} requests
            </div>
            {requests.map(req => (
              <div
                key={req.id}
                onClick={() => setSelected(req)}
                className={`p-4 cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#2C2C2C] border-b border-gray-800 ${selected?.id === req.id ? 'bg-[#2C2C2C] border-l-2 border-[#C9A84C]' : ''}`}
              >
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                  <span className="font-semibold truncate">{req.name}</span>
                  <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${getStatusColor(req.status)}`}>{req.status}</span>
                </div>
                <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm truncate">{req.message}</p>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
                  <Clock className="w-3 h-3" />
                  {new Date(req.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                  {req.photos?.length > 0 && (
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-1 ml-auto">
                      <ImageIcon className="w-3 h-3" /> {req.photos.length}
                    </span>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Quote Builder */}
          <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6">
            {selected ? (
              <div className="max-w-5xl mx-auto">
                {/* Customer Info */}
                <div className="bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-xl p-4 mb-4 border border-gray-800 flex items-center justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="text-xl font-bold">{selected.name}</h3>
                    <p className="text-gray-400 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Phone className="w-4 h-4" /> {selected.phone}
                    </p>
                    <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm mt-1">{selected.message}</p>
                  </div>
                  <span className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-full ${getStatusColor(selected.status)}`}>{selected.status}</span>
                </div>

                {/* Rooms */}
                {rooms.map((room, roomIndex) => (
                  <div key={room.id} className="bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-xl mb-4 border border-gray-800 overflow-hidden">
                    {/* Room Header */}
                    <div 
                      className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-[#2C2C2C] cursor-pointer"
                      onClick={() => toggleRoom(room.id)}
                    >
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                        {room.expanded ? <ChevronUp className="w-4 h-4" /> : <ChevronDown className="w-4 h-4" />}
                        <Home className="w-4 h-4 text-[#C9A84C]" />
                        <input
                          type="text"
                          value={room.name}
                          onChange={(e) => updateRoom(room.id, { name: e.target.value })}
                          onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                          className="bg-transparent font-semibold focus:outline-none focus:border-b border-[#C9A84C]"
                        />
                        <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">({room.windows.length} windows)</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <span className="text-[#C9A84C] font-bold">${calculateRoomTotal(room).toLocaleString()}</span>
                        {rooms.length > 1 && (
                          <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); removeRoom(room.id); }} className="text-red-400 hover:text-red-300 p-1">
                            <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                          </button>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {room.expanded && (
                      <div className="p-4">
                        {/* Photos for this room */}
                        {room.photos.length > 0 && (
                          <div className="flex gap-2 mb-4 overflow-x-auto pb-2">
                            {room.photos.map((photo, i) => (
                              <div key={i} className="relative flex-shrink-0">
                                <img src={photo} alt="" className="w-24 h-24 object-cover rounded-lg border border-gray-700" />
                                <button
                                  onClick={() => analyzePhoto(room.id, i)}
                                  disabled={analyzing}
                                  className="absolute -bottom-2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded flex items-center gap-1"
                                >
                                  {analyzing ? <Loader2 className="w-3 h-3 animate-spin" /> : <Wand2 className="w-3 h-3" />}
                                  AI
                                </button>
                              </div>
                            ))}
                          </div>
                        )}

                        {/* Windows */}
                        {room.windows.map((window, windowIndex) => (
                          <div key={window.id} className="bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg p-4 mb-3 border border-gray-800">
                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
                              <span className="font-semibold text-sm">Window {windowIndex + 1}</span>
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                {/* Quantity */}
                                <div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-[#2C2C2C] rounded-lg px-2 py-1">
                                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">Qty:</span>
                                  <button onClick={() => updateWindow(room.id, window.id, { quantity: Math.max(1, window.quantity - 1) })} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white">
                                    <Minus className="w-3 h-3" />
                                  </button>
                                  <span className="w-6 text-center font-bold">{window.quantity}</span>
                                  <button onClick={() => updateWindow(room.id, window.id, { quantity: window.quantity + 1 })} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white">
                                    <Plus className="w-3 h-3" />
                                  </button>
                                </div>
                                <button onClick={() => copyWindow(room.id, window.id)} className="text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-300 p-1" title="Copy window">
                                  <Copy className="w-4 h-4" />
                                </button>
                                {room.windows.length > 1 && (
                                  <button onClick={() => removeWindow(room.id, window.id)} className="text-red-400 hover:text-red-300 p-1">
                                    <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                                  </button>
                                )}
                              </div>
                            </div>

                            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-3">
                              {/* Dimensions */}
                              <div>
                                <label className="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Width"</label>
                                <input
                                  type="number"
                                  value={window.width}
                                  onChange={(e) => updateWindow(room.id, window.id, { width: e.target.value })}
                                  placeholder="48"
                                  className="w-full bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded px-2 py-1.5 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-sm"
                                />
                              </div>
                              <div>
                                <label className="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Height"</label>
                                <input
                                  type="number"
                                  value={window.height}
                                  onChange={(e) => updateWindow(room.id, window.id, { height: e.target.value })}
                                  placeholder="60"
                                  className="w-full bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded px-2 py-1.5 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-sm"
                                />
                              </div>
                              
                              {/* Treatment */}
                              <div>
                                <label className="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Treatment</label>
                                <select
                                  value={window.treatment}
                                  onChange={(e) => updateWindow(room.id, window.id, { treatment: e.target.value })}
                                  className="w-full bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded px-2 py-1.5 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-sm"
                                >
                                  <option value="drapes">Drapes</option>
                                  <option value="roman_shades">Roman Shades</option>
                                  <option value="blinds">Blinds</option>
                                  <option value="sheers">Sheers</option>
                                  <option value="valance">Valance</option>
                                </select>
                              </div>

                              {/* Lining */}
                              <div>
                                <label className="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Lining</label>
                                <select
                                  value={window.lining}
                                  onChange={(e) => updateWindow(room.id, window.id, { lining: e.target.value })}
                                  className="w-full bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded px-2 py-1.5 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-sm"
                                >
                                  <option value="unlined">Unlined</option>
                                  <option value="standard">Standard</option>
                                  <option value="blackout">Blackout</option>
                                  <option value="thermal">Thermal/Bump</option>
                                  <option value="interlining">Interlining</option>
                                </select>
                              </div>

                              {/* Hardware */}
                              <div>
                                <label className="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Hardware</label>
                                <select
                                  value={window.hardware}
                                  onChange={(e) => updateWindow(room.id, window.id, { hardware: e.target.value })}
                                  className="w-full bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded px-2 py-1.5 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-sm"
                                >
                                  <option value="standard_rod">Standard Rod</option>
                                  <option value="decorative_rod">Decorative Rod</option>
                                  <option value="ripplefold_track">Ripplefold Track</option>
                                  <option value="customer_supplies">Customer Supplies</option>
                                </select>
                              </div>

                              {/* Motorization */}
                              <div>
                                <label className="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Motor</label>
                                <select
                                  value={window.motorization}
                                  onChange={(e) => updateWindow(room.id, window.id, { motorization: e.target.value })}
                                  className="w-full bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded px-2 py-1.5 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-sm"
                                >
                                  <option value="none">None</option>
                                  <option value="motorized_basic">Basic Motor</option>
                                  <option value="motorized_somfy">Somfy</option>
                                  <option value="motorized_lutron">Lutron</option>
                                </select>
                              </div>
                            </div>

                            {/* Window pricing */}
                            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-gray-800 text-sm">
                              <div className="flex gap-4 text-gray-400">
                                <span>Labor: ${window.laborCost}</span>
                                <span>Materials: ${window.materialsCost}</span>
                                <span>Hardware: ${window.hardwareCost}</span>
                              </div>
                              <span className="font-bold text-[#C9A84C]">
                                ${((window.laborCost + window.materialsCost + window.hardwareCost) * window.quantity).toLocaleString()}
                                {window.quantity > 1 && <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 ml-1">× {window.quantity}</span>}
                              </span>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        ))}

                        <button
                          onClick={() => addWindow(room.id)}
                          className="w-full py-2 border border-dashed border-gray-700 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:border-[#C9A84C] transition flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
                        >
                          <Plus className="w-4 h-4" /> Add Window
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                ))}

                {/* Add Room Button */}
                <button
                  onClick={addRoom}
                  className="w-full py-3 mb-4 bg-[#2C2C2C] hover:bg-[#3C3C3C] rounded-xl text-gray-300 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition"
                >
                  <Plus className="w-5 h-5" /> Add Room
                </button>

                {/* Totals & Send */}
                <div className="bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-xl p-5 border border-[#C9A84C]">
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-4">
                    <div className="text-center">
                      <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm">Labor</p>
                      <p className="text-xl font-bold">${calculateTotalLabor().toLocaleString()}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-center">
                      <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm">Materials</p>
                      <p className="text-xl font-bold">${calculateTotalMaterials().toLocaleString()}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-center">
                      <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm">Hardware</p>
                      <p className="text-xl font-bold">${calculateTotalHardware().toLocaleString()}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-center bg-[#C9A84C]/20 rounded-lg py-2">
                      <p className="text-[#C9A84C] text-sm">Grand Total</p>
                      <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-[#C9A84C]">${calculateGrandTotal().toLocaleString()}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="mb-4">
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                      <label className="text-sm text-gray-400">Quote Notes</label>
                      <button onClick={generateQuoteNotes} className="text-xs text-[#C9A84C] hover:underline">
                        📝 Generate Summary
                      </button>
                    </div>
                    <textarea
                      value={quoteNotes}
                      onChange={(e) => setQuoteNotes(e.target.value)}
                      rows={6}
                      className="w-full bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-lg px-3 py-2 border border-gray-700 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none text-sm font-mono"
                      placeholder="Click 'Generate Summary' or type custom notes..."
                    />
                  </div>

                  <button
                    onClick={sendQuote}
                    disabled={sending || calculateGrandTotal() === 0}
                    className="w-full bg-[#C9A84C] hover:bg-[#A07A2E] text-[#1A1A1A] font-bold py-4 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-50 transition text-lg"
                  >
                    <Send className="w-5 h-5" />
                    {sending ? 'Sending...' : `Send Quote - $${calculateGrandTotal().toLocaleString()}`}
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full text-gray-500">
                <div className="text-center">
                  <Eye className="w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 opacity-30" />
                  <p className="text-lg">Select a request to start quoting</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

echo ""
echo "✅ COMPREHENSIVE QUOTE BUILDER INSTALLED!"
echo ""
echo "Features:"
echo "  ✓ Multiple rooms per quote"
echo "  ✓ Multiple windows per room"
echo "  ✓ Quantity selector (+/-)"
echo "  ✓ Copy Window button"
echo "  ✓ All lining options (unlined, standard, blackout, thermal, interlining)"
echo "  ✓ Hardware options (rods, decorative, ripplefold, motorized)"
echo "  ✓ Motorization (None, Basic, Somfy, Lutron)"
echo "  ✓ Rowley Company-based pricing"
echo "  ✓ Per window, per room, and grand total"
echo "  ✓ AI photo analysis per room"
echo ""
echo "📋 MAX ASSIGNED:"
echo "  1. Inventory Management Module"
echo "  2. Financial Module"
echo "  (See ~/Empire/logs/MAX_TASKS_$(date +%Y%m%d).md)"
echo ""
echo "Hard refresh http://localhost:3001 (Ctrl+Shift+R)"


✅ Comprehensive Quote Builder installed!

Hard refresh http://localhost:3001 (Ctrl+Shift+R)

🎯 New Features:
Multi-Room Quoting
Code
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ 📍 Living Room              Total: $2,450   │
│ ├── Window 1: 72"×84" Drapes, Blackout  ×1  │
│ ├── Window 2: 48"×60" Sheers            ×2  │
│ └── [+ Add Window]                          │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ 📍 Master Bedroom           Total: $1,200   │
│ ├── Window 1: 60"×72" Roman, Motorized  ×1  │
│ └── [+ Add Window]                          │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ [+ Add Room]                                │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
│ Labor: $850 │ Materials: $1,200 │ Hardware: $1,600 │
│                GRAND TOTAL: $3,650                 │

Per Window Options:
Qty: +/- buttons for identical windows
📋 Copy: Duplicate window settings
Treatment: Drapes, Roman, Blinds, Sheers, Valance
Lining: Unlined, Standard, Blackout, Thermal/Bump, Interlining
Hardware: Standard Rod, Decorative, Ripplefold Track
Motor: None, Basic, Somfy, Lutron
Pricing (Rowley-based):
Auto-calculates per window
Room subtotals
Grand Total with breakdown

🤖 MAX Tasks Assigned:

Inventory Management Module
Financial Module

Go test it now! 🚀

Great! Let me understand your vision for the Empire Control Center:

📋 Questions:
1. Main Dashboard Purpose
Is this the first thing you see when you open the Empire system?
Should MAX be the central AI assistant that helps navigate all apps?
2. What should be on the Control Center?

Thinking something like:

Code
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  🏰 EMPIRE CONTROL CENTER                                   │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                             │
│   🤖 MAX (AI Assistant)              📊 Quick Stats         │
│   ┌─────────────────────┐            Revenue: $42,500       │
│   │  "Good morning!     │            Open Quotes: 5         │
│   │   You have 3 new    │            Jobs in Progress: 2    │
│   │   quote requests    │            Inventory Alerts: 1    │
│   │   and 1 payment     │                                   │
│   │   received."        │                                   │
│   │                     │                                   │
│   │  [Ask MAX anything] │                                   │
│   └─────────────────────┘                                   │
│                                                             │
│   🚀 QUICK LAUNCH                                           │
│   ┌──────┐ ┌──────┐ ┌──────┐ ┌──────┐ ┌──────┐            │
│   │ 🏭   │ │ 💎   │ │ 🎫   │ │ 📦   │ │ 💰   │            │
│   │Work  │ │Luxe  │ │Ticket│ │Inven │ │Finance│           │
│   │room  │ │Forge │ │      │ │tory  │ │      │            │
│   └──────┘ └──────┘ └──────┘ └──────┘ └──────┘            │
│                                                             │
│   📋 TODAY'S TASKS                 🔔 RECENT ACTIVITY       │
│   □ Quote for Azul Designs         • Payment $1,500 recv'd  │
│   □ Follow up: Smith order         • New quote request      │
│   □ Order fabric from Rowley       • Job #142 completed     │
│                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

3. MAX Interaction Style
Chat interface (like ChatGPT)?
Voice commands (future)?
Quick action buttons ("Create Quote", "Check Inventory", etc.)?
Should MAX proactively suggest things?
4. Apps/Modules to Include

Which should be on the dashboard?

 WorkroomForge (quotes, production)
 LuxeForge (marketplace)
 SupportForge (tickets)
 Inventory Management
 Financial/Accounting
 Calendar/Scheduling
 Customer CRM
 Reports/Analytics
Others?
5. Design Style
Keep the dark theme with gold accents?
More modern/minimal or data-rich?
Mobile-friendly important?
6. Port/URL
Should this be at localhost:3000 as the main entry?
Or a separate empire-control app?

Quick mockup options:

Option A: MAX-Centric (AI First)

Code
MAX takes up 50% of screen, apps are secondary


Option B: Dashboard-Centric (Data First)

Code
Stats/metrics prominent, MAX is a sidebar assistant


Option C: Command Center (Action First)

Code
Big quick-launch buttons, MAX as floating helper


Which direction resonates? Or mix of all?

Got it! Let me explain the port question then build it:

📍 Port/URL Explanation:

Current Setup:

Code
localhost:3000  → LuxeForge (marketplace)
localhost:3001  → WorkroomForge (quotes)
localhost:8000  → Backend API


Options:

Option A: Empire Control at :3000 (Recommended)

Code
localhost:3000  → 🏰 Empire Control Center (MAIN ENTRY)
localhost:3001  → WorkroomForge
localhost:3002  → LuxeForge
localhost:3003  → SupportForge
...etc


Pro: 3000 is the "default" - easy to remember

Option B: Separate Port

Code
localhost:9000  → 🏰 Empire Control Center
localhost:3000  → LuxeForge (unchanged)
...etc


I recommend Option A - Control Center should be the main entry point.

Now let me build the Empire Control Center:

bash
# Create Empire Control Center app
cd ~/Empire
mkdir -p empire-control/src/app

# Create package.json
cat > empire-control/package.json << 'EOF'
{
  "name": "empire-control",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev -p 3000",
    "build": "next build",
    "start": "next start -p 3000"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "next": "14.0.4",
    "react": "^18",
    "react-dom": "^18",
    "lucide-react": "^0.294.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "typescript": "^5",
    "@types/node": "^20",
    "@types/react": "^18",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.3.0",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.0.1",
    "postcss": "^8"
  }
}
EOF

# Create configs
cat > empire-control/tailwind.config.js << 'EOF'
module.exports = {
  content: ["./src/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}"],
  theme: {
    extend: {
      colors: {
        gold: { 400: '#C9A84C', 500: '#B8973F', 600: '#A07A2E' },
        empire: { 900: '#0D0D0D', 800: '#1A1A1A', 700: '#2C2C2C' }
      }
    }
  },
  plugins: [],
}
EOF

cat > empire-control/postcss.config.js << 'EOF'
module.exports = { plugins: { tailwindcss: {}, autoprefixer: {} } }
EOF

cat > empire-control/tsconfig.json << 'EOF'
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "es5",
    "lib": ["dom", "es2017"],
    "jsx": "preserve",
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "strict": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "paths": { "@/*": ["./src/*"] }
  },
  "include": ["**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}
EOF

cat > empire-control/next.config.js << 'EOF'
module.exports = { reactStrictMode: true }
EOF

# Create globals.css
mkdir -p empire-control/src/app
cat > empire-control/src/app/globals.css << 'EOF'
@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

body {
  background: #0D0D0D;
  color: white;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; height: 8px; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #1A1A1A; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #3C3C3C; border-radius: 4px; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: #4C4C4C; }

@keyframes pulse-gold {
  0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(201, 168, 76, 0.4); }
  50% { box-shadow: 0 0 20px 10px rgba(201, 168, 76, 0.1); }
}

.pulse-gold { animation: pulse-gold 2s infinite; }

@keyframes float {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
  50% { transform: translateY(-5px); }
}

.float { animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
EOF

cat > empire-control/src/app/layout.tsx << 'EOF'
import './globals.css'
export const metadata = { title: '🏰 Empire Control Center', description: 'Command your empire' }
export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return <html lang="en"><body>{children}</body></html>
}
EOF

# Create the main Empire Control Center page
cat > empire-control/src/app/page.tsx << 'EOF'
'use client'
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import {
  Factory, Gem, Ticket, Package, DollarSign, Calendar, Users, BarChart3,
  Send, Mic, MicOff, Bell, Settings, Search, ChevronRight, Clock,
  CheckCircle, AlertTriangle, TrendingUp, MessageSquare, Zap, Brain,
  ExternalLink, Plus, RefreshCw
} from 'lucide-react'

// App definitions
const APPS = [
  { id: 'workroom', name: 'WorkroomForge', icon: Factory, color: 'from-amber-500 to-orange-600', port: 3001, desc: 'Quotes & Production' },
  { id: 'luxe', name: 'LuxeForge', icon: Gem, color: 'from-purple-500 to-pink-600', port: 3002, desc: 'Marketplace' },
  { id: 'support', name: 'SupportForge', icon: Ticket, color: 'from-blue-500 to-cyan-600', port: 3003, desc: 'Customer Support' },
  { id: 'inventory', name: 'Inventory', icon: Package, color: 'from-green-500 to-emerald-600', port: 3004, desc: 'Stock Management' },
  { id: 'finance', name: 'Finance', icon: DollarSign, color: 'from-yellow-500 to-amber-600', port: 3005, desc: 'Accounting' },
  { id: 'calendar', name: 'Schedule', icon: Calendar, color: 'from-red-500 to-rose-600', port: 3006, desc: 'Calendar' },
  { id: 'crm', name: 'Customers', icon: Users, color: 'from-indigo-500 to-violet-600', port: 3007, desc: 'CRM' },
  { id: 'analytics', name: 'Analytics', icon: BarChart3, color: 'from-teal-500 to-cyan-600', port: 3008, desc: 'Reports' },
]

export default function EmpireControlCenter() {
  const [maxMessage, setMaxMessage] = useState('')
  const [chatHistory, setChatHistory] = useState<{role: string, content: string, time: Date}[]>([])
  const [isTyping, setIsTyping] = useState(false)
  const [inputValue, setInputValue] = useState('')
  const [stats, setStats] = useState({
    revenue: 0,
    openQuotes: 0,
    activeJobs: 0,
    alerts: 0
  })
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<any[]>([])
  const [activities, setActivities] = useState<any[]>([])
  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<any[]>([])
  const [showNotifications, setShowNotifications] = useState(false)
  const [currentTime, setCurrentTime] = useState(new Date())
  const chatEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

  // Clock
  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setInterval(() => setCurrentTime(new Date()), 1000)
    return () => clearInterval(timer)
  }, [])

  // Initial greeting
  useEffect(() => {
    const hour = new Date().getHours()
    const greeting = hour < 12 ? 'Good morning' : hour < 17 ? 'Good afternoon' : 'Good evening'
    
    setTimeout(() => {
      setMaxMessage(`${greeting}! I'm MAX, your Empire AI assistant. You have 2 new quote requests and $1,500 payment received. What would you like to do?`)
      setChatHistory([{
        role: 'max',
        content: `${greeting}! I'm MAX, your Empire AI assistant. You have 2 new quote requests and $1,500 payment received. What would you like to do?`,
        time: new Date()
      }])
    }, 500)

    // Load stats
    fetchStats()
    fetchTasks()
    fetchActivities()
    fetchNotifications()

    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      fetchStats()
      fetchNotifications()
    }, 30000)

    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  const fetchStats = async () => {
    try {
      const [quotesRes, statsRes] = await Promise.all([
        fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/quote-requests').catch(() => null),
        fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/max/stats').catch(() => null)
      ])
      
      if (quotesRes?.ok) {
        const data = await quotesRes.json()
        const pending = data.requests?.filter((r: any) => r.status === 'pending').length || 0
        setStats(s => ({ ...s, openQuotes: pending }))
      }
      
      if (statsRes?.ok) {
        const data = await statsRes.json()
        setStats(s => ({ ...s, ...data }))
      } else {
        // Mock data
        setStats({
          revenue: 42500,
          openQuotes: 2,
          activeJobs: 3,
          alerts: 1
        })
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e)
    }
  }

  const fetchTasks = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/max/tasks').catch(() => null)
      if (res?.ok) {
        const data = await res.json()
        setTasks(data.tasks || [])
      } else {
        setTasks([
          { id: 1, text: 'Quote for Azul Designs', urgent: true, done: false },
          { id: 2, text: 'Follow up: Smith order', urgent: false, done: false },
          { id: 3, text: 'Order fabric from Rowley', urgent: false, done: false },
          { id: 4, text: 'Review inventory levels', urgent: false, done: true },
        ])
      }
    } catch (e) { console.error(e) }
  }

  const fetchActivities = async () => {
    setActivities([
      { id: 1, text: 'Payment $1,500 received', type: 'payment', time: '10 min ago' },
      { id: 2, text: 'New quote request from Azul Designs', type: 'quote', time: '25 min ago' },
      { id: 3, text: 'Job #142 marked complete', type: 'job', time: '1 hour ago' },
      { id: 4, text: 'Inventory alert: Low on blackout lining', type: 'alert', time: '2 hours ago' },
    ])
  }

  const fetchNotifications = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/notifications?unread_only=true').catch(() => null)
      if (res?.ok) {
        const data = await res.json()
        setNotifications(data.notifications || [])
      }
    } catch (e) { console.error(e) }
  }

  const sendToMax = async () => {
    if (!inputValue.trim()) return
    
    const userMessage = inputValue.trim()
    setInputValue('')
    setChatHistory(h => [...h, { role: 'user', content: userMessage, time: new Date() }])
    setIsTyping(true)

    // Scroll to bottom
    setTimeout(() => chatEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }), 100)

    try {
      const res = await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/max/chat', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ message: userMessage })
      })
      
      if (res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json()
        setChatHistory(h => [...h, { role: 'max', content: data.response, time: new Date() }])
        setMaxMessage(data.response)
      } else {
        // Fallback response
        const fallbackResponse = getSmartResponse(userMessage)
        setChatHistory(h => [...h, { role: 'max', content: fallbackResponse, time: new Date() }])
        setMaxMessage(fallbackResponse)
      }
    } catch (e) {
      const fallbackResponse = getSmartResponse(userMessage)
      setChatHistory(h => [...h, { role: 'max', content: fallbackResponse, time: new Date() }])
      setMaxMessage(fallbackResponse)
    }
    
    setIsTyping(false)
    setTimeout(() => chatEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }), 100)
  }

  const getSmartResponse = (msg: string): string => {
    const lower = msg.toLowerCase()
    if (lower.includes('quote') || lower.includes('workroom')) {
      return "I'll open WorkroomForge for you. You have 2 pending quote requests - Azul Designs needs ripplefold drapes and Test Designer needs 3 windows done. Click the WorkroomForge tile to get started!"
    }
    if (lower.includes('inventory') || lower.includes('stock')) {
      return "Checking inventory... You're running low on blackout lining (15 yards left). I recommend ordering from Rowley Company. Want me to create a purchase order?"
    }
    if (lower.includes('revenue') || lower.includes('money') || lower.includes('payment')) {
      return `This month's revenue is $${stats.revenue.toLocaleString()}. You received a $1,500 payment from Johnson Design Co. today. 3 invoices are pending payment totaling $4,200.`
    }
    if (lower.includes('task') || lower.includes('todo')) {
      return `You have ${tasks.filter(t => !t.done).length} pending tasks. Most urgent: Quote for Azul Designs. Would you like me to prioritize your day?`
    }
    if (lower.includes('help')) {
      return "I can help you with:\n• Quote management (WorkroomForge)\n• Inventory tracking\n• Financial reports\n• Customer management\n• Scheduling\n\nJust ask me anything or click one of the app tiles!"
    }
    return "I understand. Let me help you with that. You can click any app tile below to get started, or ask me specific questions about quotes, inventory, finances, or scheduling."
  }

  const openApp = (port: number) => {
    window.open(`http://localhost:${port}`, '_blank')
  }

  const toggleTask = (taskId: number) => {
    setTasks(tasks.map(t => t.id === taskId ? { ...t, done: !t.done } : t))
  }

  const getActivityIcon = (type: string) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'payment': return <DollarSign className="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" />
      case 'quote': return <MessageSquare className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400" />
      case 'job': return <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />
      case 'alert': return <AlertTriangle className="w-4 h-4 text-yellow-400" />
      default: return <Zap className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-empire-900 text-white">
      {/* Header */}
      <header className="bg-empire-800 border-b border-gray-800 px-6 py-4">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <div className="text-3xl">🏰</div>
            <div>
              <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold bg-gradient-to-r from-gold-400 to-yellow-300 bg-clip-text text-transparent">
                EMPIRE CONTROL CENTER
              </h1>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Command your business empire</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            {/* Time */}
            <div className="text-right mr-4">
              <div className="text-xl font-mono text-gold-400">
                {currentTime.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}
              </div>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                {currentTime.toLocaleDateString([], { weekday: 'long', month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Search */}
            <div className="relative">
              <Search className="w-4 h-4 absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-500" />
              <input 
                type="text" 
                placeholder="Search everything..." 
                className="bg-empire-700 border border-gray-700 rounded-lg pl-10 pr-4 py-2 text-sm w-64 focus:border-gold-400 outline-none"
              />
            </div>

            {/* Notifications */}
            <div className="relative">
              <button 
                onClick={() => setShowNotifications(!showNotifications)}
                className="relative p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-empire-700"
              >
                <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />
                {(notifications.length > 0 || stats.alerts > 0) && (
                  <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-5 h-5 bg-red-500 rounded-full text-xs flex items-center justify-center">
                    {notifications.length || stats.alerts}
                  </span>
                )}
              </button>
            </div>

            {/* Settings */}
            <button className="p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-empire-700">
              <Settings className="w-5 h-5" />
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      <main className="max-w-7xl mx-auto p-6">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-12 gap-6">
          
          {/* Left Column - MAX AI */}
          <div className="col-span-12 lg:col-span-5">
            <div className="bg-empire-800 rounded-2xl border border-gray-800 overflow-hidden h-[600px] flex flex-col">
              {/* MAX Header */}
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-gold-400/20 to-amber-500/20 px-5 py-4 border-b border-gray-800">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-gold-400 to-amber-600 flex items-center justify-center pulse-gold">
                    <Brain className="w-6 h-6 text-empire-900" />
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <h2 className="font-bold text-lg flex items-center gap-2">
                      MAX
                      <span className="text-xs bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">Online</span>
                    </h2>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Your AI Business Assistant</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Chat Area */}
              <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4">
                {chatHistory.map((msg, i) => (
                  <div key={i} className={`flex ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}>
                    <div className={`max-w-[85%] rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 ${
                      msg.role === 'user' 
                        ? 'bg-gold-400 text-empire-900' 
                        : 'bg-empire-700 text-white'
                    }`}>
                      <p className="text-sm whitespace-pre-wrap">{msg.content}</p>
                      <p className={`text-xs mt-1 ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'text-empire-900/50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}>
                        {msg.time.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
                {isTyping && (
                  <div className="flex justify-start">
