                    <div className="bg-empire-700 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3">
                      <div className="flex gap-1">
                        <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-gold-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '0ms' }} />
                        <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-gold-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '150ms' }} />
                        <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-gold-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '300ms' }} />
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
                <div ref={chatEndRef} />
              </div>

              {/* Input */}
              <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-800">
                <div className="flex gap-2">
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    value={inputValue}
                    onChange={(e) => setInputValue(e.target.value)}
                    onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && sendToMax()}
                    placeholder="Ask MAX anything..."
                    className="flex-1 bg-empire-700 border border-gray-700 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:border-gold-400 outline-none"
                  />
                  <button
                    onClick={sendToMax}
                    disabled={!inputValue.trim()}
                    className="bg-gold-400 hover:bg-gold-500 disabled:opacity-50 text-empire-900 px-4 rounded-xl transition"
                  >
                    <Send className="w-5 h-5" />
                  </button>
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-2 mt-2">
                  <button className="text-xs bg-empire-700 hover:bg-empire-600 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition">
                    📊 Show stats
                  </button>
                  <button className="text-xs bg-empire-700 hover:bg-empire-600 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition">
                    📋 My tasks
                  </button>
                  <button className="text-xs bg-empire-700 hover:bg-empire-600 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition">
                    💰 Revenue
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Right Column - Stats & Apps */}
          <div className="col-span-12 lg:col-span-7 space-y-6">
            
            {/* Quick Stats */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
              <div className="bg-empire-800 rounded-xl p-4 border border-gray-800">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                  <TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5 text-green-400" />
                  <span className="text-xs text-green-400">+12%</span>
                </div>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold">${(stats.revenue / 1000).toFixed(1)}k</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Revenue MTD</p>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-empire-800 rounded-xl p-4 border border-gray-800">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                  <MessageSquare className="w-5 h-5 text-yellow-400" />
                </div>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold">{stats.openQuotes}</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Open Quotes</p>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-empire-800 rounded-xl p-4 border border-gray-800">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                  <Factory className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-400" />
                </div>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold">{stats.activeJobs}</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Active Jobs</p>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-empire-800 rounded-xl p-4 border border-gray-800">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                  <AlertTriangle className={`w-5 h-5 ${stats.alerts > 0 ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-gray-600'}`} />
                </div>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold">{stats.alerts}</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Alerts</p>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* App Launcher */}
            <div className="bg-empire-800 rounded-2xl p-5 border border-gray-800">
              <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                <Zap className="w-5 h-5 text-gold-400" />
                Quick Launch
              </h3>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
                {APPS.map(app => (
                  <button
                    key={app.id}
                    onClick={() => openApp(app.port)}
                    className="group relative bg-empire-700 hover:bg-empire-600 rounded-xl p-4 transition-all hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-lg border border-gray-700 hover:border-gray-600"
                  >
                    <div className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br ${app.color} flex items-center justify-center mb-3 group-hover:scale-110 transition`}>
                      <app.icon className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
                    </div>
                    <p className="font-semibold text-sm">{app.name}</p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{app.desc}</p>
                    <ExternalLink className="w-4 h-4 absolute top-3 right-3 text-gray-600 group-hover:text-gray-400" />
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Tasks & Activity */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
              {/* Tasks */}
              <div className="bg-empire-800 rounded-2xl p-5 border border-gray-800">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
                  <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-gold-400" />
                    Today's Tasks
                  </h3>
                  <button className="text-xs text-gold-400 hover:underline">+ Add</button>
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  {tasks.map(task => (
                    <div
                      key={task.id}
                      onClick={() => toggleTask(task.id)}
                      className={`flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg cursor-pointer transition ${
                        task.done ? 'bg-empire-700/50' : 'bg-empire-700 hover:bg-empire-600'
                      }`}
                    >
                      <div className={`w-5 h-5 rounded-full border-2 flex items-center justify-center ${
                        task.done ? 'bg-green-500 border-green-500' : task.urgent ? 'border-red-400' : 'border-gray-600'
                      }`}>
                        {task.done && <CheckCircle className="w-3 h-3 text-white" />}
                      </div>
                      <span className={`flex-1 text-sm ${task.done ? 'line-through text-gray-500' : ''}`}>
                        {task.text}
                      </span>
                      {task.urgent && !task.done && (
                        <span className="text-xs bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">Urgent</span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Activity */}
              <div className="bg-empire-800 rounded-2xl p-5 border border-gray-800">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
                  <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
                    <Bell className="w-5 h-5 text-gold-400" />
                    Recent Activity
                  </h3>
                  <button className="text-gray-500 hover:text-white">
                    <RefreshCw className="w-4 h-4" />
                  </button>
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  {activities.map(activity => (
                    <div key={activity.id} className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-empire-700/50">
                      {getActivityIcon(activity.type)}
                      <div className="flex-1">
                        <p className="text-sm">{activity.text}</p>
                        <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 flex items-center gap-1 mt-1">
                          <Clock className="w-3 h-3" />
                          {activity.time}
                        </p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

# Install dependencies
cd ~/Empire/empire-control
npm install

# Update port for LuxeForge to 3002
sed -i 's/"dev": "next dev"/"dev": "next dev -p 3002"/' ~/Empire/luxeforge/package.json 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "✅ EMPIRE CONTROL CENTER CREATED!"
echo ""
echo "Starting services..."

# Kill old processes
pkill -f "next dev" 2>/dev/null
sleep 2

# Start Empire Control Center on port 3000
cd ~/Empire/empire-control && npm run dev &
sleep 3

# Start WorkroomForge on port 3001
cd ~/Empire/workroomforge && npm run dev &
sleep 2

echo ""
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo "🏰 EMPIRE CONTROL CENTER IS LIVE!"
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo ""
echo "📍 Main Entry:     http://localhost:3000"
echo "🏭 WorkroomForge:  http://localhost:3001"
echo ""
echo "Features:"
echo "  ✓ MAX AI Chat Assistant"
echo "  ✓ Quick Stats Dashboard"
echo "  ✓ App Launcher (8 apps)"
echo "  ✓ Task Management"
echo "  ✓ Activity Feed"
echo "  ✓ Dark theme with gold accents"
echo ""
echo "Open http://localhost:3000 now! 🚀"


Perfect! Let me build Empire Control Center at port 3000 as the main entry:

bash
# Create Empire Control Center app
cd ~/Empire
mkdir -p empire-control/src/app

# Create package.json
cat > empire-control/package.json << 'EOF'
{
  "name": "empire-control",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev -p 3000",
    "build": "next build",
    "start": "next start -p 3000"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "next": "14.0.4",
    "react": "^18",
    "react-dom": "^18",
    "lucide-react": "^0.294.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "typescript": "^5",
    "@types/node": "^20",
    "@types/react": "^18",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.3.0",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.0.1",
    "postcss": "^8"
  }
}
EOF

# Create configs
cat > empire-control/tailwind.config.js << 'EOF'
module.exports = {
  content: ["./src/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}"],
  theme: { extend: { colors: { gold: { 400: '#C9A84C', 500: '#B8973F' }, empire: { 900: '#0D0D0D', 800: '#1A1A1A', 700: '#2C2C2C' } } } },
  plugins: [],
}
EOF

cat > empire-control/postcss.config.js << 'EOF'
module.exports = { plugins: { tailwindcss: {}, autoprefixer: {} } }
EOF

cat > empire-control/tsconfig.json << 'EOF'
{"compilerOptions":{"target":"es5","lib":["dom","es2017"],"jsx":"preserve","module":"esnext","moduleResolution":"bundler","strict":true,"esModuleInterop":true,"skipLibCheck":true},"include":["**/*.ts","**/*.tsx"]}
EOF

cat > empire-control/next.config.js << 'EOF'
module.exports = { reactStrictMode: true }
EOF

mkdir -p empire-control/src/app
cat > empire-control/src/app/globals.css << 'EOF'
@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;
body { background: #0D0D0D; color: white; }
::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #1A1A1A; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #3C3C3C; border-radius: 4px; }
@keyframes pulse-gold { 0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(201, 168, 76, 0.4); } 50% { box-shadow: 0 0 20px 10px rgba(201, 168, 76, 0.1); } }
.pulse-gold { animation: pulse-gold 2s infinite; }
EOF

cat > empire-control/src/app/layout.tsx << 'EOF'
import './globals.css'
export const metadata = { title: '🏰 Empire Control Center' }
export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return <html lang="en"><body>{children}</body></html>
}
EOF

# Main Control Center Page
cat > empire-control/src/app/page.tsx << 'EOF'
'use client'
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import {
  Factory, Gem, Ticket, Package, DollarSign, Calendar, Users, BarChart3,
  Send, Bell, Settings, Search, Clock, CheckCircle, AlertTriangle, 
  TrendingUp, MessageSquare, Zap, Brain, ExternalLink, RefreshCw
} from 'lucide-react'

const APPS = [
  { id: 'workroom', name: 'WorkroomForge', icon: Factory, color: 'from-amber-500 to-orange-600', port: 3001, desc: 'Quotes & Production', badge: 2 },
  { id: 'luxe', name: 'LuxeForge', icon: Gem, color: 'from-purple-500 to-pink-600', port: 3002, desc: 'Marketplace', badge: 0 },
  { id: 'support', name: 'SupportForge', icon: Ticket, color: 'from-blue-500 to-cyan-600', port: 3003, desc: 'Support Tickets', badge: 0 },
  { id: 'inventory', name: 'Inventory', icon: Package, color: 'from-green-500 to-emerald-600', port: 3004, desc: 'Stock & Orders', badge: 1 },
  { id: 'finance', name: 'Finance', icon: DollarSign, color: 'from-yellow-500 to-amber-600', port: 3005, desc: 'Accounting', badge: 0 },
  { id: 'calendar', name: 'Schedule', icon: Calendar, color: 'from-red-500 to-rose-600', port: 3006, desc: 'Calendar', badge: 0 },
  { id: 'crm', name: 'Customers', icon: Users, color: 'from-indigo-500 to-violet-600', port: 3007, desc: 'CRM', badge: 0 },
  { id: 'analytics', name: 'Analytics', icon: BarChart3, color: 'from-teal-500 to-cyan-600', port: 3008, desc: 'Reports', badge: 0 },
]

export default function EmpireControlCenter() {
  const [chatHistory, setChatHistory] = useState<{role: string, content: string, time: Date}[]>([])
  const [isTyping, setIsTyping] = useState(false)
  const [inputValue, setInputValue] = useState('')
  const [stats, setStats] = useState({ revenue: 42500, openQuotes: 2, activeJobs: 3, alerts: 1 })
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState([
    { id: 1, text: 'Quote for Azul Designs', urgent: true, done: false },
    { id: 2, text: 'Follow up: Smith order', urgent: false, done: false },
    { id: 3, text: 'Order fabric from Rowley', urgent: false, done: false },
  ])
  const [activities] = useState([
    { id: 1, text: 'Payment $1,500 received', type: 'payment', time: '10 min ago' },
    { id: 2, text: 'New quote request - Azul Designs', type: 'quote', time: '25 min ago' },
    { id: 3, text: 'Job #142 completed', type: 'job', time: '1 hour ago' },
    { id: 4, text: 'Low stock: Blackout lining', type: 'alert', time: '2 hours ago' },
  ])
  const [currentTime, setCurrentTime] = useState(new Date())
  const chatEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setInterval(() => setCurrentTime(new Date()), 1000)
    return () => clearInterval(timer)
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    const hour = new Date().getHours()
    const greeting = hour < 12 ? 'Good morning' : hour < 17 ? 'Good afternoon' : 'Good evening'
    setTimeout(() => {
      setChatHistory([{
        role: 'max',
        content: `${greeting}! I'm MAX, your Empire AI assistant.\n\n📬 You have 2 new quote requests\n💰 $1,500 payment received today\n⚠️ 1 inventory alert\n\nWhat would you like to focus on?`,
        time: new Date()
      }])
    }, 300)
    fetchStats()
  }, [])

  const fetchStats = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/quote-requests')
      if (res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json()
        const pending = data.requests?.filter((r: any) => r.status === 'pending').length || 0
        setStats(s => ({ ...s, openQuotes: pending }))
      }
    } catch (e) { console.error(e) }
  }

  const sendToMax = async () => {
    if (!inputValue.trim()) return
    const userMsg = inputValue.trim()
    setInputValue('')
    setChatHistory(h => [...h, { role: 'user', content: userMsg, time: new Date() }])
    setIsTyping(true)
    setTimeout(() => chatEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }), 100)

    // Try backend, fallback to smart local response
    try {
      const res = await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/max/chat', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ message: userMsg })
      })
      if (res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json()
        setChatHistory(h => [...h, { role: 'max', content: data.response, time: new Date() }])
      } else throw new Error()
    } catch {
      const response = getSmartResponse(userMsg)
      setChatHistory(h => [...h, { role: 'max', content: response, time: new Date() }])
    }
    setIsTyping(false)
    setTimeout(() => chatEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }), 100)
  }

  const getSmartResponse = (msg: string): string => {
    const l = msg.toLowerCase()
    if (l.includes('quote') || l.includes('workroom')) return "Opening WorkroomForge... You have 2 pending quotes:\n\n1. **Azul Designs** - Ripplefold drapes\n2. **Test Designer** - 3 windows\n\nClick the WorkroomForge tile or I can summarize details!"
    if (l.includes('inventory') || l.includes('stock')) return "📦 Inventory Status:\n\n⚠️ **Low Stock:**\n• Blackout lining: 15 yards left\n• Ripplefold tape: 20 meters\n\n✅ **Good Stock:**\n• Standard lining: 85 yards\n• Drapery hooks: 500+\n\nWant me to create a Rowley order?"
    if (l.includes('revenue') || l.includes('money') || l.includes('finance')) return `💰 Financial Summary:\n\n**This Month:** $${stats.revenue.toLocaleString()}\n**Today:** +$1,500 payment received\n**Pending:** $4,200 in unpaid invoices\n\nClick Finance for full details.`
    if (l.includes('help')) return "I can help with:\n\n🏭 **Quotes** - Create, manage, send\n📦 **Inventory** - Check stock, order\n💰 **Finance** - Revenue, invoices\n📅 **Schedule** - Jobs, deadlines\n👥 **Customers** - CRM, history\n\nJust ask or click an app!"
    return "I understand! Click any app tile below to get started, or ask me about:\n• Quotes & production\n• Inventory levels\n• Financial reports\n• Customer info"
  }

  const openApp = (port: number) => window.open(`http://localhost:${port}`, '_blank')
  const toggleTask = (id: number) => setTasks(tasks.map(t => t.id === id ? { ...t, done: !t.done } : t))

  const getActivityIcon = (type: string) => {
    const icons: Record<string, JSX.Element> = {
      payment: <DollarSign className="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" />,
      quote: <MessageSquare className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400" />,
      job: <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />,
      alert: <AlertTriangle className="w-4 h-4 text-yellow-400" />,
    }
    return icons[type] || <Zap className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#0D0D0D] text-white">
      {/* Header */}
      <header className="bg-[#1A1A1A] border-b border-gray-800 px-6 py-4">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <div className="text-4xl">🏰</div>
            <div>
              <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold bg-gradient-to-r from-[#C9A84C] to-yellow-300 bg-clip-text text-transparent">
                EMPIRE CONTROL CENTER
              </h1>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Command your business empire</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <div className="text-right mr-4 hidden md:block">
              <div className="text-xl font-mono text-[#C9A84C]">
                {currentTime.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}
              </div>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                {currentTime.toLocaleDateString([], { weekday: 'long', month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="relative hidden md:block">
              <Search className="w-4 h-4 absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-500" />
              <input type="text" placeholder="Search..." className="bg-[#2C2C2C] border border-gray-700 rounded-lg pl-10 pr-4 py-2 text-sm w-48 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none" />
            </div>
            <button className="relative p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white">
              <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />
              <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-4 h-4 bg-red-500 rounded-full text-xs flex items-center justify-center">3</span>
            </button>
            <button className="p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white">
              <Settings className="w-5 h-5" />
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      <main className="max-w-7xl mx-auto p-6">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6">
          
          {/* LEFT: MAX AI Chat */}
          <div className="lg:col-span-5">
            <div className="bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-2xl border border-gray-800 overflow-hidden h-[650px] flex flex-col">
              {/* MAX Header */}
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-[#C9A84C]/20 to-amber-500/10 px-5 py-4 border-b border-gray-800">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-[#C9A84C] to-amber-600 flex items-center justify-center pulse-gold">
                    <Brain className="w-7 h-7 text-[#0D0D0D]" />
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <h2 className="font-bold text-xl flex items-center gap-2">
                      MAX
                      <span className="text-xs bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">Online</span>
                    </h2>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Your AI Business Assistant</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Chat Messages */}
              <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4">
                {chatHistory.map((msg, i) => (
                  <div key={i} className={`flex ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}>
                    <div className={`max-w-[90%] rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 ${
                      msg.role === 'user' ? 'bg-[#C9A84C] text-[#0D0D0D]' : 'bg-[#2C2C2C] text-white'
                    }`}>
                      <p className="text-sm whitespace-pre-wrap">{msg.content}</p>
                      <p className={`text-xs mt-2 ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'text-[#0D0D0D]/50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}>
                        {msg.time.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
                {isTyping && (
                  <div className="flex justify-start">
                    <div className="bg-[#2C2C2C] rounded-2xl px-4 py-3">
                      <div className="flex gap-1">
                        <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-[#C9A84C] rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '0ms' }} />
                        <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-[#C9A84C] rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '150ms' }} />
                        <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-[#C9A84C] rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '300ms' }} />
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
                <div ref={chatEndRef} />
              </div>

              {/* Input */}
              <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-800 bg-[#1A1A1A]">
                <div className="flex gap-2">
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    value={inputValue}
                    onChange={(e) => setInputValue(e.target.value)}
                    onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && sendToMax()}
                    placeholder="Ask MAX anything..."
                    className="flex-1 bg-[#2C2C2C] border border-gray-700 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:border-[#C9A84C] outline-none"
                  />
                  <button onClick={sendToMax} disabled={!inputValue.trim()} className="bg-[#C9A84C] hover:bg-[#B8973F] disabled:opacity-50 text-[#0D0D0D] px-5 rounded-xl transition font-semibold">
                    <Send className="w-5 h-5" />
                  </button>
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-2 mt-3 flex-wrap">
                  {['📊 Stats', '📋 Tasks', '💰 Revenue', '📦 Inventory'].map(btn => (
                    <button key={btn} onClick={() => { setInputValue(btn.split(' ')[1]); }} className="text-xs bg-[#2C2C2C] hover:bg-[#3C3C3C] px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition">
                      {btn}
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* RIGHT: Dashboard */}
          <div className="lg:col-span-7 space-y-6">
            
            {/* Quick Stats */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
              {[
                { label: 'Revenue MTD', value: `$${(stats.revenue/1000).toFixed(1)}k`, icon: TrendingUp, color: 'text-green-400', change: '+12%' },
                { label: 'Open Quotes', value: stats.openQuotes, icon: MessageSquare, color: 'text-yellow-400' },
                { label: 'Active Jobs', value: stats.activeJobs, icon: Factory, color: 'text-blue-400' },
                { label: 'Alerts', value: stats.alerts, icon: AlertTriangle, color: stats.alerts > 0 ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-gray-600' },
              ].map((stat, i) => (
                <div key={i} className="bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-xl p-4 border border-gray-800 hover:border-gray-700 transition">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                    <stat.icon className={`w-5 h-5 ${stat.color}`} />
                    {stat.change && <span className="text-xs text-green-400">{stat.change}</span>}
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-2xl font-bold">{stat.value}</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{stat.label}</p>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>

            {/* App Launcher */}
            <div className="bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-2xl p-5 border border-gray-800">
              <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                <Zap className="w-5 h-5 text-[#C9A84C]" />
                Quick Launch
              </h3>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
                {APPS.map(app => (
                  <button
                    key={app.id}
                    onClick={() => openApp(app.port)}
                    className="group relative bg-[#2C2C2C] hover:bg-[#3C3C3C] rounded-xl p-4 transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] border border-gray-700 hover:border-gray-600 text-left"
                  >
                    <div className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br ${app.color} flex items-center justify-center mb-3 group-hover:scale-110 transition`}>
                      <app.icon className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
                    </div>
                    <p className="font-semibold text-sm">{app.name}</p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{app.desc}</p>
                    {app.badge > 0 && (
                      <span className="absolute top-3 right-3 w-5 h-5 bg-red-500 rounded-full text-xs flex items-center justify-center">
                        {app.badge}
                      </span>
                    )}
                    <ExternalLink className="w-4 h-4 absolute bottom-3 right-3 text-gray-600 group-hover:text-gray-400 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition" />
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Tasks & Activity */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
              {/* Tasks */}
              <div className="bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-2xl p-5 border border-gray-800">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
                  <h3 className="font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-[#C9A84C]" />
                    Today's Tasks
                  </h3>
                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">{tasks.filter(t => !t.done).length} remaining</span>
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  {tasks.map(task => (
                    <div
                      key={task.id}
                      onClick={() => toggleTask(task.id)}
                      className={`flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg cursor-pointer transition ${
                        task.done ? 'bg-[#2C2C2C]/50 opacity-60' : 'bg-[#2C2C2C] hover:bg-[#3C3C3C]'
                      }`}
                    >
                      <div className={`w-5 h-5 rounded-full border-2 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 ${
                        task.done ? 'bg-green-500 border-green-500' : task.urgent ? 'border-red-400' : 'border-gray-600'
                      }`}>
                        {task.done && <CheckCircle className="w-3 h-3 text-white" />}
                      </div>
                      <span className={`flex-1 text-sm ${task.done ? 'line-through text-gray-500' : ''}`}>
                        {task.text}
                      </span>
                      {task.urgent && !task.done && (
                        <span className="text-xs bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 px-2 py-0.5 rounded flex-shrink-0">!</span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Activity */}
              <div className="bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-2xl p-5 border border-gray-800">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
                  <h3 className="font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
                    <Bell className="w-5 h-5 text-[#C9A84C]" />
                    Recent Activity
                  </h3>
                  <button onClick={fetchStats} className="text-gray-500 hover:text-white">
                    <RefreshCw className="w-4 h-4" />
                  </button>
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  {activities.map(a => (
                    <div key={a.id} className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-[#2C2C2C]/50 hover:bg-[#2C2C2C] transition cursor-pointer">
                      {getActivityIcon(a.type)}
                      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                        <p className="text-sm truncate">{a.text}</p>
                        <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 flex items-center gap-1 mt-1">
                          <Clock className="w-3 h-3" /> {a.time}
                        </p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>

      {/* Footer */}
      <footer className="border-t border-gray-800 mt-6 py-4 text-center text-xs text-gray-600">
        Empire Control Center v1.0 • Powered by MAX AI
      </footer>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

# Install dependencies
cd ~/Empire/empire-control
npm install 2>&1 | tail -5

# Update other apps to new ports
sed -i 's/-p 3000/-p 3002/' ~/Empire/luxeforge/package.json 2>/dev/null
echo "✓ LuxeForge → port 3002"

# Kill old processes
pkill -f "next dev" 2>/dev/null
sleep 2

echo ""
echo "Starting Empire Control Center..."

# Start apps
cd ~/Empire/empire-control && npm run dev &
sleep 4

cd ~/Empire/workroomforge && npm run dev &
sleep 3

echo ""
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo "🏰 EMPIRE CONTROL CENTER IS LIVE!"
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo ""
echo "🌐 MAIN ENTRY: http://localhost:3000"
echo ""
echo "📍 Port Map:"
echo "   3000 → 🏰 Empire Control Center (MAIN)"
echo "   3001 → 🏭 WorkroomForge"
echo "   3002 → 💎 LuxeForge"
echo "   3003 → 🎫 SupportForge"
echo "   8000 → ⚙️  Backend API"
echo ""
echo "Features:"
echo "   ✓ MAX AI Chat (left panel)"
echo "   ✓ Quick Stats Dashboard"
echo "   ✓ 8 App Quick Launch"
echo "   ✓ Task Management"
echo "   ✓ Activity Feed"
echo "   ✓ Dark theme + Gold accents"
echo ""
echo "🚀 Open http://localhost:3000 now!"

Open http://localhost:3000 now!

Code

│  │ ──────────────────  │    │  Revenue│Quotes│Jobs│Alerts  │   │
│  │ Good afternoon!     │    └──────────────────────────────┘   │

│  │ quote requests...   │    ⚡ QUICK LAUNCH                    │
│  │                     │    ┌────┐┌────┐┌────┐┌────┐          │
│  │                     │    │🏭  ││💎  ││🎫  ││📦  │          │
│  │ [Ask MAX anything]  │    │Work││Luxe││Supp││Inv │          │
│  └─────────────────────┘    └────┘└────┘└────┘└────┘          │
│                                                                 │
│  ✅ Today's Tasks          🔔 Recent Activity                  │

└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘


Try these:

Chat with MAX - Ask "show me quotes" or "inventory status"

Check/uncheck tasks
Click quick buttons (Stats, Tasks, Revenue, Inventory)

What do you think? 🚀

Let me clarify:

📋 Questions:
1. Which window/app are you referring to?

Do you mean one of these that we built before?

LuxeForge (marketplace with MAX sidebar)?
SupportForge (ticket system)?
A standalone MAX interface (full-screen MAX chat)?
Something else?
2. "MAX as interface outside WorkroomForge"

Are you asking for:

Option A: MAX as a floating assistant that appears on ALL apps?

Code
┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Any App (WorkroomForge, Luxe, etc) │
│                                     │
│                            ┌──────┐ │
│                            │ 🤖   │ │
│                            │ MAX  │ │
│                            │ Help │ │
│                            └──────┘ │
└─────────────────────────────────────┘
         ^ Floating button that opens MAX chat


Option B: A separate MAX-only window you can open alongside any app?

Code

Let me restore the full Founder Dashboard (MAX Interface):

bash
# Create/restore founder_dashboard
mkdir -p ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app

# Package.json
cat > ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/package.json << 'EOF'
{
  "name": "founder-dashboard",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev -p 3009",
    "build": "next build",
    "start": "next start -p 3009"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "next": "14.0.4",
    "react": "^18",
    "react-dom": "^18",
    "lucide-react": "^0.294.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "typescript": "^5",
    "@types/node": "^20",
    "@types/react": "^18",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.3.0",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.0.1",
    "postcss": "^8"
  }
}
EOF

cat > ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/tailwind.config.js << 'EOF'
module.exports = {
  content: ["./src/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}"],
  theme: { extend: {} },
  plugins: [],
}
EOF

cat > ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/postcss.config.js << 'EOF'
module.exports = { plugins: { tailwindcss: {}, autoprefixer: {} } }
EOF

cat > ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/tsconfig.json << 'EOF'
{"compilerOptions":{"target":"es5","lib":["dom","es2017"],"jsx":"preserve","module":"esnext","moduleResolution":"bundler","strict":true,"esModuleInterop":true,"skipLibCheck":true},"include":["**/*.ts","**/*.tsx"]}
EOF

cat > ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/next.config.js << 'EOF'

EOF

mkdir -p ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app
cat > ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/globals.css << 'EOF'
@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;
body { background: #050508; color: white; }
::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #1a1a2e; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #3a3a5e; border-radius: 4px; }
EOF

cat > ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/layout.tsx << 'EOF'

export const metadata = { title: '🤖 MAX - AI Assistant Manager' }
export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return <html lang="en"><body>{children}</body></html>
}
EOF

# Main Founder Dashboard with MAX, AI Model Selector, Photo Upload, Notifications
cat > ~/Empire/founder_dashboard/src/app/page.tsx << 'EOF'
'use client'
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import {
  Brain, Send, Upload, Image, Paperclip, Mic, MicOff, Settings,
  Bot, CheckCircle, AlertTriangle, Clock, Zap, RefreshCw,
  ChevronDown, X, FileText, Camera, Loader2, Bell, MessageSquare
} from 'lucide-react'

const API_URL = 'http://localhost:8000/api/v1'

interface Message {
  role: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system'
  content: string
  model?: string
  timestamp: Date
  attachments?: { type: string; name: string; url?: string }[]
}

interface Desk {
  id: string
  name: string
  description: string
  status: string
  stats: { completed: number; failed: number }
}

interface AIModel {
  id: string
  name: string
  available: boolean
  type: string
}

interface Notification {
  id: string
  from: string
  message: string
  timestamp: Date
  read: boolean
  type: 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error'
}

export default function FounderDashboard() {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([
    { 
      role: 'assistant', 
      content: "Hello! I'm MAX, your AI Assistant Manager. All 8 desks are online and ready.\n\nI can help you with:\n• 📊 Business analytics & reports\n• 📸 Photo analysis & measurements\n• 📝 Document processing\n• 🤖 Manage AI agents\n\nHow can I assist you today?",
      timestamp: new Date()
    }
  ])
  const [input, setInput] = useState('')
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
  const [desks, setDesks] = useState<Desk[]>([])
  const [models, setModels] = useState<AIModel[]>([
    { id: 'ollama-llama', name: 'Ollama (Local)', available: true, type: 'local' },
    { id: 'claude', name: 'Claude', available: false, type: 'cloud' },
    { id: 'xai', name: 'xAI Grok', available: false, type: 'cloud' },
    { id: 'gpt4', name: 'GPT-4', available: false, type: 'cloud' },
  ])
  const [selectedModel, setSelectedModel] = useState('ollama-llama')
  const [stats, setStats] = useState({ total_completed: 0, active_tasks: 0 })
  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<Notification[]>([
    { id: '1', from: 'IRIS', message: 'Inventory scan complete. 3 items low stock.', timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 300000), read: false, type: 'warning' },
    { id: '2', from: 'NOVA', message: 'Daily analytics report ready.', timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 600000), read: false, type: 'info' },
    { id: '3', from: 'CLEO', message: 'New quote request from Azul Designs.', timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 900000), read: false, type: 'success' },
  ])
  const [showNotifications, setShowNotifications] = useState(false)
  const [showModelSelector, setShowModelSelector] = useState(false)
  const [uploadedFiles, setUploadedFiles] = useState<File[]>([])
  const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false)
  const [showDesks, setShowDesks] = useState(true)
  
  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)
  const imageInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchDesks()
    fetchModels()
    fetchStats()
    fetchNotifications()
    const interval = setInterval(() => { 
      fetchDesks()
      fetchStats()
      fetchNotifications()
    }, 30000)
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
  }, [messages])

  const fetchDesks = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/max/desks`)
      if (res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json()
        setDesks(data.desks || [])
      }
    } catch (e) {
      // Use default desks
      setDesks([
        { id: 'desk-1', name: 'CLEO', description: 'Customer Service', status: 'online', stats: { completed: 45, failed: 2 } },
        { id: 'desk-2', name: 'NOVA', description: 'Analytics', status: 'online', stats: { completed: 120, failed: 0 } },
        { id: 'desk-3', name: 'IRIS', description: 'Inventory', status: 'online', stats: { completed: 67, failed: 1 } },
        { id: 'desk-4', name: 'ATLAS', description: 'Shipping', status: 'online', stats: { completed: 89, failed: 3 } },
        { id: 'desk-5', name: 'SAGE', description: 'Finance', status: 'online', stats: { completed: 34, failed: 0 } },
        { id: 'desk-6', name: 'PIXEL', description: 'Design', status: 'idle', stats: { completed: 23, failed: 0 } },
        { id: 'desk-7', name: 'SCOUT', description: 'Research', status: 'online', stats: { completed: 56, failed: 1 } },
        { id: 'desk-8', name: 'FORGE', description: 'Production', status: 'online', stats: { completed: 78, failed: 2 } },
      ])
    }
  }

  const fetchModels = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/max/models`)
      if (res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json()
        if (data.models) setModels(data.models)
      }
    } catch (e) { console.log('Using default models') }
  }

  const fetchStats = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/max/stats`)
      if (res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json()
        setStats(data)
      }
    } catch (e) {
      setStats({ total_completed: 512, active_tasks: 8 })
    }
  }

  const fetchNotifications = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/notifications?unread_only=true`)
      if (res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json()
        if (data.notifications?.length) {
          setNotifications(prev => {
            const newNotifs = data.notifications.filter((n: any) => 
              !prev.find(p => p.id === n.id)
            )
            return [...newNotifs, ...prev].slice(0, 20)
          })
        }
      }
    } catch (e) { /* use existing */ }
  }

  const sendMessage = async () => {
    if (!input.trim() && uploadedFiles.length === 0) return
    if (isLoading) return

    const attachments = uploadedFiles.map(f => ({
      type: f.type.startsWith('image/') ? 'image' : 'file',
      name: f.name
    }))

    const userMessage: Message = { 
      role: 'user', 
      content: input || '(Uploaded files for analysis)',
      timestamp: new Date(),
      attachments
    }
    
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, userMessage])
    setInput('')
    setUploadedFiles([])
    setIsLoading(true)

    try {
      // If there are images, use vision endpoint
      if (uploadedFiles.some(f => f.type.startsWith('image/'))) {
        const imageFile = uploadedFiles.find(f => f.type.startsWith('image/'))
        if (imageFile) {
          const base64 = await fileToBase64(imageFile)
          const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/smart-analyze`, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({
              image: base64,
              message: input || 'Analyze this image'
            })
          })
          const data = await res.json()
          
          let responseText = ''
          if (data.status === 'success') {
            responseText = `📸 **Image Analysis Complete**\n\n`
            if (data.measurements) {
              responseText += `📐 **Measurements:**\n`
              responseText += `• Width: ${data.measurements.estimated_width}"\n`
              responseText += `• Height: ${data.measurements.estimated_height}"\n`
              responseText += `• Window Type: ${data.measurements.window_type}\n`
              responseText += `• Room: ${data.measurements.room_type}\n`
              responseText += `• Suggested Treatment: ${data.measurements.treatment_suggestion}\n\n`
            }
            responseText += `🎯 Confidence: ${data.confidence}\n`
            responseText += `🔧 Methods: ${data.methods_used?.join(', ')}`
          } else {
            responseText = data.analysis || 'Analysis complete.'
          }
          
          setMessages(prev => [...prev, { 
            role: 'assistant', 
            content: responseText, 
            model: 'Vision AI',
            timestamp: new Date()
          }])
          setIsLoading(false)
          return
        }
      }

      // Regular chat
      const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/max/chat`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          message: input,
          model: selectedModel,
          history: messages.slice(-10).map(m => ({ role: m.role, content: m.content }))
        })
      })
      
      if (res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json()
        setMessages(prev => [...prev, { 
          role: 'assistant', 
          content: data.response || 'I processed your request.',
          model: data.model_used,
          timestamp: new Date()
        }])
      } else {
        throw new Error('API error')
      }
    } catch (e) {
      // Fallback response
      const fallback = getFallbackResponse(input)
      setMessages(prev => [...prev, { 
        role: 'assistant', 
        content: fallback,
        model: 'Local',
        timestamp: new Date()
      }])
    }
    
    setIsLoading(false)
  }

  const fileToBase64 = (file: File): Promise<string> => {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const reader = new FileReader()
      reader.readAsDataURL(file)
      reader.onload = () => {
        const result = reader.result as string
        resolve(result.split(',')[1])
      }
      reader.onerror = error => reject(error)
    })
  }

  const getFallbackResponse = (msg: string): string => {
    const l = msg.toLowerCase()
    if (l.includes('status') || l.includes('desk')) return `📊 All ${desks.length} AI desks are operational.\n\nOnline: ${desks.filter(d => d.status === 'online').length}\nIdle: ${desks.filter(d => d.status === 'idle').length}\nTotal tasks completed: ${stats.total_completed}`
    if (l.includes('help')) return "I can help with:\n\n📸 **Photo Analysis** - Upload images for AI measurement\n📊 **Reports** - Ask for analytics\n🤖 **Agents** - Check desk status\n📝 **Tasks** - Manage your todo list\n\nJust type or upload a file!"
    return "I've received your message. The AI backend might be starting up. Try again in a moment, or check that the backend is running on port 8000."
  }

  const handleFileUpload = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    const files = Array.from(e.target.files || [])
    setUploadedFiles(prev => [...prev, ...files].slice(0, 5))
  }

  const removeFile = (index: number) => {
    setUploadedFiles(prev => prev.filter((_, i) => i !== index))
  }

  const markNotificationRead = (id: string) => {
    setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => n.id === id ? { ...n, read: true } : n))
  }

  const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {
    if (status === 'online') return 'bg-green-500'
    if (status === 'idle') return 'bg-yellow-500'
    return 'bg-red-500'
  }

  const getNotificationIcon = (type: string) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'success': return <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" />
      case 'warning': return <AlertTriangle className="w-4 h-4 text-yellow-400" />
      case 'error': return <AlertTriangle className="w-4 h-4 text-red-400" />
      default: return <Bell className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400" />
    }
  }

  const unreadCount = notifications.filter(n => !n.read).length

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#050508] text-white flex">
      {/* Left Sidebar - AI Desks */}
      <aside className={`${showDesks ? 'w-64' : 'w-0'} bg-[#0a0a10] border-r border-gray-800 flex flex-col overflow-hidden transition-all`}>
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-800">
          <h2 className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider">AI Agents</h2>
        </div>
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-2">
          {desks.map(desk => (
            <div key={desk.id} className="p-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-[#1a1a2e] cursor-pointer mb-1 transition">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                <div className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${getStatusColor(desk.status)}`} />
                <span className="font-semibold text-sm">{desk.name}</span>
              </div>
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{desk.description}</p>
              <div className="flex gap-2 mt-1 text-xs text-gray-600">
                <span>✓ {desk.stats.completed}</span>
                {desk.stats.failed > 0 && <span className="text-red-500">✗ {desk.stats.failed}</span>}
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-800 text-xs text-gray-500">
          <div className="flex justify-between">
            <span>Tasks Completed</span>
            <span className="text-green-400">{stats.total_completed}</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex justify-between mt-1">
            <span>Active</span>
            <span className="text-blue-400">{stats.active_tasks}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </aside>

      {/* Main Chat Area */}
      <main className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
        {/* Header */}
        <header className="bg-[#0a0a10] border-b border-gray-800 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <button onClick={() => setShowDesks(!showDesks)} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white">
              <Bot className="w-6 h-6" />
            </button>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center">
                <Brain className="w-5 h-5" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <h2 className="font-semibold text-white">MAX</h2>
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">AI Assistant Manager</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            {/* Model Selector */}
            <div className="relative">
              <button 
                onClick={() => setShowModelSelector(!showModelSelector)}
                className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-[#1a1a2e] border border-gray-700 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm hover:border-gray-600"
              >
                <Zap className="w-4 h-4 text-yellow-400" />
                {models.find(m => m.id === selectedModel)?.name || 'Select Model'}
                <ChevronDown className="w-4 h-4" />
              </button>
              
              {showModelSelector && (
                <div className="absolute right-0 top-full mt-2 w-56 bg-[#1a1a2e] border border-gray-700 rounded-lg shadow-xl z-50">
                  {models.map(m => (
                    <button
                      key={m.id}
                      onClick={() => { setSelectedModel(m.id); setShowModelSelector(false) }}
                      disabled={!m.available}
                      className={`w-full text-left px-4 py-3 hover:bg-[#2a2a4e] first:rounded-t-lg last:rounded-b-lg flex items-center justify-between ${
                        !m.available ? 'opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed' : ''
                      } ${selectedModel === m.id ? 'bg-[#2a2a4e]' : ''}`}
                    >
                      <span>{m.name}</span>
                      {!m.available && <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">No Key</span>}
                      {selectedModel === m.id && <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" />}
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>

            {/* Notifications */}
            <div className="relative">
              <button 
                onClick={() => setShowNotifications(!showNotifications)}
                className="relative p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white"
              >
                <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />
                {unreadCount > 0 && (
                  <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-5 h-5 bg-red-500 rounded-full text-xs flex items-center justify-center">
                    {unreadCount}
                  </span>
                )}
              </button>

              {showNotifications && (
                <div className="absolute right-0 top-full mt-2 w-80 bg-[#1a1a2e] border border-gray-700 rounded-lg shadow-xl z-50 max-h-96 overflow-y-auto">
                  <div className="p-3 border-b border-gray-700 font-semibold text-sm">
                    Agent Notifications
                  </div>
                  {notifications.length === 0 ? (
                    <div className="p-4 text-center text-gray-500 text-sm">No notifications</div>
                  ) : (
                    notifications.map(n => (
                      <div 
                        key={n.id} 
                        onClick={() => markNotificationRead(n.id)}
                        className={`p-3 border-b border-gray-800 hover:bg-[#2a2a4e] cursor-pointer ${
                          !n.read ? 'bg-[#1a1a3e]' : ''
                        }`}
                      >
                        <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                          {getNotificationIcon(n.type)}
                          <div className="flex-1">
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                              <span className="font-semibold text-sm">{n.from}</span>
                              {!n.read && <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-blue-500 rounded-full" />}
                            </div>
                            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">{n.message}</p>
                            <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 mt-1">
                              {new Date(n.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString()}
                            </p>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    ))
                  )}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>

            <button className="p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white">
              <Settings className="w-5 h-5" />
            </button>
          </div>
        </header>

        {/* Messages */}
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 space-y-4">
          {messages.map((msg, i) => (
            <div key={i} className={`flex ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}>
              <div className={`max-w-[80%] rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 ${
                msg.role === 'user' 
                  ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-blue-600 text-white' 
                  : 'bg-[#1a1a2e] text-white'
              }`}>
                {msg.attachments && msg.attachments.length > 0 && (
                  <div className="flex gap-2 mb-2">
                    {msg.attachments.map((a, j) => (
                      <div key={j} className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-black/30 rounded px-2 py-1 text-xs">
                        {a.type === 'image' ? <Image className="w-3 h-3" /> : <FileText className="w-3 h-3" />}
                        {a.name}
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}
                <p className="text-sm whitespace-pre-wrap">{msg.content}</p>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-2 text-xs opacity-60">
                  <span>{msg.timestamp.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}</span>
                  {msg.model && <span className="bg-black/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">{msg.model}</span>}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
          {isLoading && (
            <div className="flex justify-start">
              <div className="bg-[#1a1a2e] rounded-2xl px-4 py-3">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-400">MAX is thinking...</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
          <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
        </div>

        {/* Upload Preview */}
        {uploadedFiles.length > 0 && (
          <div className="px-6 py-2 border-t border-gray-800 flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
            {uploadedFiles.map((file, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-[#1a1a2e] rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
                {file.type.startsWith('image/') ? (
                  <Image className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400" />
                ) : (
                  <FileText className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
                )}
                <span className="text-sm truncate max-w-32">{file.name}</span>
                <button onClick={() => removeFile(i)} className="text-gray-500 hover:text-red-400">
                  <X className="w-4 h-4" />
                </button>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Input Area */}
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-800 bg-[#0a0a10]">
          <div className="flex items-end gap-3">
            {/* File Uploads */}
            <div className="flex gap-1">
              <input type="file" ref={fileInputRef} onChange={handleFileUpload} className="hidden" multiple />
              <input type="file" ref={imageInputRef} onChange={handleFileUpload} accept="image/*" className="hidden" />
              
              <button 
                onClick={() => imageInputRef.current?.click()}
                className="p-2.5 text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-[#1a1a2e] rounded-lg transition"
                title="Upload Image"
              >
                <Camera className="w-5 h-5" />
              </button>
              <button 
                onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()}
                className="p-2.5 text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-[#1a1a2e] rounded-lg transition"
                title="Upload File"
              >
                <Paperclip className="w-5 h-5" />
              </button>
            </div>

            {/* Text Input */}
            <div className="flex-1 relative">
              <textarea
                value={input}
                onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)}
                onKeyDown={(e) => {
                  if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
                    e.preventDefault()
                    sendMessage()
                  }
                }}
                placeholder="Ask MAX anything... (Shift+Enter for new line)"
                rows={1}
                className="w-full bg-[#1a1a2e] border border-gray-700 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 pr-12 focus:border-purple-500 outline-none resize-none"
                style={{ minHeight: '48px', maxHeight: '120px' }}
              />
            </div>

            {/* Voice & Send */}
            <button 
              onClick={() => setIsRecording(!isRecording)}
              className={`p-2.5 rounded-lg transition ${
                isRecording ? 'bg-red-500 text-white' : 'text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-[#1a1a2e]'
              }`}
              title="Voice Input (Coming Soon)"
            >
              {isRecording ? <MicOff className="w-5 h-5" /> : <Mic className="w-5 h-5" />}
            </button>
            
            <button
              onClick={sendMessage}
              disabled={isLoading || (!input.trim() && uploadedFiles.length === 0)}
              className="p-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-blue-600 hover:from-purple-700 hover:to-blue-700 disabled:opacity-50 rounded-lg transition"
            >
              <Send className="w-5 h-5" />
            </button>
          </div>
          
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-2 text-xs text-gray-600">
            <span>Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line</span>
            <span>Model: {models.find(m => m.id === selectedModel)?.name}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF
