# ============================================
# SHARED NAVIGATION COMPONENT
# ============================================
cat > ~/Empire/shared/components/EmpireNav.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'
'use client'
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import {
  Home, Brain, Bell, Settings, Search, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight,
  Factory, Package, Calendar, Truck, DollarSign, FileText, Receipt,
  BarChart3, Users, History, Globe, Lightbulb, FlaskConical, TrendingUp,
  ShoppingBag, Building2, Handshake, Ticket, BookOpen, Video, User,
  Shield, Plug, CreditCard, Bot, Menu, X, Command, Sparkles,
  HelpCircle, LogOut, Moon, ExternalLink, Clock, Star, Zap
} from 'lucide-react'

interface NavItem {
  id: string
  label: string
  icon: any
  href?: string
  port?: number
  status: 'ready' | 'coming' | 'beta'
  badge?: number
}

interface NavSection {
  id: string
  label: string
  icon: any
  color: string
  items: NavItem[]
}

const NAV_SECTIONS: NavSection[] = [
  {
    id: 'command',
    label: 'Command',
    icon: Home,
    color: 'from-amber-500 to-orange-600',
    items: [
      { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Control Center', icon: Home, port: 3000, status: 'ready' },
      { id: 'max', label: 'MAX AI', icon: Brain, port: 3009, status: 'ready' },
      { id: 'notifications', label: 'Notifications', icon: Bell, href: '/notifications', status: 'coming', badge: 3 },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'operations',
    label: 'Operations',
    icon: Factory,
    color: 'from-blue-500 to-cyan-600',
    items: [
      { id: 'workroom', label: 'WorkroomForge', icon: Factory, port: 3001, status: 'ready' },
      { id: 'inventory', label: 'Inventory', icon: Package, port: 3004, status: 'ready' },
      { id: 'scheduler', label: 'Job Scheduler', icon: Calendar, href: '/scheduler', status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'installations', label: 'Installations', icon: Truck, href: '/installations', status: 'coming' },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'finance',
    label: 'Finance',
    icon: DollarSign,
    color: 'from-green-500 to-emerald-600',
    items: [
      { id: 'finance-dash', label: 'Dashboard', icon: DollarSign, port: 3005, status: 'ready' },
      { id: 'invoicing', label: 'Invoicing', icon: FileText, href: '/invoicing', status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'expenses', label: 'Expenses', icon: Receipt, href: '/expenses', status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'reports', label: 'Reports', icon: BarChart3, href: '/reports', status: 'coming' },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'customers',
    label: 'Customers',
    icon: Users,
    color: 'from-purple-500 to-pink-600',
    items: [
      { id: 'crm', label: 'CRM', icon: Users, port: 3007, status: 'ready' },
      { id: 'quotes', label: 'Quote History', icon: History, href: '/quotes', status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'portal', label: 'Customer Portal', icon: Globe, href: '/portal', status: 'coming' },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'innovation',
    label: 'Innovation',
    icon: Lightbulb,
    color: 'from-yellow-500 to-orange-600',
    items: [
      { id: 'creations', label: 'Creations Lab', icon: Lightbulb, port: 3006, status: 'ready' },
      { id: 'research', label: 'R&D Projects', icon: FlaskConical, href: '/research', status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'market', label: 'Market Research', icon: TrendingUp, href: '/market', status: 'coming' },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'marketplace',
    label: 'Marketplace',
    icon: ShoppingBag,
    color: 'from-pink-500 to-rose-600',
    items: [
      { id: 'store', label: 'LuxeForge Store', icon: ShoppingBag, href: '/store', status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'suppliers', label: 'Supplier Catalog', icon: Building2, href: '/suppliers', status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'partners', label: 'Partner Network', icon: Handshake, href: '/partners', status: 'coming' },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'support',
    label: 'Support',
    icon: Ticket,
    color: 'from-cyan-500 to-blue-600',
    items: [
      { id: 'tickets', label: 'Support Tickets', icon: Ticket, href: '/tickets', status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'knowledge', label: 'Knowledge Base', icon: BookOpen, href: '/knowledge', status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'training', label: 'Training Videos', icon: Video, href: '/training', status: 'coming' },
    ]
  },
]

const SETTINGS_ITEMS: NavItem[] = [
  { id: 'profile', label: 'Business Profile', icon: User, href: '/settings/profile', status: 'coming' },
  { id: 'team', label: 'Team & Permissions', icon: Shield, href: '/settings/team', status: 'coming' },
  { id: 'integrations', label: 'Integrations', icon: Plug, href: '/settings/integrations', status: 'coming' },
  { id: 'billing', label: 'Billing', icon: CreditCard, href: '/settings/billing', status: 'coming' },
]

const AI_AGENTS = [
  { id: 'max', name: 'MAX', role: 'Director', color: 'from-amber-500 to-orange-600', status: 'online' },
  { id: 'darwin', name: 'DARWIN', role: 'R&D', color: 'from-cyan-500 to-blue-600', status: 'online' },
  { id: 'cleo', name: 'CLEO', role: 'Customers', color: 'from-pink-500 to-rose-600', status: 'online' },
  { id: 'nova', name: 'NOVA', role: 'Analytics', color: 'from-violet-500 to-purple-600', status: 'online' },
  { id: 'iris', name: 'IRIS', role: 'Inventory', color: 'from-emerald-500 to-green-600', status: 'online' },
  { id: 'sage', name: 'SAGE', role: 'Finance', color: 'from-yellow-500 to-amber-600', status: 'online' },
  { id: 'forge', name: 'FORGE', role: 'Production', color: 'from-slate-500 to-gray-600', status: 'online' },
  { id: 'pixel', name: 'PIXEL', role: 'Design', color: 'from-fuchsia-500 to-pink-600', status: 'idle' },
]

interface EmpireNavProps {
  currentPage: string
  currentPort: number
}

export default function EmpireNav({ currentPage, currentPort }: EmpireNavProps) {
  const [collapsed, setCollapsed] = useState(false)
  const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = useState(false)
  const [showSearch, setShowSearch] = useState(false)
  const [showAgents, setShowAgents] = useState(false)
  const [expandedSections, setExpandedSections] = useState<string[]>(['command', 'operations'])
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')
  const [recentItems, setRecentItems] = useState<string[]>(['dashboard', 'workroom', 'crm'])

  // Keyboard shortcut for search
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === 'k') {
        e.preventDefault()
        setShowSearch(true)
      }
      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        setShowSearch(false)
      }
    }
    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown)
    return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown)
  }, [])

  const toggleSection = (sectionId: string) => {
    setExpandedSections(prev => 
      prev.includes(sectionId) ? prev.filter(id => id !== sectionId) : [...prev, sectionId]
    )
  }

  const navigateTo = (item: NavItem) => {
    if (item.status === 'coming') {
      // Show coming soon modal or navigate to placeholder
      window.location.href = `http://localhost:3000/coming-soon?module=${item.id}`
      return
    }
    if (item.port) {
      window.location.href = `http://localhost:${item.port}`
    } else if (item.href) {
      window.location.href = `http://localhost:3000${item.href}`
    }
  }

  const getStatusBadge = (status: string) => {
    if (status === 'coming') return <span className="text-[10px] bg-gray-500/30 text-gray-400 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">Soon</span>
    if (status === 'beta') return <span className="text-[10px] bg-purple-500/30 text-purple-400 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">Beta</span>
    return null
  }

  const isActive = (item: NavItem) => item.port === currentPort || item.id === currentPage

  // Search results
  const allItems = NAV_SECTIONS.flatMap(s => s.items)
  const searchResults = searchQuery 
    ? allItems.filter(item => item.label.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
    : []

  return (
    <>
      {/* Mobile Header */}
      <div className="lg:hidden fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 h-14 bg-[#0a0a12] border-b border-white/10 z-50 flex items-center justify-between px-4">
        <button onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)} className="p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg">
          <Menu className="w-6 h-6" />
        </button>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500 to-orange-600 flex items-center justify-center">
            <span className="text-sm font-bold">E</span>
          </div>
          <span className="font-bold">Empire</span>
        </div>
        <button onClick={() => setShowSearch(true)} className="p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg">
          <Search className="w-5 h-5" />
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Mobile Overlay */}
      {mobileOpen && (
        <div className="lg:hidden fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 z-50" onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)} />
      )}

      {/* Sidebar */}
      <aside className={`
        fixed top-0 left-0 h-full bg-[#0a0a12] border-r border-white/10 z-50 flex flex-col
        transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out
        ${collapsed ? 'w-16' : 'w-64'}
        ${mobileOpen ? 'translate-x-0' : '-translate-x-full lg:translate-x-0'}
      `}>
        {/* Logo */}
        <div className={`h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center ${collapsed ? 'justify-center px-2' : 'justify-between px-4'}`}>
          {!collapsed && (
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500 to-orange-600 flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg shadow-amber-500/20">
                <span className="text-lg font-bold text-white">E</span>
              </div>
              <div>
                <h1 className="font-bold text-sm bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-400 to-orange-500 bg-clip-text text-transparent">EMPIRE</h1>
                <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">Founder's Edition</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
          {collapsed && (
            <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500 to-orange-600 flex items-center justify-center">
              <span className="text-lg font-bold text-white">E</span>
            </div>
          )}
          <button 
            onClick={() => setCollapsed(!collapsed)}
            className="hidden lg:flex p-1.5 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-white"
          >
            {collapsed ? <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" /> : <ChevronLeft className="w-4 h-4" />}
          </button>
          <button 
            onClick={() => setMobileOpen(false)}
            className="lg:hidden p-1.5 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg"
          >
            <X className="w-5 h-5" />
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Search Button */}
        {!collapsed && (
          <div className="p-3">
            <button 
              onClick={() => setShowSearch(true)}
              className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition"
            >
              <Search className="w-4 h-4" />
              <span>Search...</span>
              <kbd className="ml-auto text-[10px] bg-white/10 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">⌘K</kbd>
            </button>
          </div>
        )}
        {collapsed && (
          <div className="p-2">
            <button 
              onClick={() => setShowSearch(true)}
              className="w-full p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-white"
              title="Search (⌘K)"
            >
              <Search className="w-5 h-5 mx-auto" />
            </button>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Navigation */}
        <nav className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto py-2 px-2">
          {NAV_SECTIONS.map(section => (
            <div key={section.id} className="mb-2">
              {/* Section Header */}
              <button
                onClick={() => !collapsed && toggleSection(section.id)}
                className={`w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-2 py-2 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition ${collapsed ? 'justify-center' : ''}`}
                title={collapsed ? section.label : undefined}
              >
                <section.icon className="w-4 h-4 flex-shrink-0" />
                {!collapsed && (
                  <>
                    <span className="text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider flex-1 text-left">{section.label}</span>
                    <ChevronRight className={`w-3 h-3 transition-transform ${expandedSections.includes(section.id) ? 'rotate-90' : ''}`} />
                  </>
                )}
              </button>

              {/* Section Items */}
              {(collapsed || expandedSections.includes(section.id)) && (
                <div className={collapsed ? 'space-y-1 mt-1' : 'ml-2 space-y-0.5 mt-1'}>
                  {section.items.map(item => (
                    <button
                      key={item.id}
                      onClick={() => navigateTo(item)}
                      className={`w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-2 py-2 rounded-lg transition ${
                        isActive(item)
                          ? 'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400'
                          : item.status === 'coming'
                          ? 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-400 hover:bg-white/5'
                          : 'text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5'
                      } ${collapsed ? 'justify-center' : ''}`}
                      title={collapsed ? item.label : undefined}
                    >
                      <item.icon className="w-4 h-4 flex-shrink-0" />
                      {!collapsed && (
                        <>
                          <span className="text-sm flex-1 text-left">{item.label}</span>
                          {item.badge && (
                            <span className="w-5 h-5 bg-red-500 text-white text-[10px] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                              {item.badge}
                            </span>
                          )}
                          {getStatusBadge(item.status)}
                        </>
                      )}
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          ))}
        </nav>

        {/* Bottom Section */}
        <div className="border-t border-white/10 p-2">
          {/* AI Agents Button */}
          <button
            onClick={() => setShowAgents(!showAgents)}
            className={`w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-2 py-2 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition ${collapsed ? 'justify-center' : ''}`}
            title={collapsed ? 'AI Agents' : undefined}
          >
            <Bot className="w-4 h-4" />
            {!collapsed && (
              <>
                <span className="text-sm flex-1 text-left">AI Agents</span>
                <span className="w-5 h-5 bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 text-[10px] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">8</span>
              </>
            )}
          </button>

          {/* Settings */}
          <button
            onClick={() => navigateTo({ id: 'settings', label: 'Settings', icon: Settings, href: '/settings', status: 'coming' })}
            className={`w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-2 py-2 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition ${collapsed ? 'justify-center' : ''}`}
            title={collapsed ? 'Settings' : undefined}
          >
            <Settings className="w-4 h-4" />
            {!collapsed && <span className="text-sm">Settings</span>}
          </button>

          {/* Help */}
          <button
            className={`w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-2 py-2 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition ${collapsed ? 'justify-center' : ''}`}
            title={collapsed ? 'Help' : undefined}
          >
            <HelpCircle className="w-4 h-4" />
            {!collapsed && <span className="text-sm">Help & Support</span>}
          </button>
        </div>
      </aside>

      {/* Search Modal */}
      {showSearch && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-start justify-center pt-20 px-4">
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={() => setShowSearch(false)} />
          <div className="relative bg-[#1a1a2e] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-xl overflow-hidden">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 border-b border-white/10">
              <Search className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
              <input
                type="text"
                placeholder="Search modules, features, or ask MAX..."
                value={searchQuery}
                onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
                className="flex-1 bg-transparent outline-none text-lg"
                autoFocus
              />
              <kbd className="px-2 py-1 bg-white/10 rounded text-xs text-gray-400">ESC</kbd>
            </div>
            
            {/* Quick Actions */}
            {!searchQuery && (
              <div className="p-4">
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Quick Actions</p>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                  {[
                    { label: 'New Quote', icon: FileText, action: () => navigateTo({ id: 'workroom', label: 'WorkroomForge', icon: Factory, port: 3001, status: 'ready' }) },
                    { label: 'Check Inventory', icon: Package, action: () => navigateTo({ id: 'inventory', label: 'Inventory', icon: Package, port: 3004, status: 'ready' }) },
                    { label: 'View Revenue', icon: DollarSign, action: () => navigateTo({ id: 'finance', label: 'Finance', icon: DollarSign, port: 3005, status: 'ready' }) },
                    { label: 'Ask MAX', icon: Brain, action: () => navigateTo({ id: 'max', label: 'MAX', icon: Brain, port: 3009, status: 'ready' }) },
                  ].map((action, i) => (
                    <button
                      key={i}
                      onClick={() => { action.action(); setShowSearch(false) }}
                      className="flex items-center gap-2 p-3 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-xl transition"
                    >
                      <action.icon className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-400" />
                      <span className="text-sm">{action.label}</span>
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>

                <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mt-4 mb-2">Recent</p>
                <div className="space-y-1">
                  {recentItems.map(itemId => {
                    const item = allItems.find(i => i.id === itemId)
                    if (!item) return null
                    return (
                      <button
                        key={item.id}
                        onClick={() => { navigateTo(item); setShowSearch(false) }}
                        className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 p-2 hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg transition"
                      >
                        <Clock className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
                        <span className="text-sm">{item.label}</span>
                      </button>
                    )
                  })}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Search Results */}
            {searchQuery && (
              <div className="p-4 max-h-80 overflow-y-auto">
                {searchResults.length === 0 ? (
                  <p className="text-gray-500 text-center py-8">No results found</p>
                ) : (
                  <div className="space-y-1">
                    {searchResults.map(item => (
                      <button
                        key={item.id}
                        onClick={() => { navigateTo(item); setShowSearch(false) }}
                        className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 p-3 hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg transition"
                      >
                        <item.icon className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
                        <span className="flex-1 text-left">{item.label}</span>
                        {getStatusBadge(item.status)}
                      </button>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* AI Agents Panel */}
      {showAgents && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center p-4">
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60" onClick={() => setShowAgents(false)} />
          <div className="relative bg-[#1a1a2e] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-md overflow-hidden">
            <div className="p-4 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center justify-between">
              <h2 className="font-bold text-lg flex items-center gap-2">
                <Bot className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400" />
                AI Agents
              </h2>
              <button onClick={() => setShowAgents(false)} className="p-1 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg">
                <X className="w-5 h-5" />
              </button>
            </div>
            <div className="p-4 space-y-2 max-h-96 overflow-y-auto">
              {AI_AGENTS.map(agent => (
                <div
                  key={agent.id}
                  className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-xl transition cursor-pointer"
                  onClick={() => { setShowAgents(false); navigateTo({ id: 'max', label: 'MAX', icon: Brain, port: 3009, status: 'ready' }) }}
                >
                  <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br ${agent.color} flex items-center justify-center`}>
                    <span className="font-bold text-sm">{agent.name[0]}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex-1">
                    <p className="font-medium">{agent.name}</p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{agent.role}</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${agent.status === 'online' ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-yellow-500'}`} />
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Mobile Bottom Nav */}
      <div className="lg:hidden fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-[#0a0a12] border-t border-white/10 z-40 flex items-center justify-around px-2">
        {[
          { icon: Home, label: 'Home', port: 3000 },
          { icon: Factory, label: 'Workroom', port: 3001 },
          { icon: Brain, label: 'MAX', port: 3009 },
          { icon: Users, label: 'CRM', port: 3007 },
          { icon: Menu, label: 'More', action: () => setMobileOpen(true) },
        ].map((item, i) => (
          <button
            key={i}
            onClick={() => item.action ? item.action() : window.location.href = `http://localhost:${item.port}`}
            className={`flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 rounded-xl transition ${
              item.port === currentPort ? 'text-amber-400' : 'text-gray-400'
            }`}
          >
            <item.icon className="w-5 h-5" />
            <span className="text-[10px]">{item.label}</span>
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>
    </>
  )
}
ENDOFFILE

echo "✅ Shared navigation component created!"

# ============================================
# UPDATE EMPIRE CONTROL CENTER WITH NAV
# ============================================
cat > ~/Empire/empire-control/src/app/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'
'use client'
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import {
  Factory, Package, DollarSign, Calendar, Users, BarChart3,
  Send, Bell, Settings, Search, Clock, CheckCircle, AlertTriangle, 
  TrendingUp, MessageSquare, Zap, Brain, ExternalLink, RefreshCw,
  X, ChevronRight, ChevronLeft, Target, Cpu, FlaskConical, Lightbulb,
  Home, Menu, Bot, FileText, Ticket, ShoppingBag, HelpCircle,
  Truck, Receipt, History, Globe, Building2, Handshake, BookOpen,
  Video, User, Shield, Plug, CreditCard, Command, Star, Moon
} from 'lucide-react'

// Navigation sections
const NAV_SECTIONS = [
  {
    id: 'command', label: 'Command', items: [
      { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Control Center', icon: Home, port: 3000, status: 'ready' },
      { id: 'max', label: 'MAX AI', icon: Brain, port: 3009, status: 'ready' },
      { id: 'notifications', label: 'Notifications', icon: Bell, status: 'coming' },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'operations', label: 'Operations', items: [
      { id: 'workroom', label: 'WorkroomForge', icon: Factory, port: 3001, status: 'ready' },
      { id: 'inventory', label: 'Inventory', icon: Package, port: 3004, status: 'ready' },
      { id: 'scheduler', label: 'Job Scheduler', icon: Calendar, status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'installations', label: 'Installations', icon: Truck, status: 'coming' },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'finance', label: 'Finance', items: [
      { id: 'finance-dash', label: 'Dashboard', icon: DollarSign, port: 3005, status: 'ready' },
      { id: 'invoicing', label: 'Invoicing', icon: FileText, status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'expenses', label: 'Expenses', icon: Receipt, status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'reports', label: 'Reports', icon: BarChart3, status: 'coming' },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'customers', label: 'Customers', items: [
      { id: 'crm', label: 'CRM', icon: Users, port: 3007, status: 'ready' },
      { id: 'quotes', label: 'Quote History', icon: History, status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'portal', label: 'Customer Portal', icon: Globe, status: 'coming' },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'innovation', label: 'Innovation', items: [
      { id: 'creations', label: 'Creations Lab', icon: Lightbulb, port: 3006, status: 'ready' },
      { id: 'research', label: 'R&D Projects', icon: FlaskConical, status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'market', label: 'Market Research', icon: TrendingUp, status: 'coming' },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'marketplace', label: 'Marketplace', items: [
      { id: 'store', label: 'LuxeForge Store', icon: ShoppingBag, status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'suppliers', label: 'Suppliers', icon: Building2, status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'partners', label: 'Partners', icon: Handshake, status: 'coming' },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'support', label: 'Support', items: [
      { id: 'tickets', label: 'Tickets', icon: Ticket, status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'knowledge', label: 'Knowledge Base', icon: BookOpen, status: 'coming' },
      { id: 'training', label: 'Training', icon: Video, status: 'coming' },
    ]
  },
]

const AI_AGENTS = [
  { id: 'max', name: 'MAX', role: 'Director', color: 'from-amber-500 to-orange-600', status: 'online' },
  { id: 'darwin', name: 'DARWIN', role: 'R&D', color: 'from-cyan-500 to-blue-600', status: 'online' },
  { id: 'cleo', name: 'CLEO', role: 'Customers', color: 'from-pink-500 to-rose-600', status: 'online' },
  { id: 'nova', name: 'NOVA', role: 'Analytics', color: 'from-violet-500 to-purple-600', status: 'online' },
  { id: 'iris', name: 'IRIS', role: 'Inventory', color: 'from-emerald-500 to-green-600', status: 'online' },
  { id: 'sage', name: 'SAGE', role: 'Finance', color: 'from-yellow-500 to-amber-600', status: 'online' },
  { id: 'forge', name: 'FORGE', role: 'Production', color: 'from-slate-500 to-gray-600', status: 'online' },
  { id: 'pixel', name: 'PIXEL', role: 'Design', color: 'from-fuchsia-500 to-pink-600', status: 'idle' },
]

const STATS = [
  { label: 'Revenue MTD', value: '$52.4k', change: '+18%', icon: TrendingUp, color: 'text-green-400' },
  { label: 'Open Quotes', value: '7', icon: MessageSquare, color: 'text-yellow-400' },
  { label: 'Active Jobs', value: '5', icon: Factory, color: 'text-blue-400' },
  { label: 'Low Stock', value: '3', icon: AlertTriangle, color: 'text-red-400' },
]

export default function EmpireControlCenter() {
  const [sidebarCollapsed, setSidebarCollapsed] = useState(false)
  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false)
  const [expandedSections, setExpandedSections] = useState(['command', 'operations'])
  const [showSearch, setShowSearch] = useState(false)
  const [showAgents, setShowAgents] = useState(false)
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')
  const [currentTime, setCurrentTime] = useState(new Date())
  const [chatHistory, setChatHistory] = useState<{role: string, content: string, time: Date}[]>([])
  const [chatInput, setChatInput] = useState('')
  const [isTyping, setIsTyping] = useState(false)
  const chatEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setInterval(() => setCurrentTime(new Date()), 1000)
    return () => clearInterval(timer)
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === 'k') {
        e.preventDefault()
        setShowSearch(true)
      }
      if (e.key === 'Escape') setShowSearch(false)
    }
    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown)
    return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown)
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    const hour = new Date().getHours()
    const greeting = hour < 12 ? 'Good morning' : hour < 17 ? 'Good afternoon' : 'Good evening'
    setTimeout(() => {
      setChatHistory([{
        role: 'max',
        content: `${greeting}! I'm MAX, your Empire AI.\n\n📊 Quick Stats:\n• Revenue: $52.4k (+18%)\n• 7 open quotes\n• 3 low stock items\n\nHow can I help?`,
        time: new Date()
      }])
    }, 500)
  }, [])

  const toggleSection = (id: string) => {
    setExpandedSections(prev => prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter(s => s !== id) : [...prev, id])
  }

  const navigateTo = (item: any) => {
    if (item.status === 'coming') {
      window.location.href = `/coming-soon?module=${item.id}&name=${encodeURIComponent(item.label)}`
      return
    }
    if (item.port) window.location.href = `http://localhost:${item.port}`
  }

  const sendToMax = () => {
    if (!chatInput.trim()) return
    setChatHistory(h => [...h, { role: 'user', content: chatInput, time: new Date() }])
    setChatInput('')
    setIsTyping(true)
    setTimeout(() => {
      setChatHistory(h => [...h, { 
        role: 'max', 
        content: "I'll help you with that! You can navigate to any module using the sidebar, or ask me specific questions about your business.", 
        time: new Date() 
      }])
      setIsTyping(false)
    }, 1500)
  }

  const allItems = NAV_SECTIONS.flatMap(s => s.items)
  const searchResults = searchQuery ? allItems.filter(i => i.label.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())) : []

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#030308] text-white flex">
      {/* Sidebar */}
      <aside className={`fixed top-0 left-0 h-full bg-[#0a0a12] border-r border-white/10 z-50 flex flex-col transition-all duration-300 ${sidebarCollapsed ? 'w-16' : 'w-64'} ${mobileMenuOpen ? 'translate-x-0' : '-translate-x-full lg:translate-x-0'}`}>
        {/* Logo */}
        <div className={`h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center ${sidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center' : 'justify-between px-4'}`}>
          {!sidebarCollapsed && (
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500 to-orange-600 flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg shadow-amber-500/20">
                <span className="text-lg font-bold">E</span>
              </div>
              <div>
                <h1 className="font-bold text-sm bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-400 to-orange-500 bg-clip-text text-transparent">EMPIRE</h1>
                <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">Founder's Edition</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
          {sidebarCollapsed && (
            <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500 to-orange-600 flex items-center justify-center">
              <span className="text-lg font-bold">E</span>
            </div>
          )}
          <button onClick={() => setSidebarCollapsed(!sidebarCollapsed)} className="hidden lg:flex p-1.5 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg text-gray-400">
            {sidebarCollapsed ? <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" /> : <ChevronLeft className="w-4 h-4" />}
          </button>
          <button onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)} className="lg:hidden p-1.5 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg">
            <X className="w-5 h-5" />
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Search */}
        {!sidebarCollapsed && (
          <div className="p-3">
            <button onClick={() => setShowSearch(true)} className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-400">
              <Search className="w-4 h-4" /><span>Search...</span><kbd className="ml-auto text-[10px] bg-white/10 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">⌘K</kbd>
            </button>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Nav */}
        <nav className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto py-2 px-2">
          {NAV_SECTIONS.map(section => (
            <div key={section.id} className="mb-2">
              <button onClick={() => !sidebarCollapsed && toggleSection(section.id)} className={`w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-2 py-2 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 ${sidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center' : ''}`}>
                {!sidebarCollapsed && <span className="text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider flex-1 text-left">{section.label}</span>}
              </button>
              {(sidebarCollapsed || expandedSections.includes(section.id)) && (
                <div className={sidebarCollapsed ? 'space-y-1 mt-1' : 'ml-2 space-y-0.5 mt-1'}>
                  {section.items.map(item => (
                    <button key={item.id} onClick={() => navigateTo(item)} className={`w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-2 py-2 rounded-lg transition ${item.port === 3000 ? 'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400' : item.status === 'coming' ? 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-400 hover:bg-white/5' : 'text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5'} ${sidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center' : ''}`} title={sidebarCollapsed ? item.label : undefined}>
                      <item.icon className="w-4 h-4 flex-shrink-0" />
                      {!sidebarCollapsed && <span className="text-sm flex-1 text-left">{item.label}</span>}
                      {!sidebarCollapsed && item.status === 'coming' && <span className="text-[10px] bg-gray-500/30 text-gray-400 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">Soon</span>}
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          ))}
        </nav>

        {/* Bottom */}
        <div className="border-t border-white/10 p-2">
          <button onClick={() => setShowAgents(true)} className={`w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-2 py-2 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 ${sidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center' : ''}`}>
            <Bot className="w-4 h-4" />
            {!sidebarCollapsed && <><span className="text-sm flex-1 text-left">AI Agents</span><span className="w-5 h-5 bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 text-[10px] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">8</span></>}
          </button>
          <button className={`w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-2 py-2 rounded-lg text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 ${sidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center' : ''}`}>
            <Settings className="w-4 h-4" />
            {!sidebarCollapsed && <span className="text-sm">Settings</span>}
          </button>
        </div>
      </aside>

      {/* Main Content */}
      <main className={`flex-1 ${sidebarCollapsed ? 'lg:ml-16' : 'lg:ml-64'} transition-all duration-300`}>
        {/* Top Bar */}
        <header className="h-16 bg-[#0a0a12]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 sticky top-0 z-40 flex items-center justify-between px-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <button onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(true)} className="lg:hidden p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg">
              <Menu className="w-5 h-5" />
            </button>
            <h1 className="text-xl font-bold">Control Center</h1>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <div className="text-right hidden md:block">
              <p className="text-sm font-mono text-amber-400">{currentTime.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{currentTime.toLocaleDateString([], { weekday: 'short', month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}</p>
            </div>
            <button className="relative p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg">
              <Bell className="w-5 h-5" />
              <span className="absolute top-1 right-1 w-2 h-2 bg-red-500 rounded-full" />
            </button>
            <button onClick={() => navigateTo({ port: 3009 })} className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500/20 to-orange-500/20 border border-amber-500/30 text-amber-400 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-amber-500/30 transition">
              <Brain className="w-4 h-4" />
              <span className="text-sm font-medium hidden sm:inline">Ask MAX</span>
            </button>
          </div>
        </header>

        {/* Dashboard Content */}
        <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
          {/* Stats */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
            {STATS.map((stat, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="bg-[#0a0a12] rounded-xl p-5 border border-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition cursor-pointer">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
                  <stat.icon className={`w-5 h-5 ${stat.color}`} />
                  {stat.change && <span className="text-xs text-green-400">{stat.change}</span>}
                </div>
                <p className="text-2xl font-bold">{stat.value}</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">{stat.label}</p>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
            {/* MAX Chat */}
            <div className="bg-[#0a0a12] rounded-2xl border border-white/10 overflow-hidden">
              <div className="px-5 py-4 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center gap-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500/10 to-orange-500/10">
                <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500 to-orange-600 flex items-center justify-center">
                  <Brain className="w-5 h-5" />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <h2 className="font-bold">MAX</h2>
                  <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">AI Director • Online</p>
                </div>
                <button onClick={() => navigateTo({ port: 3009 })} className="ml-auto text-gray-400 hover:text-white">
                  <ExternalLink className="w-4 h-4" />
                </button>
              </div>
              <div className="h-64 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-3">
                {chatHistory.map((msg, i) => (
                  <div key={i} className={`flex ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}>
                    <div className={`max-w-[85%] rounded-xl px-4 py-2 ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'bg-amber-500 text-black' : 'bg-white/10'}`}>
                      <p className="text-sm whitespace-pre-wrap">{msg.content}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
                {isTyping && (
                  <div className="flex gap-1 px-4 py-2 bg-white/10 rounded-xl w-fit">
                    <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-amber-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" />
                    <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-amber-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{animationDelay:'0.1s'}} />
                    <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-amber-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{animationDelay:'0.2s'}} />
                  </div>
                )}
                <div ref={chatEndRef} />
              </div>
              <div className="p-4 border-t border-white/10">
                <div className="flex gap-2">
                  <input type="text" value={chatInput} onChange={(e) => setChatInput(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && sendToMax()} placeholder="Ask MAX..." className="flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 text-sm focus:border-amber-500/50 outline-none" />
                  <button onClick={sendToMax} className="bg-amber-500 text-black px-4 rounded-xl font-medium hover:bg-amber-400 transition">
                    <Send className="w-4 h-4" />
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Quick Access */}
            <div className="bg-[#0a0a12] rounded-2xl border border-white/10 p-5">
              <h2 className="font-bold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"><Zap className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400" /> Quick Access</h2>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                {[
                  { label: 'New Quote', icon: FileText, port: 3001, color: 'from-blue-500 to-cyan-600' },
                  { label: 'Inventory', icon: Package, port: 3004, color: 'from-green-500 to-emerald-600' },
                  { label: 'Finance', icon: DollarSign, port: 3005, color: 'from-yellow-500 to-amber-600' },
                  { label: 'CRM', icon: Users, port: 3007, color: 'from-purple-500 to-pink-600' },
                  { label: 'Creations', icon: Lightbulb, port: 3006, color: 'from-pink-500 to-rose-600' },
                  { label: 'MAX AI', icon: Brain, port: 3009, color: 'from-amber-500 to-orange-600' },
                ].map((app, i) => (
                  <button key={i} onClick={() => navigateTo({ port: app.port })} className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-xl transition group">
                    <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br ${app.color} flex items-center justify-center group-hover:scale-110 transition`}>
                      <app.icon className="w-5 h-5 text-white" />
                    </div>
                    <span className="font-medium text-sm">{app.label}</span>
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* AI Agents Status */}
          <div className="bg-[#0a0a12] rounded-2xl border border-white/10 p-5">
            <h2 className="font-bold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"><Bot className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400" /> AI Agents</h2>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-8 gap-3">
              {AI_AGENTS.map(agent => (
                <div key={agent.id} className="flex flex-col items-center p-3 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-xl transition cursor-pointer" onClick={() => navigateTo({ port: 3009 })}>
                  <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br ${agent.color} flex items-center justify-center mb-2`}>
                    <span className="font-bold text-sm">{agent.name[0]}</span>
                  </div>
                  <p className="font-medium text-xs">{agent.name}</p>
                  <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">{agent.role}</p>
                  <div className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full mt-1 ${agent.status === 'online' ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-yellow-500'}`} />
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>

      {/* Mobile Bottom Nav */}
      <div className="lg:hidden fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-[#0a0a12] border-t border-white/10 z-40 flex items-center justify-around px-2">
        {[
          { icon: Home, label: 'Home', port: 3000, active: true },
          { icon: Factory, label: 'Workroom', port: 3001 },
          { icon: Brain, label: 'MAX', port: 3009 },
          { icon: Users, label: 'CRM', port: 3007 },
          { icon: Menu, label: 'More', action: () => setMobileMenuOpen(true) },
        ].map((item, i) => (
          <button key={i} onClick={() => item.action ? item.action() : navigateTo({ port: item.port })} className={`flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 rounded-xl ${item.active ? 'text-amber-400' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>
            <item.icon className="w-5 h-5" />
            <span className="text-[10px]">{item.label}</span>
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Search Modal */}
      {showSearch && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-start justify-center pt-20 px-4">
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={() => setShowSearch(false)} />
          <div className="relative bg-[#1a1a2e] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl w-full max-w-xl overflow-hidden">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 border-b border-white/10">
              <Search className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
              <input type="text" placeholder="Search modules..." value={searchQuery} onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)} className="flex-1 bg-transparent outline-none" autoFocus />
              <kbd className="px-2 py-1 bg-white/10 rounded text-xs text-gray-400">ESC</kbd>
            </div>
            <div className="p-4 max-h-80 overflow-y-auto">
              {!searchQuery ? (
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase">Quick Actions</p>
                  {[{ label: 'New Quote', port: 3001 }, { label: 'Check Inventory', port: 3004 }, { label: 'Ask MAX', port: 3009 }].map((a, i) => (
                    <button key={i} onClick={() => { navigateTo({ port: a.port }); setShowSearch(false) }} className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 p-3 hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg">{a.label}</button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              ) : searchResults.length === 0 ? (
                <p className="text-gray-500 text-center py-8">No results</p>
              ) : (
                <div className="space-y-1">
                  {searchResults.map(item => (
                    <button key={item.id} onClick={() => { navigateTo(item); setShowSearch(false) }} className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 p-3 hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg">
                      <item.icon className="w-5 h-5" /><span>{item.label}</span>
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Agents Modal */}
      {showAgents && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center p-4">
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60" onClick={() => setShowAgents(false)} />
          <div className="relative bg-[#1a1a2e] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl w-full max-w-md overflow-hidden">
            <div className="p-4 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center justify-between">
              <h2 className="font-bold flex items-center gap-2"><Bot className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400" />AI Agents</h2>
              <button onClick={() => setShowAgents(false)} className="p-1 hover:bg-white/10 rounded"><X className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
            </div>
            <div className="p-4 space-y-2">
              {AI_AGENTS.map(agent => (
                <div key={agent.id} onClick={() => { setShowAgents(false); navigateTo({ port: 3009 }) }} className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-xl cursor-pointer">
                  <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br ${agent.color} flex items-center justify-center`}><span className="font-bold">{agent.name[0]}</span></div>
                  <div className="flex-1"><p className="font-medium">{agent.name}</p><p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{agent.role}</p></div>
                  <div className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${agent.status === 'online' ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-yellow-500'}`} />
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Mobile overlay */}
      {mobileMenuOpen && <div className="lg:hidden fixed in


Let me continue and complete the integration. The previous response got cut off. Let me restart cleanly:

bash
cd ~/Empire

echo "🏰 Building Empire v1.4.0 - Unified Navigation"
echo "=============================================="

# Create Coming Soon page first
mkdir -p ~/Empire/empire-control/src/app/coming-soon

cat > ~/Empire/empire-control/src/app/coming-soon/page.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'
'use client'
import { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation'
import { Suspense } from 'react'
import {
  Construction, ArrowLeft, Bell, Calendar, Clock, Sparkles,
  Home, Brain, Rocket, CheckCircle
} from 'lucide-react'

function ComingSoonContent() {
  const searchParams = useSearchParams()
  const moduleName = searchParams.get('name') || 'This Module'
  const moduleId = searchParams.get('module') || 'unknown'

  const features = {
    'scheduler': ['Drag & drop scheduling', 'Team calendar view', 'Automated reminders', 'Integration with CRM'],
    'installations': ['Track install crews', 'GPS routing', 'Customer notifications', 'Photo documentation'],
    'invoicing': ['Professional templates', 'Auto-generate from quotes', 'Payment tracking', 'Recurring invoices'],
    'expenses': ['Receipt scanning', 'Category tracking', 'Vendor management', 'Tax reports'],
    'reports': ['Custom dashboards', 'Export to PDF/Excel', 'Scheduled reports', 'KPI tracking'],
    'quotes': ['Quote history', 'Version comparison', 'Win/loss analysis', 'Follow-up automation'],
    'portal': ['Customer login', 'Order tracking', 'Document sharing', 'Payment portal'],
    'research': ['Market analysis', 'Competitor tracking', 'Trend reports', 'AI insights'],
    'market': ['Industry data', 'Price benchmarking', 'Opportunity scoring', 'Territory mapping'],
    'store': ['Product catalog', 'Online ordering', 'Customer accounts', 'Inventory sync'],
    'suppliers': ['Vendor database', 'Price comparison', 'Order automation', 'Quality tracking'],
    'partners': ['Partner directory', 'Referral tracking', 'Commission management', 'Collaboration tools'],
    'tickets': ['Ticket management', 'SLA tracking', 'Knowledge base', 'Customer satisfaction'],
    'knowledge': ['Searchable articles', 'Video tutorials', 'FAQs', 'Community forums'],
    'training': ['Video courses', 'Certifications', 'Progress tracking', 'Team training'],
    'notifications': ['Real-time alerts', 'Email digests', 'Mobile push', 'Custom rules'],
  }

  const plannedFeatures = features[moduleId as keyof typeof features] || ['Advanced features', 'Seamless integration', 'AI assistance', 'Mobile support']

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#030308] text-white flex flex-col">
      {/* Header */}
      <header className="h-16 bg-[#0a0a12] border-b border-white/10 flex items-center px-6">
        <button 
          onClick={() => window.location.href = 'http://localhost:3000'}
          className="flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition"
        >
          <ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5" />
          <span>Back to Control Center</span>
        </button>
      </header>

      {/* Content */}
      <main className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center p-6">
        <div className="max-w-lg text-center">
          {/* Icon */}
          <div className="w-24 h-24 mx-auto mb-8 rounded-3xl bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500/20 to-orange-500/20 border border-amber-500/30 flex items-center justify-center">
            <Construction className="w-12 h-12 text-amber-400" />
          </div>

          {/* Title */}
          <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold mb-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-400 to-orange-500 bg-clip-text text-transparent">
            {moduleName}
          </h1>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-400 mb-8">Coming Soon</p>

          {/* Description */}
          <p className="text-gray-500 mb-8">
            Our team is working hard to bring you this feature. 
            It will be part of the Empire Founder's Edition.
          </p>

          {/* Planned Features */}
          <div className="bg-[#0a0a12] rounded-2xl border border-white/10 p-6 mb-8 text-left">
            <h3 className="font-semibold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Sparkles className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400" />
              Planned Features
            </h3>
            <div className="space-y-3">
              {plannedFeatures.map((feature, i) => (
                <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-3 text-gray-400">
                  <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-500" />
                  <span>{feature}</span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Actions */}
          <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 justify-center">
            <button 
              onClick={() => window.location.href = 'http://localhost:3000'}
              className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl transition"
            >
              <Home className="w-5 h-5" />
              Control Center
            </button>
            <button 
              onClick={() => window.location.href = 'http://localhost:3009'}
              className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500 to-orange-500 hover:from-amber-600 hover:to-orange-600 text-black font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-xl transition"
            >
              <Brain className="w-5 h-5" />
              Ask MAX
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Notify */}
          <div className="mt-12 p-4 bg-white/5 rounded-xl border border-white/10">
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
              <Bell className="w-4 h-4" />
              MAX will notify you when this module is ready
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>

      {/* Footer */}
      <footer className="h-16 border-t border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center text-sm text-gray-600">
        Empire Founder's Edition • Building the Future of Window Treatment Business
      </footer>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function ComingSoon() {
  return (
    <Suspense fallback={<div className="min-h-screen bg-[#030308] flex items-center justify-center"><div className="text-white">Loading...</div></div>}>
      <ComingSoonContent />
    </Suspense>
  )
}
ENDOFFILE

echo "✅ Coming Soon page created"

# Now update ALL the apps with unified sidebar navigation

# Update WorkroomForge with nav
cat > ~/Empire/workroomforge/src/components/TopNav.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'
'use client'
import { useState } from 'react'
import {
  Home, Brain, Package, DollarSign, Users, Lightbulb, Factory,
  Menu, X, Search, Bell, ChevronDown, Bot, Settings
} from 'lucide-react'

const APPS = [
  { label: 'Control Center', icon: Home, port: 3000 },
  { label: 'WorkroomForge', icon: Factory, port: 3001 },
  { label: 'Inventory', icon: Package, port: 3004 },
  { label: 'Finance', icon: DollarSign, port: 3005 },
  { label: 'Creations', icon: Lightbulb, port: 3006 },
  { label: 'CRM', icon: Users, port: 3007 },
  { label: 'MAX AI', icon: Brain, port: 3009 },
]

export default function TopNav({ currentApp, currentPort }: { currentApp: string, currentPort: number }) {
  const [showMenu, setShowMenu] = useState(false)
  const [showSearch, setShowSearch] = useState(false)

  return (
    <>
      <div className="h-12 bg-[#0a0a12] border-b border-white/10 flex items-center justify-between px-4 sticky top-0 z-50">
        {/* Left */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <button onClick={() => window.location.href = 'http://localhost:3000'} className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <div className="w-7 h-7 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500 to-orange-600 flex items-center justify-center">
              <span className="text-xs font-bold">E</span>
            </div>
            <span className="text-sm font-bold text-amber-400 hidden sm:inline">EMPIRE</span>
          </button>
          <span className="text-gray-600">/</span>
          <span className="text-sm font-medium">{currentApp}</span>
        </div>

        {/* Center - App Switcher */}
        <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-1">
          {APPS.map(app => (
            <button
              key={app.port}
              onClick={() => window.location.href = `http://localhost:${app.port}`}
              className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs transition ${
                app.port === currentPort 
                  ? 'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400' 
                  : 'text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5'
              }`}
            >
              <app.icon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
              <span className="hidden lg:inline">{app.label}</span>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Right */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <button 
            onClick={() => setShowSearch(true)}
            className="p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg"
          >
            <Search className="w-4 h-4" />
          </button>
          <button className="relative p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg">
            <Bell className="w-4 h-4" />
            <span className="absolute top-1 right-1 w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-red-500 rounded-full" />
          </button>
          <button 
            onClick={() => window.location.href = 'http://localhost:3009'}
            className="flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs hover:bg-amber-500/30 transition"
          >
            <Brain className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
            <span className="hidden sm:inline">MAX</span>
          </button>
          <button 
            onClick={() => setShowMenu(!showMenu)}
            className="md:hidden p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white"
          >
            <Menu className="w-5 h-5" />
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Mobile Menu */}
      {showMenu && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 md:hidden">
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60" onClick={() => setShowMenu(false)} />
          <div className="absolute right-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-[#0a0a12] border-l border-white/10 p-4">
            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
              <span className="font-bold">Menu</span>
              <button onClick={() => setShowMenu(false)}><X className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-1">
              {APPS.map(app => (
                <button
                  key={app.port}
                  onClick={() => window.location.href = `http://localhost:${app.port}`}
                  className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm ${
                    app.port === currentPort ? 'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400' : 'text-gray-400 hover:bg-white/5'
                  }`}
                >
                  <app.icon className="w-4 h-4" />
                  {app.label}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Search Modal */}
      {showSearch && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-start justify-center pt-20 px-4">
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60" onClick={() => setShowSearch(false)} />
          <div className="relative bg-[#1a1a2e] border border-white/10 rounded-xl w-full max-w-md overflow-hidden">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4">
              <Search className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-400" />
              <input type="text" placeholder="Search..." className="flex-1 bg-transparent outline-none" autoFocus />
            </div>
            <div className="p-4 border-t border-white/10">
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-2">Quick Navigation</p>
              {APPS.slice(0, 4).map(app => (
                <button
                  key={app.port}
                  onClick={() => { window.location.href = `http://localhost:${app.port}`; setShowSearch(false) }}
                  className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 p-2 hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg text-sm text-gray-400"
                >
                  <app.icon className="w-4 h-4" />
                  {app.label}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </>
  )
}
ENDOFFILE

# Create the TopNav component
cat > ~/Empire/shared/TopNav.tsx << 'ENDOFFILE'
'use client'
import { useState } from 'react'
import {
  Home, Brain, Package, DollarSign, Users, Lightbulb, Factory,
  Menu, X, Search, Bell
} from 'lucide-react'

const APPS = [
  { label: 'Control Center', icon: Home, port: 3000 },
  { label: 'WorkroomForge', icon: Factory, port: 3001 },
  { label: 'Inventory', icon: Package, port: 3004 },
  { label: 'Finance', icon: DollarSign, port: 3005 },
  { label: 'Creations', icon: Lightbulb, port: 3006 },
  { label: 'CRM', icon: Users, port: 3007 },
  { label: 'MAX AI', icon: Brain, port: 3009 },
]

export default function TopNav({ currentApp, currentPort }: { currentApp: string, currentPort: number }) {
  const [showMenu, setShowMenu] = useState(false)

  return (
    <>
      <div className="h-12 bg-[#0a0a12] border-b border-white/10 flex items-center justify-between px-4 sticky top-0 z-50">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <button onClick={() => window.location.href = 'http://localhost:3000'} className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <div className="w-7 h-7 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500 to-orange-600 flex items-center justify-center">
              <span className="text-xs font-bold">E</span>
            </div>
            <span className="text-sm font-bold text-amber-400 hidden sm:inline">EMPIRE</span>
          </button>
          <span className="text-gray-600">/</span>
          <span className="text-sm font-medium">{currentApp}</span>
        </div>
        <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-1">
          {APPS.map(app => (
            <button key={app.port} onClick={() => window.location.href = `http://localhost:${app.port}`}
              className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs transition ${app.port === currentPort ? 'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400' : 'text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5'}`}>
              <app.icon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
              <span className="hidden lg:inline">{app.label}</span>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <button className="relative p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg">
            <Bell className="w-4 h-4" />
            <span className="absolute top-1 right-1 w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-red-500 rounded-full" />
          </button>
          <button onClick={() => window.location.href = 'http://localhost:3009'}
            className="flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs hover:bg-amber-500/30">
            <Brain className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /><span className="hidden sm:inline">MAX</span>
          </button>
          <button onClick={() => setShowMenu(!showMenu)} className="md:hidden p-2 text-gray-400">
            <Menu className="w-5 h-5" />
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
      {showMenu && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 md:hidden">
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60" onClick={() => setShowMenu(false)} />
          <div className="absolute right-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-[#0a0a12] border-l border-white/10 p-4">
            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
              <span className="font-bold">Menu</span>
              <button onClick={() => setShowMenu(false)}><X className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-1">
              {APPS.map(app => (
                <button key={app.port} onClick={() => window.location.href = `http://localhost:${app.port}`}
                  className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm ${app.port === currentPort ? 'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400' : 'text-gray-400 hover:bg-white/5'}`}>
                  <app.icon className="w-4 h-4" />{app.label}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </>
  )
}
ENDOFFILE

'use client'
import { useState } from 'react'
import {
  Home, Brain, Package, DollarSign, Users, Lightbulb, Factory,
  Menu, X, Search, Bell
} from 'lucide-react'

const APPS = [
  { label: 'Control Center', icon: Home, port: 3000 },
  { label: 'WorkroomForge', icon: Factory, port: 3001 },
  { label: 'Inventory', icon: Package, port: 3004 },
  { label: 'Finance', icon: DollarSign, port: 3005 },
  { label: 'Creations', icon: Lightbulb, port: 3006 },
  { label: 'CRM', icon: Users, port: 3007 },
  { label: 'MAX AI', icon: Brain, port: 3009 },
]

export default function TopNav({ currentApp, currentPort }: { currentApp: string, currentPort: number }) {
  const [showMenu, setShowMenu] = useState(false)

  return (
    <>
      <div className="h-12 bg-[#0a0a12] border-b border-white/10 flex items-center justify-between px-4 sticky top-0 z-50">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <button onClick={() => window.location.href = 'http://localhost:3000'} className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <div className="w-7 h-7 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500 to-orange-600 flex items-center justify-center">
              <span className="text-xs font-bold">E</span>
            </div>
            <span className="text-sm font-bold text-amber-400 hidden sm:inline">EMPIRE</span>
          </button>
          <span className="text-gray-600">/</span>
          <span className="text-sm font-medium">{currentApp}</span>
        </div>
        <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-1">
          {APPS.map(app => (
            <button key={app.port} onClick={() => window.location.href = 'http://localhost:' + app.port}
              className={'flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs transition ' + (app.port === currentPort ? 'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400' : 'text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5')}>
              <app.icon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
              <span className="hidden lg:inline">{app.label}</span>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <button className="relative p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg">
            <Bell className="w-4 h-4" />
            <span className="absolute top-1 right-1 w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-red-500 rounded-full" />
          </button>
          <button onClick={() => window.location.href = 'http://localhost:3009'}
            className="flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs hover:bg-amber-500/30">
            <Brain className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /><span className="hidden sm:inline">MAX</span>
          </button>
          <button onClick={() => setShowMenu(!showMenu)} className="md:hidden p-2 text-gray-400">
            <Menu className="w-5 h-5" />
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
      {showMenu && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 md:hidden">
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60" onClick={() => setShowMenu(false)} />
          <div className="absolute right-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-[#0a0a12] border-l border-white/10 p-4">
            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
              <span className="font-bold">Menu</span>
              <button onClick={() => setShowMenu(false)}><X className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-1">
              {APPS.map(app => (
                <button key={app.port} onClick={() => window.location.href = 'http://localhost:' + app.port}
                  className={'w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm ' + (app.port === currentPort ? 'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400' : 'text-gray-400 hover:bg-white/5')}>
                  <app.icon className="w-4 h-4" />{app.label}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </>
  )
}
ENDOFFILE

"Show me open quotes" → Pulls from WorkroomForge
"Revenue this month" → Pulls from Finance
"Low stock items" → Pulls from Inventory

Animations & transitions
Keyboard shortcuts everywhere
Mobile optimization

echo ""


The crashes are likely due to too many Next.js dev servers running. Each one uses 200-500MB RAM. Let me create a system monitor and optimize:

bash
cd ~/Empire

# Create system monitor and management tools
mkdir -p ~/Empire/scripts

# ============================================
# EMPIRE SYSTEM MANAGER
# ============================================
cat > ~/Empire/scripts/empire-manager.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Empire System Manager
# Monitors and manages all Empire services

RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
NC='\033[0m'

show_status() {
    clear
    echo -e "${BLUE}═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════${NC}"
    echo -e "${YELLOW}🏰 EMPIRE SYSTEM MANAGER${NC}"
    echo -e "${BLUE}═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════${NC}"
    echo ""
    
    # Memory
    MEM_TOTAL=$(free -m | awk '/^Mem:/{print $2}')
    MEM_USED=$(free -m | awk '/^Mem:/{print $3}')
    MEM_PERCENT=$((MEM_USED * 100 / MEM_TOTAL))
    
    if [ $MEM_PERCENT -gt 90 ]; then
        MEM_COLOR=$RED
    elif [ $MEM_PERCENT -gt 70 ]; then
        MEM_COLOR=$YELLOW
    else
        MEM_COLOR=$GREEN
    fi
    
    echo -e "💾 Memory: ${MEM_COLOR}${MEM_USED}MB / ${MEM_TOTAL}MB (${MEM_PERCENT}%)${NC}"
    
    # CPU
    CPU_LOAD=$(uptime | awk -F'load average:' '{print $2}' | awk -F',' '{print $1}' | xargs)
    echo -e "🔥 CPU Load: ${CPU_LOAD}"
    
    # Disk
    DISK_PERCENT=$(df -h / | awk 'NR==2{print $5}' | tr -d '%')
    echo -e "💿 Disk: ${DISK_PERCENT}% used"
    
    # Node processes
    NODE_COUNT=$(ps aux | grep -E "node|next" | grep -v grep | wc -l)
    echo -e "📱 Node Processes: ${NODE_COUNT}"
    
    echo ""
    echo -e "${BLUE}───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────${NC}"
    echo -e "${YELLOW}🌐 EMPIRE SERVICES${NC}"
    echo -e "${BLUE}───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────${NC}"
    echo ""
    
    # Check each service
    check_port() {
        PORT=$1
        NAME=$2
        if netstat -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ":$PORT " || ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -q ":$PORT "; then
            echo -e "  ${GREEN}✓${NC} $NAME (port $PORT)"
            return 0
        else
            echo -e "  ${RED}✗${NC} $NAME (port $PORT) - NOT RUNNING"
            return 1
        fi
    }
    
    check_port 3000 "Control Center"
    check_port 3001 "WorkroomForge"
    check_port 3004 "Inventory"
    check_port 3005 "Finance"
    check_port 3006 "Creations"
    check_port 3007 "CRM"
    check_port 3009 "MAX AI"
    check_port 8000 "Backend API"
    
    echo ""
}

stop_all() {
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Stopping all Empire services...${NC}"
    pkill -f "next dev" 2>/dev/null
    pkill -f "uvicorn" 2>/dev/null
    sleep 2
    echo -e "${GREEN}✓ All services stopped${NC}"
}

start_minimal() {
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Starting minimal Empire (Control + MAX only)...${NC}"
    stop_all
    sleep 2
    cd ~/Empire/empire-control && npm run dev &
    sleep 2
    cd ~/Empire/founder_dashboard && npm run dev &
    sleep 3
    echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Minimal mode started (ports 3000, 3009)${NC}"
}

start_all() {
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Starting all Empire services...${NC}"
    stop_all
    sleep 2
    cd ~/Empire/empire-control && npm run dev &
    sleep 1
    cd ~/Empire/workroomforge && npm run dev &
    sleep 1
    cd ~/Empire/inventory && npm run dev &
    sleep 1
    cd ~/Empire/finance && npm run dev &
    sleep 1
    cd ~/Empire/creations && npm run dev &
    sleep 1
    cd ~/Empire/crm && npm run dev &
    sleep 1
    cd ~/Empire/founder_dashboard && npm run dev &
    sleep 3
    echo -e "${GREEN}✓ All services started${NC}"
}

cleanup_memory() {
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Cleaning up memory...${NC}"
    # Clear npm cache
    npm cache clean --force 2>/dev/null
    # Clear Next.js cache
    find ~/Empire -name ".next" -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null
    # Drop caches (requires sudo)
    sync
    echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Cleanup complete${NC}"
}

# Main menu
while true; do
    show_status
    echo ""
    echo -e "${BLUE}───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────${NC}"
    echo "  1) Start ALL services"
    echo "  2) Start MINIMAL (Control + MAX only)"
    echo "  3) Stop ALL services"
    echo "  4) Cleanup memory & cache"
    echo "  5) Refresh status"
    echo "  6) Exit"
    echo ""
    read -p "Choose option: " choice
    
    case $choice in
        1) start_all ;;
        2) start_minimal ;;
        3) stop_all ;;
        4) cleanup_memory ;;
        5) continue ;;
        6) exit 0 ;;
        *) echo "Invalid option" ;;
    esac
    
    read -p "Press Enter to continue..."
done
EOF

chmod +x ~/Empire/scripts/empire-manager.sh

# ============================================
# QUICK SYSTEM FIX SCRIPT
# ============================================
cat > ~/Empire/scripts/fix-system.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "🔧 EMPIRE QUICK FIX"
echo "==================="
echo ""

# 1. Stop all Node processes
echo "1. Stopping all Node processes..."
pkill -f "next dev" 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "node" 2>/dev/null
sleep 2
echo "   ✓ Done"

# 2. Clear Next.js caches
echo "2. Clearing build caches..."
find ~/Empire -name ".next" -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null
find ~/Empire -name "node_modules/.cache" -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null
echo "   ✓ Done"

# 3. Check memory
echo "3. Memory status:"
free -h | grep Mem
echo ""

# 4. Recommendations
MEM_USED=$(free -m | awk '/^Mem:/{print $3}')
MEM_TOTAL=$(free -m | awk '/^Mem:/{print $2}')
MEM_PERCENT=$((MEM_USED * 100 / MEM_TOTAL))

if [ $MEM_PERCENT -gt 80 ]; then
    echo "⚠️  HIGH MEMORY USAGE ($MEM_PERCENT%)"
    echo ""
    echo "Recommendations:"
    echo "  • Run MINIMAL mode (only Control + MAX)"
    echo "  • Close browser tabs"
    echo "  • Reboot if issues persist"
    echo ""
    echo "Starting MINIMAL mode..."
    cd ~/Empire/empire-control && npm run dev &
    sleep 2
    cd ~/Empire/founder_dashboard && npm run dev &
else
    echo "✓ Memory OK ($MEM_PERCENT%)"
    echo ""
    echo "You can run: ~/Empire/scripts/empire-manager.sh"
fi

echo ""
echo "✅ Fix complete!"
EOF

chmod +x ~/Empire/scripts/fix-system.sh

# ============================================
# AUTO-MONITOR (runs in background)
# ============================================
cat > ~/Empire/scripts/auto-monitor.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

LOG_FILE=~/Empire/logs/system-monitor.log
mkdir -p ~/Empire/logs

echo "$(date): Monitor started" >> $LOG_FILE

while true; do
    MEM_PERCENT=$(free | awk '/^Mem:/{printf("%.0f", $3/$2*100)}')
    
    if [ $MEM_PERCENT -gt 90 ]; then
        echo "$(date): CRITICAL - Memory at $MEM_PERCENT%" >> $LOG_FILE
        
        # Auto-kill some processes if critical
        pkill -f "next dev -p 3004" 2>/dev/null  # Kill Inventory
        pkill -f "next dev -p 3005" 2>/dev/null  # Kill Finance
        pkill -f "next dev -p 3006" 2>/dev/null  # Kill Creations
        pkill -f "next dev -p 3007" 2>/dev/null  # Kill CRM
        
        echo "$(date): Killed non-essential services to free memory" >> $LOG_FILE
    fi
    
    sleep 30
done
EOF

chmod +x ~/Empire/scripts/auto-monitor.sh

# Create desktop shortcut for system manager
cat > ~/Desktop/empire-manager.desktop << 'EOF'

Version=1.0
Type=Application

Comment=Monitor and manage Empire services
Exec=gnome-terminal -- bash -c "~/Empire/scripts/empire-manager.sh"
Icon=utilities-system-monitor
Terminal=true
Categories=Utility;
EOF

chmod +x ~/Desktop/empire-manager.desktop

echo ""
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo "✅ SYSTEM TOOLS CREATED"
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo ""
echo "🔧 Tools Available:"
echo ""
echo "  ~/Empire/scripts/fix-system.sh     - Quick fix (stops all, clears cache)"
echo "  ~/Empire/scripts/empire-manager.sh - Full system manager (interactive)"
echo "  ~/Empire/scripts/auto-monitor.sh   - Background monitor (auto-kills if critical)"
echo ""
echo "🖥️ Desktop Shortcut: Empire Manager"
echo ""
echo "Running quick fix now..."
echo ""

# Run quick fix
~/Empire/scripts/fix-system.sh
