Los archivos se están cortando. Déjame crear versiones más compactas:

bash
cd ~/Empire/empire-app

# Verificar qué archivos tenemos
echo "📋 Verificando archivos actuales..."
ls -la src/app/*/page.tsx 2>/dev/null | head -20

echo ""
echo "Líneas por archivo:"
wc -l src/app/*/page.tsx 2>/dev/null


Ahora creo los archivos de forma más simple:

bash
cd ~/Empire/empire-app

# INVENTARIO SIMPLIFICADO
cat > src/app/inventory/page.tsx << 'INVEOF'
'use client'
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import { Package, Plus, Search, Trash2, X, TrendingDown, TrendingUp, Download, AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react'

const MATERIALS = [
  { sku: 'FAB-001', name: 'Seda Dupioni', category: 'Telas', supplier: 'Rowley', minStock: 10, unit: 'yardas', cost: 45, sell: 85 },
  { sku: 'FAB-002', name: 'Lino Belga', category: 'Telas', supplier: 'Rowley', minStock: 15, unit: 'yardas', cost: 35, sell: 65 },
  { sku: 'FAB-003', name: 'Terciopelo', category: 'Telas', supplier: 'Rowley', minStock: 10, unit: 'yardas', cost: 55, sell: 95 },
  { sku: 'FAB-004', name: 'Sheer Voile', category: 'Telas', supplier: 'Rowley', minStock: 20, unit: 'yardas', cost: 12, sell: 28 },
  { sku: 'LIN-001', name: 'Forro Standard', category: 'Forros', supplier: 'Rowley', minStock: 25, unit: 'yardas', cost: 6, sell: 12 },
  { sku: 'LIN-002', name: 'Forro Blackout', category: 'Forros', supplier: 'Rowley', minStock: 20, unit: 'yardas', cost: 12, sell: 22 },
  { sku: 'HW-001', name: 'Riel Ripplefold', category: 'Herrajes', supplier: 'Kirsch', minStock: 5, unit: 'pies', cost: 8, sell: 15 },
  { sku: 'HW-002', name: 'Barra Decorativa', category: 'Herrajes', supplier: 'Graber', minStock: 3, unit: 'pies', cost: 12, sell: 25 },
  { sku: 'MOT-001', name: 'Somfy Glydea 35', category: 'Motores', supplier: 'Somfy', minStock: 2, unit: 'unidad', cost: 285, sell: 485 },
  { sku: 'MOT-002', name: 'Lutron Sivoia', category: 'Motores', supplier: 'Lutron', minStock: 2, unit: 'unidad', cost: 425, sell: 695 },
  { sku: 'SUP-001', name: 'Hilo (5000yd)', category: 'Insumos', supplier: 'Rowley', minStock: 5, unit: 'carretes', cost: 8, sell: 15 },
  { sku: 'SUP-002', name: 'Ganchos (100pc)', category: 'Insumos', supplier: 'Rowley', minStock: 5, unit: 'cajas', cost: 12, sell: 25 },
]

interface Item { id: string; sku: string; name: string; category: string; supplier: string; quantity: number; minStock: number; unit: string; cost: number; sell: number }

export default function Inventory() {
  const [items, setItems] = useState<Item[]>([])
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('')
  const [showAdd, setShowAdd] = useState(false)
  const [form, setForm] = useState({ sku: '', name: '', category: 'Telas', supplier: 'Rowley', quantity: 0, minStock: 5, unit: 'yardas', cost: 0, sell: 0 })

  useEffect(() => { const s = localStorage.getItem('empire_inv'); if (s) setItems(JSON.parse(s)) }, [])
  useEffect(() => { if (items.length) localStorage.setItem('empire_inv', JSON.stringify(items)) }, [items])

  const loadDefaults = () => {
    const newItems = MATERIALS.map(m => ({ ...m, id: Date.now().toString() + Math.random(), quantity: 0 }))
    setItems([...items, ...newItems])
  }

  const updateQty = (id: string, d: number) => setItems(items.map(i => i.id === id ? { ...i, quantity: Math.max(0, i.quantity + d) } : i))
  const del = (id: string) => setItems(items.filter(i => i.id !== id))

  const add = () => {
    if (!form.name) return
    setItems([{ ...form, id: Date.now().toString() }, ...items])
    setShowAdd(false)
  }

  const filtered = items.filter(i => i.name.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) || i.sku.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()))
  const lowStock = items.filter(i => i.quantity <= i.minStock).length

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#030308] p-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-green-500 to-emerald-600 flex items-center justify-center"><Package className="w-6 h-6" /></div>
          <div><h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Inventario</h1><p className="text-gray-500">{items.length} items</p></div>
        </div>
        <div className="flex gap-3">
          {items.length === 0 && <button onClick={loadDefaults} className="bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl flex items-center gap-2"><Download className="w-5 h-5" />Cargar Base</button>}
          <button onClick={() => setShowAdd(true)} className="bg-gradient-to-r from-green-500 to-emerald-600 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl font-semibold flex items-center gap-2"><Plus className="w-5 h-5" />Agregar</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {lowStock > 0 && <div className="bg-yellow-500/10 border border-yellow-500/30 rounded-xl p-4 mb-6 flex items-center gap-3"><AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-yellow-400" /><span className="text-yellow-400">{lowStock} items con stock bajo</span></div>}

      <div className="relative mb-6">
        <Search className="w-5 h-5 absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-500" />
        <input type="text" placeholder="Buscar..." value={search} onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-[#0a0a12] border border-white/10 rounded-xl pl-12 pr-4 py-3 outline-none" />
      </div>

      {items.length === 0 ? (
        <div className="text-center py-16">
          <Package className="w-16 h-16 text-green-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
          <h2 className="text-xl font-bold mb-2">Sin inventario</h2>
          <button onClick={loadDefaults} className="bg-gradient-to-r from-green-500 to-emerald-600 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold mt-4">Cargar Materiales Base</button>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3">
          {filtered.map(item => (
            <div key={item.id} className={`bg-[#0a0a12] rounded-xl border p-4 ${item.quantity <= item.minStock ? 'border-yellow-500/50' : 'border-white/10'}`}>
              <div className="flex justify-between mb-2">
                <div><p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{item.sku}</p><h3 className="font-semibold">{item.name}</h3></div>
                <button onClick={() => del(item.id)} className="text-gray-500 hover:text-red-400"><Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                <span className="text-xs bg-white/10 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">{item.category}</span>
                <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">{item.supplier}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <div>
                  <p className={`text-2xl font-bold ${item.quantity <= item.minStock ? 'text-yellow-400' : ''}`}>{item.quantity}</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{item.unit}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-2">
                  <button onClick={() => updateQty(item.id, -1)} className="w-10 h-10 bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center"><TrendingDown className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
                  <button onClick={() => updateQty(item.id, 1)} className="w-10 h-10 bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center"><TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {showAdd && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60" onClick={() => setShowAdd(false)} />
          <div className="relative bg-[#0a0a12] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl w-full max-w-md p-6">
            <h2 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4">Agregar Item</h2>
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <input placeholder="SKU" value={form.sku} onChange={(e) => setForm({...form, sku: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none" />
              <input placeholder="Nombre *" value={form.name} onChange={(e) => setForm({...form, name: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none" />
              <input type="number" placeholder="Cantidad" value={form.quantity||''} onChange={(e) => setForm({...form, quantity: +e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none" />
            </div>
            <div className="flex gap-3 mt-6">
              <button onClick={() => setShowAdd(false)} className="flex-1 bg-white/10 py-3 rounded-xl">Cancelar</button>
              <button onClick={add} className="flex-1 bg-green-500 py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold">Agregar</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
INVEOF

echo "✅ Inventario creado ($(wc -l < src/app/inventory/page.tsx) líneas)"

# SHIPPING SIMPLIFICADO
cat > src/app/shipping/page.tsx << 'SHIPEOF'
'use client'
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import { Truck, Plus, ArrowDown, ArrowUp, X, Clock, ExternalLink } from 'lucide-react'

interface Shipment { id: string; type: 'in' | 'out'; carrier: string; tracking: string; items: string; status: string; date: string }

export default function Shipping() {
  const [shipments, setShipments] = useState<Shipment[]>([])
  const [showAdd, setShowAdd] = useState(false)
  const [form, setForm] = useState({ type: 'in' as const, carrier: 'FedEx', tracking: '', items: '', date: '' })

  useEffect(() => { const s = localStorage.getItem('empire_ship'); if (s) setShipments(JSON.parse(s)) }, [])
  useEffect(() => { localStorage.setItem('empire_ship', JSON.stringify(shipments)) }, [shipments])

  const add = () => {
    if (!form.items) return
    setShipments([{ ...form, id: Date.now().toString(), status: 'pending' }, ...shipments])
    setShowAdd(false)
    setForm({ type: 'in', carrier: 'FedEx', tracking: '', items: '', date: '' })
  }

  const updateStatus = (id: string, status: string) => setShipments(shipments.map(s => s.id === id ? { ...s, status } : s))

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#030308] p-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-cyan-500 to-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center"><Truck className="w-6 h-6" /></div>
          <div><h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">ShippingForge</h1><p className="text-gray-500">{shipments.length} envíos</p></div>
        </div>
        <button onClick={() => setShowAdd(true)} className="bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-500 to-blue-600 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl font-semibold flex items-center gap-2"><Plus className="w-5 h-5" />Nuevo</button>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-6">
        <div className="bg-[#0a0a12] rounded-xl p-4 border border-white/10">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1"><ArrowDown className="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" /><span className="text-gray-500">Entrantes</span></div>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold">{shipments.filter(s => s.type === 'in').length}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="bg-[#0a0a12] rounded-xl p-4 border border-white/10">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1"><ArrowUp className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400" /><span className="text-gray-500">Salientes</span></div>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold">{shipments.filter(s => s.type === 'out').length}</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      {shipments.length === 0 ? (
        <div className="text-center py-16">
          <Truck className="w-16 h-16 text-cyan-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
          <h2 className="text-xl font-bold mb-2">Sin envíos</h2>
          <div className="flex gap-4 justify-center mt-6">
            <button onClick={() => { setForm({...form, type: 'in'}); setShowAdd(true) }} className="bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl">📥 Entrante</button>
            <button onClick={() => { setForm({...form, type: 'out'}); setShowAdd(true) }} className="bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl">📤 Saliente</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="space-y-3">
          {shipments.map(s => (
            <div key={s.id} className="bg-[#0a0a12] rounded-xl border border-white/10 p-5">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center ${s.type === 'in' ? 'bg-green-500/20' : 'bg-blue-500/20'}`}>
                    {s.type === 'in' ? <ArrowDown className="w-5 h-5 text-green-400" /> : <ArrowUp className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-400" />}
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <p className="font-semibold">{s.carrier} {s.tracking && `• ${s.tracking}`}</p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">{s.items}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <select value={s.status} onChange={(e) => updateStatus(s.id, e.target.value)} className={`text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full outline-none ${s.status === 'delivered' ? 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400' : s.status === 'transit' ? 'bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400' : 'bg-gray-500/20'}`}>
                  <option value="pending">Pendiente</option>
                  <option value="transit">En Tránsito</option>
                  <option value="delivered">Entregado</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {showAdd && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60" onClick={() => setShowAdd(false)} />
          <div className="relative bg-[#0a0a12] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl w-full max-w-md p-6">
            <h2 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4">Nuevo Envío</h2>
            <div className="flex gap-2 mb-4">
              <button onClick={() => setForm({...form, type: 'in'})} className={`flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${form.type === 'in' ? 'bg-green-500 text-black' : 'bg-white/10'}`}><ArrowDown className="w-5 h-5" />Entrante</button>
              <button onClick={() => setForm({...form, type: 'out'})} className={`flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${form.type === 'out' ? 'bg-blue-500' : 'bg-white/10'}`}><ArrowUp className="w-5 h-5" />Saliente</button>
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <select value={form.carrier} onChange={(e) => setForm({...form, carrier: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none">
                {['FedEx', 'UPS', 'USPS', 'DHL', 'Local'].map(c => <option key={c}>{c}</option>)}
              </select>
              <input placeholder="# Tracking" value={form.tracking} onChange={(e) => setForm({...form, tracking: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none" />
              <input placeholder="Items/Descripción *" value={form.items} onChange={(e) => setForm({...form, items: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none" />
            </div>
            <div className="flex gap-3 mt-6">
              <button onClick={() => setShowAdd(false)} className="flex-1 bg-white/10 py-3 rounded-xl">Cancelar</button>
              <button onClick={add} className="flex-1 bg-cyan-500 py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold">Crear</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
SHIPEOF

echo "✅ ShippingForge creado ($(wc -l < src/app/shipping/page.tsx) líneas)"

Ejecuta esto y confirma que funciona. ¿Todo bien? 🚀

Falta el directorio shipping. Vamos a crearlo:

bash
cd ~/Empire/empire-app

# Crear directorio shipping
mkdir -p src/app/shipping

# Crear ShippingForge
cat > src/app/shipping/page.tsx << 'SHIPEOF'
'use client'
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import { Truck, Plus, ArrowDown, ArrowUp, X } from 'lucide-react'

interface Shipment { id: string; type: 'in' | 'out'; carrier: string; tracking: string; items: string; status: string }

export default function Shipping() {
  const [shipments, setShipments] = useState<Shipment[]>([])
  const [showAdd, setShowAdd] = useState(false)
  const [form, setForm] = useState({ type: 'in' as const, carrier: 'FedEx', tracking: '', items: '' })

  useEffect(() => { const s = localStorage.getItem('empire_ship'); if (s) setShipments(JSON.parse(s)) }, [])
  useEffect(() => { localStorage.setItem('empire_ship', JSON.stringify(shipments)) }, [shipments])

  const add = () => {
    if (!form.items) return
    setShipments([{ ...form, id: Date.now().toString(), status: 'pending' }, ...shipments])
    setShowAdd(false)
    setForm({ type: 'in', carrier: 'FedEx', tracking: '', items: '' })
  }

  const updateStatus = (id: string, status: string) => setShipments(shipments.map(s => s.id === id ? { ...s, status } : s))

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#030308] p-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-cyan-500 to-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center"><Truck className="w-6 h-6" /></div>
          <div><h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">ShippingForge</h1><p className="text-gray-500">{shipments.length} envíos</p></div>
        </div>
        <button onClick={() => setShowAdd(true)} className="bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-500 to-blue-600 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl font-semibold flex items-center gap-2"><Plus className="w-5 h-5" />Nuevo</button>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-6">
        <div className="bg-[#0a0a12] rounded-xl p-4 border border-white/10"><div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1"><ArrowDown className="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" /><span className="text-gray-500">Entrantes</span></div><p className="text-2xl font-bold">{shipments.filter(s => s.type === 'in').length}</p></div>
        <div className="bg-[#0a0a12] rounded-xl p-4 border border-white/10"><div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1"><ArrowUp className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-400" /><span className="text-gray-500">Salientes</span></div><p className="text-2xl font-bold">{shipments.filter(s => s.type === 'out').length}</p></div>
      </div>

      {shipments.length === 0 ? (
        <div className="text-center py-16">
          <Truck className="w-16 h-16 text-cyan-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
          <h2 className="text-xl font-bold mb-2">Sin envíos</h2>
          <div className="flex gap-4 justify-center mt-6">
            <button onClick={() => { setForm({...form, type: 'in'}); setShowAdd(true) }} className="bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl">📥 Entrante</button>
            <button onClick={() => { setForm({...form, type: 'out'}); setShowAdd(true) }} className="bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl">📤 Saliente</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="space-y-3">
          {shipments.map(s => (
            <div key={s.id} className="bg-[#0a0a12] rounded-xl border border-white/10 p-5">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center ${s.type === 'in' ? 'bg-green-500/20' : 'bg-blue-500/20'}`}>
                    {s.type === 'in' ? <ArrowDown className="w-5 h-5 text-green-400" /> : <ArrowUp className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-400" />}
                  </div>
                  <div><p className="font-semibold">{s.carrier} {s.tracking && `• ${s.tracking}`}</p><p className="text-sm text-gray-400">{s.items}</p></div>
                </div>
                <select value={s.status} onChange={(e) => updateStatus(s.id, e.target.value)} className={`text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full outline-none ${s.status === 'delivered' ? 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400' : s.status === 'transit' ? 'bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400' : 'bg-gray-500/20'}`}>
                  <option value="pending">Pendiente</option>
                  <option value="transit">En Tránsito</option>
                  <option value="delivered">Entregado</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {showAdd && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60" onClick={() => setShowAdd(false)} />
          <div className="relative bg-[#0a0a12] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl w-full max-w-md p-6">
            <h2 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4">Nuevo Envío</h2>
            <div className="flex gap-2 mb-4">
              <button onClick={() => setForm({...form, type: 'in'})} className={`flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${form.type === 'in' ? 'bg-green-500 text-black' : 'bg-white/10'}`}><ArrowDown className="w-5 h-5" />Entrante</button>
              <button onClick={() => setForm({...form, type: 'out'})} className={`flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${form.type === 'out' ? 'bg-blue-500' : 'bg-white/10'}`}><ArrowUp className="w-5 h-5" />Saliente</button>
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <select value={form.carrier} onChange={(e) => setForm({...form, carrier: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none">
                {['FedEx', 'UPS', 'USPS', 'DHL', 'Local'].map(c => <option key={c}>{c}</option>)}
              </select>
              <input placeholder="# Tracking" value={form.tracking} onChange={(e) => setForm({...form, tracking: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none" />
              <input placeholder="Items *" value={form.items} onChange={(e) => setForm({...form, items: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none" />
            </div>
            <div className="flex gap-3 mt-6">
              <button onClick={() => setShowAdd(false)} className="flex-1 bg-white/10 py-3 rounded-xl">Cancelar</button>
              <button onClick={add} className="flex-1 bg-cyan-500 py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold">Crear</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
SHIPEOF

¡Todos los módulos están creados! 🎉

Ahora hard refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R) y prueba cada uno:

💾 Guardar versión:
bash
cd ~/Empire
./scripts/save-version.sh "2.5.0" "Empire v2.5 - Audio import, CRM mejorado, Workroom con materiales, Tasks Kanban, ShippingForge, Inventario pre-cargado"

echo ""
echo "✅ Empire v2.5 guardado!"
ls ~/Empire/versions/


¿Todo funciona correctamente? Avísame si hay algún error o si quieres que agregue más funcionalidad. 🚀

Vamos a verificar qué está pasando:

bash
cd ~/Empire/empire-app

# Verificar si Next.js está corriendo
echo "🔍 Verificando procesos..."
ps aux | grep -E "next|node" | grep -v grep

echo ""
echo "🔍 Verificando puertos..."
ss -tlnp | grep -E "300[0-9]"

echo ""
echo "🔍 Verificando errores en el proyecto..."
ls -la src/app/

echo ""
echo "🔍 Último error de Next.js (si existe)..."
# Reiniciar Next.js
pkill -f "next dev" 2>/dev/null
sleep 2

echo ""
echo "🚀 Reiniciando servidor..."
npm run dev 2>&1 &
sleep 5

echo ""
echo "📋 Estado:"
ss -tlnp | grep 3000


Ejecuta esto y dime qué ves. Si hay errores, los mostraremos.

¡El servidor está corriendo! El problema es que tienes MÚLTIPLES proyectos corriendo en diferentes puertos:

Puerto 3000 → empire-control (proyecto viejo)
Puerto 3001 → workroomforge (proyecto viejo)
Puerto 3009 → founder_dashboard (proyecto viejo)

Vamos a matar todo y correr solo el nuevo empire-app:

bash
# Matar todos los procesos de Next.js
pkill -f "next" 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "node.*next" 2>/dev/null
sleep 3

# Verificar que están muertos
echo "🔍 Verificando que no hay procesos..."
ps aux | grep -E "next|node" | grep -v grep

echo ""
echo "🔍 Puertos libres..."
ss -tlnp | grep -E "300[0-9]"

# Ahora iniciar SOLO empire-app
cd ~/Empire/empire-app
echo ""
echo "🚀 Iniciando Empire v2.5..."
npm run dev &
sleep 5

echo ""
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo "✅ EMPIRE v2.5 CORRIENDO"
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo ""
echo "🌐 Abre: http://localhost:3000"
echo ""
echo "Hard refresh: Ctrl+Shift+R"


Ejecuta esto y luego abre http://localhost:3000 con hard refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R).

Perfecto, veo la página de MAX funcionando. Necesitas:

Botón de Audio para subir archivos a MAX
Botones funcionales (New Quote, Check Stock, etc.)

Vamos a arreglarlo:

bash
cd ~/Empire/empire-app

# Actualizar página de MAX con Audio Upload
cat > src/app/max/page.tsx << 'MAXEOF'
'use client'
import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react'
import { Brain, Send, Mic, Upload, FileAudio, X, Loader2, Factory, Package, Users, TrendingUp, Square } from 'lucide-react'
import Link from 'next/link'

interface Message { id: string; role: 'user' | 'max'; content: string; timestamp: Date }

export default function MaxPage() {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([])
  const [input, setInput] = useState('')
  const [isTyping, setIsTyping] = useState(false)
  const [showAudioUpload, setShowAudioUpload] = useState(false)
  const [audioFile, setAudioFile] = useState<File | null>(null)
  const [audioUrl, setAudioUrl] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [isTranscribing, setIsTranscribing] = useState(false)
  const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false)
  const mediaRecorder = useRef<MediaRecorder | null>(null)
  const chunks = useRef<Blob[]>([])
  const endRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    const hour = new Date().getHours()
    const greeting = hour < 12 ? 'Buenos días' : hour < 17 ? 'Buenas tardes' : 'Buenas noches'
    setMessages([{
      id: '1', role: 'max', timestamp: new Date(),
      content: `¡${greeting}! Soy MAX, tu Director de IA de Empire.\n\nPuedo ayudarte con:\n• Crear cotizaciones y gestionar trabajos\n• Revisar niveles de inventario\n• Analizar el rendimiento de tu negocio\n• Responder preguntas sobre tus datos\n\n🎤 **Nuevo:** Sube un audio y lo analizaré por ti.\n\n¿Qué te gustaría hacer?`
    }])
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => { endRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }) }, [messages])

  const sendMessage = (text?: string) => {
    const msg = text || input.trim()
    if (!msg) return
    
    setMessages(m => [...m, { id: Date.now().toString(), role: 'user', content: msg, timestamp: new Date() }])
    setInput('')
    setIsTyping(true)

    setTimeout(() => {
      const response = generateResponse(msg)
      setMessages(m => [...m, { id: (Date.now()+1).toString(), role: 'max', content: response, timestamp: new Date() }])
      setIsTyping(false)
    }, 1000)
  }

  const generateResponse = (input: string): string => {
    const lower = input.toLowerCase()
    if (lower.includes('cotiza') || lower.includes('quote')) return '📝 Para crear una cotización:\n\n1. Ve a **Workroom** en el menú\n2. Click en **Nueva Cotización**\n3. Agrega habitaciones y ventanas\n4. Selecciona tratamientos y materiales\n\n¿Quieres que te lleve allá?'
    if (lower.includes('inventario') || lower.includes('stock')) return '📦 Para revisar inventario:\n\n1. Ve a **Inventory** en el menú\n2. Click **Cargar Base** si está vacío\n3. Usa los botones ↑↓ para ajustar cantidades\n\nItems con stock bajo aparecen en amarillo.'
    if (lower.includes('cliente') || lower.includes('customer')) return '👥 Para agregar un cliente:\n\n1. Ve a **CRM** en el menú\n2. Click **Nuevo Contacto**\n3. Llena los datos\n4. Usa **Cotizar** para crear cotización directa'
    if (lower.includes('finanza') || lower.includes('revenue') || lower.includes('dinero')) return '💰 Para ver finanzas:\n\n1. Ve a **Finance** en el menú\n2. Agrega ingresos y gastos\n3. Ve el balance en tiempo real'
    if (lower.includes('audio') || lower.includes('transcri')) return '🎤 Para analizar audio:\n\n1. Click el botón **Audio** arriba\n2. Graba o sube un archivo\n3. Yo lo transcribo y analizo\n\n¿Quieres probarlo?'
    return `Entiendo que preguntas sobre: "${input}"\n\nPuedo ayudarte con:\n• Cotizaciones → /workroom\n• Inventario → /inventory\n• Clientes → /customers\n• Finanzas → /finance\n\n¿Qué necesitas específicamente?`
  }

  // Audio Recording
  const startRecording = async () => {
    try {
      const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true })
      mediaRecorder.current = new MediaRecorder(stream)
      chunks.current = []
      mediaRecorder.current.ondataavailable = (e) => { if (e.data.size > 0) chunks.current.push(e.data) }
      mediaRecorder.current.onstop = () => {
        const blob = new Blob(chunks.current, { type: 'audio/webm' })
        setAudioFile(new File([blob], 'recording.webm', { type: 'audio/webm' }))
        setAudioUrl(URL.createObjectURL(blob))
        stream.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop())
      }
      mediaRecorder.current.start()
      setIsRecording(true)
    } catch (err) { alert('No se pudo acceder al micrófono') }
  }

  const stopRecording = () => {
    if (mediaRecorder.current && isRecording) {
      mediaRecorder.current.stop()
      setIsRecording(false)
    }
  }

  const handleFileUpload = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    const file = e.target.files?.[0]
    if (file) {
      if (file.size > 25 * 1024 * 1024) { alert('Máximo 25MB'); return }
      setAudioFile(file)
      setAudioUrl(URL.createObjectURL(file))
    }
  }

  const transcribeAudio = async () => {
    if (!audioFile) return
    setIsTranscribing(true)
    
    try {
      const formData = new FormData()
      formData.append('audio', audioFile)
      
      const response = await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/transcribe', {
        method: 'POST',
        body: formData,
      })
      
      if (response.ok) {
        const data = await response.json()
        setShowAudioUpload(false)
        setAudioFile(null)
        setAudioUrl(null)
        sendMessage(`🎤 [Audio transcrito]: ${data.text}`)
      } else {
        alert('Error en transcripción. Verifica que el backend esté corriendo.')
      }
    } catch (err) {
      alert('Backend no disponible. Inicia: cd ~/Empire/backend && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000')
    } finally {
      setIsTranscribing(false)
    }
  }

  const clearAudio = () => {
    setAudioFile(null)
    setAudioUrl(null)
  }

  const quickActions = [
    { label: 'Nueva Cotización', icon: Factory, href: '/workroom' },
    { label: 'Ver Stock', icon: Package, href: '/inventory' },
    { label: 'Agregar Cliente', icon: Users, href: '/customers' },
    { label: 'Ver Finanzas', icon: TrendingUp, href: '/finance' },
  ]

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#030308] flex flex-col">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500/10 to-orange-500/10 border-b border-amber-500/20 px-6 py-4">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500 to-orange-600 flex items-center justify-center">
              <Brain className="w-6 h-6" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold flex items-center gap-2">MAX <span className="text-xs bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">Online</span></h1>
              <p className="text-gray-500">AI Director • Empire Intelligence</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <button onClick={() => setShowAudioUpload(!showAudioUpload)} className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl font-semibold transition ${showAudioUpload ? 'bg-amber-500 text-black' : 'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400 hover:bg-amber-500/30'}`}>
            <Mic className="w-5 h-5" />Audio
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Quick Actions */}
      <div className="px-6 py-4 border-b border-white/10 flex gap-3 overflow-x-auto">
        {quickActions.map((action, i) => (
          <Link key={i} href={action.href} className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl whitespace-nowrap transition">
            <action.icon className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-400" />
            <span className="text-sm">{action.label}</span>
          </Link>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Audio Upload Panel */}
      {showAudioUpload && (
        <div className="px-6 py-4 bg-[#0a0a12] border-b border-white/10">
          <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto">
            <h3 className="font-semibold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"><FileAudio className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400" />Subir Audio para Análisis</h3>
            
            {!audioFile ? (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                {/* Record Button */}
                <button onClick={isRecording ? stopRecording : startRecording} className={`w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-3 py-4 rounded-xl font-semibold transition ${isRecording ? 'bg-red-500 animate-pulse' : 'bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500 to-orange-600'}`}>
                  {isRecording ? <><Square className="w-5 h-5" />Detener Grabación</> : <><Mic className="w-5 h-5" />Grabar Audio</>}
                </button>
                {isRecording && <p className="text-center text-red-400 animate-pulse">🔴 Grabando...</p>}
                
                {/* Upload */}
                <div className="relative">
                  <input type="file" accept="audio/*" onChange={handleFileUpload} className="absolute inset-0 opacity-0 cursor-pointer" />
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 py-4 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-700 hover:border-amber-500 rounded-xl text-gray-400 cursor-pointer">
                    <Upload className="w-5 h-5" />O sube un archivo (MP3, WAV, M4A - máx 25MB)
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                <div className="bg-white/5 rounded-xl p-4">
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-2">Audio listo: {audioFile.name}</p>
                  <audio src={audioUrl!} controls className="w-full" />
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-3">
                  <button onClick={clearAudio} className="flex-1 bg-white/10 py-3 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2"><X className="w-5 h-5" />Cancelar</button>
                  <button onClick={transcribeAudio} disabled={isTranscribing} className="flex-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500 to-orange-600 py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-50">
                    {isTranscribing ? <><Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin" />Transcribiendo...</> : <><Brain className="w-5 h-5" />Analizar con MAX</>}
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Messages */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 space-y-4">
        {messages.map(msg => (
          <div key={msg.id} className={`flex ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}>
            <div className={`max-w-[80%] rounded-2xl px-5 py-3 ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'bg-amber-500 text-black' : 'bg-[#0a0a12] border border-white/10'}`}>
              {msg.role === 'max' && <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2 text-amber-400"><Brain className="w-4 h-4" /><span className="text-xs font-medium">MAX</span></div>}
              <p className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm leading-relaxed">{msg.content}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
        {isTyping && (
          <div className="flex justify-start">
            <div className="bg-[#0a0a12] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl px-5 py-3">
              <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin text-amber-400" />
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
        <div ref={endRef} />
      </div>

      {/* Input */}
      <div className="p-4 border-t border-white/10 bg-[#0a0a12]">
        <div className="flex gap-3">
          <input type="text" value={input} onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && sendMessage()} placeholder="Pregunta a MAX..." className="flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none focus:border-amber-500/50" />
          <button onClick={() => sendMessage()} className="bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500 to-orange-600 px-6 rounded-xl"><Send className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
MAXEOF

echo "✅ MAX actualizado con Audio Upload"
echo ""
echo "🌐 Hard refresh: http://localhost:3000/max (Ctrl+Shift+R)"
echo ""
echo "Funciones:"
echo "  • Botón 'Audio' en header → Grabar o subir archivo"
echo "  • Quick Actions → Links funcionales a otras páginas"
echo "  • Chat con MAX → Respuestas inteligentes"


Ejecuta y haz hard refresh en http://localhost:3000/max

Ahora verás:

Botón "Audio" arriba a la derecha
Quick Actions funcionales que llevan a otras páginas
Grabación o subida de audio

¿Funciona? 🎤

El archivo se cortó otra vez. Voy a crear una versión más compacta:

bash
cd ~/Empire/empire-app

# Verificar cuántas líneas tiene actualmente
echo "Líneas actuales en max/page.tsx:"
wc -l src/app/max/page.tsx

# Crear versión compacta de MAX
cat > src/app/max/page.tsx << 'MAXEOF'
'use client'
import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react'
import { Brain, Send, Mic, Upload, X, Loader2, Factory, Package, Users, TrendingUp, Square } from 'lucide-react'
import Link from 'next/link'

interface Msg { id: string; role: 'user' | 'max'; content: string }

export default function MaxPage() {
  const [msgs, setMsgs] = useState<Msg[]>([])
  const [input, setInput] = useState('')
  const [typing, setTyping] = useState(false)
  const [showAudio, setShowAudio] = useState(false)
  const [audioFile, setAudioFile] = useState<File|null>(null)
  const [audioUrl, setAudioUrl] = useState<string|null>(null)
  const [recording, setRecording] = useState(false)
  const [transcribing, setTranscribing] = useState(false)
  const recorder = useRef<MediaRecorder|null>(null)
  const chunks = useRef<Blob[]>([])
  const endRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    const h = new Date().getHours()
    const g = h < 12 ? 'Buenos días' : h < 17 ? 'Buenas tardes' : 'Buenas noches'
    setMsgs([{ id: '1', role: 'max', content: `¡${g}! Soy MAX.\n\n🎤 Sube un audio y lo analizo.\n\n¿Qué necesitas?` }])
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => { endRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }) }, [msgs])

  const send = (text?: string) => {
    const m = text || input.trim()
    if (!m) return
    setMsgs(p => [...p, { id: Date.now().toString(), role: 'user', content: m }])
    setInput('')
    setTyping(true)
    setTimeout(() => {
      const r = genResponse(m)
      setMsgs(p => [...p, { id: (Date.now()+1).toString(), role: 'max', content: r }])
      setTyping(false)
    }, 800)
  }

  const genResponse = (i: string): string => {
    const l = i.toLowerCase()
    if (l.includes('cotiza') || l.includes('quote')) return '📝 Ve a Workroom → Nueva Cotización'
    if (l.includes('inventario') || l.includes('stock')) return '📦 Ve a Inventory → Cargar Base'
    if (l.includes('cliente')) return '👥 Ve a CRM → Nuevo Contacto'
    if (l.includes('audio')) return '🎤 Click Audio arriba → Graba o sube archivo'
    return `Entiendo: "${i}"\n\nPuedo ayudar con:\n• Cotizaciones → /workroom\n• Inventario → /inventory\n• Clientes → /customers`
  }

  const startRec = async () => {
    try {
      const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true })
      recorder.current = new MediaRecorder(stream)
      chunks.current = []
      recorder.current.ondataavailable = (e) => { if (e.data.size > 0) chunks.current.push(e.data) }
      recorder.current.onstop = () => {
        const blob = new Blob(chunks.current, { type: 'audio/webm' })
        setAudioFile(new File([blob], 'rec.webm'))
        setAudioUrl(URL.createObjectURL(blob))
        stream.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop())
      }
      recorder.current.start()
      setRecording(true)
    } catch { alert('Sin acceso al mic') }
  }

  const stopRec = () => { if (recorder.current) { recorder.current.stop(); setRecording(false) } }

  const onFile = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    const f = e.target.files?.[0]
    if (f && f.size < 25*1024*1024) { setAudioFile(f); setAudioUrl(URL.createObjectURL(f)) }
  }

  const transcribe = async () => {
    if (!audioFile) return
    setTranscribing(true)
    try {
      const fd = new FormData(); fd.append('audio', audioFile)
      const res = await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/transcribe', { method: 'POST', body: fd })
      if (res.ok) {
        const d = await res.json()
        setShowAudio(false); setAudioFile(null); setAudioUrl(null)
        send(`🎤 Audio: ${d.text}`)
      } else { alert('Error transcripción') }
    } catch { alert('Backend no disponible') }
    setTranscribing(false)
  }

  const actions = [
    { label: 'Nueva Cotización', icon: Factory, href: '/workroom' },
    { label: 'Ver Stock', icon: Package, href: '/inventory' },
    { label: 'Agregar Cliente', icon: Users, href: '/customers' },
    { label: 'Finanzas', icon: TrendingUp, href: '/finance' },
  ]

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#030308] flex flex-col">
      <div className="bg-amber-500/10 border-b border-amber-500/20 px-6 py-4">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500 to-orange-600 flex items-center justify-center"><Brain className="w-6 h-6" /></div>
            <div><h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">MAX <span className="text-xs bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">Online</span></h1><p className="text-gray-500">AI Director</p></div>
          </div>
          <button onClick={() => setShowAudio(!showAudio)} className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl font-semibold ${showAudio ? 'bg-amber-500 text-black' : 'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400'}`}><Mic className="w-5 h-5" />Audio</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="px-6 py-3 border-b border-white/10 flex gap-3 overflow-x-auto">
        {actions.map((a, i) => <Link key={i} href={a.href} className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl whitespace-nowrap"><a.icon className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-400" /><span className="text-sm">{a.label}</span></Link>)}
      </div>

      {showAudio && (
        <div className="px-6 py-4 bg-[#0a0a12] border-b border-white/10">
          {!audioFile ? (
            <div className="space-y-3 max-w-lg mx-auto">
              <button onClick={recording ? stopRec : startRec} className={`w-full py-4 rounded-xl font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${recording ? 'bg-red-500 animate-pulse' : 'bg-amber-500'}`}>
                {recording ? <><Square className="w-5 h-5" />Detener</> : <><Mic className="w-5 h-5" />Grabar</>}
              </button>
              <div className="relative">
                <input type="file" accept="audio/*" onChange={onFile} className="absolute inset-0 opacity-0 cursor-pointer" />
                <div className="py-4 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-700 rounded-xl text-center text-gray-400"><Upload className="w-5 h-5 inline mr-2" />Subir archivo (MP3, WAV)</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-3 max-w-lg mx-auto">
              <audio src={audioUrl!} controls className="w-full" />
              <div className="flex gap-3">
                <button onClick={() => { setAudioFile(null); setAudioUrl(null) }} className="flex-1 bg-white/10 py-3 rounded-xl"><X className="w-5 h-5 inline" /> Cancelar</button>
                <button onClick={transcribe} disabled={transcribing} className="flex-1 bg-amber-500 py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold disabled:opacity-50">
                  {transcribing ? <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 inline animate-spin" /> : <Brain className="w-5 h-5 inline" />} Analizar
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 space-y-4">
        {msgs.map(m => (
          <div key={m.id} className={`flex ${m.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}>
            <div className={`max-w-[80%] rounded-2xl px-5 py-3 ${m.role === 'user' ? 'bg-amber-500 text-black' : 'bg-[#0a0a12] border border-white/10'}`}>
              {m.role === 'max' && <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2 text-amber-400"><Brain className="w-4 h-4" /><span className="text-xs">MAX</span></div>}
              <p className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm">{m.content}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
        {typing && <div className="flex justify-start"><div className="bg-[#0a0a12] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl px-5 py-3"><Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin text-amber-400" /></div></div>}
        <div ref={endRef} />
      </div>

      <div className="p-4 border-t border-white/10 bg-[#0a0a12]">
        <div className="flex gap-3">
          <input type="text" value={input} onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && send()} placeholder="Pregunta a MAX..." className="flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none" />
          <button onClick={() => send()} className="bg-amber-500 px-6 rounded-xl"><Send className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
MAXEOF

echo "✅ MAX creado ($(wc -l < src/app/max/page.tsx) líneas)"
echo ""
echo "🌐 Hard refresh: http://localhost:3000/max"


Ejecuta y haz Ctrl+Shift+R en la página de MAX. ¿Ves el botón "Audio" ahora? 🎤

¡Perfecto! El archivo se creó correctamente con 160 líneas.

Ahora haz hard refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R) en:

http://localhost:3000/max

Deberías ver:

✅ Botón "Audio" arriba a la derecha
✅ Botones de Quick Actions (Nueva Cotización, Ver Stock, etc.)
✅ Opción de grabar o subir archivo de audio

Para probar el audio:

Click en "Audio" (botón naranja arriba)
Click "Grabar" o sube un archivo MP3/WAV
Click "Analizar" → Envía a Whisper para transcribir
MAX recibe el texto y responde

Si quieres probar la transcripción real, asegúrate que el backend esté corriendo:

bash
# En otra terminal:
cd ~/Empire/backend
source venv/bin/activate
uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000


¿Funciona el botón de Audio ahora? 🎤

Vamos a verificar el backend y arreglar el error:

bash
# Verificar si el backend está corriendo
echo "🔍 Verificando backend..."
curl -s http://localhost:8000/ 2>/dev/null || echo "❌ Backend no responde"

echo ""
echo "🔍 Verificando endpoint de transcripción..."
curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/transcribe/status 2>/dev/null || echo "❌ Endpoint no disponible"

echo ""
echo "🔍 Procesos en puerto 8000..."
ss -tlnp | grep 8000


Ahora vamos a reiniciar el backend correctamente:

bash
cd ~/Empire/backend

# Activar entorno virtual
source venv/bin/activate

# Verificar que los archivos existen
echo "📋 Archivos en backend:"
ls -la

# Verificar contenido de main.py
echo ""
echo "📋 Contenido de main.py:"
cat main.py

echo ""
echo "📋 Contenido de transcribe.py:"
cat transcribe.py 2>/dev/null || echo "❌ transcribe.py no existe"


Si falta el archivo, créalo:

bash
cd ~/Empire/backend
source venv/bin/activate

# Crear transcribe.py
cat > transcribe.py << 'EOF'
from fastapi import APIRouter, UploadFile, File, HTTPException
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
import tempfile
import os

router = APIRouter()

try:
    import whisper
    model = whisper.load_model("base")
    WHISPER_OK = True
    print("✅ Whisper model loaded")
except Exception as e:
    WHISPER_OK = False
    model = None
    print(f"⚠️ Whisper not available: {e}")

@router.post("/transcribe")
async def transcribe_audio(audio: UploadFile = File(...)):
    if not WHISPER_OK:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=503, detail="Whisper not installed")
    
    contents = await audio.read()
    if len(contents) > 25 * 1024 * 1024:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=413, detail="File too large (max 25MB)")
    
    suffix = os.path.splitext(audio.filename or ".webm")[1]
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False, suffix=suffix) as tmp:
        tmp.write(contents)
        tmp_path = tmp.name
    
    try:
        result = model.transcribe(tmp_path, language="es", fp16=False)
        return JSONResponse({"success": True, "text": result["text"]})
    except Exception as e:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(e))
    finally:
        if os.path.exists(tmp_path):
            os.remove(tmp_path)

@router.get("/transcribe/status")
async def status():
    return {"available": WHISPER_OK, "model": "base" if WHISPER_OK else None}
EOF

# Crear/actualizar main.py
cat > main.py << 'EOF'
from fastapi import FastAPI
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware

app = FastAPI(title="Empire API", version="2.5")

app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=["*"],
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

try:
    from transcribe import router as transcribe_router
    app.include_router(transcribe_router, prefix="/api")
    print("✅ Transcription API loaded")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"⚠️ Transcription not loaded: {e}")

@app.get("/")
def root():
    return {"status": "Empire API v2.5", "endpoints": ["/api/transcribe"]}

@app.get("/health")
def health():
    return {"status": "ok"}
EOF

echo "✅ Backend files created"

# Matar proceso anterior si existe
pkill -f "uvicorn" 2>/dev/null
sleep 2

# Iniciar backend
echo ""
echo "🚀 Starting backend..."
uvicorn main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 &
sleep 5

# Verificar
echo ""
echo "🔍 Testing..."
curl -s http://localhost:8000/
echo ""
curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/transcribe/status


Ejecuta estos comandos y dime qué ves. El backend debería mostrar:

{"status": "Empire API v2.5"}
{"available": true, "model": "base"}

El backend está funcionando y Whisper está disponible. El problema puede ser el formato del audio o CORS. Vamos a verificar:

bash
# Probar transcripción directamente con un archivo de prueba
cd ~/Empire/backend
source venv/bin/activate

# Crear un archivo de audio de prueba y enviarlo

# Ver logs del backend en tiempo real

echo "   El error específico aparecerá ahí."

# Verificar que el endpoint acepta POST
curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/transcribe \
  -F "audio=@/dev/null" \
  2>&1 | head -5

echo ""
echo "Si ves 'Unprocessable Entity' es normal (archivo vacío)"
echo "Si ves otro error, ese es el problema"


Ahora actualicemos MAX para mostrar el error específico:

bash
cd ~/Empire/empire-app

# Actualizar MAX para mostrar errores detallados
cat > src/app/max/page.tsx << 'MAXEOF'
'use client'
import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react'
import { Brain, Send, Mic, Upload, X, Loader2, Factory, Package, Users, TrendingUp, Square, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react'
import Link from 'next/link'

interface Msg { id: string; role: 'user' | 'max'; content: string }

export default function MaxPage() {
  const [msgs, setMsgs] = useState<Msg[]>([])
  const [input, setInput] = useState('')
  const [typing, setTyping] = useState(false)
  const [showAudio, setShowAudio] = useState(false)
  const [audioFile, setAudioFile] = useState<File|null>(null)
  const [audioUrl, setAudioUrl] = useState<string|null>(null)
  const [recording, setRecording] = useState(false)
  const [transcribing, setTranscribing] = useState(false)
  const [error, setError] = useState('')
  const recorder = useRef<MediaRecorder|null>(null)
  const chunks = useRef<Blob[]>([])
  const endRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    const h = new Date().getHours()
    const g = h < 12 ? 'Buenos días' : h < 17 ? 'Buenas tardes' : 'Buenas noches'
    setMsgs([{ id: '1', role: 'max', content: `¡${g}! Soy MAX.\n\n🎤 Sube un audio y lo analizo.\n\n¿Qué necesitas?` }])
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => { endRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }) }, [msgs])

  const send = (text?: string) => {
    const m = text || input.trim()
    if (!m) return
    setMsgs(p => [...p, { id: Date.now().toString(), role: 'user', content: m }])
    setInput('')
    setTyping(true)
    setTimeout(() => {
      const r = genResponse(m)
      setMsgs(p => [...p, { id: (Date.now()+1).toString(), role: 'max', content: r }])
      setTyping(false)
    }, 800)
  }

  const genResponse = (i: string): string => {
    const l = i.toLowerCase()
    if (l.includes('cotiza') || l.includes('quote')) return '📝 Ve a Workroom → Nueva Cotización'
    if (l.includes('inventario') || l.includes('stock')) return '📦 Ve a Inventory → Cargar Base'
    if (l.includes('cliente')) return '👥 Ve a CRM → Nuevo Contacto'
    if (l.includes('audio')) return '🎤 Click Audio arriba → Graba o sube archivo'
    return `Entiendo: "${i}"\n\nPuedo ayudar con:\n• Cotizaciones → /workroom\n• Inventario → /inventory\n• Clientes → /customers`
  }

  const startRec = async () => {
    try {
      setError('')
      const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true })
      recorder.current = new MediaRecorder(stream, { mimeType: 'audio/webm' })
      chunks.current = []
      recorder.current.ondataavailable = (e) => { if (e.data.size > 0) chunks.current.push(e.data) }
      recorder.current.onstop = () => {
        const blob = new Blob(chunks.current, { type: 'audio/webm' })
        setAudioFile(new File([blob], 'recording.webm', { type: 'audio/webm' }))
        setAudioUrl(URL.createObjectURL(blob))
        stream.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop())
      }
      recorder.current.start()
      setRecording(true)
    } catch (err) { 
      setError('No se pudo acceder al micrófono. Verifica permisos.')
    }
  }

  const stopRec = () => { 
    if (recorder.current && recording) { 
      recorder.current.stop()
      setRecording(false) 
    } 
  }

  const onFile = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    setError('')
    const f = e.target.files?.[0]
    if (f) {
      if (f.size > 25*1024*1024) { 
        setError('Archivo muy grande. Máximo 25MB')
        return 
      }
      setAudioFile(f)
      setAudioUrl(URL.createObjectURL(f))
    }
  }

  const transcribe = async () => {
    if (!audioFile) return
    setTranscribing(true)
    setError('')
    
    try {
      const fd = new FormData()
      fd.append('audio', audioFile, audioFile.name)
      
      console.log('Sending audio:', audioFile.name, audioFile.type, audioFile.size)
      
      const res = await fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/transcribe', { 
        method: 'POST', 
        body: fd 
      })
      
      console.log('Response status:', res.status)
      
      if (res.ok) {
        const d = await res.json()
        console.log('Transcription result:', d)
        setShowAudio(false)
        setAudioFile(null)
        setAudioUrl(null)
        send(`🎤 Audio transcrito: "${d.text}"`)
      } else {
        const errData = await res.json().catch(() => ({ detail: 'Error desconocido' }))
        console.error('Error response:', errData)
        setError(`Error ${res.status}: ${errData.detail || JSON.stringify(errData)}`)
      }
    } catch (err: any) {
      console.error('Fetch error:', err)
      setError(`Error de conexión: ${err.message}. ¿Backend corriendo en puerto 8000?`)
    }
    setTranscribing(false)
  }

  const clearAudio = () => {
    setAudioFile(null)
    setAudioUrl(null)
    setError('')
  }

  const actions = [
    { label: 'Nueva Cotización', icon: Factory, href: '/workroom' },
    { label: 'Ver Stock', icon: Package, href: '/inventory' },
    { label: 'Agregar Cliente', icon: Users, href: '/customers' },
    { label: 'Finanzas', icon: TrendingUp, href: '/finance' },
  ]

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#030308] flex flex-col">
      <div className="bg-amber-500/10 border-b border-amber-500/20 px-6 py-4">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500 to-orange-600 flex items-center justify-center"><Brain className="w-6 h-6" /></div>
            <div><h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">MAX <span className="text-xs bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">Online</span></h1><p className="text-gray-500">AI Director</p></div>
          </div>
          <button onClick={() => { setShowAudio(!showAudio); setError('') }} className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl font-semibold ${showAudio ? 'bg-amber-500 text-black' : 'bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400'}`}><Mic className="w-5 h-5" />Audio</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="px-6 py-3 border-b border-white/10 flex gap-3 overflow-x-auto">
        {actions.map((a, i) => <Link key={i} href={a.href} className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl whitespace-nowrap"><a.icon className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-400" /><span className="text-sm">{a.label}</span></Link>)}
      </div>

      {showAudio && (
        <div className="px-6 py-4 bg-[#0a0a12] border-b border-white/10">
          <div className="max-w-lg mx-auto space-y-4">
            {error && (
              <div className="bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/30 rounded-xl p-3 flex items-start gap-2 text-red-400 text-sm">
                <AlertCircle className="w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <span>{error}</span>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {!audioFile ? (
              <>
                <button onClick={recording ? stopRec : startRec} className={`w-full py-4 rounded-xl font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${recording ? 'bg-red-500 animate-pulse' : 'bg-amber-500 text-black'}`}>
                  {recording ? <><Square className="w-5 h-5" />Detener Grabación</> : <><Mic className="w-5 h-5" />Grabar Audio</>}
                </button>
                {recording && <p className="text-center text-red-400 animate-pulse">🔴 Grabando...</p>}
                <div className="relative">
                  <input type="file" accept="audio/*,.mp3,.wav,.m4a,.webm,.ogg" onChange={onFile} className="absolute inset-0 opacity-0 cursor-pointer" />
                  <div className="py-4 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-700 hover:border-amber-500 rounded-xl text-center text-gray-400 cursor-pointer">
                    <Upload className="w-5 h-5 inline mr-2" />Subir archivo (MP3, WAV, M4A - máx 25MB)
                  </div>
                </div>
              </>
            ) : (
              <>
                <div className="bg-white/5 rounded-xl p-4">
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-2">📁 {audioFile.name} ({(audioFile.size/1024/1024).toFixed(2)} MB)</p>
                  <audio src={audioUrl!} controls className="w-full" />
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-3">
                  <button onClick={clearAudio} className="flex-1 bg-white/10 py-3 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 hover:bg-white/20"><X className="w-5 h-5" />Cancelar</button>
                  <button onClick={transcribe} disabled={transcribing} className="flex-1 bg-amber-500 text-black py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-50">
                    {transcribing ? <><Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin" />Analizando...</> : <><Brain className="w-5 h-5" />Analizar</>}
                  </button>
                </div>
              </>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 space-y-4">
        {msgs.map(m => (
          <div key={m.id} className={`flex ${m.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}>
            <div className={`max-w-[80%] rounded-2xl px-5 py-3 ${m.role === 'user' ? 'bg-amber-500 text-black' : 'bg-[#0a0a12] border border-white/10'}`}>
              {m.role === 'max' && <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2 text-amber-400"><Brain className="w-4 h-4" /><span className="text-xs">MAX</span></div>}
              <p className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm">{m.content}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
        {typing && <div className="flex justify-start"><div className="bg-[#0a0a12] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl px-5 py-3"><Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin text-amber-400" /></div></div>}
        <div ref={endRef} />
      </div>

      <div className="p-4 border-t border-white/10 bg-[#0a0a12]">
        <div className="flex gap-3">
          <input type="text" value={input} onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && send()} placeholder="Pregunta a MAX..." className="flex-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none focus:border-amber-500" />
          <button onClick={() => send()} className="bg-amber-500 text-black px-6 rounded-xl"><Send className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
MAXEOF

echo "✅ MAX actualizado con manejo de errores"
echo ""
echo "🌐 Hard refresh: http://localhost:3000/max"
echo ""
echo "Ahora verás el error específico en rojo cuando falle."
echo "También revisa la consola del navegador (F12) para más detalles."


Ejecuta esto y prueba de nuevo. El error específico aparecerá en rojo en la página, y también en la consola del navegador (F12 → Console).

¿Qué error muestra? 🔍

¡Encontré el problema! Falta ffmpeg. Whisper lo necesita para procesar audio.

bash
# Instalar ffmpeg
sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y ffmpeg

# Verificar instalación
ffmpeg -version | head -1

# Probar transcripción de nuevo
echo ""
echo "🔍 Probando transcripción..."
curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/transcribe \
  -F "audio=@/dev/null" \
  2>&1

echo ""
echo "✅ Si ves 'Unprocessable Entity' ahora es normal (archivo vacío)"
echo "   El error de ffmpeg debería estar resuelto"


Después de instalar ffmpeg, prueba de nuevo en http://localhost:3000/max con el botón Audio. 🎤

¡FFmpeg está instalado! El error ahora es porque enviamos un archivo vacío (/dev/null). Eso es normal.

Ahora prueba con un archivo de audio real desde el navegador:

Hard refresh en http://localhost:3000/max (Ctrl+Shift+R)
Click "Audio"
Graba algo (habla por 3-5 segundos) o sube un MP3/WAV
Click "Analizar"

Debería funcionar ahora. 🎤

Si quieres probar desde terminal con un audio real:

bash
cd ~/Empire/backend
source venv/bin/activate

# Crear un audio de prueba con texto
echo "Probando con audio sintético..."

# Descargar un audio de prueba pequeño
curl -L -o test.mp3 "https://www2.cs.uic.edu/~i101/SoundFiles/BabyElephantWalk60.wav" 2>/dev/null

# Probar transcripción
curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/transcribe \
  -F "audio=@test.mp3" \
  2>&1

rm -f test.mp3


¿Funciona el audio desde el navegador ahora?

¡Excelente proyecto! Vamos a crear Actitud Mental Positiva (AMP) - un híbrido entre Mindvalley (cursos) y Puramente (meditación/bienestar).

bash
# ============================================
# CREAR PROYECTO: ACTITUD MENTAL POSITIVA
# ============================================

mkdir -p ~/Projects/actitud-mental-positiva
cd ~/Projects/actitud-mental-positiva

# Inicializar proyecto Next.js
npx create-next-app@latest amp-app --typescript --tailwind --app --no-eslint --no-src-dir --import-alias "@/*" << EOF
y
EOF

cd amp-app

# Instalar dependencias
npm install lucide-react framer-motion

echo "✅ Proyecto base creado"


Ahora la estructura y diseño:

bash
cd ~/Projects/actitud-mental-positiva/amp-app

# Crear estructura de carpetas
mkdir -p app/{cursos,meditaciones,diario,perfil,comunidad}
mkdir -p components/{ui,layout,meditation,courses}
mkdir -p public/images

# ============================================
# LAYOUT PRINCIPAL
# ============================================
cat > app/layout.tsx << 'EOF'
import type { Metadata } from 'next'
import { Inter } from 'next/font/google'
import './globals.css'

const inter = Inter({ subsets: ['latin'] })

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: 'Actitud Mental Positiva | Portal de la Alegría',
  description: 'Transforma tu vida con meditaciones, cursos y herramientas de bienestar mental',
}

export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <html lang="es">
      <body className={`${inter.className} bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-950 via-purple-950 to-slate-950 text-white min-h-screen`}>
        {children}
      </body>
    </html>
  )
}
EOF

# ============================================
# ESTILOS GLOBALES
# ============================================
cat > app/globals.css << 'EOF'
@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

:root {
  --amp-primary: #8B5CF6;
  --amp-secondary: #EC4899;
  --amp-accent: #F59E0B;
  --amp-calm: #06B6D4;
}

body {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e1b4b 0%, #4c1d95 50%, #0f172a 100%);
}

.glass {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
}

.glow-purple {
  box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);
}

.glow-pink {
  box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.3);
}

.gradient-text {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #8B5CF6, #EC4899, #F59E0B);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
}

@keyframes float {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
  50% { transform: translateY(-10px); }
}

.animate-float {
  animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes breathe {
  0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.8; }
  50% { transform: scale(1.1); opacity: 1; }
}

.animate-breathe {
  animation: breathe 4s ease-in-out infinite;
}
EOF
