Ahora la página principal:

bash
cd ~/Projects/actitud-mental-positiva/amp-app

# ============================================
# PÁGINA PRINCIPAL - LANDING
# ============================================
cat > app/page.tsx << 'EOF'
'use client'
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import Link from 'next/link'
import { 
  Sparkles, Heart, BookOpen, Music, Calendar, Users, 
  Play, ArrowRight, Star, Moon, Sun, Zap, Brain,
  Smile, TrendingUp, Award, CheckCircle
} from 'lucide-react'

export default function Home() {
  const [mood, setMood] = useState('')
  const [greeting, setGreeting] = useState('')

  useEffect(() => {
    const hour = new Date().getHours()
    if (hour < 12) setGreeting('Buenos días')
    else if (hour < 18) setGreeting('Buenas tardes')
    else setGreeting('Buenas noches')
  }, [])

  const features = [
    { icon: Music, label: 'Meditaciones', desc: 'Guiadas para cada momento', color: 'from-violet-500 to-purple-600', href: '/meditaciones' },
    { icon: BookOpen, label: 'Cursos', desc: 'Transforma tu mentalidad', color: 'from-pink-500 to-rose-600', href: '/cursos' },
    { icon: Calendar, label: 'Diario', desc: 'Registra tu progreso', color: 'from-amber-500 to-orange-600', href: '/diario' },
    { icon: Users, label: 'Comunidad', desc: 'Conecta con otros', color: 'from-cyan-500 to-teal-600', href: '/comunidad' },
  ]

  const moods = [
    { emoji: '😊', label: 'Feliz', color: 'bg-yellow-500' },
    { emoji: '😌', label: 'Tranquilo', color: 'bg-green-500' },
    { emoji: '😔', label: 'Triste', color: 'bg-blue-500' },
    { emoji: '😰', label: 'Ansioso', color: 'bg-purple-500' },
    { emoji: '😤', label: 'Frustrado', color: 'bg-red-500' },
    { emoji: '🤔', label: 'Reflexivo', color: 'bg-indigo-500' },
  ]

  const dailyMeditation = {
    title: 'Respira y Suelta',
    duration: '10 min',
    category: 'Relajación',
    image: '🧘‍♀️'
  }

  const popularCourses = [
    { title: 'Actitud Positiva en 21 Días', author: 'AMP Team', lessons: 21, color: 'from-violet-600 to-purple-700' },
    { title: 'Superar la Ansiedad', author: 'Dr. Bienestar', lessons: 14, color: 'from-pink-600 to-rose-700' },
    { title: 'Manifestación Consciente', author: 'Luna Verde', lessons: 28, color: 'from-amber-600 to-orange-700' },
  ]

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen">
      {/* Navigation */}
      <nav className="fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 glass">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <Link href="/" className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500 to-pink-500 flex items-center justify-center animate-float">
                <Sparkles className="w-6 h-6" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <h1 className="font-bold text-lg gradient-text">AMP</h1>
                <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">Portal de la Alegría</p>
              </div>
            </Link>
            <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-8">
              <Link href="/meditaciones" className="text-sm text-gray-300 hover:text-white transition">Meditaciones</Link>
              <Link href="/cursos" className="text-sm text-gray-300 hover:text-white transition">Cursos</Link>
              <Link href="/diario" className="text-sm text-gray-300 hover:text-white transition">Mi Diario</Link>
              <Link href="/comunidad" className="text-sm text-gray-300 hover:text-white transition">Comunidad</Link>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
              <button className="text-sm text-gray-300 hover:text-white">Iniciar Sesión</button>
              <button className="bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-pink-500 px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold hover:opacity-90 transition">
                Comenzar Gratis
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </nav>

      {/* Hero Section */}
      <section className="pt-32 pb-20 px-6">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center">
            <div>
              <p className="text-violet-400 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                <Sparkles className="w-5 h-5" />
                {greeting}, bienvenido al Portal de la Alegría
              </p>
              <h1 className="text-5xl md:text-6xl font-bold mb-6 leading-tight">
                Transforma tu
                <span className="gradient-text"> Actitud Mental</span>
                <br />y cambia tu vida
              </h1>
              <p className="text-xl text-gray-300 mb-8">
                Meditaciones guiadas, cursos transformadores y herramientas de bienestar 
                para manifestar la vida que mereces.
              </p>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-4">
                <Link href="/meditaciones" className="bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-pink-500 px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-semibold flex items-center gap-2 hover:opacity-90 transition glow-purple">
                  <Play className="w-5 h-5" />
                  Comenzar Ahora
                </Link>
                <Link href="/cursos" className="glass px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-semibold flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-white/10 transition">
                  Ver Cursos
                  <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5" />
                </Link>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-6 mt-8 text-sm text-gray-400">
                <span className="flex items-center gap-2"><CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" />100+ Meditaciones</span>
                <span className="flex items-center gap-2"><CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" />20+ Cursos</span>
                <span className="flex items-center gap-2"><CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" />Comunidad Activa</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            {/* Mood Check Widget */}
            <div className="glass rounded-3xl p-8 glow-purple">
              <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-2">¿Cómo te sientes hoy?</h3>
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-6">Tu estado de ánimo nos ayuda a personalizar tu experiencia</p>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3 mb-6">
                {moods.map((m) => (
                  <button
                    key={m.label}
                    onClick={() => setMood(m.label)}
                    className={`p-4 rounded-2xl transition-all ${
                      mood === m.label 
                        ? `${m.color} scale-105` 
                        : 'bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10'
                    }`}
                  >
                    <span className="text-3xl block mb-2">{m.emoji}</span>
                    <span className="text-xs">{m.label}</span>
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
              {mood && (
                <div className="bg-violet-500/20 rounded-xl p-4 border border-violet-500/30">
                  <p className="text-sm">
                    <span className="text-violet-400 font-semibold">Recomendación:</span> 
                    {mood === 'Ansioso' && ' Prueba nuestra meditación de respiración profunda'}
                    {mood === 'Triste' && ' Te sugerimos el curso "Encontrar la Alegría Interior"'}
                    {mood === 'Feliz' && ' ¡Perfecto momento para una meditación de gratitud!'}
                    {mood === 'Tranquilo' && ' Mantén ese estado con nuestra meditación de mantenimiento'}
                    {mood === 'Frustrado' && ' La meditación de soltar te ayudará a liberar tensiones'}
                    {mood === 'Reflexivo' && ' Explora nuestro curso de autoconocimiento'}
                  </p>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Features Grid */}
      <section className="py-20 px-6">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
          <div className="text-center mb-12">
            <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-4">Todo lo que necesitas para tu bienestar</h2>
            <p className="text-gray-400 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
              Una plataforma completa con herramientas probadas para transformar tu mentalidad y manifestar bienestar.
            </p>
          </div>
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
            {features.map((feature) => (
              <Link
                key={feature.label}
                href={feature.href}
                className="glass rounded-2xl p-6 hover:scale-105 transition-all group"
              >
                <div className={`w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br ${feature.color} flex items-center justify-center mb-4 group-hover:scale-110 transition`}>
                  <feature.icon className="w-7 h-7" />
                </div>
                <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-2">{feature.label}</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm">{feature.desc}</p>
              </Link>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Daily Meditation */}
      <section className="py-20 px-6">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
          <div className="glass rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12 relative overflow-hidden">
            <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-64 h-64 bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500/20 to-pink-500/20 rounded-full blur-3xl"></div>
            <div className="relative z-10 grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-8 items-center">
              <div>
                <span className="text-violet-400 text-sm font-medium">MEDITACIÓN DEL DÍA</span>
                <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mt-2 mb-4">{dailyMeditation.title}</h2>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-6">
                  <span className="bg-white/10 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm">{dailyMeditation.duration}</span>
                  <span className="bg-white/10 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm">{dailyMeditation.category}</span>
                </div>
                <p className="text-gray-400 mb-6">
                  Una práctica guiada para liberar tensiones y conectar con tu paz interior. 
                  Perfecta para comenzar o terminar tu día.
                </p>
                <button className="bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-pink-500 px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-semibold flex items-center gap-2 hover:opacity-90 transition">
                  <Play className="w-5 h-5" />
                  Comenzar Meditación
                </button>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-center">
                <div className="w-64 h-64 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500/30 to-pink-500/30 flex items-center justify-center animate-breathe">
                  <div className="w-48 h-48 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500/50 to-pink-500/50 flex items-center justify-center">
                    <span className="text-8xl">{dailyMeditation.image}</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Popular Courses */}
      <section className="py-20 px-6">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
            <div>
              <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-2">Cursos Populares</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-400">Transforma tu vida con nuestros programas</p>
            </div>
            <Link href="/cursos" className="text-violet-400 hover:text-violet-300 flex items-center gap-2">
              Ver todos <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" />
            </Link>
          </div>
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
            {popularCourses.map((course, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="glass rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:scale-105 transition-all group cursor-pointer">
                <div className={`h-40 bg-gradient-to-br ${course.color} flex items-center justify-center`}>
                  <Brain className="w-16 h-16 opacity-50 group-hover:scale-110 transition" />
                </div>
                <div className="p-6">
                  <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-2">{course.title}</h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-4">Por {course.author}</p>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                    <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">{course.lessons} lecciones</span>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-amber-400">
                      <Star className="w-4 h-4 fill-current" />
                      <span className="text-sm">4.9</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Stats */}
      <section className="py-20 px-6">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
          <div className="glass rounded-3xl p-12">
            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-4 gap-8 text-center">
              {[
                { value: '50K+', label: 'Usuarios Activos', icon: Users },
                { value: '100+', label: 'Meditaciones', icon: Music },
                { value: '20+', label: 'Cursos', icon: BookOpen },
                { value: '4.9', label: 'Calificación', icon: Star },
              ].map((stat, i) => (
                <div key={i}>
                  <stat.icon className="w-8 h-8 mx-auto mb-4 text-violet-400" />
                  <p className="text-4xl font-bold gradient-text mb-2">{stat.value}</p>
                  <p className="text-gray-400">{stat.label}</p>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* CTA */}
      <section className="py-20 px-6">
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto text-center">
          <h2 className="text-4xl font-bold mb-6">
            Comienza tu viaje de transformación
            <span className="gradient-text"> hoy</span>
          </h2>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-400 mb-8">
            Únete a miles de personas que ya están transformando su mentalidad y manifestando bienestar.
          </p>
          <button className="bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-pink-500 px-10 py-5 rounded-full text-lg font-semibold hover:opacity-90 transition glow-purple">
            Comenzar Gratis - 7 Días de Prueba
          </button>
          <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm mt-4">Sin tarjeta de crédito • Cancela cuando quieras</p>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Footer */}
      <footer className="py-12 px-6 border-t border-white/10">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
          <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-6">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500 to-pink-500 flex items-center justify-center">
                <Sparkles className="w-6 h-6" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <h3 className="font-bold">Actitud Mental Positiva</h3>
                <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">Portal de la Alegría</p>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-8 text-sm text-gray-400">
              <Link href="/about" className="hover:text-white">Sobre Nosotros</Link>
              <Link href="/privacy" className="hover:text-white">Privacidad</Link>
              <Link href="/terms" className="hover:text-white">Términos</Link>
              <Link href="/contact" className="hover:text-white">Contacto</Link>
            </div>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">© 2024 AMP. Todos los derechos reservados.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </footer>

      {/* Mobile Nav */}
      <nav className="fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 md:hidden glass border-t border-white/10 px-6 py-3 z-50">
        <div className="flex justify-around">
          {[
            { icon: Music, label: 'Meditar', href: '/meditaciones' },
            { icon: BookOpen, label: 'Cursos', href: '/cursos' },
            { icon: Smile, label: 'Ánimo', href: '/diario' },
            { icon: Users, label: 'Social', href: '/comunidad' },
          ].map((item) => (
            <Link key={item.label} href={item.href} className="flex flex-col items-center gap-1 text-gray-400 hover:text-violet-400">
              <item.icon className="w-6 h-6" />
              <span className="text-xs">{item.label}</span>
            </Link>
          ))}
        </div>
      </nav>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

import { useState } from 'react'

]

  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen pb-24">
      {/* Header */}
      <header className="glass sticky top-0 z-40 px

import type { Metadata } from 'next'
import './globals.css'

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: 'Actitud Mental Positiva | Portal de la Alegría',
  description: 'Transforma tu vida con meditaciones, cursos y herramientas de bienestar',
}

export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {

}

bash
cd ~/Projects/actitud-mental-positiva/amp-app

cat > app/page.tsx << 'HOMEEOF'
'use client'
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import Link from 'next/link'
import { Sparkles, Heart, BookOpen, Music, Calendar, Users, Play, ArrowRight, Star, Moon, Sun, Brain, CheckCircle } from 'lucide-react'

export default function Home() {
  const [mood, setMood] = useState('')
  const [greeting, setGreeting] = useState('')

  useEffect(() => {
    const h = new Date().getHours()
    setGreeting(h < 12 ? 'Buenos días' : h < 18 ? 'Buenas tardes' : 'Buenas noches')
  }, [])

  const features = [
    { icon: Music, label: 'Meditaciones', desc: 'Guiadas para cada momento', color: 'from-violet-500 to-purple-600', href: '/meditaciones' },
    { icon: BookOpen, label: 'Cursos', desc: 'Transforma tu mentalidad', color: 'from-pink-500 to-rose-600', href: '/cursos' },
    { icon: Calendar, label: 'Diario', desc: 'Registra tu progreso', color: 'from-amber-500 to-orange-600', href: '/diario' },
    { icon: Users, label: 'Comunidad', desc: 'Conecta con otros', color: 'from-cyan-500 to-teal-600', href: '/comunidad' },
  ]

  const moods = [
    { emoji: '😊', label: 'Feliz', color: 'bg-yellow-500' },
    { emoji: '😌', label: 'Tranquilo', color: 'bg-green-500' },
    { emoji: '😔', label: 'Triste', color: 'bg-blue-500' },
    { emoji: '😰', label: 'Ansioso', color: 'bg-purple-500' },
    { emoji: '😤', label: 'Frustrado', color: 'bg-red-500' },
    { emoji: '🤔', label: 'Reflexivo', color: 'bg-indigo-500' },
  ]

  const courses = [
    { title: 'Actitud Positiva en 21 Días', author: 'AMP Team', lessons: 21 },
    { title: 'Superar la Ansiedad', author: 'Dr. Bienestar', lessons: 14 },
    { title: 'Manifestación Consciente', author: 'Luna Verde', lessons: 28 },
  ]

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen">
      {/* Nav */}
      <nav className="fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 glass">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
          <Link href="/" className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500 to-pink-500 flex items-center justify-center">
              <Sparkles className="w-6 h-6" />
            </div>
            <div><h1 className="font-bold gradient-text">AMP</h1><p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">Portal de la Alegría</p></div>
          </Link>
          <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-8">
            <Link href="/meditaciones" className="text-sm text-gray-300 hover:text-white">Meditaciones</Link>
            <Link href="/cursos" className="text-sm text-gray-300 hover:text-white">Cursos</Link>
            <Link href="/diario" className="text-sm text-gray-300 hover:text-white">Mi Diario</Link>
          </div>
          <button className="bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-pink-500 px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold">Comenzar</button>
        </div>
      </nav>

      {/* Hero */}
      <section className="pt-32 pb-20 px-6">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center">
          <div>
            <p className="text-violet-400 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"><Sparkles className="w-5 h-5" />{greeting}</p>
            <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-6">Transforma tu <span className="gradient-text">Actitud Mental</span> y cambia tu vida</h1>
            <p className="text-xl text-gray-300 mb-8">Meditaciones guiadas, cursos transformadores y herramientas de bienestar.</p>
            <div className="flex gap-4">
              <Link href="/meditaciones" className="bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-pink-500 px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-semibold flex items-center gap-2 glow"><Play className="w-5 h-5" />Comenzar</Link>
              <Link href="/cursos" className="glass px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">Cursos <ArrowRight className="w-5 h-5" /></Link>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-6 mt-8 text-sm text-gray-400">
              <span className="flex items-center gap-2"><CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" />100+ Meditaciones</span>
              <span className="flex items-center gap-2"><CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" />20+ Cursos</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          {/* Mood Widget */}
          <div className="glass rounded-3xl p-8 glow">
            <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-2">¿Cómo te sientes hoy?</h3>
            <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-6">Tu estado de ánimo personaliza tu experiencia</p>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3 mb-6">
              {moods.map((m) => (
                <button key={m.label} onClick={() => setMood(m.label)} className={`p-4 rounded-2xl transition-all ${mood === m.label ? `${m.color} scale-105` : 'bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10'}`}>
                  <span className="text-3xl block mb-2">{m.emoji}</span>
                  <span className="text-xs">{m.label}</span>
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
            {mood && (
              <div className="bg-violet-500/20 rounded-xl p-4 border border-violet-500/30">
                <p className="text-sm"><span className="text-violet-400 font-semibold">Recomendación: </span>
                  {mood === 'Ansioso' && 'Prueba meditación de respiración'}
                  {mood === 'Triste' && 'Curso "Encontrar la Alegría Interior"'}
                  {mood === 'Feliz' && '¡Meditación de gratitud!'}
                  {mood === 'Tranquilo' && 'Meditación de mantenimiento'}
                  {mood === 'Frustrado' && 'Meditación de soltar'}
                  {mood === 'Reflexivo' && 'Curso de autoconocimiento'}
                </p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Features */}
      <section className="py-20 px-6">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-center mb-12">Todo para tu bienestar</h2>
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
            {features.map((f) => (
              <Link key={f.label} href={f.href} className="glass rounded-2xl p-6 hover:scale-105 transition-all">
                <div className={`w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br ${f.color} flex items-center justify-center mb-4`}>
                  <f.icon className="w-7 h-7" />
                </div>
                <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-2">{f.label}</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm">{f.desc}</p>
              </Link>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Daily Meditation */}
      <section className="py-20 px-6">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto glass rounded-3xl p-12 relative overflow-hidden">
          <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-64 h-64 bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500/20 to-pink-500/20 rounded-full blur-3xl"></div>
          <div className="relative grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-8 items-center">
            <div>
              <span className="text-violet-400 text-sm">MEDITACIÓN DEL DÍA</span>
              <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mt-2 mb-4">Respira y Suelta</h2>
              <div className="flex gap-4 mb-6">
                <span className="bg-white/10 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm">10 min</span>
                <span className="bg-white/10 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm">Relajación</span>
              </div>
              <p className="text-gray-400 mb-6">Libera tensiones y conecta con tu paz interior.</p>
              <button className="bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-pink-500 px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-semibold flex items-center gap-2"><Play className="w-5 h-5" />Comenzar</button>
            </div>
            <div className="flex justify-center">
              <div className="w-64 h-64 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500/30 to-pink-500/30 flex items-center justify-center animate-breathe">
                <span className="text-8xl">🧘‍♀️</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Courses */}
      <section className="py-20 px-6">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
          <div className="flex justify-between mb-8">
            <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold">Cursos Populares</h2>
            <Link href="/cursos" className="text-violet-400 flex items-center gap-2">Ver todos <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" /></Link>
          </div>
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
            {courses.map((c, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="glass rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:scale-105 transition-all cursor-pointer">
                <div className={`h-40 bg-gradient-to-br ${i===0 ? 'from-violet-600 to-purple-700' : i===1 ? 'from-pink-600 to-rose-700' : 'from-amber-600 to-orange-700'} flex items-center justify-center`}>
                  <Brain className="w-16 h-16 opacity-50" />
                </div>
                <div className="p-6">
                  <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-2">{c.title}</h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-4">Por {c.author}</p>
                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                    <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">{c.lessons} lecciones</span>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-amber-400"><Star className="w-4 h-4 fill-current" /><span className="text-sm">4.9</span></div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* CTA */}
      <section className="py-20 px-6 text-center">
        <h2 className="text-4xl font-bold mb-6">Comienza tu transformación <span className="gradient-text">hoy</span></h2>
        <p className="text-xl text-gray-400 mb-8">Únete a miles transformando su mentalidad</p>
        <button className="bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-pink-500 px-10 py-5 rounded-full text-lg font-semibold glow">7 Días Gratis</button>
      </section>

      {/* Mobile Nav */}
      <nav className="fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 md:hidden glass px-6 py-3 z-50">
        <div className="flex justify-around">
          {[{ icon: Music, label: 'Meditar', href: '/meditaciones' }, { icon: BookOpen, label: 'Cursos', href: '/cursos' }, { icon: Calendar, label: 'Diario', href: '/diario' }, { icon: Users, label: 'Social', href: '/comunidad' }].map((i) => (
            <Link key={i.label} href={i.href} className="flex flex-col items-center gap-1 text-gray-400 hover:text-violet-400">
              <i.icon className="w-6 h-6" /><span className="text-xs">{i.label}</span>
            </Link>
          ))}
        </div>
      </nav>
    </div>
  )
}

El archivo se cortó. Vamos paso a paso con archivos más pequeños:

bash
cd ~/Projects/actitud-mental-positiva/amp-app

# Layout
cat > app/layout.tsx << 'EOF'
import type { Metadata } from 'next'
import './globals.css'

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: 'Actitud Mental Positiva | Portal de la Alegría',
  description: 'Transforma tu vida con meditaciones y cursos de bienestar',
}

export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <html lang="es">
      <body className="bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-950 via-purple-950 to-slate-950 text-white min-h-screen">
        {children}
      </body>
    </html>
  )
}
EOF

# Estilos
cat > app/globals.css << 'EOF'
@import "tailwindcss";
.glass { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }
.glow { box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(139,92,246,0.3); }
.gradient-text { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #8B5CF6, #EC4899); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; }
@keyframes breathe { 0%,100% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.08); } }
.animate-breathe { animation: breathe 4s ease-in-out infinite; }
EOF

echo "✅ Layout y estilos creados"


Ahora la página principal en partes:

bash
cd ~/Projects/actitud-mental-positiva/amp-app

cat > app/page.tsx << 'EOF'
'use client'
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import Link from 'next/link'
import { Sparkles, BookOpen, Music, Calendar, Users, Play, ArrowRight, Star, Brain, CheckCircle } from 'lucide-react'

const moods = [
  { emoji: '😊', label: 'Feliz', color: 'bg-yellow-500', tip: 'Meditación de gratitud' },
  { emoji: '😌', label: 'Tranquilo', color: 'bg-green-500', tip: 'Mantén tu paz interior' },
  { emoji: '😔', label: 'Triste', color: 'bg-blue-500', tip: 'Curso de alegría interior' },
  { emoji: '😰', label: 'Ansioso', color: 'bg-purple-500', tip: 'Respiración profunda' },
  { emoji: '😤', label: 'Frustrado', color: 'bg-red-500', tip: 'Meditación de soltar' },
  { emoji: '🤔', label: 'Reflexivo', color: 'bg-indigo-500', tip: 'Autoconocimiento' },
]

const features = [
  { icon: Music, label: 'Meditaciones', desc: 'Guiadas', color: 'from-violet-500 to-purple-600', href: '/meditaciones' },
  { icon: BookOpen, label: 'Cursos', desc: 'Transforma', color: 'from-pink-500 to-rose-600', href: '/cursos' },
  { icon: Calendar, label: 'Diario', desc: 'Progreso', color: 'from-amber-500 to-orange-600', href: '/diario' },
  { icon: Users, label: 'Comunidad', desc: 'Conecta', color: 'from-cyan-500 to-teal-600', href: '/comunidad' },
]

const courses = [
  { title: 'Actitud Positiva 21 Días', author: 'AMP', lessons: 21, color: 'from-violet-600 to-purple-700' },
  { title: 'Superar Ansiedad', author: 'Dr. Paz', lessons: 14, color: 'from-pink-600 to-rose-700' },
  { title: 'Manifestación', author: 'Luna', lessons: 28, color: 'from-amber-600 to-orange-700' },
]

export default function Home() {
  const [mood, setMood] = useState<typeof moods[0] | null>(null)
  const [greeting, setGreeting] = useState('')

  useEffect(() => {
    const h = new Date().getHours()
    setGreeting(h < 12 ? 'Buenos días' : h < 18 ? 'Buenas tardes' : 'Buenas noches')
  }, [])

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen pb-20">
      {/* Nav */}
      <nav className="fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 glass">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
          <Link href="/" className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500 to-pink-500 flex items-center justify-center"><Sparkles className="w-5 h-5" /></div>
            <span className="font-bold gradient-text text-xl">AMP</span>
          </Link>
          <div className="hidden md:flex gap-6">
            <Link href="/meditaciones" className="text-gray-300 hover:text-white text-sm">Meditaciones</Link>
            <Link href="/cursos" className="text-gray-300 hover:text-white text-sm">Cursos</Link>
            <Link href="/diario" className="text-gray-300 hover:text-white text-sm">Diario</Link>
          </div>
          <button className="bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-pink-500 px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold">Comenzar</button>
        </div>
      </nav>

      {/* Hero */}
      <section className="pt-28 pb-16 px-6">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-10 items-center">
          <div>
            <p className="text-violet-400 mb-3 flex items-center gap-2"><Sparkles className="w-4 h-4" />{greeting}</p>
            <h1 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold mb-5 leading-tight">Transforma tu <span className="gradient-text">Actitud Mental</span></h1>
            <p className="text-lg text-gray-300 mb-6">Meditaciones, cursos y herramientas de bienestar para manifestar la vida que mereces.</p>
            <div className="flex gap-3 mb-6">
              <Link href="/meditaciones" className="bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-pink-500 px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-semibold flex items-center gap-2 glow"><Play className="w-4 h-4" />Meditar</Link>
              <Link href="/cursos" className="glass px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">Cursos<ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" /></Link>
            </div>
            <div className="flex gap-4 text-sm text-gray-400">
              <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" />100+ Meditaciones</span>
              <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-400" />20+ Cursos</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          {/* Mood */}
          <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-6 glow">
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-1">¿Cómo te sientes?</h3>
            <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-4">Personaliza tu experiencia</p>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 mb-4">
              {moods.map((m) => (
                <button key={m.label} onClick={() => setMood(m)} className={`p-3 rounded-xl transition-all ${mood?.label === m.label ? `${m.color} scale-105` : 'bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10'}`}>
                  <span className="text-2xl block">{m.emoji}</span>
                  <span className="text-xs">{m.label}</span>
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
            {mood && <div className="bg-violet-500/20 rounded-lg p-3 border border-violet-500/30 text-sm"><span className="text-violet-400 font-medium">Recomendación:</span> {mood.tip}</div>}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Features */}
      <section className="py-12 px-6">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
          {features.map((f) => (
            <Link key={f.label} href={f.href} className="glass rounded-xl p-5 hover:scale-105 transition-all text-center">
              <div className={`w-12 h-12 mx-auto rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br ${f.color} flex items-center justify-center mb-3`}><f.icon className="w-6 h-6" /></div>
              <h3 className="font-semibold">{f.label}</h3>
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-xs">{f.desc}</p>
            </Link>
          ))}
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Daily Meditation */}
      <section className="py-12 px-6">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto glass rounded-2xl p-8 relative overflow-hidden">
          <div className="absolute -top-20 -right-20 w-64 h-64 bg-violet-500/20 rounded-full blur-3xl"></div>
          <div className="relative grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 items-center">
            <div>
              <span className="text-violet-400 text-xs uppercase">Meditación del día</span>
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mt-1 mb-3">Respira y Suelta</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-4">10 min • Relajación</p>
              <button className="bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-pink-500 px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-semibold flex items-center gap-2"><Play className="w-4 h-4" />Comenzar</button>
            </div>
            <div className="flex justify-center">
              <div className="w-40 h-40 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500/30 to-pink-500/30 flex items-center justify-center animate-breathe">
                <span className="text-6xl">🧘‍♀️</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Courses */}
      <section className="py-12 px-6">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
          <div className="flex justify-between mb-6">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Cursos Populares</h2>
            <Link href="/cursos" className="text-violet-400 text-sm flex items-center gap-1">Ver todos<ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4" /></Link>
          </div>
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            {courses.map((c, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="glass rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:scale-105 transition-all cursor-pointer">
                <div className={`h-32 bg-gradient-to-br ${c.color} flex items-center justify-center`}><Brain className="w-12 h-12 opacity-40" /></div>
                <div className="p-4">
                  <h3 className="font-semibold mb-1">{c.title}</h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-400 text-xs mb-2">Por {c.author}</p>
                  <div className="flex justify-between text-xs">
                    <span className="text-gray-500">{c.lessons} lecciones</span>
                    <span className="text-amber-400 flex items-center gap-1"><Star className="w-3 h-3 fill-current" />4.9</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* CTA */}
      <section className="py-12 px-6 text-center">
        <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-4">Comienza tu transformación</h2>
        <button className="bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-pink-500 px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-semibold glow">7 Días Gratis</button>
      </section>

      {/* Mobile Nav */}
      <nav className="fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 md:hidden glass px-4 py-2 z-50">
        <div className="flex justify-around">
          {features.map((f) => (
            <Link key={f.label} href={f.href} className="flex flex-col items-center gap-1 text-gray-400 hover:text-violet-400 py-1">
              <f.icon className="w-5 h-5" /><span className="text-[10px]">{f.label}</span>
            </Link>
          ))}
        </div>
      </nav>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

Ahora la página de Meditaciones completa:

bash
cd ~/Projects/actitud-mental-positiva/amp-app

cat > app/meditaciones/page.tsx << 'EOF'
'use client'
import { useState } from 'react'
import Link from 'next/link'
import { ArrowLeft, Play, Clock, Heart, Search, Moon, Sun, Wind, Brain, Sparkles, Lock, Pause } from 'lucide-react'

const categories = [
  { id: 'all', label: 'Todas', icon: Sparkles },
  { id: 'calm', label: 'Calma', icon: Wind },
  { id: 'sleep', label: 'Dormir', icon: Moon },
  { id: 'morning', label: 'Mañana', icon: Sun },
  { id: 'anxiety', label: 'Ansiedad', icon: Brain },
]

const meditations = [
  { id: 1, title: 'Respira y Suelta', duration: '10 min', category: 'calm', plays: 12500, image: '🧘‍♀️', free: true, audio: '/audio/respira.mp3' },
  { id: 2, title: 'Sueño Profundo', duration: '30 min', category: 'sleep', plays: 8900, image: '🌙', free: true },
  { id: 3, title: 'Energía Matutina', duration: '15 min', category: 'morning', plays: 7200, image: '☀️', free: false },
  { id: 4, title: 'Calma la Ansiedad', duration: '12 min', category: 'anxiety', plays: 15600, image: '💆‍♀️', free: true },
  { id: 5, title: 'Enfoque Total', duration: '8 min', category: 'calm', plays: 5400, image: '🎯', free: false },
  { id: 6, title: 'Gratitud Diaria', duration: '7 min', category: 'morning', plays: 9800, image: '🙏', free: true },
  { id: 7, title: 'Liberar Estrés', duration: '15 min', category: 'calm', plays: 11200, image: '🌿', free: false },
  { id: 8, title: 'Amor Propio', duration: '20 min', category: 'calm', plays: 6700, image: '❤️', free: false },
]

export default function MeditacionesPage() {
  const [category, setCategory] = useState('all')
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('')
  const [favorites, setFavorites] = useState<number[]>([])
  const [playing, setPlaying] = useState<number | null>(null)

  const filtered = meditations.filter(m => 
    (category === 'all' || m.category === category) &&
    m.title.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())
  )

  const toggleFav = (id: number) => setFavorites(f => f.includes(id) ? f.filter(x => x !== id) : [...f, id])

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen pb-24">
      <header className="glass sticky top-0 z-40 px-6 py-4">
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto flex items-center gap-4">
          <Link href="/" className="p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg"><ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5" /></Link>
          <div className="flex-1">
            <h1 className="text-xl font-bold">Meditaciones</h1>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">{meditations.length} sesiones disponibles</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 py-6">
        {/* Search */}
        <div className="relative mb-6">
          <Search className="w-5 h-5 absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400" />
          <input type="text" placeholder="Buscar meditación..." value={search} onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl pl-12 pr-4 py-3 outline-none focus:border-violet-500" />
        </div>

        {/* Categories */}
        <div className="flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-4 mb-6">
          {categories.map((c) => (
            <button key={c.id} onClick={() => setCategory(c.id)} className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-full whitespace-nowrap transition ${category === c.id ? 'bg-violet-500' : 'bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10'}`}>
              <c.icon className="w-4 h-4" />{c.label}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Grid */}
        <div className="grid gap-4">
          {filtered.map((m) => (
            <div key={m.id} className="glass rounded-xl p-4 flex items-center gap-4 hover:bg-white/5 transition">
              <div className="w-16 h-16 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500/30 to-pink-500/30 flex items-center justify-center text-3xl flex-shrink-0">
                {m.image}
              </div>
              <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <h3 className="font-semibold truncate">{m.title}</h3>
                  {!m.free && <Lock className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-400" />}
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-gray-400">
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><Clock className="w-3 h-3" />{m.duration}</span>
                  <span>{m.plays.toLocaleString()} plays</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <button onClick={() => toggleFav(m.id)} className={`p-2 rounded-lg ${favorites.includes(m.id) ? 'text-pink-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>
                <Heart className={`w-5 h-5 ${favorites.includes(m.id) ? 'fill-current' : ''}`} />
              </button>
              <button onClick={() => setPlaying(playing === m.id ? null : m.id)} className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center ${m.free ? 'bg-violet-500 hover:bg-violet-600' : 'bg-amber-500 hover:bg-amber-600'}`}>
                {playing === m.id ? <Pause className="w-5 h-5" /> : <Play className="w-5 h-5 ml-0.5" />}
              </button>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Player Bar */}
      {playing && (
        <div className="fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 glass border-t border-white/10 px-6 py-4">
          <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto flex items-center gap-4">
            <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-lg bg-violet-500/30 flex items-center justify-center text-2xl">
              {meditations.find(m => m.id === playing)?.image}
            </div>
            <div className="flex-1">
              <p className="font-medium">{meditations.find(m => m.id === playing)?.title}</p>
              <div className="w-full bg-white/10 rounded-full h-1 mt-2"><div className="bg-violet-500 h-1 rounded-full w-1/3"></div></div>
            </div>
            <button onClick={() => setPlaying(null)} className="w-10 h-10 bg-violet-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
              <Pause className="w-5 h-5" />
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

echo "✅ Meditaciones creada"


Ahora Cursos con videos (estilo Mindvalley):

bash
cd ~/Projects/actitud-mental-positiva/amp-app

cat > app/cursos/page.tsx << 'EOF'
'use client'
import { useState } from 'react'
import Link from 'next/link'
import { ArrowLeft, Play, Clock, Users, Star, Lock, Check, ChevronDown, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react'

const courses = [
  {
    id: 1, title: 'Actitud Positiva en 21 Días', author: 'María García', avatar: '👩‍🏫',
    description: 'Transforma tu mentalidad y desarrolla hábitos positivos en solo 3 semanas.',
    duration: '6 horas', lessons: 21, students: 12500, rating: 4.9, price: 97, free: false,
    color: 'from-violet-600 to-purple-700',
    modules: [
      { title: 'Semana 1: Fundamentos', lessons: ['Introducción', 'El poder del pensamiento', 'Identificar patrones', 'Ejercicio diario', 'Meditación guiada', 'Reflexión', 'Resumen'] },
      { title: 'Semana 2: Transformación', lessons: ['Reprogramar creencias', 'Afirmaciones', 'Visualización', 'Gratitud', 'Mindfulness', 'Conexión', 'Integración'] },
      { title: 'Semana 3: Consolidación', lessons: ['Hábitos duraderos', 'Superar obstáculos', 'Comunidad', 'Tu plan', 'Celebración', 'Próximos pasos', 'Graduación'] },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 2, title: 'Superar la Ansiedad', author: 'Dr. Carlos Paz', avatar: '👨‍⚕️',
    description: 'Técnicas probadas para manejar y superar la ansiedad de forma natural.',
    duration: '4 horas', lessons: 14, students: 8900, rating: 4.8, price: 77, free: false,
    color: 'from-pink-600 to-rose-700',
    modules: [
      { title: 'Entendiendo la Ansiedad', lessons: ['¿Qué es?', 'Síntomas', 'Causas', 'El ciclo'] },
      { title: 'Herramientas', lessons: ['Respiración', 'Grounding', 'Journaling', 'Movimiento', 'Nutrición'] },
      { title: 'Transformación', lessons: ['Pensamientos', 'Emociones', 'Hábitos', 'Mantener el progreso', 'Tu nueva vida'] },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 3, title: 'Manifestación Consciente', author: 'Luna Verde', avatar: '🌙',
    description: 'Aprende a manifestar tus deseos usando la ley de atracción de forma práctica.',
    duration: '8 horas', lessons: 28, students: 6700, rating: 4.9, price: 127, free: false,
    color: 'from-amber-600 to-orange-700',
    modules: [
      { title: 'Fundamentos', lessons: ['La ley de atracción', 'Vibración', 'Creencias', 'Claridad', 'Intención', 'Alineación', 'Práctica'] },
      { title: 'Técnicas Avanzadas', lessons: ['Visualización', 'Afirmaciones', 'Scripting', 'Vision board', 'Meditación', 'Gratitud', 'Soltar'] },
      { title: 'Maestría', lessons: ['Manifestar dinero', 'Relaciones', 'Salud', 'Propósito', 'Obstáculos', 'Casos reales', 'Tu viaje'] },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 4, title: 'Introducción al Bienestar', author: 'AMP Team', avatar: '✨',
    description: 'Curso gratuito para comenzar tu viaje de transformación personal.',
    duration: '1 hora', lessons: 5, students: 25000, rating: 4.7, price: 0, free: true,
    color: 'from-cyan-600 to-teal-700',
    modules: [
      { title: 'Comienza Aquí', lessons: ['Bienvenida', 'Tu primer paso', 'Meditación básica', 'Journaling', 'Próximo nivel'] },
    ]
  },
]

export default function CursosPage() {
  const [selectedCourse, setSelectedCourse] = useState<typeof courses[0] | null>(null)
  const [expandedModule, setExpandedModule] = useState<number | null>(0)

  if (selectedCourse) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen pb-24">
        {/* Course Header */}
        <div className={`bg-gradient-to-br ${selectedCourse.color} px-6 py-8`}>
          <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
            <button onClick={() => setSelectedCourse(null)} className="flex items-center gap-2 text-white/80 hover:text-white mb-4">
              <ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5" />Volver a cursos
            </button>
            <div className="flex items-start gap-6">
              <div className="w-20 h-20 rounded-2xl bg-white/20 flex items-center justify-center text-4xl">{selectedCourse.avatar}</div>
              <div className="flex-1">
                <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2">{selectedCourse.title}</h1>
                <p className="text-white/80 mb-3">{selectedCourse.description}</p>
                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-4 text-sm">
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><Clock className="w-4 h-4" />{selectedCourse.duration}</span>
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><Play className="w-4 h-4" />{selectedCourse.lessons} lecciones</span>
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><Users className="w-4 h-4" />{selectedCourse.students.toLocaleString()}</span>
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><Star className="w-4 h-4 fill-current text-yellow-400" />{selectedCourse.rating}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Content */}
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 py-6">
          {/* Modules */}
          <h2 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4">Contenido del Curso</h2>
          <div className="space-y-3 mb-8">
            {selectedCourse.modules.map((module, i) => (
              <div key={i} className="glass rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
                <button onClick={() => setExpandedModule(expandedModule === i ? null : i)} className="w-full flex items-center justify-between p-4 hover:bg-white/5">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-violet-500/20 flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold">{i + 1}</div>
                    <span className="font-medium">{module.title}</span>
                    <span className="text-sm text-gray-400">({module.lessons.length} lecciones)</span>
                  </div>
                  {expandedModule === i ? <ChevronDown className="w-5 h-5" /> : <ChevronRight className="w-5 h-5" />}
                </button>
                {expandedModule === i && (
                  <div className="border-t border-white/10 p-4 space-y-2">
                    {module.lessons.map((lesson, j) => (
                      <div key={j} className="flex items-center gap-3 p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/5 cursor-pointer">
                        {selectedCourse.free || j === 0 ? (
                          <div className="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-violet-500 flex items-center justify-center"><Play className="w-3 h-3" /></div>
                        ) : (
                          <div className="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-white/10 flex items-center justify-center"><Lock className="w-3 h-3" /></div>
                        )}
                        <span className="text-sm">{lesson}</span>
                        {j === 0 && !selectedCourse.free && <span className="text-xs bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">Preview</span>}
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* CTA */}
          {!selectedCourse.free && (
            <div className="glass rounded-xl p-6 text-center">
              <p className="text-3xl font-bold mb-2">${selectedCourse.price} USD</p>
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-4">Acceso de por vida • Certificado incluido</p>
              <Link href={`/checkout?course=${selectedCourse.id}`} className="block w-full bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-pink-500 py-4 rounded-xl font-semibold">
                Inscribirme Ahora
              </Link>
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-3">Garantía de 30 días</p>
            </div>
          )}
          {selectedCourse.free && (
            <button className="w-full bg-gradient-to-r from-green-500 to-emerald-600 py-4 rounded-xl font-semibold">
              Comenzar Curso Gratis
            </button>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen pb-24">
      <header className="glass sticky top-0 z-40 px-6 py-4">
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto flex items-center gap-4">
          <Link href="/" className="p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg"><ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5" /></Link>
          <div><h1 className="text-xl font-bold">Cursos</h1><p className="text-xs text-gray-400">Transforma tu vida</p></div>
        </div>
      </header>

      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 py-6 space-y-4">
        {courses.map((course) => (
          <div key={course.id} onClick={() => setSelectedCourse(course)} className="glass rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:scale-[1.02] transition-all cursor-pointer">
            <div className={`h-32 bg-gradient-to-br ${course.color} flex items-center justify-center relative`}>
              <span className="text-6xl">{course.avatar}</span>
              {course.free && <span className="absolute top-3 right-3 bg-green-500 text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full font-semibold">GRATIS</span>}
            </div>
            <div className="p-5">
              <h3 className="text-lg font-bold mb-1">{course.title}</h3>
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-3">Por {course.author}</p>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm">
                <div className="flex gap-4 text-gray-500">
                  <span>{course.lessons} lecciones</span>
                  <span>{course.duration}</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-amber-400"><Star className="w-4 h-4 fill-current" />{course.rating}</span>
                  {!course.free && <span className="font-bold">${course.price}</span>}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

Ahora Eventos y Conferencias con video:

bash
cd ~/Projects/actitud-mental-positiva/amp-app

mkdir -p app/eventos

cat > app/eventos/page.tsx << 'EOF'
'use client'
import { useState } from 'react'
import Link from 'next/link'
import { ArrowLeft, Video, Calendar, Clock, Users, MapPin, Play, Bell, Check, Mic } from 'lucide-react'

const events = [
  {
    id: 1, title: 'Meditación Grupal en Vivo', type: 'live', date: '2024-03-01', time: '19:00', duration: '45 min',
    host: 'María García', avatar: '👩‍🏫', attendees: 234, maxAttendees: 500, price: 0,
    description: 'Únete a nuestra meditación semanal gratuita para conectar con la comunidad.',
    color: 'from-violet-500 to-purple-600'
  },
  {
    id: 2, title: 'Masterclass: Supera la Ansiedad', type: 'webinar', date: '2024-03-05', time: '18:00', duration: '90 min',
    host: 'Dr. Carlos Paz', avatar: '👨‍⚕️', attendees: 156, maxAttendees: 200, price: 27,
    description: 'Aprende técnicas avanzadas para manejar la ansiedad en tu día a día.',
    color: 'from-pink-500 to-rose-600'
  },
  {
    id: 3, title: 'Retiro Virtual de Fin de Semana', type: 'retreat', date: '2024-03-15', time: '09:00', duration: '2 días',
    host: 'Luna Verde', avatar: '🌙', attendees: 45, maxAttendees: 50, price: 147,
    description: 'Dos días de inmersión total en prácticas de bienestar y transformación.',
    color: 'from-amber-500 to-orange-600'
  },
  {
    id: 4, title: 'Círculo de Manifestación', type: 'live', date: '2024-03-08', time: '20:00', duration: '60 min',
    host: 'Luna Verde', avatar: '🌙', attendees: 89, maxAttendees: 100, price: 15,
    description: 'Sesión grupal para establecer intenciones y manifestar juntos.',
    color: 'from-cyan-500 to-teal-600'
  },
]

const pastEvents = [
  { id: 101, title: 'Introducción a la Meditación', host: 'María García', recording: true, views: 1250 },
  { id: 102, title: 'Respiración para el Estrés', host: 'Dr. Carlos Paz', recording: true, views: 890 },
  { id: 103, title: 'Journaling Transformador', host: 'AMP Team', recording: true, views: 2100 },
]

export default function EventosPage() {
  const [registered, setRegistered] = useState<number[]>([])
  const [showVideo, setShowVideo] = useState<number | null>(null)

  const toggleRegister = (id: number) => {
    setRegistered(r => r.includes(id) ? r.filter(x => x !== id) : [...r, id])
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen pb-24">
      <header className="glass sticky top-0 z-40 px-6 py-4">
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto flex items-center gap-4">
          <Link href="/" className="p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg"><ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5" /></Link>
          <div><h1 className="text-xl font-bold">Eventos y Conferencias</h1><p className="text-xs text-gray-400">En vivo y grabaciones</p></div>
        </div>
      </header>

      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 py-6">
        {/* Upcoming */}
        <h2 className="text-lg font-bold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"><Video className="w-5 h-5 text-violet-400" />Próximos Eventos</h2>
        <div className="space-y-4 mb-10">
          {events.map((event) => (
            <div key={event.id} className="glass rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
              <div className={`bg-gradient-to-r ${event.color} px-5 py-3 flex items-center justify-between`}>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <span className="text-2xl">{event.avatar}</span>
                  <div>
                    <span className="text-xs uppercase opacity-80">{event.type === 'live' ? '🔴 En Vivo' : event.type === 'webinar' ? '📹 Webinar' : '🏕️ Retiro'}</span>
                    <h3 className="font-bold">{event.title}</h3>
                  </div>
                </div>
                {event.price === 0 ? (
                  <span className="bg-white/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm">Gratis</span>
                ) : (
                  <span className="bg-white/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-bold">${event.price}</span>
                )}
              </div>
              <div className="p-5">
                <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-4">{event.description}</p>
                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-4 text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4">
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><Calendar className="w-4 h-4" />{event.date}</span>
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><Clock className="w-4 h-4" />{event.time} • {event.duration}</span>
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><Users className="w-4 h-4" />{event.attendees}/{event.maxAttendees}</span>
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><Mic className="w-4 h-4" />{event.host}</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-3">
                  <button onClick={() => toggleRegister(event.id)} className={`flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 ${registered.includes(event.id) ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-violet-500 hover:bg-violet-600'}`}>
                    {registered.includes(event.id) ? <><Check className="w-5 h-5" />Registrado</> : <><Bell className="w-5 h-5" />Registrarme</>}
                  </button>
                  {registered.includes(event.id) && (
                    <button className="px-6 py-3 bg-white/10 rounded-xl font-semibold flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-white/20">
                      <Video className="w-5 h-5" />Unirme
                    </button>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Recordings */}
        <h2 className="text-lg font-bold mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"><Play className="w-5 h-5 text-pink-400" />Grabaciones Disponibles</h2>
        <div className="space-y-3">
          {pastEvents.map((event) => (
            <div key={event.id} className="glass rounded-xl p-4 flex items-center gap-4 hover:bg-white/5 cursor-pointer" onClick={() => setShowVideo(event.id)}>
              <div className="w-16 h-16 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-br from-pink-500/30 to-rose-500/30 flex items-center justify-center">
                <Play className="w-6 h-6" />
              </div>
              <div className="flex-1">
                <h3 className="font-medium">{event.title}</h3>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Por {event.host} • {event.views.toLocaleString()} vistas</p>
              </div>
              <button className="w-10 h-10 bg-pink-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                <Play className="w-5 h-5 ml-0.5" />
              </button>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Video Modal */}
      {showVideo && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/90 flex items-center justify-center p-6">
          <div className="w-full max-w-4xl">
            <div className="flex justify-between mb-4">
              <h3 className="text-xl font-bold">{pastEvents.find(e => e.id === showVideo)?.title}</h3>
              <button onClick={() => setShowVideo(null)} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div className="aspect-video bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-900 to-pink-900 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
              <div className="text-center">
                <Play className="w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-4 opacity-50" />
                <p className="text-gray-400">Video player placeholder</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Integrar con YouTube, Vimeo o video propio</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
EOF

Ahora Checkout/Pagos con Stripe:

bash
cd ~/Projects/actitud-mental-positiva/amp-app

mkdir -p app/checkout

cat > app/checkout/page.tsx << 'EOF'
'use client'
import { useState, Suspense } from 'react'
import { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation'
import Link from 'next/link'
import { ArrowLeft, CreditCard, Lock, Check, Shield, Star } from 'lucide-react'

const courses: Record<string, any> = {
  '1': { title: 'Actitud Positiva en 21 Días', price: 97, author: 'María García' },
  '2': { title: 'Superar la Ansiedad', price: 77, author: 'Dr. Carlos Paz' },
  '3': { title: 'Manifestación Consciente', price: 127, author: 'Luna Verde' },
}

const plans = [
  { id: 'monthly', name: 'Mensual', price: 19, period: '/mes', savings: null },
  { id: 'yearly', name: 'Anual', price: 149, period: '/año', savings: 'Ahorra 40%', popular: true },
  { id: 'lifetime', name: 'De por vida', price: 297, period: 'una vez', savings: 'Mejor valor' },
]

function CheckoutContent() {
  const searchParams = useSearchParams()
  const courseId = searchParams.get('course')
  const planType = searchParams.get('plan')
  
  const [selectedPlan, setSelectedPlan] = useState(planType || 'yearly')
  const [form, setForm] = useState({ name: '', email: '', card: '', exp: '', cvc: '' })
  const [processing, setProcessing] = useState(false)
  const [success, setSuccess] = useState(false)

  const course = courseId ? courses[courseId] : null
  const plan = plans.find(p => p.id === selectedPlan)

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault()
    setProcessing(true)
    // Simular procesamiento
    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000))
    setSuccess(true)
    setProcessing(false)
  }

  if (success) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center p-6">
        <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-8 max-w-md text-center">
          <div className="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-green-500 flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-6">
            <Check className="w-10 h-10" />
          </div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2">¡Pago Exitoso!</h1>
          <p className="text-gray-400 mb-6">Tu acceso ha sido activado. Revisa tu correo para más detalles.</p>
          <Link href={course ? '/cursos' : '/'} className="block bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-pink-500 py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold">
            {course ? 'Ir al Curso' : 'Explorar Contenido'}
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen pb-10">
      <header className="glass sticky top-0 z-40 px-6 py-4">
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto flex items-center gap-4">
          <Link href={course ? '/cursos' : '/'} className="p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg"><ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5" /></Link>
          <div><h1 className="text-xl font-bold">Checkout Seguro</h1><p className="text-xs text-gray-400 flex items-center gap-1"><Lock className="w-3 h-3" />Conexión encriptada</p></div>
        </div>
      </header>

      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 py-6">
        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
          {/* Left - Plans or Course */}
          <div>
            {!course && (
              <>
                <h2 className="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Elige tu Plan</h2>
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  {plans.map((p) => (
                    <button key={p.id} onClick={() => setSelectedPlan(p.id)} className={`w-full glass rounded-xl p-4 text-left transition-all ${selectedPlan === p.id ? 'ring-2 ring-violet-500 bg-violet-500/10' : 'hover:bg-white/5'}`}>
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                        <div>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                            <span className="font-semibold">{p.name}</span>
                            {p.popular && <span className="bg-violet-500 text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">Popular</span>}
                          </div>
                          <p className="text-2xl font-bold mt-1">${p.price}<span className="text-sm text-gray-400 font-normal">{p.period}</span></p>
                        </div>
                        {p.savings && <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">{p.savings}</span>}
                      </div>
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
                <div className="mt-6 space-y-2">
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">✓ Acceso a todas las meditaciones</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">✓ Todos los cursos incluidos</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">✓ Eventos en vivo</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">✓ Comunidad exclusiva</p>
                </div>
              </>
            )}

            {course && (
              <div className="glass rounded-xl p-6">
                <h2 className="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Tu Compra</h2>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-4">
                  <div className="w-16 h-16 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500 to-pink-500 flex items-center justify-center text-2xl">📚</div>
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="font-semibold">{course.title}</h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">Por {course.author}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="border-t border-white/10 pt-4 space-y-2">
                  <div className="flex justify-between"><span className="text-gray-400">Subtotal</span><span>${course.price}</span></div>
                  <div className="flex justify-between text-lg font-bold"><span>Total</span><span>${course.price} USD</span></div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Right - Payment Form */}
          <div>
            <h2 className="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Información de Pago</h2>
            <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="glass rounded-xl p-6 space-y-4">
              <div>
                <label className="text-sm text-gray-400">Nombre completo</label>
                <input type="text" required value={form.name} onChange={(e) => setForm({...form, name: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 mt-1 outline-none focus:border-violet-500" placeholder="Tu nombre" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="text-sm text-gray-400">Email</label>
                <input type="email" required value={form.email} onChange={(e) => setForm({...form, email: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 mt-1 outline-none focus:border-violet-500" placeholder="tu@email.com" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="text-sm text-gray-400 flex items-center gap-2"><CreditCard className="w-4 h-4" />Número de tarjeta</label>
                <input type="text" required value={form.card} onChange={(e) => setForm({...form, card: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 mt-1 outline-none focus:border-violet-500" placeholder="4242 4242 4242 4242" maxLength={19} />
              </div>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div>
                  <label className="text-sm text-gray-400">Expiración</label>
                  <input type="text" required value={form.exp} onChange={(e) => setForm({...form, exp: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 mt-1 outline-none focus:border-violet-500" placeholder="MM/AA" maxLength={5} />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className="text-sm text-gray-400">CVC</label>
                  <input type="text" required value={form.cvc} onChange={(e) => setForm({...form, cvc: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 mt-1 outline-none focus:border-violet-500" placeholder="123" maxLength={4} />
                </div>
              </div>
              
              <button type="submit" disabled={processing} className="w-full bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-pink-500 py-4 rounded-xl font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-50">
                {processing ? (
                  <span className="animate-pulse">Procesando...</span>
                ) : (
                  <>Pagar ${course?.price || plan?.price} USD</>
                )}
              </button>

              <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-4 pt-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
                <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><Shield className="w-4 h-4" />Pago seguro</span>
                <span className="flex items-center gap-1"><Lock className="w-4 h-4" />SSL encriptado</span>
              </div>
            </form>

            <div className="mt-6 glass rounded-xl p-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm">
                <Star className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-400 fill-current" />
                <span>Garantía de 30 días - Si no estás satisfecho, te devolvemos tu dinero.</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function CheckoutPage() {
  return (
    <Suspense fallback={<div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center">Cargando...</div>}>
      <CheckoutContent />
    </Suspense>
  )
}
EOF

Sí, hablamos de esto antes. Los crashes pueden ser por:

Firefox con chat largo - Esta conversación tiene MUCHO contenido
Múltiples proyectos Next.js corriendo simultáneamente
Memoria agotada

Vamos a diagnosticar y crear un sistema de monitoreo:

bash
# Diagnóstico rápido
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo "🔍 DIAGNÓSTICO DEL SISTEMA"
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"

echo ""
echo "📊 MEMORIA:"
free -h

echo ""
echo "📊 PROCESOS MÁS PESADOS:"
ps aux --sort=-%mem | head -10

echo ""
echo "📊 PROCESOS NODE/NEXT:"
ps aux | grep -E "node|next" | grep -v grep | wc -l
echo "procesos de Node.js corriendo"

echo ""
echo "📊 PUERTOS EN USO:"
ss -tlnp | grep -E "300[0-9]"

echo ""
echo "📊 USO DE DISCO:"
df -h /

echo ""
echo "📊 FIREFOX/BROWSER:"
ps aux | grep -i firefox | head -3


Ahora creemos el sistema de monitoreo:

bash
mkdir -p ~/Empire/monitoring
cd ~/Empire/monitoring

# Script de monitoreo continuo
cat > monitor.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

LOG_FILE=~/Empire/monitoring/crash_log.txt
ALERT_MEM=80  # Alerta si memoria > 80%

log_event() {
    echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] $1" >> $LOG_FILE
    echo "$1"
}

check_system() {
    # Memoria
    MEM_USED=$(free | grep Mem | awk '{printf "%.0f", $3/$2 * 100}')
    if [ "$MEM_USED" -gt "$ALERT_MEM" ]; then
        log_event "⚠️ ALERTA: Memoria al ${MEM_USED}%"
        
        # Top 5 procesos por memoria
        log_event "Top procesos:"
        ps aux --sort=-%mem | head -6 | tail -5 >> $LOG_FILE
    fi
    
    # Procesos Node zombies
    NODE_COUNT=$(ps aux | grep -E "node|next" | grep -v grep | wc -l)
    if [ "$NODE_COUNT" -gt 10 ]; then
        log_event "⚠️ ALERTA: $NODE_COUNT procesos Node.js (demasiados)"
    fi
    
    # Firefox memoria
    FF_MEM=$(ps aux | grep -i firefox | grep -v grep | awk '{sum+=$4} END {printf "%.0f", sum}')
    if [ "$FF_MEM" -gt 50 ]; then
        log_event "⚠️ Firefox usando ${FF_MEM}% memoria"
    fi
}

# Header
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo "🔍 Monitor Empire - $(date)"
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
log_event "Monitor iniciado"

# Loop de monitoreo
while true; do
    check_system
    sleep 60  # Cada minuto
done
EOF

chmod +x monitor.sh

# Script para limpiar procesos
cat > cleanup.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "🧹 Limpiando procesos..."

# Matar Next.js duplicados (mantener solo los necesarios)
echo "Procesos Next.js antes:"
ps aux | grep -E "next" | grep -v grep | wc -l

# Matar todos los next-server excepto puerto 3000 y 3002
pkill -f "next-server.*3001" 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "next-server.*3009" 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "founder_dashboard" 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "workroomforge" 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "empire-control" 2>/dev/null

sleep 2

echo "Procesos Next.js después:"
ps aux | grep -E "next" | grep -v grep | wc -l

# Limpiar cache de npm
echo ""
echo "Limpiando cache..."
npm cache clean --force 2>/dev/null

# Memoria liberada
echo ""
echo "📊 Memoria actual:"
free -h

echo ""
echo "✅ Limpieza completada"
EOF

chmod +x cleanup.sh

# Script de reporte de crashes
cat > crash_report.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo "📋 REPORTE DE CRASHES - $(date)"
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"

# Logs del sistema
echo ""
echo "📌 Últimos errores del kernel (OOM killer):"
sudo dmesg | grep -i "killed process" | tail -5 2>/dev/null || echo "Sin acceso a dmesg"

echo ""
echo "📌 Logs de journal (últimas crashes):"
journalctl --since "1 hour ago" -p err 2>/dev/null | tail -10 || echo "Sin acceso a journal"

echo ""
echo "📌 Firefox crashes:"
ls -la ~/.mozilla/firefox/*/minidumps/ 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || echo "Sin crashes de Firefox"

echo ""
echo "📌 Procesos actuales pesados:"
ps aux --sort=-%mem | head -8

echo ""
echo "📌 Temperatura CPU (si disponible):"
sensors 2>/dev/null | grep -i temp | head -3 || echo "sensors no instalado"
EOF

chmod +x crash_report.sh

echo "✅ Scripts de monitoreo creados"


Ahora ejecutemos limpieza y diagnóstico:

bash

cd ~/Empire/monitoring
./cleanup.sh

echo ""
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo "💡 RECOMENDACIONES PARA EVITAR CRASHES"
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo ""
echo "1. FIREFOX + CHAT LARGO:"
echo "   → Abre nueva pestaña para continuar (este chat es muy largo)"
echo "   → O usa Chrome/Edge que maneja mejor memoria"
echo ""
echo "2. MÚLTIPLES PROYECTOS:"
echo "   → Solo mantén 1-2 servidores Next.js corriendo"
echo "   → Empire: puerto 3000"
echo "   → AMP: puerto 3002"
echo ""
echo "3. MONITOREO:"
echo "   → Terminal nueva: ~/Empire/monitoring/monitor.sh"
echo "   → Verifica: ~/Empire/monitoring/crash_log.txt"
echo ""
echo "4. SI HAY CRASH:"
echo "   → Ejecuta: ~/Empire/monitoring/crash_report.sh"
echo "   → Ejecuta: ~/Empire/monitoring/cleanup.sh"
echo ""

Let's diagnose the crashes:

bash
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"

echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"

Run this and tell me what you see.

My suspicion: This chat is VERY long (we've been building Empire + AMP for hours). Firefox struggles with large DOM/text content. The crashes are likely:

Firefox + long chat - This conversation has thousands of lines
Multiple Next.js servers - You have 3000, 3001, 3002, 3009 running
Memory exhaustion - All of the above combined

Immediate fix:

bash
# Kill unnecessary processes
pkill -f "founder_dashboard" 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "workroomforge" 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "empire-control" 2>/dev/null

echo "Cleaned up old projects"
ps aux | grep next | grep -v grep | wc -l
echo "Next.js processes remaining"


Best recommendation: Start a new chat for the next task. This conversation is too heavy and that's likely causing Firefox crashes. 🔧

Found the problem! 🎯

Issues:
Firefox using 27% of RAM (4.6GB!) - This chat is too long
4 Next.js servers running - You only need 2
Old projects still running - empire-control, workroomforge, founder_dashboard
Let's fix it:
bash

pkill -f "workroomforge" 2>/dev/null  
pkill -f "founder_dashboard" 2>/dev/null

sleep 2

echo ""
echo "📊 Ports now:"
ss -tlnp | grep -E "300[0-9]"

echo ""
echo "📊 Memory freed:"
free -h

  ~/Empire/versions/empire-20260223-1756.tar.gz
  ~/Empire/versions/amp-20260223-1756.tar.gz

TO START NEW CHAT, PASTE:
"Continue my Empire project at ~/Empire/empire-app and AMP at ~/Projects/actitud-mental-positiva/amp-app"
EOF

echo "✅ Saved! View anytime with:"
echo "cat ~/Empire/PROJECT_INFO.txt"
